authors_text: Jinwei Ren,Jianke Zhu,Jialiang Zhang
title: End-to-end Weakly-supervised Single-stage Multiple 3D Hand Mesh Reconstruction from a Single RGB Image
title_zh: 从单个 RGB 图像进行端到端弱监督单级多重 3D 手部网格重建
abstract: In this paper, we consider the challenging task of simultaneously locating and recovering multiple hands from a single 2D image. Previous studies either focus on single hand reconstruction or solve this problem in a multi-stage way. Moreover, the conventional two-stage pipeline firstly detects hand areas, and then estimates 3D hand pose from each cropped patch. To reduce the computational redundancy in preprocessing and feature extraction, for the first time, we propose a concise but efficient single-stage pipeline for multi-hand reconstruction. Specifically, we design a multi-head auto-encoder structure, where each head network shares the same feature map and outputs the hand center, pose and texture, respectively. Besides, we adopt a weakly-supervised scheme to alleviate the burden of expensive 3D real-world data annotations. To this end, we propose a series of losses optimized by a stage-wise training scheme, where a multi-hand dataset with 2D annotations is generated based on the publicly available single hand datasets. In order to further improve the accuracy of the weakly supervised model, we adopt several feature consistency constraints in both single and multiple hand settings. Specifically, the keypoints of each hand estimated from local features should be consistent with the re-projected points predicted from global features. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks including FreiHAND, HO3D, InterHand2.6M and RHD demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art model-based methods in both weakly-supervised and fully-supervised manners. The code and models are available at {https://github.com/zijinxuxu/SMHR}.
summary: In this paper, we consider the challenging task of simultaneously locating and recovering multiple hands from a single 2D image. Previous studies either focus on single hand reconstruction or solve this problem in a multi-stage way. Moreover, the conventional two-stage pipeline firstly detects hand areas, and then estimates 3D hand pose from each cropped patch. To reduce the computational redundancy in preprocessing and feature extraction, for the first time, we propose a concise but efficient single-stage pipeline for multi-hand reconstruction. Specifically, we design a multi-head auto-encoder structure, where each head network shares the same feature map and outputs the hand center, pose and texture, respectively. Besides, we adopt a weakly-supervised scheme to alleviate the burden of expensive 3D real-world data annotations. To this end, we propose a series of losses optimized by a stage-wise training scheme, where a multi-hand dataset with 2D annotations is generated based on the publicly available single hand datasets. In order to further improve the accuracy of the weakly supervised model, we adopt several feature consistency constraints in both single and multiple hand settings. Specifically, the keypoints of each hand estimated from local features should be consistent with the re-projected points predicted from global features. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks including FreiHAND, HO3D, InterHand2.6M and RHD demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art model-based methods in both weakly-supervised and fully-supervised manners. The code and models are available at {https://github.com/zijinxuxu/SMHR}.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑从单个 2D 图像中同时定位和恢复多只手的挑战性任务。先前的研究要么侧重于单手重建，要么以多阶段的方式解决这个问题。此外，传统的两级流程首先检测手部区域，然后根据每个裁剪后的补丁估计 3D 手部姿势。为了减少预处理和特征提取中的计算冗余，我们首次提出了一种简洁但高效的单级管道用于多手重建。具体来说，我们设计了一个多头自动编码器结构，其中每个头网络共享相同的特征图并分别输出手部中心、姿势和纹理。此外，我们采用弱监督方案来减轻昂贵的 3D 现实世界数据注释的负担。为此，我们提出了一系列通过分阶段训练方案优化的损失，其中基于公开可用的单手数据集生成带有2D注释的多手数据集。为了进一步提高弱监督模型的准确性，我们在单手和多手设置中采用了多种特征一致性约束。具体来说，根据局部特征估计的每只手的关键点应该与根据全局特征预测的重投影点一致。对 FreiHAND、HO3D、InterHand2.6M 和 RHD 等公共基准的大量实验表明，我们的方法在弱监督和全监督方式上都优于最先进的基于模型的方法。代码和模型可在 {https://github.com/zijinxuxu/SMHR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的弱监督单阶段多手3D手部网格重建方法，从单张RGB图像中同时定位并恢复多只手的3D结构。
AI.motivation: 传统方法要么专注于单手重建，要么采用计算冗余的多阶段流程，且依赖昂贵的3D标注数据。本文旨在通过单阶段架构降低计算成本，并利用弱监督策略减少对高质量3D标注的依赖。
AI.method: 设计多头自编码器结构，共享特征图以输出手部中心、姿态和纹理；采用弱监督方案，通过分阶段训练策略生成基于公开单手数据集的2D标注多手数据集，并引入单/多手场景下的特征一致性约束（如局部关键点与全局重投影点的一致性）。
AI.result: 在FreiHAND、HO3D等公开基准测试中，该方法在弱监督和全监督设置下均优于现有基于模型的方法，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的单阶段弱监督方法有效解决了多手3D重建问题，在保持高效性的同时提升了精度，为减少对3D标注依赖提供了新思路。

authors_text: Hongzhan Lin,Jing Ma,Liangliang Chen,Zhiwei Yang,Mingfei Cheng,Guang Chen
title: Detect Rumors in Microblog Posts for Low-Resource Domains via Adversarial Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 通过对抗性对比学习检测微博帖子中针对低资源领域的谣言
comment: The first study for the low-resource rumor detection on social media in cross-domain and cross-lingual settings
comments: The first study for the low-resource rumor detection on social media in cross-domain and cross-lingual settings
abstract: Massive false rumors emerging along with breaking news or trending topics severely hinder the truth. Existing rumor detection approaches achieve promising performance on the yesterday's news, since there is enough corpus collected from the same domain for model training. However, they are poor at detecting rumors about unforeseen events especially those propagated in different languages due to the lack of training data and prior knowledge (i.e., low-resource regimes). In this paper, we propose an adversarial contrastive learning framework to detect rumors by adapting the features learned from well-resourced rumor data to that of the low-resourced. Our model explicitly overcomes the restriction of domain and/or language usage via language alignment and a novel supervised contrastive training paradigm. Moreover, we develop an adversarial augmentation mechanism to further enhance the robustness of low-resource rumor representation. Extensive experiments conducted on two low-resource datasets collected from real-world microblog platforms demonstrate that our framework achieves much better performance than state-of-the-art methods and exhibits a superior capacity for detecting rumors at early stages.
summary: Massive false rumors emerging along with breaking news or trending topics severely hinder the truth. Existing rumor detection approaches achieve promising performance on the yesterday's news, since there is enough corpus collected from the same domain for model training. However, they are poor at detecting rumors about unforeseen events especially those propagated in different languages due to the lack of training data and prior knowledge (i.e., low-resource regimes). In this paper, we propose an adversarial contrastive learning framework to detect rumors by adapting the features learned from well-resourced rumor data to that of the low-resourced. Our model explicitly overcomes the restriction of domain and/or language usage via language alignment and a novel supervised contrastive training paradigm. Moreover, we develop an adversarial augmentation mechanism to further enhance the robustness of low-resource rumor representation. Extensive experiments conducted on two low-resource datasets collected from real-world microblog platforms demonstrate that our framework achieves much better performance than state-of-the-art methods and exhibits a superior capacity for detecting rumors at early stages.
abstract_zh: 随着突发新闻或热门话题的出现，大量虚假谣言严重阻碍了真相。现有的谣言检测方法在昨天的新闻上取得了可喜的性能，因为从同一领域收集了足够的语料库用于模型训练。然而，由于缺乏训练数据和先验知识（即资源匮乏的制度），他们很难检测到有关不可预见事件的谣言，尤其是那些以不同语言传播的谣言。在本文中，我们提出了一种对抗性对比学习框架，通过将从资源丰富的谣言数据中学习到的特征应用于资源匮乏的谣言数据来检测谣言。我们的模型通过语言对齐和新颖的监督对比训练范例明确克服了领域和/或语言使用的限制。此外，我们开发了一种对抗性增强机制，以进一步增强低资源谣言表示的鲁棒性。对从现实世界的微博平台收集的两个低资源数据集进行的大量实验表明，我们的框架比最先进的方法取得了更好的性能，并表现出早期检测谣言的卓越能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种对抗对比学习框架，用于在低资源领域检测微博中的谣言。
AI.motivation: 现有谣言检测方法依赖大量同领域数据，在低资源场景（如新事件或不同语言）下表现不佳，因缺乏训练数据和先验知识。
AI.method: 通过语言对齐和监督对比训练范式实现跨领域/语言特征迁移，并引入对抗增强机制提升低资源谣言表示的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在两个真实微博低资源数据集上实验表明，该框架显著优于现有方法，尤其在早期阶段检测效果突出。
AI.conclusion: 对抗对比学习框架有效解决了低资源场景下的谣言检测问题，具有良好的跨领域和跨语言适应能力。

authors_text: Michael Gleicher,Xinyi Yu,Yuheng Chen
title: Trinary Tools for Continuously Valued Binary Classifiers
title_zh: 用于连续赋值二元分类器的三元工具
comment: Author's version of journal paper accepted to appear
comments: Author's version of journal paper accepted to appear
abstract: Classification methods for binary (yes/no) tasks often produce a continuously valued score. Machine learning practitioners must perform model selection, calibration, discretization, performance assessment, tuning, and fairness assessment. Such tasks involve examining classifier results, typically using summary statistics and manual examination of details. In this paper, we provide an interactive visualization approach to support such continuously-valued classifier examination tasks. Our approach addresses the three phases of these tasks: calibration, operating point selection, and examination. We enhance standard views and introduce task-specific views so that they can be integrated into a multi-view coordination (MVC) system. We build on an existing comparison-based approach, extending it to continuous classifiers by treating the continuous values as trinary (positive, unsure, negative) even if the classifier will not ultimately use the 3-way classification. We provide use cases that demonstrate how our approach enables machine learning practitioners to accomplish key tasks.
summary: Classification methods for binary (yes/no) tasks often produce a continuously valued score. Machine learning practitioners must perform model selection, calibration, discretization, performance assessment, tuning, and fairness assessment. Such tasks involve examining classifier results, typically using summary statistics and manual examination of details. In this paper, we provide an interactive visualization approach to support such continuously-valued classifier examination tasks. Our approach addresses the three phases of these tasks: calibration, operating point selection, and examination. We enhance standard views and introduce task-specific views so that they can be integrated into a multi-view coordination (MVC) system. We build on an existing comparison-based approach, extending it to continuous classifiers by treating the continuous values as trinary (positive, unsure, negative) even if the classifier will not ultimately use the 3-way classification. We provide use cases that demonstrate how our approach enables machine learning practitioners to accomplish key tasks.
abstract_zh: 二元（是/否）任务的分类方法通常会产生连续的评分。机器学习从业者必须进行模型选择、校准、离散化、性能评估、调优和公平性评估。此类任务涉及检查分类器结果，通常使用汇总统计数据和手动检查细节。在本文中，我们提供了一种交互式可视化方法来支持此类连续评估的分类器检查任务。我们的方法解决了这些任务的三个阶段：校准、操作点选择和检查。我们增强了标准视图并引入了特定于任务的视图，以便它们可以集成到多视图协调（MVC）系统中。我们以现有的基于比较的方法为基础，通过将连续值视为三元（正、不确定、负）将其扩展到连续分类器，即使分类器最终不会使用三向分类。我们提供的用例展示了我们的方法如何帮助机器学习从业者完成关键任务。

AI.tldr: 提出一种交互式可视化方法，用于支持连续值二元分类器的校准、操作点选择和检查任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖总结统计和手动检查，难以高效处理连续值分类器的复杂任务，需更有效的工具支持。
AI.method: 通过将连续值分为三元（正、不确定、负），结合多视图协调系统，增强标准视图并引入任务专用视图。
AI.result: 使用案例表明该方法能有效支持模型校准、操作点选择和详细检查等关键任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过交互式可视化有效支持连续值二元分类器的分析，提升从业者处理相关任务的效率。

authors_text: Xun Long Ng,Kian Eng Ong,Qichen Zheng,Yun Ni,Si Yong Yeo,Jun Liu
title: Animal Kingdom: A Large and Diverse Dataset for Animal Behavior Understanding
title_zh: 动物王国：用于理解动物行为的大型且多样化的数据集
abstract: Understanding animals' behaviors is significant for a wide range of applications. However, existing animal behavior datasets have limitations in multiple aspects, including limited numbers of animal classes, data samples and provided tasks, and also limited variations in environmental conditions and viewpoints. To address these limitations, we create a large and diverse dataset, Animal Kingdom, that provides multiple annotated tasks to enable a more thorough understanding of natural animal behaviors. The wild animal footages used in our dataset record different times of the day in extensive range of environments containing variations in backgrounds, viewpoints, illumination and weather conditions. More specifically, our dataset contains 50 hours of annotated videos to localize relevant animal behavior segments in long videos for the video grounding task, 30K video sequences for the fine-grained multi-label action recognition task, and 33K frames for the pose estimation task, which correspond to a diverse range of animals with 850 species across 6 major animal classes. Such a challenging and comprehensive dataset shall be able to facilitate the community to develop, adapt, and evaluate various types of advanced methods for animal behavior analysis. Moreover, we propose a Collaborative Action Recognition (CARe) model that learns general and specific features for action recognition with unseen new animals. This method achieves promising performance in our experiments. Our dataset can be found at https://sutdcv.github.io/Animal-Kingdom.
summary: Understanding animals' behaviors is significant for a wide range of applications. However, existing animal behavior datasets have limitations in multiple aspects, including limited numbers of animal classes, data samples and provided tasks, and also limited variations in environmental conditions and viewpoints. To address these limitations, we create a large and diverse dataset, Animal Kingdom, that provides multiple annotated tasks to enable a more thorough understanding of natural animal behaviors. The wild animal footages used in our dataset record different times of the day in extensive range of environments containing variations in backgrounds, viewpoints, illumination and weather conditions. More specifically, our dataset contains 50 hours of annotated videos to localize relevant animal behavior segments in long videos for the video grounding task, 30K video sequences for the fine-grained multi-label action recognition task, and 33K frames for the pose estimation task, which correspond to a diverse range of animals with 850 species across 6 major animal classes. Such a challenging and comprehensive dataset shall be able to facilitate the community to develop, adapt, and evaluate various types of advanced methods for animal behavior analysis. Moreover, we propose a Collaborative Action Recognition (CARe) model that learns general and specific features for action recognition with unseen new animals. This method achieves promising performance in our experiments. Our dataset can be found at https://sutdcv.github.io/Animal-Kingdom.
abstract_zh: 了解动物的行为对于广泛的应用具有重要意义。然而，现有的动物行为数据集在多个方面都存在局限性，包括动物类别、数据样本和提供的任务数量有限，以及环境条件和观点的变化有限。为了解决这些限制，我们创建了一个大型且多样化的数据集“动物王国”，它提供了多个带注释的任务，以便更全面地了解动物的自然行为。我们的数据集中使用的野生动物镜头记录了一天中不同时间在各种环境中的情况，其中包括背景、视角、照明和天气条件的变化。更具体地说，我们的数据集包含 50 小时的带注释视频，用于在视频基础任务中定位长视频中的相关动物行为片段，用于细粒度多标签动作识别任务的 30K 视频序列，以及用于姿势估计任务的 33K 帧，对应于 6 个主要动物类别的 850 个物种的各种动物。这样一个具有挑战性和全面的数据集应能够促进社区开发、适应和评估各种类型的动物行为分析先进方法。此外，我们提出了一种协作动作识别（CARe）模型，该模型可以学习未见过的新动物的动作识别的一般和特定特征。该方法在我们的实验中取得了有希望的性能。我们的数据集可以在 https://sutdcv.github.io/Animal-Kingdom 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个大规模且多样化的动物行为数据集Animal Kingdom，并设计协作动作识别模型CARe以促进动物行为分析研究。
AI.motivation: 现有动物行为数据集存在动物种类少、样本量有限、任务单一及环境条件变化不足等问题，限制了模型的泛化能力与实际应用。
AI.method: 构建包含850种动物、6大类别的Animal Kingdom数据集，涵盖视频定位、细粒度动作识别和姿态估计任务，并提出融合通用与特定特征的CARe模型。
AI.result: 数据集包含50小时标注视频、30K视频序列及33K帧图像，CARe模型在未见动物上表现优异，为社区提供基准测试资源。
AI.conclusion: Animal Kingdom数据集和CARe模型为动物行为理解提供新基准，推动跨物种行为分析方法的发展。

authors_text: Yanchao Yuan,Cancheng Li,Lu Xu,Ke Zhang,Yang Hua,Jicong Zhang
title: Parallel Network with Channel Attention and Post-Processing for Carotid Arteries Vulnerable Plaque Segmentation in Ultrasound Images
title_zh: 超声图像中颈动脉易损斑块分割的具有通道关注和后处理的并行网络
abstract: Carotid arteries vulnerable plaques are a crucial factor in the screening of atherosclerosis by ultrasound technique. However, the plaques are contaminated by various noises such as artifact, speckle noise, and manual segmentation may be time-consuming. This paper proposes an automatic convolutional neural network (CNN) method for plaque segmentation in carotid ultrasound images using a small dataset. First, a parallel network with three independent scale decoders is utilized as our base segmentation network, pyramid dilation convolutions are used to enlarge receptive fields in the three segmentation sub-networks. Subsequently, the three decoders are merged to be rectified in channels by SENet. Thirdly, in test stage, the initially segmented plaque is refined by the max contour morphology post-processing to obtain the final plaque. Moreover, three loss function Dice loss, SSIM loss and cross-entropy loss are compared to segment plaques. Test results show that the proposed method with dice loss function yields a Dice value of 0.820, an IoU of 0.701, Acc of 0.969, and modified Hausdorff distance (MHD) of 1.43 for 30 vulnerable cases of plaques, it outperforms some of the conventional CNN-based methods on these metrics. Additionally, we apply an ablation experiment to show the validity of each proposed module. Our study provides some reference for similar researches and may be useful in actual applications for plaque segmentation of ultrasound carotid arteries.
summary: Carotid arteries vulnerable plaques are a crucial factor in the screening of atherosclerosis by ultrasound technique. However, the plaques are contaminated by various noises such as artifact, speckle noise, and manual segmentation may be time-consuming. This paper proposes an automatic convolutional neural network (CNN) method for plaque segmentation in carotid ultrasound images using a small dataset. First, a parallel network with three independent scale decoders is utilized as our base segmentation network, pyramid dilation convolutions are used to enlarge receptive fields in the three segmentation sub-networks. Subsequently, the three decoders are merged to be rectified in channels by SENet. Thirdly, in test stage, the initially segmented plaque is refined by the max contour morphology post-processing to obtain the final plaque. Moreover, three loss function Dice loss, SSIM loss and cross-entropy loss are compared to segment plaques. Test results show that the proposed method with dice loss function yields a Dice value of 0.820, an IoU of 0.701, Acc of 0.969, and modified Hausdorff distance (MHD) of 1.43 for 30 vulnerable cases of plaques, it outperforms some of the conventional CNN-based methods on these metrics. Additionally, we apply an ablation experiment to show the validity of each proposed module. Our study provides some reference for similar researches and may be useful in actual applications for plaque segmentation of ultrasound carotid arteries.
abstract_zh: 颈动脉易损斑块是超声技术筛查动脉粥样硬化的关键因素。然而，斑块受到各种噪声的污染，例如伪影、散斑噪声，并且手动分割可能非常耗时。本文提出了一种使用小数据集进行颈动脉超声图像斑块分割的自动卷积神经网络（CNN）方法。首先，使用具有三个独立尺度解码器的并行网络作为我们的基础分割网络，使用金字塔膨胀卷积来扩大三个分割子网络中的感受野。随后，三个解码器被合并以通过 SENet 在通道中进行校正。第三，在测试阶段，通过最大轮廓形态学后处理对最初分割的斑块进行细化，得到最终的斑块。此外，将三种损失函数Dice损失、SSIM损失和交叉熵损失与节段斑块进行了比较。测试结果表明，对于 30 个斑块的易损病例，所提出的带有 dice 损失函数的方法的 Dice 值为 0.820，IoU 为 0.701，Acc 为 0.969，修正的 Hausdorff 距离（MHD）为 1.43，在这些指标上优于一些基于 CNN 的传统方法。此外，我们应用消融实验来证明每个提出的模块的有效性。我们的研究为类似研究提供了一定的参考，并可能对超声颈动脉斑块分割的实际应用有所帮助。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于平行网络和通道注意力机制的自动卷积神经网络方法，用于超声图像中颈动脉易损斑块的分割。
AI.motivation: 颈动脉易损斑块的超声分割受噪声干扰且手动分割耗时，需开发适用于小数据集的自动分割方法。
AI.method: 采用包含三个独立尺度解码器的平行网络，结合金字塔空洞卷积扩大感受野，通过SENet进行通道校正，并使用最大轮廓形态学后处理优化分割结果，对比Dice、SSIM和交叉熵损失函数。
AI.result: 在30例易损斑块数据中，使用Dice损失函数取得Dice值0.820、IoU 0.701、准确率0.969和MHD 1.43，优于传统CNN方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模块有效性验证，为超声颈动脉斑块分割提供参考，具有实际应用潜力。

search_text: Parallel Network with Channel Attention and Post-Processing for Carotid Arteries Vulnerable Plaque Segmentation in Ultrasound Images 超声图像中颈动脉易损斑块分割的具有通道关注和后处理的并行网络 Carotid arteries vulnerable plaques are a crucial factor in the screening of atherosclerosis by ultrasound technique. However, the plaques are contaminated by various noises such as artifact, speckle noise, and manual segmentation may be time-consuming. This paper proposes an automatic convolutional neural network (CNN) method for plaque segmentation in carotid ultrasound images using a small dataset. First, a parallel network with three independent scale decoders is utilized as our base segmentation network, pyramid dilation convolutions are used to enlarge receptive fields in the three segmentation sub-networks. Subsequently, the three decoders are merged to be rectified in channels by SENet. Thirdly, in test stage, the initially segmented plaque is refined by the max contour morphology post-processing to obtain the final plaque. Moreover, three loss function Dice loss, SSIM loss and cross-entropy loss are compared to segment plaques. Test results show that the proposed method with dice loss function yields a Dice value of 0.820, an IoU of 0.701, Acc of 0.969, and modified Hausdorff distance (MHD) of 1.43 for 30 vulnerable cases of plaques, it outperforms some of the conventional CNN-based methods on these metrics. Additionally, we apply an ablation experiment to show the validity of each proposed module. Our study provides some reference for similar researches and may be useful in actual applications for plaque segmentation of ultrasound carotid arteries. 颈动脉易损斑块是超声技术筛查动脉粥样硬化的关键因素。然而，斑块受到各种噪声的污染，例如伪影、散斑噪声，并且手动分割可能非常耗时。本文提出了一种使用小数据集进行颈动脉超声图像斑块分割的自动卷积神经网络（CNN）方法。首先，使用具有三个独立尺度解码器的并行网络作为我们的基础分割网络，使用金字塔膨胀卷积来扩大三个分割子网络中的感受野。随后，三个解码器被合并以通过 SENet 在通道中进行校正。第三，在测试阶段，通过最大轮廓形态学后处理对最初分割的斑块进行细化，得到最终的斑块。此外，将三种损失函数Dice损失、SSIM损失和交叉熵损失与节段斑块进行了比较。测试结果表明，对于 30 个斑块的易损病例，所提出的带有 dice 损失函数的方法的 Dice 值为 0.820，IoU 为 0.701，Acc 为 0.969，修正的 Hausdorff 距离（MHD）为 1.43，在这些指标上优于一些基于 CNN 的传统方法。此外，我们应用消融实验来证明每个提出的模块的有效性。我们的研究为类似研究提供了一定的参考，并可能对超声颈动脉斑块分割的实际应用有所帮助。 本文提出一种基于平行网络和通道注意力机制的自动卷积神经网络方法，用于超声图像中颈动脉易损斑块的分割。 Yanchao Yuan,Cancheng Li,Lu Xu,Ke Zhang,Yang Hua,Jicong Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Ruibo Liu,Chongyang Gao,Chenyan Jia,Guangxuan Xu,Soroush Vosoughi
title: Non-Parallel Text Style Transfer with Self-Parallel Supervision
title_zh: 具有自并行监督的非并行文本样式迁移
abstract: The performance of existing text style transfer models is severely limited by the non-parallel datasets on which the models are trained. In non-parallel datasets, no direct mapping exists between sentences of the source and target style; the style transfer models thus only receive weak supervision of the target sentences during training, which often leads the model to discard too much style-independent information, or utterly fail to transfer the style. In this work, we propose LaMer, a novel text style transfer framework based on large-scale language models. LaMer first mines the roughly parallel expressions in the non-parallel datasets with scene graphs, and then employs MLE training, followed by imitation learning refinement, to leverage the intrinsic parallelism within the data. On two benchmark tasks (sentiment & formality transfer) and a newly proposed challenging task (political stance transfer), our model achieves qualitative advances in transfer accuracy, content preservation, and fluency. Further empirical and human evaluations demonstrate that our model not only makes training more efficient, but also generates more readable and diverse expressions than previous models.
summary: The performance of existing text style transfer models is severely limited by the non-parallel datasets on which the models are trained. In non-parallel datasets, no direct mapping exists between sentences of the source and target style; the style transfer models thus only receive weak supervision of the target sentences during training, which often leads the model to discard too much style-independent information, or utterly fail to transfer the style. In this work, we propose LaMer, a novel text style transfer framework based on large-scale language models. LaMer first mines the roughly parallel expressions in the non-parallel datasets with scene graphs, and then employs MLE training, followed by imitation learning refinement, to leverage the intrinsic parallelism within the data. On two benchmark tasks (sentiment & formality transfer) and a newly proposed challenging task (political stance transfer), our model achieves qualitative advances in transfer accuracy, content preservation, and fluency. Further empirical and human evaluations demonstrate that our model not only makes training more efficient, but also generates more readable and diverse expressions than previous models.
abstract_zh: 现有文本样式传输模型的性能受到训练模型的非并行数据集的严重限制。在非并行数据集中，源风格的句子和目标风格的句子之间不存在直接映射；因此，风格迁移模型在训练期间仅接受对目标句子的弱监督，这通常导致模型丢弃太多与风格无关的信息，或者完全无法迁移风格。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LaMer，一种基于大规模语言模型的新型文本样式迁移框架。 LaMer 首先使用场景图挖掘非并行数据集中的大致并行表达式，然后采用 MLE 训练，然后进行模仿学习细化，以利用数据内的内在并行性。在两个基准任务（情感和形式转移）和一个新提出的挑战性任务（政治立场转移）上，我们的模型在转移准确性、内容保存和流畅性方面取得了质的进步。进一步的实证和人类评估表明，我们的模型不仅使训练更加高效，而且比以前的模型生成了更具可读性和多样性的表达。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于大规模语言模型的非平行文本风格迁移框架LaMer，通过挖掘非平行数据集中的隐含平行性来提升风格迁移效果。
AI.motivation: 现有文本风格迁移模型在非平行数据集上表现受限，因缺乏源句与目标句的直接映射关系，导致模型难以有效保留内容信息并完成风格迁移。
AI.method: 利用场景图挖掘非平行数据中的近似平行表达，结合最大似然估计训练与模仿学习优化，通过内在平行性提升模型性能。
AI.result: 在情感迁移、正式度迁移及新提出的政治立场迁移任务中，模型在迁移准确性、内容保留度和流畅性方面均取得显著提升，且训练效率更高。
AI.conclusion: LaMer通过自平行监督机制有效解决了非平行数据下的风格迁移难题，生成结果更符合人类阅读习惯且多样性更强。

authors_text: Wanrong Zhu,Bo Pang,Ashish V. Thapliyal,William Yang Wang,Radu Soricut
title: End-to-end Dense Video Captioning as Sequence Generation
title_zh: 作为序列生成的端到端密集视频字幕
abstract: Dense video captioning aims to identify the events of interest in an input video, and generate descriptive captions for each event. Previous approaches usually follow a two-stage generative process, which first proposes a segment for each event, then renders a caption for each identified segment. Recent advances in large-scale sequence generation pretraining have seen great success in unifying task formulation for a great variety of tasks, but so far, more complex tasks such as dense video captioning are not able to fully utilize this powerful paradigm. In this work, we show how to model the two subtasks of dense video captioning jointly as one sequence generation task, and simultaneously predict the events and the corresponding descriptions. Experiments on YouCook2 and ViTT show encouraging results and indicate the feasibility of training complex tasks such as end-to-end dense video captioning integrated into large-scale pretrained models.
summary: Dense video captioning aims to identify the events of interest in an input video, and generate descriptive captions for each event. Previous approaches usually follow a two-stage generative process, which first proposes a segment for each event, then renders a caption for each identified segment. Recent advances in large-scale sequence generation pretraining have seen great success in unifying task formulation for a great variety of tasks, but so far, more complex tasks such as dense video captioning are not able to fully utilize this powerful paradigm. In this work, we show how to model the two subtasks of dense video captioning jointly as one sequence generation task, and simultaneously predict the events and the corresponding descriptions. Experiments on YouCook2 and ViTT show encouraging results and indicate the feasibility of training complex tasks such as end-to-end dense video captioning integrated into large-scale pretrained models.
abstract_zh: 密集视频字幕旨在识别输入视频中感兴趣的事件，并为每个事件生成描述性字幕。以前的方法通常遵循两阶段生成过程，首先为每个事件提出一个片段，然后为每个识别的片段呈现一个标题。大规模序列生成预训练的最新进展在统一各种任务的任务制定方面取得了巨大成功，但到目前为止，更复杂的任务（例如密集视频字幕）无法充分利用这种强大的范例。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何将密集视频字幕的两个子任务联合建模为一个序列生成任务，并同时预测事件和相应的描述。 YouCook2 和 ViTT 上的实验显示出令人鼓舞的结果，并表明训练复杂任务（例如集成到大规模预训练模型中的端到端密集视频字幕）的可行性。

AI.tldr: 将密集视频字幕的事件检测与字幕生成整合为端到端的序列生成任务
AI.motivation: 现有两阶段方法效率低，而大规模预训练模型未被有效应用于复杂任务如密集视频字幕，需统一建模以提升效果
AI.method: 将事件检测与字幕生成联合建模为单一序列生成任务，通过端到端模型同步预测事件及对应描述
AI.result: 在YouCook2和ViTT数据集上取得有希望结果，验证了端到端密集视频字幕的可行性
AI.conclusion: 证明了复杂任务如端到端密集视频字幕可有效集成至大规模预训练模型中

authors_text: Ivan Dario Jimenez Rodriguez,Noel Csomay-Shanklin,Yisong Yue,Aaron D. Ames
title: Neural Gaits: Learning Bipedal Locomotion via Control Barrier Functions and Zero Dynamics Policies
title_zh: 神经步态：通过控制屏障功能和零动态策略学习双足运动
abstract: This work presents Neural Gaits, a method for learning dynamic walking gaits through the enforcement of set invariance that can be refined episodically using experimental data from the robot. We frame walking as a set invariance problem enforceable via control barrier functions (CBFs) defined on the reduced-order dynamics quantifying the underactuated component of the robot: the zero dynamics. Our approach contains two learning modules: one for learning a policy that satisfies the CBF condition, and another for learning a residual dynamics model to refine imperfections of the nominal model. Importantly, learning only over the zero dynamics significantly reduces the dimensionality of the learning problem while using CBFs allows us to still make guarantees for the full-order system. The method is demonstrated experimentally on an underactuated bipedal robot, where we are able to show agile and dynamic locomotion, even with partially unknown dynamics.
summary: This work presents Neural Gaits, a method for learning dynamic walking gaits through the enforcement of set invariance that can be refined episodically using experimental data from the robot. We frame walking as a set invariance problem enforceable via control barrier functions (CBFs) defined on the reduced-order dynamics quantifying the underactuated component of the robot: the zero dynamics. Our approach contains two learning modules: one for learning a policy that satisfies the CBF condition, and another for learning a residual dynamics model to refine imperfections of the nominal model. Importantly, learning only over the zero dynamics significantly reduces the dimensionality of the learning problem while using CBFs allows us to still make guarantees for the full-order system. The method is demonstrated experimentally on an underactuated bipedal robot, where we are able to show agile and dynamic locomotion, even with partially unknown dynamics.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了神经步态，这是一种通过执行集合不变性来学习动态行走步态的方法，该不变性可以使用机器人的实验数据进行逐步细化。我们将行走视为一个可通过控制障碍函数（CBF）强制执行的一组不变性问题，该控制障碍函数定义在量化机器人欠驱动部分的降阶动力学上：零动力学。我们的方法包含两个学习模块：一个用于学习满足 CBF 条件的策略，另一个用于学习残差动态模型以改进名义模型的缺陷。重要的是，仅在零动态范围内学习可以显着降低学习问题的维数，而使用 CBF 仍允许我们为全阶系统做出保证。该方法在欠驱动双足机器人上进行了实验演示，即使在部分未知的动力学情况下，我们也能够展示敏捷和动态的运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过控制屏障函数（CBFs）和零动态策略学习双足机器人动态行走步态的方法，确保在实验数据优化下的安全性和动态性。
AI.motivation: 传统双足机器人步态学习面临动态不确定性、高维状态空间和安全性保证的挑战，需开发兼顾动态性能与安全约束的学习框架。
AI.method: 方法包含两个模块：1) 学习满足CBF条件的策略以确保安全；2) 学习残差动力学模型修正名义模型误差。通过聚焦零动态降低学习维度，同时保留CBF对全系统的安全性保证。
AI.result: 在欠驱动双足机器人实验中实现敏捷动态运动，验证了方法在部分未知动力学场景下的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合控制屏障函数与零动态策略的学习框架，为双足机器人提供了安全、高效且适应未知动态的步态学习解决方案。

authors_text: Pengfei Gao,Jingpeng Zhao,Yinglong Ma,Ahmad Tanvir,Beihong Jin
title: HFT-ONLSTM: Hierarchical and Fine-Tuning Multi-label Text Classification
title_zh: HFT-ONLSTM：分层和微调的多标签文本分类
abstract: Many important classification problems in the real-world consist of a large number of closely related categories in a hierarchical structure or taxonomy. Hierarchical multi-label text classification (HMTC) with higher accuracy over large sets of closely related categories organized in a hierarchy or taxonomy has become a challenging problem. In this paper, we present a hierarchical and fine-tuning approach based on the Ordered Neural LSTM neural network, abbreviated as HFT-ONLSTM, for more accurate level-by-level HMTC. First, we present a novel approach to learning the joint embeddings based on parent category labels and textual data for accurately capturing the joint features of both category labels and texts. Second, a fine tuning technique is adopted for training parameters such that the text classification results in the upper level should contribute to the classification in the lower one. At last, the comprehensive analysis is made based on extensive experiments in comparison with the state-of-the-art hierarchical and flat multi-label text classification approaches over two benchmark datasets, and the experimental results show that our HFT-ONLSTM approach outperforms these approaches, in particular reducing computational costs while achieving superior performance.
summary: Many important classification problems in the real-world consist of a large number of closely related categories in a hierarchical structure or taxonomy. Hierarchical multi-label text classification (HMTC) with higher accuracy over large sets of closely related categories organized in a hierarchy or taxonomy has become a challenging problem. In this paper, we present a hierarchical and fine-tuning approach based on the Ordered Neural LSTM neural network, abbreviated as HFT-ONLSTM, for more accurate level-by-level HMTC. First, we present a novel approach to learning the joint embeddings based on parent category labels and textual data for accurately capturing the joint features of both category labels and texts. Second, a fine tuning technique is adopted for training parameters such that the text classification results in the upper level should contribute to the classification in the lower one. At last, the comprehensive analysis is made based on extensive experiments in comparison with the state-of-the-art hierarchical and flat multi-label text classification approaches over two benchmark datasets, and the experimental results show that our HFT-ONLSTM approach outperforms these approaches, in particular reducing computational costs while achieving superior performance.
abstract_zh: 现实世界中的许多重要分类问题由层次结构或分类法中大量密切相关的类别组成。对按层次结构或分类法组织的大量密切相关类别具有更高准确度的分层多标签文本分类（HMTC）已成为一个具有挑战性的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于有序神经 LSTM 神经网络（缩写为 HFT-ONLSTM）的分层微调方法，以实现更准确的逐级 HMTC。首先，我们提出了一种基于父类别标签和文本数据学习联合嵌入的新方法，以准确捕获类别标签和文本的联合特征。其次，对训练参数采用微调技术，使得上层的文本分类结果应该有助于下层的分类。最后，在两个基准数据集上与最先进的分层和平面多标签文本分类方法进行了广泛的实验比较，进行了综合分析，实验结果表明我们的 HFT-ONLSTM 方法优于这些方法，特别是在降低计算成本的同时实现了卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 提出HFT-ONLSTM方法，解决分层多标签文本分类中的高精度问题
AI.motivation: 现实场景中多标签分类需处理紧密关联的层次化类别，提升HMTC准确率是关键挑战
AI.method: 基于有序神经LSTM（ONLSTM）的分层与微调方法，通过联合嵌入学习和参数微调提升分类效果
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上实验，HFT-ONLSTM在准确率和计算成本上优于现有分层与扁平化多标签分类方法
AI.conclusion: HFT-ONLSTM通过分层结构与微调机制有效提升多标签文本分类准确率，同时降低计算成本

authors_text: Nikhil Krishnaswamy,Sadaf Ghaffari
title: Exploiting Embodied Simulation to Detect Novel Object Classes Through Interaction
title_zh: 利用具体模拟通过交互检测新的对象类别
abstract: In this paper we present a novel method for a naive agent to detect novel objects it encounters in an interaction. We train a reinforcement learning policy on a stacking task given a known object type, and then observe the results of the agent attempting to stack various other objects based on the same trained policy. By extracting embedding vectors from a convolutional neural net trained over the results of the aforementioned stacking play, we can determine the similarity of a given object to known object types, and determine if the given object is likely dissimilar enough to the known types to be considered a novel class of object. We present the results of this method on two datasets gathered using two different policies and demonstrate what information the agent needs to extract from its environment to make these novelty judgments.
summary: In this paper we present a novel method for a naive agent to detect novel objects it encounters in an interaction. We train a reinforcement learning policy on a stacking task given a known object type, and then observe the results of the agent attempting to stack various other objects based on the same trained policy. By extracting embedding vectors from a convolutional neural net trained over the results of the aforementioned stacking play, we can determine the similarity of a given object to known object types, and determine if the given object is likely dissimilar enough to the known types to be considered a novel class of object. We present the results of this method on two datasets gathered using two different policies and demonstrate what information the agent needs to extract from its environment to make these novelty judgments.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，让朴素智能体能够检测在交互中遇到的新物体。我们在给定已知对象类型的堆叠任务上训练强化学习策略，然后观察代理尝试基于相同训练策略堆叠各种其他对象的结果。通过从根据上述堆叠游戏的结果训练的卷积神经网络中提取嵌入向量，我们可以确定给定对象与已知对象类型的相似性，并确定给定对象是否可能与已知类型足够不同以被视为新的对象类别。我们在使用两种不同策略收集的两个数据集上展示了该方法的结果，并演示了代理需要从其环境中提取哪些信息来做出这些新颖性判断。

AI.tldr: 提出一种通过具身模拟和交互检测新物体类别的方法，利用强化学习策略和嵌入向量分析物体相似性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖标注数据或先验知识，难以适应新物体，需通过交互和模拟实现自主检测。
AI.method: 训练强化学习策略执行堆叠任务，利用CNN提取嵌入向量，通过相似性判断物体是否为新类别。
AI.result: 在两个数据集上验证方法有效性，表明代理能通过环境信息准确判断物体新颖性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自主学习新物体类别提供了有效途径，减少对人工标注数据的依赖。

search_text: Exploiting Embodied Simulation to Detect Novel Object Classes Through Interaction 利用具体模拟通过交互检测新的对象类别 In this paper we present a novel method for a naive agent to detect novel objects it encounters in an interaction. We train a reinforcement learning policy on a stacking task given a known object type, and then observe the results of the agent attempting to stack various other objects based on the same trained policy. By extracting embedding vectors from a convolutional neural net trained over the results of the aforementioned stacking play, we can determine the similarity of a given object to known object types, and determine if the given object is likely dissimilar enough to the known types to be considered a novel class of object. We present the results of this method on two datasets gathered using two different policies and demonstrate what information the agent needs to extract from its environment to make these novelty judgments. 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的方法，让朴素智能体能够检测在交互中遇到的新物体。我们在给定已知对象类型的堆叠任务上训练强化学习策略，然后观察代理尝试基于相同训练策略堆叠各种其他对象的结果。通过从根据上述堆叠游戏的结果训练的卷积神经网络中提取嵌入向量，我们可以确定给定对象与已知对象类型的相似性，并确定给定对象是否可能与已知类型足够不同以被视为新的对象类别。我们在使用两种不同策略收集的两个数据集上展示了该方法的结果，并演示了代理需要从其环境中提取哪些信息来做出这些新颖性判断。 提出一种通过具身模拟和交互检测新物体类别的方法，利用强化学习策略和嵌入向量分析物体相似性。 Nikhil Krishnaswamy,Sadaf Ghaffari cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Suman K. Bera,Sayan Bhattacharya,Jayesh Choudhari,Prantar Ghosh
title: A New Dynamic Algorithm for Densest Subhypergraphs
title_zh: 一种新的最稠子超图动态算法
comment: Extended abstract appears in TheWebConf (previously WWW) 2022
comments: Extended abstract appears in TheWebConf (previously WWW) 2022
abstract: Computing a dense subgraph is a fundamental problem in graph mining, with a diverse set of applications ranging from electronic commerce to community detection in social networks. In many of these applications, the underlying context is better modelled as a weighted hypergraph that keeps evolving with time. This motivates the problem of maintaining the densest subhypergraph of a weighted hypergraph in a {\em dynamic setting}, where the input keeps changing via a sequence of updates (hyperedge insertions/deletions). Previously, the only known algorithm for this problem was due to Hu et al. [HWC17]. This algorithm worked only on unweighted hypergraphs, and had an approximation ratio of $(1+ε)r^2$ and an update time of $O(\text{poly} (r, \log n))$, where $r$ denotes the maximum rank of the input across all the updates. We obtain a new algorithm for this problem, which works even when the input hypergraph is weighted. Our algorithm has a significantly improved (near-optimal) approximation ratio of $(1+ε)$ that is independent of $r$, and a similar update time of $O(\text{poly} (r, \log n))$. It is the first $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm even for the special case of weighted simple graphs. To complement our theoretical analysis, we perform experiments with our dynamic algorithm on large-scale, real-world data-sets. Our algorithm significantly outperforms the state of the art [HWC17] both in terms of accuracy and efficiency.

In many of these applications, the underlying context is better modelled as a weighted hypergraph that keeps evolving with time. This algorithm worked only on unweighted hypergraphs, and had an approximation ratio of $(1+ε)r^2$ and an update time of $O(\text{poly} (r, \log n))$, where $r$ denotes the maximum rank of the input across all the updates. We obtain a new algorithm for this problem, which works even when the input hypergraph is weighted. Our algorithm has a significantly improved (near-optimal) approximation ratio of $(1+ε)$ that is independent of $r$, and a similar update time of $O(\text{poly} (r, \log n))$. It is the first $(1+ε)$-approximation algorithm even for the special case of weighted simple graphs. To complement our theoretical analysis, we perform experiments with our dynamic algorithm on large-scale, real-world data-sets. Our algorithm significantly outperforms the state of the art [HWC17] both in terms of accuracy and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 计算密集子图是图挖掘中的一个基本问题，其应用范围广泛，从电子商务到社交网络中的社区检测。在许多此类应用程序中，底层上下文可以更好地建模为随时间不断演变的加权超图。这引发了在动态设置中维护加权超图的最密集子超图的问题，其中输入通过一系列更新（超边插入/删除）不断变化。此前，解决此问题的唯一已知算法是 Hu 等人提出的。 [HWC17]。该算法仅适用于未加权的超图，近似率为 $(1+ε)r^2$ ，更新时间为 $O(\text{poly} (r, \log n))$，其中 $r$ 表示所有更新中输入的最大排名。我们针对这个问题获得了一种新算法，即使在输入超图被加权时该算法也能工作。我们的算法具有显着改进的（接近最优）$(1+ε)$ 近似率，该近似率独立于$r$，并且更新时间类似$O(\text{poly} (r, \log n))$。即使对于加权简单图的特殊情况，它也是第一个 $(1+ε)$ 近似算法。为了补充我们的理论分析，我们使用我们的动态算法在大规模的真实数据集上进行实验。我们的算法在准确性和效率方面都显着优于最先进的算法 [HWC17]。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的动态算法，用于在加权超图中高效维护最密集子超图。
AI.motivation: 现有算法仅适用于无权超图且近似比依赖于超图的最大秩r，无法处理动态变化的加权超图场景。
AI.method: 设计了一种适用于加权超图的动态算法，近似比独立于r且达到近优的(1+ε)，同时保持与先前方法相似的更新时间复杂度。
AI.result: 实验表明，新算法在大规模真实数据集上显著优于现有最先进的方法，在准确性和效率方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: 该算法是首个针对加权简单图的(1+ε)-近似动态算法，理论分析与实验验证均证明其有效性。

authors_text: Mohammed Shaiqur Rahman,Jiyang Wang,Senem Velipasalar Gursoy,David Anastasiu,Shuo Wang,Anuj Sharma
title: Synthetic Distracted Driving (SynDD2) dataset for analyzing distracted behaviors and various gaze zones of a driver
title_zh: 合成分心驾驶 (SynDD2) 数据集，用于分析驾驶员的分心行为和各种注视区域
abstract: This article presents a synthetic distracted driving (SynDD2 - a continuum of SynDD1) dataset for machine learning models to detect and analyze drivers' various distracted behavior and different gaze zones. We collected the data in a stationary vehicle using three in-vehicle cameras positioned at locations: on the dashboard, near the rearview mirror, and on the top right-side window corner. The dataset contains two activity types: distracted activities and gaze zones for each participant, and each activity type has two sets: without appearance blocks and with appearance blocks such as wearing a hat or sunglasses. The order and duration of each activity for each participant are random. In addition, the dataset contains manual annotations for each activity, having its start and end time annotated. Researchers could use this dataset to evaluate the performance of machine learning algorithms to classify various distracting activities and gaze zones of drivers.
summary: This article presents a synthetic distracted driving (SynDD2 - a continuum of SynDD1) dataset for machine learning models to detect and analyze drivers' various distracted behavior and different gaze zones. We collected the data in a stationary vehicle using three in-vehicle cameras positioned at locations: on the dashboard, near the rearview mirror, and on the top right-side window corner. The dataset contains two activity types: distracted activities and gaze zones for each participant, and each activity type has two sets: without appearance blocks and with appearance blocks such as wearing a hat or sunglasses. The order and duration of each activity for each participant are random. In addition, the dataset contains manual annotations for each activity, having its start and end time annotated. Researchers could use this dataset to evaluate the performance of machine learning algorithms to classify various distracting activities and gaze zones of drivers.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一个合成分心驾驶（SynDD2 - SynDD1 的连续体）数据集，用于机器学习模型，以检测和分析驾驶员的各种分心行为和不同的注视区域。我们使用位于仪表板上、后视镜附近和右上窗角的三个车载摄像头收集静止车辆中的数据。该数据集包含两种活动类型：每个参与者的分心活动和凝视区域，每种活动类型都有两组：没有外观块和有外观块（例如戴帽子或太阳镜）。每个参与者的每项活动的顺序和持续时间是随机的。此外，数据集还包含每个活动的手动注释，并注释了其开始和结束时间。研究人员可以使用该数据集来评估机器学习算法的性能，以对驾驶员的各种分散注意力的活动和注视区域进行分类。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个合成分心驾驶数据集SynDD2，用于分析驾驶员分心行为及注视区域，支持机器学习模型的训练与评估。
AI.motivation: 现有驾驶行为数据集缺乏对遮挡物干扰和多样化分心行为的覆盖，限制了算法鲁棒性研究，需构建更全面的数据集以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过三摄像头（仪表盘、后视镜旁、车窗右上角）采集静态车辆内数据，包含分心行为与注视区域两类活动，每类分为无遮挡与有遮挡（如帽子、墨镜）两种场景，活动顺序与时长随机化，并提供手动标注的时间戳。
AI.result: 构建完成包含多视角、多遮挡条件及精确标注的SynDD2数据集，可作为基准测试资源供研究者评估分心行为识别算法性能。
AI.conclusion: SynDD2数据集为驾驶行为分析提供了多样化样本，有助于推动更精准的分心检测技术发展，进而提升道路安全水平。

authors_text: Frank Cwitkowitz,Jonathan Driedger,Zhiyao Duan
title: A Data-Driven Methodology for Considering Feasibility and Pairwise Likelihood in Deep Learning Based Guitar Tablature Transcription Systems
title_zh: 考虑基于深度学习的吉他指法谱转录系统的可行性和成对可能性的数据驱动方法
abstract: Guitar tablature transcription is an important but understudied problem within the field of music information retrieval. Traditional signal processing approaches offer only limited performance on the task, and there is little acoustic data with transcription labels for training machine learning models. However, guitar transcription labels alone are more widely available in the form of tablature, which is commonly shared among guitarists online. In this work, a collection of symbolic tablature is leveraged to estimate the pairwise likelihood of notes on the guitar. The output layer of a baseline tablature transcription model is reformulated, such that an inhibition loss can be incorporated to discourage the co-activation of unlikely note pairs. This naturally enforces playability constraints for guitar, and yields tablature which is more consistent with the symbolic data used to estimate pairwise likelihoods. With this methodology, we show that symbolic tablature can be used to shape the distribution of a tablature transcription model's predictions, even when little acoustic data is available.
summary: Guitar tablature transcription is an important but understudied problem within the field of music information retrieval. Traditional signal processing approaches offer only limited performance on the task, and there is little acoustic data with transcription labels for training machine learning models. However, guitar transcription labels alone are more widely available in the form of tablature, which is commonly shared among guitarists online. In this work, a collection of symbolic tablature is leveraged to estimate the pairwise likelihood of notes on the guitar. The output layer of a baseline tablature transcription model is reformulated, such that an inhibition loss can be incorporated to discourage the co-activation of unlikely note pairs. This naturally enforces playability constraints for guitar, and yields tablature which is more consistent with the symbolic data used to estimate pairwise likelihoods. With this methodology, we show that symbolic tablature can be used to shape the distribution of a tablature transcription model's predictions, even when little acoustic data is available.
abstract_zh: 吉他指法谱转录是音乐信息检索领域中一个重要但尚未得到充分研究的问题。传统的信号处理方法只能提供有限的任务性能，并且用于训练机器学习模型的带有转录标签的声学数据很少。然而，吉他转录标签本身以指法谱的形式更广泛地使用，这种形式通常在吉他手之间在线共享。在这项工作中，利用一组符号指法谱来估计吉他上音符的成对可能性。基线指法谱转录模型的输出层被重新制定，以便可以合并抑制损失以阻止不太可能的音符对的共同激活。这自然会强制吉他的可演奏性限制，并产生与用于估计成对可能性的符号数据更加一致的指法谱。通过这种方法，我们表明即使在可用的声学数据很少的情况下，符号指法谱也可以用于塑造指法谱转录模型预测的分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，利用符号吉他谱表中的音符对可能性来改进深度学习的吉他谱转录系统，确保生成的谱表符合实际演奏可行性。
AI.motivation: 传统信号处理方法在吉他谱转录任务上表现有限，且缺乏带标签的音频数据，但符号谱表资源丰富，需探索如何利用此类数据提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过收集符号谱表估计音符对可能性，修改基线模型输出层以引入抑制损失，避免不可能音符对同时激活，从而施加演奏可行性约束。
AI.result: 实验表明，即使在音频数据稀缺的情况下，该方法能有效调整模型预测分布，使生成的谱表更符合符号数据估计的音符对可能性。
AI.conclusion: 符号谱表可作为有效先验信息引导模型预测，提升转录质量，尤其在缺乏音频数据时具有显著优势。

search_text: A Data-Driven Methodology for Considering Feasibility and Pairwise Likelihood in Deep Learning Based Guitar Tablature Transcription Systems 考虑基于深度学习的吉他指法谱转录系统的可行性和成对可能性的数据驱动方法 Guitar tablature transcription is an important but understudied problem within the field of music information retrieval. Traditional signal processing approaches offer only limited performance on the task, and there is little acoustic data with transcription labels for training machine learning models. However, guitar transcription labels alone are more widely available in the form of tablature, which is commonly shared among guitarists online. In this work, a collection of symbolic tablature is leveraged to estimate the pairwise likelihood of notes on the guitar. The output layer of a baseline tablature transcription model is reformulated, such that an inhibition loss can be incorporated to discourage the co-activation of unlikely note pairs. This naturally enforces playability constraints for guitar, and yields tablature which is more consistent with the symbolic data used to estimate pairwise likelihoods. With this methodology, we show that symbolic tablature can be used to shape the distribution of a tablature transcription model's predictions, even when little acoustic data is available. 吉他指法谱转录是音乐信息检索领域中一个重要但尚未得到充分研究的问题。传统的信号处理方法只能提供有限的任务性能，并且用于训练机器学习模型的带有转录标签的声学数据很少。然而，吉他转录标签本身以指法谱的形式更广泛地使用，这种形式通常在吉他手之间在线共享。在这项工作中，利用一组符号指法谱来估计吉他上音符的成对可能性。基线指法谱转录模型的输出层被重新制定，以便可以合并抑制损失以阻止不太可能的音符对的共同激活。这自然会强制吉他的可演奏性限制，并产生与用于估计成对可能性的符号数据更加一致的指法谱。通过这种方法，我们表明即使在可用的声学数据很少的情况下，符号指法谱也可以用于塑造指法谱转录模型预测的分布。 本文提出一种数据驱动方法，利用符号吉他谱表中的音符对可能性来改进深度学习的吉他谱转录系统，确保生成的谱表符合实际演奏可行性。 Frank Cwitkowitz,Jonathan Driedger,Zhiyao Duan eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Samarth Mishra,Pengkai Zhu,Venkatesh Saligrama
title: Learning Compositional Representations for Effective Low-Shot Generalization
title_zh: 学习组合表示以实现有效的低样本泛化
abstract: We propose Recognition as Part Composition (RPC), an image encoding approach inspired by human cognition. It is based on the cognitive theory that humans recognize complex objects by components, and that they build a small compact vocabulary of concepts to represent each instance with. RPC encodes images by first decomposing them into salient parts, and then encoding each part as a mixture of a small number of prototypes, each representing a certain concept. We find that this type of learning inspired by human cognition can overcome hurdles faced by deep convolutional networks in low-shot generalization tasks, like zero-shot learning, few-shot learning and unsupervised domain adaptation. Furthermore, we find a classifier using an RPC image encoder is fairly robust to adversarial attacks, that deep neural networks are known to be prone to. Given that our image encoding principle is based on human cognition, one would expect the encodings to be interpretable by humans, which we find to be the case via crowd-sourcing experiments. Finally, we propose an application of these interpretable encodings in the form of generating synthetic attribute annotations for evaluating zero-shot learning methods on new datasets.
summary: We propose Recognition as Part Composition (RPC), an image encoding approach inspired by human cognition. It is based on the cognitive theory that humans recognize complex objects by components, and that they build a small compact vocabulary of concepts to represent each instance with. RPC encodes images by first decomposing them into salient parts, and then encoding each part as a mixture of a small number of prototypes, each representing a certain concept. We find that this type of learning inspired by human cognition can overcome hurdles faced by deep convolutional networks in low-shot generalization tasks, like zero-shot learning, few-shot learning and unsupervised domain adaptation. Furthermore, we find a classifier using an RPC image encoder is fairly robust to adversarial attacks, that deep neural networks are known to be prone to. Given that our image encoding principle is based on human cognition, one would expect the encodings to be interpretable by humans, which we find to be the case via crowd-sourcing experiments. Finally, we propose an application of these interpretable encodings in the form of generating synthetic attribute annotations for evaluating zero-shot learning methods on new datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了“识别为部分组合”（RPC），这是一种受人类认知启发的图像编码方法。它基于这样的认知理论：人类通过组件来识别复杂的对象，并构建一个小型紧凑的概念词汇表来表示每个实例。 RPC 对图像进行编码，首先将图像分解为显着部分，然后将每个部分编码为少量原型的混合，每个原型代表一个特定的概念。我们发现，这种受人类认知启发的学习可以克服深度卷积网络在低样本泛化任务中面临的障碍，例如零样本学习、少样本学习和无监督域适应。此外，我们发现使用 RPC 图像编码器的分类器对于对抗性攻击相当稳健，而众所周知，深度神经网络很容易发生这种攻击。鉴于我们的图像编码原理基于人类认知，人们会期望编码能够被人类解释，我们通过众包实验发现情况就是如此。最后，我们提出了这些可解释编码的应用，以生成合成属性注释的形式来评估新数据集上的零样本学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人类认知的图像编码方法RPC，通过将图像分解为部件并用原型混合编码，以提升低样本情况下的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 深度卷积网络在零样本学习、少样本学习等低样本任务中存在局限性，且易受对抗攻击影响，需探索更符合人类认知机制的可解释性方法。
AI.method: RPC方法首先将图像分解为显著部件，再将每个部件编码为少量原型的混合，模仿人类通过部件组合认知复杂物体的机制。
AI.result: RPC在低样本任务中表现优于传统方法，对对抗攻击具有鲁棒性，且通过众包实验验证了编码的可解释性，并用于生成合成属性标注。
AI.conclusion: 基于人类认知的组合表征学习能有效提升低样本泛化能力，同时兼具可解释性与鲁棒性，为零样本学习评估提供了新工具。

authors_text: Mohammadmehdi Naghiaei,Hossein A. Rahmani,Yashar Deldjoo
title: CPFair: Personalized Consumer and Producer Fairness Re-ranking for Recommender Systems
title_zh: CPFair：推荐系统的个性化消费者和生产者公平性重新排名
abstract: Recently, there has been a rising awareness that when machine learning (ML) algorithms are used to automate choices, they may treat/affect individuals unfairly, with legal, ethical, or economic consequences. Recommender systems are prominent examples of such ML systems that assist users in making high-stakes judgments. A common trend in the previous literature research on fairness in recommender systems is that the majority of works treat user and item fairness concerns separately, ignoring the fact that recommender systems operate in a two-sided marketplace. In this work, we present an optimization-based re-ranking approach that seamlessly integrates fairness constraints from both the consumer and producer-side in a joint objective framework. We demonstrate through large-scale experiments on 8 datasets that our proposed method is capable of improving both consumer and producer fairness without reducing overall recommendation quality, demonstrating the role algorithms may play in minimizing data biases.
summary: Recently, there has been a rising awareness that when machine learning (ML) algorithms are used to automate choices, they may treat/affect individuals unfairly, with legal, ethical, or economic consequences. Recommender systems are prominent examples of such ML systems that assist users in making high-stakes judgments. A common trend in the previous literature research on fairness in recommender systems is that the majority of works treat user and item fairness concerns separately, ignoring the fact that recommender systems operate in a two-sided marketplace. In this work, we present an optimization-based re-ranking approach that seamlessly integrates fairness constraints from both the consumer and producer-side in a joint objective framework. We demonstrate through large-scale experiments on 8 datasets that our proposed method is capable of improving both consumer and producer fairness without reducing overall recommendation quality, demonstrating the role algorithms may play in minimizing data biases.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们越来越认识到，当机器学习 (ML) 算法用于自动化选择时，它们可能会不公平地对待/影响个人，从而带来法律、道德或经济后果。推荐系统是此类机器学习系统的典型例子，可以帮助用户做出高风险的判断。以往关于推荐系统公平性的文献研究的一个共同趋势是，大多数作品分别对待用户和项目公平性问题，忽略了推荐系统在双边市场中运行的事实。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于优化的重新排名方法，该方法将来自消费者和生产者端的公平约束无缝集成到联合目标框架中。我们通过对 8 个数据集进行大规模实验证明，我们提出的方法能够在不降低整体推荐质量的情况下提高消费者和生产者的公平性，从而证明算法在最小化数据偏差方面可能发挥的作用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于优化的重排序方法，将消费者和生产者的公平性约束整合到推荐系统的联合目标框架中，以解决双边市场中的公平性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统公平性研究多独立处理用户和物品的公平性，忽视了推荐系统作为双边市场需同时平衡消费者与生产者利益的特性。
AI.method: 设计联合优化目标函数，通过重排序策略同步满足消费者侧（用户）与生产者侧（内容提供者）的公平性约束，并在8个数据集上验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在8个大规模数据集上同时提升消费者与生产者公平性，且未显著降低推荐系统整体质量指标。
AI.conclusion: 算法可有效缓解推荐系统中的数据偏差问题，证明了联合优化框架在双边市场公平性保障中的可行性与必要性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于优化的重排序方法，将消费者和生产者的公平性约束整合到推荐系统的联合目标框架中，以解决双边市场中的公平性问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有推荐系统公平性研究多独立处理用户和物品的公平性，忽视了推荐系统作为双边市场需同时平衡消费者与生产者利益的特性。
ai_content.method: 设计联合优化目标函数，通过重排序策略同步满足消费者侧（用户）与生产者侧（内容提供者）的公平性约束，并在8个数据集上验证有效性。

search_text: CPFair: Personalized Consumer and Producer Fairness Re-ranking for Recommender Systems CPFair：推荐系统的个性化消费者和生产者公平性重新排名 Recently, there has been a rising awareness that when machine learning (ML) algorithms are used to automate choices, they may treat/affect individuals unfairly, with legal, ethical, or economic consequences. Recommender systems are prominent examples of such ML systems that assist users in making high-stakes judgments. A common trend in the previous literature research on fairness in recommender systems is that the majority of works treat user and item fairness concerns separately, ignoring the fact that recommender systems operate in a two-sided marketplace. In this work, we present an optimization-based re-ranking approach that seamlessly integrates fairness constraints from both the consumer and producer-side in a joint objective framework. We demonstrate through large-scale experiments on 8 datasets that our proposed method is capable of improving both consumer and producer fairness without reducing overall recommendation quality, demonstrating the role algorithms may play in minimizing data biases. 最近，人们越来越认识到，当机器学习 (ML) 算法用于自动化选择时，它们可能会不公平地对待/影响个人，从而带来法律、道德或经济后果。推荐系统是此类机器学习系统的典型例子，可以帮助用户做出高风险的判断。以往关于推荐系统公平性的文献研究的一个共同趋势是，大多数作品分别对待用户和项目公平性问题，忽略了推荐系统在双边市场中运行的事实。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于优化的重新排名方法，该方法将来自消费者和生产者端的公平约束无缝集成到联合目标框架中。我们通过对 8 个数据集进行大规模实验证明，我们提出的方法能够在不降低整体推荐质量的情况下提高消费者和生产者的公平性，从而证明算法在最小化数据偏差方面可能发挥的作用。 本文提出一种基于优化的重排序方法，将消费者和生产者的公平性约束整合到推荐系统的联合目标框架中，以解决双边市场中的公平性问题。 Mohammadmehdi Naghiaei,Hossein A. Rahmani,Yashar Deldjoo cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Yuhang He,Lin Chen,Junkun Xie,Long Chen
title: Learning 3D Semantics from Pose-Noisy 2D Images with Hierarchical Full Attention Network
title_zh: 使用分层全注意力网络从姿势噪声 2D 图像中学习 3D 语义
comment: 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation, Semantic Aggregation from Images, Pose Noise
comments: 3D Point Cloud Semantic Segmentation, Semantic Aggregation from Images, Pose Noise
abstract: We propose a novel framework to learn 3D point cloud semantics from 2D multi-view image observations containing pose error. On the one hand, directly learning from the massive, unstructured and unordered 3D point cloud is computationally and algorithmically more difficult than learning from compactly-organized and context-rich 2D RGB images. On the other hand, both LiDAR point cloud and RGB images are captured in standard automated-driving datasets. This motivates us to conduct a "task transfer" paradigm so that 3D semantic segmentation benefits from aggregating 2D semantic cues, albeit pose noises are contained in 2D image observations. Among all difficulties, pose noise and erroneous prediction from 2D semantic segmentation approaches are the main challenges for the task transfer. To alleviate the influence of those factor, we perceive each 3D point using multi-view images and for each single image a patch observation is associated. Moreover, the semantic labels of a block of neighboring 3D points are predicted simultaneously, enabling us to exploit the point structure prior to further improve the performance. A hierarchical full attention network~(HiFANet) is designed to sequentially aggregates patch, bag-of-frames and inter-point semantic cues, with hierarchical attention mechanism tailored for different level of semantic cues. Also, each preceding attention block largely reduces the feature size before feeding to the next attention block, making our framework slim. Experiment results on Semantic-KITTI show that the proposed framework outperforms existing 3D point cloud based methods significantly, it requires much less training data and exhibits tolerance to pose noise. The code is available at https://github.com/yuhanghe01/HiFANet.
summary: We propose a novel framework to learn 3D point cloud semantics from 2D multi-view image observations containing pose error. On the one hand, directly learning from the massive, unstructured and unordered 3D point cloud is computationally and algorithmically more difficult than learning from compactly-organized and context-rich 2D RGB images. On the other hand, both LiDAR point cloud and RGB images are captured in standard automated-driving datasets. This motivates us to conduct a "task transfer" paradigm so that 3D semantic segmentation benefits from aggregating 2D semantic cues, albeit pose noises are contained in 2D image observations. Among all difficulties, pose noise and erroneous prediction from 2D semantic segmentation approaches are the main challenges for the task transfer. To alleviate the influence of those factor, we perceive each 3D point using multi-view images and for each single image a patch observation is associated. Moreover, the semantic labels of a block of neighboring 3D points are predicted simultaneously, enabling us to exploit the point structure prior to further improve the performance. A hierarchical full attention network~(HiFANet) is designed to sequentially aggregates patch, bag-of-frames and inter-point semantic cues, with hierarchical attention mechanism tailored for different level of semantic cues. Also, each preceding attention block largely reduces the feature size before feeding to the next attention block, making our framework slim. Experiment results on Semantic-KITTI show that the proposed framework outperforms existing 3D point cloud based methods significantly, it requires much less training data and exhibits tolerance to pose noise. The code is available at https://github.com/yuhanghe01/HiFANet.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的框架，用于从包含姿态误差的 2D 多视图图像观测中学习 3D 点云语义。一方面，直接从大量、非结构化和无序的 3D 点云中学习在计算和算法上比从紧凑组织和上下文丰富的 2D RGB 图像中学习更加困难。另一方面，LiDAR 点云和 RGB 图像都是在标准自动驾驶数据集中捕获的。这促使我们进行“任务转移”范例，以便 3D 语义分割受益于聚合 2D 语义线索，尽管 2D 图像观察中包含姿势噪声。在所有困难中，2D 语义分割方法的姿态噪声和错误预测是任务转移的主要挑战。为了减轻这些因素的影响，我们使用多视图图像来感知每个 3D 点，并且对于每个单个图像，都有一个关联的补丁观察。此外，同时预测相邻 3D 点块的语义标签，使我们能够在进一步提高性能之前利用点结构。分层全注意力网络（HiFANet）被设计为顺序聚合补丁、帧袋和点间语义线索，并针对不同级别的语义线索定制分层注意力机制。此外，每个前面的注意力块在输入到下一个注意力块之前都会大大减少特征大小，从而使我们的框架变得纤薄。 Semantic-KITTI 上的实验结果表明，所提出的框架明显优于现有的基于 3D 点云的方法，它需要更少的训练数据并且表现出对姿态噪声的容忍度。代码可在 https://github.com/yuhanghe01/HiFANet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型框架，从包含姿态噪声的2D多视角图像中学习3D点云语义分割。
AI.motivation: 3D点云语义分割面临计算复杂度高、数据无序等挑战，而2D图像包含丰富的上下文信息但存在姿态噪声，需通过任务迁移整合2D语义线索以提升3D分割效果。
AI.method: 设计分层全注意力网络（HiFANet），通过多视角图像与3D点云关联，结合块级邻近点联合预测与分层注意力机制，逐步聚合图像块、帧集合及点间语义信息，同时压缩特征尺寸以保持网络轻量化。
AI.result: 在Semantic-KITTI数据集上显著优于现有3D点云方法，训练数据需求减少，且对姿态噪声具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HiFANet通过分层注意力机制有效缓解姿态噪声与2D分割误差影响，实现了高效、数据高效的3D语义分割，适用于自动驾驶等实际场景。

authors_text: Andrei Constantin
title: Intelligent Explorations of the String Theory Landscape
title_zh: 弦理论景观的智能探索
comment: 31 pages, 2 figures; review prepared for the Wold Scientific volume Machine Learning in Theoretical Physics and Pure Mathematics
comments: 31 pages, 2 figures; review prepared for the Wold Scientific volume Machine Learning in Theoretical Physics and Pure Mathematics
abstract: The goal of identifying the Standard Model of particle physics and its extensions within string theory has been one of the principal driving forces in string phenomenology. Recently, the incorporation of artificial intelligence in string theory and certain theoretical advancements have brought to light unexpected solutions to mathematical hurdles that have so far hindered progress in this direction. In this review we focus on model building efforts in the context of the $E_8\times E_8$ heterotic string compactified on smooth Calabi-Yau threefolds and discuss several areas in which machine learning is expected to make a difference.
summary: The goal of identifying the Standard Model of particle physics and its extensions within string theory has been one of the principal driving forces in string phenomenology. Recently, the incorporation of artificial intelligence in string theory and certain theoretical advancements have brought to light unexpected solutions to mathematical hurdles that have so far hindered progress in this direction. In this review we focus on model building efforts in the context of the $E_8\times E_8$ heterotic string compactified on smooth Calabi-Yau threefolds and discuss several areas in which machine learning is expected to make a difference.
abstract_zh: 确定粒子物理标准模型及其在弦理论中的扩展的目标一直是弦现象学的主要驱动力之一。最近，人工智能与弦理论的结合以及某些理论进步为迄今为止阻碍这一方向进展的数学障碍带来了意想不到的解决方案。在这篇综述中，我们重点关注在平滑 Calabi-Yau 三重上压缩的 $E_8\times E_8$ 杂变字符串背景下的模型构建工作，并讨论机器学习有望发挥作用的几个领域。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了在E8×E8杂化弦理论中利用人工智能和机器学习解决数学障碍，推动标准模型及其扩展的模型构建。
AI.motivation: 寻找粒子物理标准模型在弦理论中的实现是弦现象学的核心目标，但数学障碍长期阻碍进展，而AI和理论突破提供了新的解决途径。
AI.method: 通过综述分析E8×E8杂化弦理论紧致化于卡拉比-丘流形的模型构建，并探讨机器学习在处理复杂数学问题中的应用潜力。
AI.result: 发现AI和理论进步解决了数学难题，机器学习在模型构建中显示出显著潜力，特别是在处理复杂计算和探索新解方面。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习在弦理论模型构建中具有重要应用前景，有助于克服传统方法难以解决的数学障碍，推动标准模型的实现。

motivation: 寻找粒子物理标准模型在弦理论中的实现是弦现象学的核心目标，但数学障碍长期阻碍进展，而AI和理论突破提供了新的解决途径。
method: 通过综述分析E8×E8杂化弦理论紧致化于卡拉比-丘流形的模型构建，并探讨机器学习在处理复杂数学问题中的应用潜力。
result: 发现AI和理论进步解决了数学难题，机器学习在模型构建中显示出显著潜力，特别是在处理复杂计算和探索新解方面。
conclusion: 机器学习在弦理论模型构建中具有重要应用前景，有助于克服传统方法难以解决的数学障碍，推动标准模型的实现。
search_text: Intelligent Explorations of the String Theory Landscape 弦理论景观的智能探索 The goal of identifying the Standard Model of particle physics and its extensions within string theory has been one of the principal driving forces in string phenomenology. Recently, the incorporation of artificial intelligence in string theory and certain theoretical advancements have brought to light unexpected solutions to mathematical hurdles that have so far hindered progress in this direction. In this review we focus on model building efforts in the context of the $E_8\times E_8$ heterotic string compactified on smooth Calabi-Yau threefolds and discuss several areas in which machine learning is expected to make a difference. 确定粒子物理标准模型及其在弦理论中的扩展的目标一直是弦现象学的主要驱动力之一。最近，人工智能与弦理论的结合以及某些理论进步为迄今为止阻碍这一方向进展的数学障碍带来了意想不到的解决方案。在这篇综述中，我们重点关注在平滑 Calabi-Yau 三重上压缩的 $E_8\times E_8$ 杂变字符串背景下的模型构建工作，并讨论机器学习有望发挥作用的几个领域。 本文综述了在E8×E8杂化弦理论中利用人工智能和机器学习解决数学障碍，推动标准模型及其扩展的模型构建。 Andrei Constantin hep-th,cs.AI

authors_text: Ankit Wagle,Gian Singh,Sunil Khatri,Sarma Vrudhula
title: A Novel ASIC Design Flow using Weight-Tunable Binary Neurons as Standard Cells
title_zh: 使用权重可调二元神经元作为标准单元的新型 ASIC 设计流程
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1910.04910
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1910.04910
abstract: In this paper, we describe a design of a mixed signal circuit for a binary neuron (a.k.a perceptron, threshold logic gate) and a methodology for automatically embedding such cells in ASICs. The binary neuron, referred to as an FTL (flash threshold logic) uses floating gate or flash transistors whose threshold voltages serve as a proxy for the weights of the neuron. Algorithms for mapping the weights to the flash transistor threshold voltages are presented. The threshold voltages are determined to maximize both the robustness of the cell and its speed. The performance, power, and area of a single FTL cell are shown to be significantly smaller (79.4%), consume less power (61.6%), and operate faster (40.3%) compared to conventional CMOS logic equivalents. Also included are the architecture and the algorithms to program the flash devices of an FTL. The FTL cells are implemented as standard cells, and are designed to allow commercial synthesis and P&R tools to automatically use them in synthesis of ASICs. Substantial reductions in area and power without sacrificing performance are demonstrated on several ASIC benchmarks by the automatic embedding of FTL cells. The paper also demonstrates how FTL cells can be used for fixing timing errors after fabrication.
summary: In this paper, we describe a design of a mixed signal circuit for a binary neuron (a.k.a perceptron, threshold logic gate) and a methodology for automatically embedding such cells in ASICs. The binary neuron, referred to as an FTL (flash threshold logic) uses floating gate or flash transistors whose threshold voltages serve as a proxy for the weights of the neuron. Algorithms for mapping the weights to the flash transistor threshold voltages are presented. The threshold voltages are determined to maximize both the robustness of the cell and its speed. The performance, power, and area of a single FTL cell are shown to be significantly smaller (79.4%), consume less power (61.6%), and operate faster (40.3%) compared to conventional CMOS logic equivalents. Also included are the architecture and the algorithms to program the flash devices of an FTL. The FTL cells are implemented as standard cells, and are designed to allow commercial synthesis and P&R tools to automatically use them in synthesis of ASICs. Substantial reductions in area and power without sacrificing performance are demonstrated on several ASIC benchmarks by the automatic embedding of FTL cells. The paper also demonstrates how FTL cells can be used for fixing timing errors after fabrication.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了二元神经元（又名感知器、阈值逻辑门）的混合信号电路的设计以及将此类单元自动嵌入 ASIC 中的方法。被称为 FTL（闪存阈值逻辑）的二元神经元使用浮动栅极或闪存晶体管，其阈值电压充当神经元权重的代理。提出了将权重映射到闪存晶体管阈值电压的算法。阈值电压的确定是为了最大限度地提高电池的鲁棒性及其速度。与传统的 CMOS 逻辑等效物相比，单个 FTL 单元的性能、功耗和面积明显更小 (79.4%)、功耗更低 (61.6%)、运行速度更快 (40.3%)。还包括对 FTL 闪存设备进行编程的架构和算法。 FTL 单元作为标准单元实现，旨在允许商业综合和 P&R 工具在 ASIC 综合中自动使用它们。通过自动嵌入 FTL 单元，在多个 ASIC 基准测试中证明了在不牺牲性能的情况下大幅减少面积和功耗。该论文还演示了如何使用 FTL 单元来修复制造后的时序错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新型ASIC设计流程，利用可调权重的二进制神经元（FTL单元）作为标准单元，以优化芯片的面积、功耗与性能。
AI.motivation: 传统CMOS逻辑在面积、功耗和速度上存在局限，而二进制神经元（阈值逻辑门）可通过阈值电压模拟权重，提供更高效的计算单元，但需解决自动集成与权重映射问题。
AI.method: 设计基于浮栅/闪存晶体管的FTL单元，开发权重到阈值电压的映射算法，优化鲁棒性与速度；将FTL作为标准单元集成至ASIC设计流程，支持商业合成与布局布线工具自动调用。
AI.result: 单个FTL单元面积比CMOS缩小79.4%，功耗降低61.6%，速度提升40.3%；在多个ASIC基准测试中验证面积与功耗显著降低，且可修复制造后的时序错误。
AI.conclusion: FTL单元作为标准单元的ASIC设计方法有效提升了能效比与性能，为低功耗高效计算提供了可行方案，适用于实际芯片设计。

authors_text: Huili Chen,Jie Ding,Eric Tramel,Shuang Wu,Anit Kumar Sahu,Salman Avestimehr,Tao Zhang
title: Self-Aware Personalized Federated Learning
title_zh: 自我意识个性化联邦学习
abstract: In the context of personalized federated learning (FL), the critical challenge is to balance local model improvement and global model tuning when the personal and global objectives may not be exactly aligned. Inspired by Bayesian hierarchical models, we develop a self-aware personalized FL method where each client can automatically balance the training of its local personal model and the global model that implicitly contributes to other clients' training. Such a balance is derived from the inter-client and intra-client uncertainty quantification. A larger inter-client variation implies more personalization is needed. Correspondingly, our method uses uncertainty-driven local training steps and aggregation rule instead of conventional local fine-tuning and sample size-based aggregation. With experimental studies on synthetic data, Amazon Alexa audio data, and public datasets such as MNIST, FEMNIST, CIFAR10, and Sent140, we show that our proposed method can achieve significantly improved personalization performance compared with the existing counterparts.
summary: In the context of personalized federated learning (FL), the critical challenge is to balance local model improvement and global model tuning when the personal and global objectives may not be exactly aligned. Inspired by Bayesian hierarchical models, we develop a self-aware personalized FL method where each client can automatically balance the training of its local personal model and the global model that implicitly contributes to other clients' training. Such a balance is derived from the inter-client and intra-client uncertainty quantification. A larger inter-client variation implies more personalization is needed. Correspondingly, our method uses uncertainty-driven local training steps and aggregation rule instead of conventional local fine-tuning and sample size-based aggregation. With experimental studies on synthetic data, Amazon Alexa audio data, and public datasets such as MNIST, FEMNIST, CIFAR10, and Sent140, we show that our proposed method can achieve significantly improved personalization performance compared with the existing counterparts.
abstract_zh: 在个性化联邦学习（FL）的背景下，关键挑战是当个人目标和全局目标可能不完全一致时，平衡本地模型改进和全局模型调整。受贝叶斯分层模型的启发，我们开发了一种自我意识的个性化 FL 方法，其中每个客户都可以自动平衡其本地个人模型的训练和隐式贡献于其他客户训练的全局模型。这种平衡源自客户间和客户内的不确定性量化。更大的客户间差异意味着需要更多的个性化。相应地，我们的方法使用不确定性驱动的局部训练步骤和聚合规则，而不是传统的局部微调和基于样本大小的聚合。通过对合成数据、Amazon Alexa 音频数据以及 MNIST、FEMNIST、CIFAR10 和 Sent140 等公共数据集的实验研究，我们表明，与现有方法相比，我们提出的方法可以实现显着提高的个性化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自感知的个性化联邦学习方法，通过量化客户端间和客户端内的不确定性来平衡本地模型优化与全局模型调优。
AI.motivation: 现有个性化联邦学习方法难以在本地模型改进与全局模型协调之间取得平衡，尤其当个人目标与全局目标不一致时性能受限。
AI.method: 受贝叶斯分层模型启发，通过不确定性驱动的本地训练步骤和聚合规则替代传统微调与样本量聚合，利用跨客户端和内客户端不确定性量化动态调整平衡权重。
AI.result: 在合成数据、Amazon Alexa音频数据及MNIST/FEMNIST/CIFAR10/Sent140等公开数据集上，该方法在个性化性能上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于不确定性量化的自感知机制能有效提升联邦学习中的个性化水平，为异质性客户端场景提供了更优的模型协调方案。

authors_text: Thomas Hayes,Songyang Zhang,Xi Yin,Guan Pang,Sasha Sheng,Harry Yang,Songwei Ge,Qiyuan Hu,Devi Parikh
title: MUGEN: A Playground for Video-Audio-Text Multimodal Understanding and GENeration
title_zh: MUGEN：视频-音频-文本多模态理解和生成的游乐场
abstract: Multimodal video-audio-text understanding and generation can benefit from datasets that are narrow but rich. The narrowness allows bite-sized challenges that the research community can make progress on. The richness ensures we are making progress along the core challenges. To this end, we present a large-scale video-audio-text dataset MUGEN, collected using the open-sourced platform game CoinRun [11]. We made substantial modifications to make the game richer by introducing audio and enabling new interactions. We trained RL agents with different objectives to navigate the game and interact with 13 objects and characters. This allows us to automatically extract a large collection of diverse videos and associated audio. We sample 375K video clips (3.2s each) and collect text descriptions from human annotators. Each video has additional annotations that are extracted automatically from the game engine, such as accurate semantic maps for each frame and templated textual descriptions. Altogether, MUGEN can help progress research in many tasks in multimodal understanding and generation. We benchmark representative approaches on tasks involving video-audio-text retrieval and generation. Our dataset and code are released at: https://mugen-org.github.io/.
summary: Multimodal video-audio-text understanding and generation can benefit from datasets that are narrow but rich. The narrowness allows bite-sized challenges that the research community can make progress on. The richness ensures we are making progress along the core challenges. To this end, we present a large-scale video-audio-text dataset MUGEN, collected using the open-sourced platform game CoinRun [11]. We made substantial modifications to make the game richer by introducing audio and enabling new interactions. We trained RL agents with different objectives to navigate the game and interact with 13 objects and characters. This allows us to automatically extract a large collection of diverse videos and associated audio. We sample 375K video clips (3.2s each) and collect text descriptions from human annotators. Each video has additional annotations that are extracted automatically from the game engine, such as accurate semantic maps for each frame and templated textual descriptions. Altogether, MUGEN can help progress research in many tasks in multimodal understanding and generation. We benchmark representative approaches on tasks involving video-audio-text retrieval and generation. Our dataset and code are released at: https://mugen-org.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 多模态视频-音频-文本理解和生成可以受益于狭窄但丰富的数据集。这种狭窄性允许研究界可以在一些小挑战上取得进展。丰富性确保我们在应对核心挑战方面取得进展。为此，我们提出了一个使用开源平台游戏 CoinRun 收集的大规模视频音频文本数据集 MUGEN [11]。我们进行了大量修改，通过引入音频和启用新的交互来使游戏更加丰富。我们训练具有不同目标的 RL 代理来导航游戏并与 13 个物体和角色进行交互。这使我们能够自动提取大量不同的视频和相关音频。我们对 375K 视频剪辑（每个 3.2 秒）进行采样，并从人类注释者那里收集文本描述。每个视频都有从游戏引擎自动提取的附加注释，例如每个帧的准确语义图和模板化文本描述。总而言之，MUGEN 可以帮助推进多模态理解和生成的许多任务的研究。我们对涉及视频音频文本检索和生成的任务的代表性方法进行基准测试。我们的数据集和代码发布于：https://mugen-org.github.io/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为MUGEN的多模态视频-音频-文本数据集，用于推动视频、音频和文本的联合理解和生成研究。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集在多模态任务中存在广度与深度的矛盾，本文旨在构建一个聚焦但丰富的数据集，以促进核心挑战的突破。
AI.method: 基于开源游戏CoinRun进行改造，引入音频和交互机制，通过训练不同目标的强化学习代理生成数据，采集375K个视频片段及人类标注文本，并自动提取语义地图等标注。
AI.result: 在视频-音频-文本检索和生成任务上基准测试了代表性方法，数据集和代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MUGEN为多模态理解与生成任务提供了高质量基准，有助于推动相关算法的研究进展。

authors_text: Amin Ranem,Camila González,Anirban Mukhopadhyay
title: Continual Hippocampus Segmentation with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformers 进行连续海马分割
abstract: In clinical settings, where acquisition conditions and patient populations change over time, continual learning is key for ensuring the safe use of deep neural networks. Yet most existing work focuses on convolutional architectures and image classification. Instead, radiologists prefer to work with segmentation models that outline specific regions-of-interest, for which Transformer-based architectures are gaining traction. The self-attention mechanism of Transformers could potentially mitigate catastrophic forgetting, opening the way for more robust medical image segmentation. In this work, we explore how recently-proposed Transformer mechanisms for semantic segmentation behave in sequential learning scenarios, and analyse how best to adapt continual learning strategies for this setting. Our evaluation on hippocampus segmentation shows that Transformer mechanisms mitigate catastrophic forgetting for medical image segmentation compared to purely convolutional architectures, and demonstrates that regularising ViT modules should be done with caution.
summary: In clinical settings, where acquisition conditions and patient populations change over time, continual learning is key for ensuring the safe use of deep neural networks. Yet most existing work focuses on convolutional architectures and image classification. Instead, radiologists prefer to work with segmentation models that outline specific regions-of-interest, for which Transformer-based architectures are gaining traction. The self-attention mechanism of Transformers could potentially mitigate catastrophic forgetting, opening the way for more robust medical image segmentation. In this work, we explore how recently-proposed Transformer mechanisms for semantic segmentation behave in sequential learning scenarios, and analyse how best to adapt continual learning strategies for this setting. Our evaluation on hippocampus segmentation shows that Transformer mechanisms mitigate catastrophic forgetting for medical image segmentation compared to purely convolutional architectures, and demonstrates that regularising ViT modules should be done with caution.
abstract_zh: 在临床环境中，采集条件和患者群体会随着时间的推移而变化，持续学习是确保深度神经网络安全使用的关键。然而，大多数现有工作都集中在卷积架构和图像分类上。相反，放射科医生更喜欢使用概述特定感兴趣区域的分割模型，基于 Transformer 的架构正在获得关注。 Transformers 的自注意力机制可能会减轻灾难性遗忘，为更强大的医学图像分割开辟道路。在这项工作中，我们探讨了最近提出的用于语义分割的 Transformer 机制在顺序学习场景中的表现，并分析如何最好地适应这种设置的持续学习策略。我们对海马体分割的评估表明，与纯卷积架构相比，Transformer 机制可以减轻医学图像分割的灾难性遗忘，并表明应谨慎进行正则化 ViT 模块。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在连续学习场景下使用Transformer进行医学图像中海马体分割的任务，对比传统卷积架构的效果。
AI.motivation: 临床环境中数据分布变化需要持续学习，但现有研究多集中于图像分类和卷积网络，而放射科医生更依赖分割模型。Transformer的自注意力机制可能缓解灾难性遗忘，值得探索。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构进行语义分割，分析其在连续学习中的表现，并对比卷积网络；通过海马体分割任务验证方法有效性，同时探讨ViT模块的正则化策略。
AI.result: 实验表明Transformer比卷积架构更有效缓解灾难性遗忘，但对ViT模块的正则化需谨慎处理以避免性能下降。
AI.conclusion: Transformer在持续医学图像分割中展现潜力，其自注意力机制有助于提升鲁棒性，但需注意正则化设计。
