authors_text: Xingxuan Zhang,Yue He,Renzhe Xu,Han Yu,Zheyan Shen,Peng Cui
title: NICO++: Towards Better Benchmarking for Domain Generalization
title_zh: NICO++：迈向更好的领域泛化基准测试
comment: The NICO challenge based on NICO++ can be found at https://nicochallenge.com/
comments: The NICO challenge based on NICO++ can be found at https://nicochallenge.com/
abstract: Despite the remarkable performance that modern deep neural networks have achieved on independent and identically distributed (I.I.D.) data, they can crash under distribution shifts. Most current evaluation methods for domain generalization (DG) adopt the leave-one-out strategy as a compromise on the limited number of domains. We propose a large-scale benchmark with extensive labeled domains named NICO++ along with more rational evaluation methods for comprehensively evaluating DG algorithms. To evaluate DG datasets, we propose two metrics to quantify covariate shift and concept shift, respectively. Two novel generalization bounds from the perspective of data construction are proposed to prove that limited concept shift and significant covariate shift favor the evaluation capability for generalization. Through extensive experiments, NICO++ shows its superior evaluation capability compared with current DG datasets and its contribution in alleviating unfairness caused by the leak of oracle knowledge in model selection.
summary: Despite the remarkable performance that modern deep neural networks have achieved on independent and identically distributed (I.I.D.) data, they can crash under distribution shifts. Most current evaluation methods for domain generalization (DG) adopt the leave-one-out strategy as a compromise on the limited number of domains. We propose a large-scale benchmark with extensive labeled domains named NICO++ along with more rational evaluation methods for comprehensively evaluating DG algorithms. To evaluate DG datasets, we propose two metrics to quantify covariate shift and concept shift, respectively. Two novel generalization bounds from the perspective of data construction are proposed to prove that limited concept shift and significant covariate shift favor the evaluation capability for generalization. Through extensive experiments, NICO++ shows its superior evaluation capability compared with current DG datasets and its contribution in alleviating unfairness caused by the leak of oracle knowledge in model selection.
abstract_zh: 尽管现代深度神经网络在独立同分布（I.I.D.）数据上取得了卓越的性能，但它们可能会在分布变化的情况下崩溃。当前大多数领域泛化（DG）评估方法都采用留一策略作为对有限数量领域的妥协。我们提出了一个名为NICO++的具有广泛标记域的大规模基准，以及更合理的评估方法来全面评估DG算法。为了评估 DG 数据集，我们提出了两个指标来分别量化协变量转变和概念转变。从数据构造的角度提出了两个新颖的泛化界限，以证明有限的概念转移和显着的协变量转移有利于泛化的评估能力。通过大量的实验，NICO++展示了其相对于现有DG数据集优越的评估能力，以及在缓解模型选择中预言机知识泄露造成的不公平方面的贡献。

AI.tldr: 提出大规模基准NICO++及更全面的评估方法，以提升领域泛化算法的评估能力。
AI.motivation: 现有领域泛化评估方法因领域数量有限，依赖留一法，导致评估不全面且存在神谕知识泄露带来的不公平。
AI.method: 构建包含大量标记领域的NICO++基准，提出协变量偏移和概念偏移量化指标，并从数据构建角度提出两个泛化界。
AI.result: 实验表明NICO++在评估能力上优于现有领域泛化数据集，并有效缓解了模型选择中的神谕知识泄露问题。
AI.conclusion: NICO++为领域泛化算法提供了更全面、公平的评估基准，有助于推动该领域研究进展。

search_text: NICO++: Towards Better Benchmarking for Domain Generalization NICO++：迈向更好的领域泛化基准测试 Despite the remarkable performance that modern deep neural networks have achieved on independent and identically distributed (I.I.D.) data, they can crash under distribution shifts. Most current evaluation methods for domain generalization (DG) adopt the leave-one-out strategy as a compromise on the limited number of domains. We propose a large-scale benchmark with extensive labeled domains named NICO++ along with more rational evaluation methods for comprehensively evaluating DG algorithms. To evaluate DG datasets, we propose two metrics to quantify covariate shift and concept shift, respectively. Two novel generalization bounds from the perspective of data construction are proposed to prove that limited concept shift and significant covariate shift favor the evaluation capability for generalization. Through extensive experiments, NICO++ shows its superior evaluation capability compared with current DG datasets and its contribution in alleviating unfairness caused by the leak of oracle knowledge in model selection. 尽管现代深度神经网络在独立同分布（I.I.D.）数据上取得了卓越的性能，但它们可能会在分布变化的情况下崩溃。当前大多数领域泛化（DG）评估方法都采用留一策略作为对有限数量领域的妥协。我们提出了一个名为NICO++的具有广泛标记域的大规模基准，以及更合理的评估方法来全面评估DG算法。为了评估 DG 数据集，我们提出了两个指标来分别量化协变量转变和概念转变。从数据构造的角度提出了两个新颖的泛化界限，以证明有限的概念转移和显着的协变量转移有利于泛化的评估能力。通过大量的实验，NICO++展示了其相对于现有DG数据集优越的评估能力，以及在缓解模型选择中预言机知识泄露造成的不公平方面的贡献。 提出大规模基准NICO++及更全面的评估方法，以提升领域泛化算法的评估能力。 Xingxuan Zhang,Yue He,Renzhe Xu,Han Yu,Zheyan Shen,Peng Cui cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mohamed Baioumy,William Hartemink,Riccardo M. G. Ferrari,Nick Hawes
title: Beta Residuals: Improving Fault-Tolerant Control for Sensory Faults via Bayesian Inference and Precision Learning
title_zh: Beta 残差：通过贝叶斯推理和精确学习改进感知故障的容错控制
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at the 11th IFAC Symposium on Fault Detection, Supervision and Safety for Technical Processes - SAFEPROCESS 2022
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures. Accepted at the 11th IFAC Symposium on Fault Detection, Supervision and Safety for Technical Processes - SAFEPROCESS 2022
abstract: Model-based fault-tolerant control (FTC) often consists of two distinct steps: fault detection & isolation (FDI), and fault accommodation. In this work we investigate posing fault-tolerant control as a single Bayesian inference problem. Previous work showed that precision learning allows for stochastic FTC without an explicit fault detection step. While this leads to implicit fault recovery, information on sensor faults is not provided, which may be essential for triggering other impact-mitigation actions. In this paper, we introduce a precision-learning based Bayesian FTC approach and a novel beta residual for fault detection. Simulation results are presented, supporting the use of beta residual against competing approaches.
summary: Model-based fault-tolerant control (FTC) often consists of two distinct steps: fault detection & isolation (FDI), and fault accommodation. In this work we investigate posing fault-tolerant control as a single Bayesian inference problem. Previous work showed that precision learning allows for stochastic FTC without an explicit fault detection step. While this leads to implicit fault recovery, information on sensor faults is not provided, which may be essential for triggering other impact-mitigation actions. In this paper, we introduce a precision-learning based Bayesian FTC approach and a novel beta residual for fault detection. Simulation results are presented, supporting the use of beta residual against competing approaches.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的容错控制 (FTC) 通常包含两个不同的步骤：故障检测和隔离 (FDI) 以及故障适应。在这项工作中，我们研究将容错控制作为单个贝叶斯推理问题。先前的工作表明，精确学习允许随机 FTC，而无需明确的故障检测步骤。虽然这会导致隐式故障恢复，但不会提供有关传感器故障的信息，而这对于触发其他影响减轻操作可能至关重要。在本文中，我们介绍了一种基于精确学习的贝叶斯 FTC 方法和一种用于故障检测的新型 beta 残差。给出了模拟结果，支持使用 beta 残差来对抗竞争方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于贝叶斯推断和精度学习的容错控制方法，并引入beta残差以提升传感器故障检测能力。
AI.motivation: 传统容错控制需分步进行故障检测与隔离，而现有精度学习方法虽可隐式容错，但无法提供传感器故障信息，限制了其他缓解措施的触发。
AI.method: 结合贝叶斯推断与精度学习构建容错控制框架，设计新型beta残差指标实现故障检测，无需显式故障隔离步骤。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了beta残差在故障检测任务中优于现有方法，且保持了系统容错性能。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过beta残差有效检测传感器故障，在保证隐式容错能力的同时提升了系统鲁棒性。

authors_text: Meng Xia,Yankun Zhao,Jihyeong Hong,Mehmet Hamza Erol,Taewook Kim,Juho Kim
title: RLens: A Computer-aided Visualization System for Supporting Reflection on Language Learning under Distributed Tutorship
title_zh: RLens：支持分布式辅导下语言学习反思的计算机辅助可视化系统
abstract: With the rise of the gig economy, online language tutoring platforms are becoming increasingly popular. These platforms provide temporary and flexible jobs for native speakers as tutors and allow language learners to have one-on-one speaking practices on demand, on which learners occasionally practice the language with different tutors. With such distributed tutorship, learners can hold flexible schedules and receive diverse feedback. However, learners face challenges in consistently tracking their learning progress because different tutors provide feedback from diverse standards and perspectives, and hardly refer to learners' previous experiences with other tutors. We present RLens, a visualization system for facilitating learners' learning progress reflection by grouping different tutors' feedback, tracking how each feedback type has been addressed across learning sessions, and visualizing the learning progress. We validate our design through a between-subjects study with 40 real-world learners. Results show that learners can successfully analyze their progress and common language issues under distributed tutorship with RLens, while most learners using the baseline interface had difficulty achieving reflection tasks. We further discuss design considerations of computer-aided systems for supporting learning under distributed tutorship.
summary: With the rise of the gig economy, online language tutoring platforms are becoming increasingly popular. These platforms provide temporary and flexible jobs for native speakers as tutors and allow language learners to have one-on-one speaking practices on demand, on which learners occasionally practice the language with different tutors. With such distributed tutorship, learners can hold flexible schedules and receive diverse feedback. However, learners face challenges in consistently tracking their learning progress because different tutors provide feedback from diverse standards and perspectives, and hardly refer to learners' previous experiences with other tutors. We present RLens, a visualization system for facilitating learners' learning progress reflection by grouping different tutors' feedback, tracking how each feedback type has been addressed across learning sessions, and visualizing the learning progress. We validate our design through a between-subjects study with 40 real-world learners. Results show that learners can successfully analyze their progress and common language issues under distributed tutorship with RLens, while most learners using the baseline interface had difficulty achieving reflection tasks. We further discuss design considerations of computer-aided systems for supporting learning under distributed tutorship.
abstract_zh: 随着零工经济的兴起，在线语言辅导平台变得越来越受欢迎。这些平台为母语人士提供临时且灵活的导师工作，并允许语言学习者按需进行一对一的口语练习，学习者偶尔会与不同的导师一起练习语言。通过这种分布式辅导，学习者可以保持灵活的时间表并获得多样化的反馈。然而，学习者在持续跟踪他们的学习进度方面面临着挑战，因为不同的导师从不同的标准和角度提供反馈，并且很少参考学习者以前与其他导师的经历。我们推出了 RLens，这是一个可视化系统，通过对不同导师的反馈进行分组、跟踪每种反馈类型在学习过程中的处理方式以及可视化学习进度，促进学习者的学习进度反思。我们通过对 40 名现实世界的学习者进行的受试者间研究来验证我们的设计。结果表明，学习者可以在 RLens 分布式辅导下成功分析自己的进度和常见语言问题，而大多数使用基线界面的学习者很难完成反思任务。我们进一步讨论了支持分布式辅导下学习的计算机辅助系统的设计考虑。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RLens系统，通过可视化技术帮助语言学习者在分布式导师制下反思学习进度。
AI.motivation: 在线语言平台的分布式导师制导致学习者难以统一跟踪学习进度，因不同导师的反馈标准不一且缺乏历史关联性。
AI.method: 开发RLens系统，整合多导师反馈、追踪反馈类型在不同学习阶段的处理情况，并通过可视化呈现学习进展。采用40名学习者的对照实验验证设计。
AI.result: 使用RLens的学习者能有效分析进步与常见问题，而基线界面用户难以完成反思任务。
AI.conclusion: RLens验证了计算机辅助系统在分布式导师制学习中的有效性，为设计相关系统提供了关键设计考量。

authors_text: Vangelis P. Oikonomou
title: An Adaptive Task-Related Component Analysis Method for SSVEP recognition
title_zh: 用于SSVEP识别的自适应任务相关成分分析方法
abstract: Steady-state visual evoked potential (SSVEP) recognition methods are equipped with learning from the subject's calibration data, and they can achieve extra high performance in the SSVEP-based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), however their performance deteriorate drastically if the calibration trials are insufficient. This study develops a new method to learn from limited calibration data and it proposes and evaluates a novel adaptive data-driven spatial filtering approach for enhancing SSVEPs detection. The spatial filter learned from each stimulus utilizes temporal information from the corresponding EEG trials. To introduce the temporal information into the overall procedure, an multitask learning approach, based on the bayesian framework, is adopted. The performance of the proposed method was evaluated into two publicly available benchmark datasets, and the results demonstrated that our method outperform competing methods by a significant margin.
summary: Steady-state visual evoked potential (SSVEP) recognition methods are equipped with learning from the subject's calibration data, and they can achieve extra high performance in the SSVEP-based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), however their performance deteriorate drastically if the calibration trials are insufficient. This study develops a new method to learn from limited calibration data and it proposes and evaluates a novel adaptive data-driven spatial filtering approach for enhancing SSVEPs detection. The spatial filter learned from each stimulus utilizes temporal information from the corresponding EEG trials. To introduce the temporal information into the overall procedure, an multitask learning approach, based on the bayesian framework, is adopted. The performance of the proposed method was evaluated into two publicly available benchmark datasets, and the results demonstrated that our method outperform competing methods by a significant margin.
abstract_zh: 稳态视觉诱发电位（SSVEP）识别方法配备了从受试者的校准数据中学习的功能，它们可以在基于SSVEP的脑机接口（BCI）中实现超高性能，但如果校准试验不充分，它们的性能会急剧恶化。本研究开发了一种从有限校准数据中学习的新方法，并提出并评估了一种用于增强 SSVEP 检测的新型自适应数据驱动空间过滤方法。从每个刺激中学习到的空间滤波器利用来自相应脑电图试验的时间信息。为了将时间信息引入整个过程，采用了基于贝叶斯框架的多任务学习方法。该方法的性能在两个公开可用的基准数据集上进行了评估，结果表明我们的方法明显优于竞争方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应任务相关成分分析方法，用于提高基于稳态视觉诱发电位（SSVEP）的脑机接口的识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的SSVEP识别方法依赖于受试者的校准数据，但如果校准试验不足，性能会显著下降。因此，需要一种能够从有限校准数据中学习并提高SSVEP检测性能的新方法。
AI.method: 该方法采用一种基于贝叶斯框架的多任务学习方法，引入时间信息到整体过程中，并通过每个刺激学习的空间滤波器利用对应的EEG试验的时间信息。
AI.result: 该方法在两个公开的基准数据集上进行了评估，结果表明该方法显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能够有效提升SSVEP检测性能，尤其是在校准数据有限的情况下，具有良好的应用前景。

search_text: An Adaptive Task-Related Component Analysis Method for SSVEP recognition 用于SSVEP识别的自适应任务相关成分分析方法 Steady-state visual evoked potential (SSVEP) recognition methods are equipped with learning from the subject's calibration data, and they can achieve extra high performance in the SSVEP-based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), however their performance deteriorate drastically if the calibration trials are insufficient. This study develops a new method to learn from limited calibration data and it proposes and evaluates a novel adaptive data-driven spatial filtering approach for enhancing SSVEPs detection. The spatial filter learned from each stimulus utilizes temporal information from the corresponding EEG trials. To introduce the temporal information into the overall procedure, an multitask learning approach, based on the bayesian framework, is adopted. The performance of the proposed method was evaluated into two publicly available benchmark datasets, and the results demonstrated that our method outperform competing methods by a significant margin. 稳态视觉诱发电位（SSVEP）识别方法配备了从受试者的校准数据中学习的功能，它们可以在基于SSVEP的脑机接口（BCI）中实现超高性能，但如果校准试验不充分，它们的性能会急剧恶化。本研究开发了一种从有限校准数据中学习的新方法，并提出并评估了一种用于增强 SSVEP 检测的新型自适应数据驱动空间过滤方法。从每个刺激中学习到的空间滤波器利用来自相应脑电图试验的时间信息。为了将时间信息引入整个过程，采用了基于贝叶斯框架的多任务学习方法。该方法的性能在两个公开可用的基准数据集上进行了评估，结果表明我们的方法明显优于竞争方法。 本文提出了一种自适应任务相关成分分析方法，用于提高基于稳态视觉诱发电位（SSVEP）的脑机接口的识别性能。 Vangelis P. authors_text: Angad Singh Wadhwa,Nikhil Tyagi,Pinaki Roy Chowdhury
title: Deep Learning based Automatic Detection of Dicentric Chromosome
title_zh: 基于深度学习的双着丝粒染色体自动检测
abstract: Automatic detection of dicentric chromosomes is an essential step to estimate radiation exposure and development of end to end emergency bio dosimetry systems. During accidents, a large amount of data is required to be processed for extensive testing to formulate a medical treatment plan for the masses, which requires this process to be automated. Current approaches require human adjustments according to the data and therefore need a human expert to calibrate the system. This paper proposes a completely data driven framework which requires minimum intervention of field experts and can be deployed in emergency cases with relative ease. Our approach involves YOLOv4 to detect the chromosomes and remove the debris in each image, followed by a classifier that differentiates between an analysable chromosome and a non-analysable one. Images are extracted from YOLOv4 based on the protocols described by WHO-BIODOSNET. The analysable chromosome is classified as Monocentric or Dicentric and an image is accepted for consideration of dose estimation based on the analysable chromosome count. We report an accuracy in dicentric identification of 94.33% on a 1:1 split of Dicentric and Monocentric Chromosomes.
summary: Automatic detection of dicentric chromosomes is an essential step to estimate radiation exposure and development of end to end emergency bio dosimetry systems. During accidents, a large amount of data is required to be processed for extensive testing to formulate a medical treatment plan for the masses, which requires this process to be automated. Current approaches require human adjustments according to the data and therefore need a human expert to calibrate the system. This paper proposes a completely data driven framework which requires minimum intervention of field experts and can be deployed in emergency cases with relative ease. Our approach involves YOLOv4 to detect the chromosomes and remove the debris in each image, followed by a classifier that differentiates between an analysable chromosome and a non-analysable one. Images are extracted from YOLOv4 based on the protocols described by WHO-BIODOSNET. The analysable chromosome is classified as Monocentric or Dicentric and an image is accepted for consideration of dose estimation based on the analysable chromosome count. We report an accuracy in dicentric identification of 94.33% on a 1:1 split of Dicentric and Monocentric Chromosomes.
abstract_zh: 双着丝粒染色体的自动检测是估计辐射暴露和开发端到端紧急生物剂量测定系统的重要步骤。事故发生时，需要处理大量数据进行广泛测试，为群众制定医疗救治方案，这就需要这个过程实现自动化。目前的方法需要根据数据进行人工调整，因此需要人类专家来校准系统。本文提出了一个完全数据驱动的框架，该框架需要最少的现场专家干预，并且可以相对轻松地在紧急情况下部署。我们的方法包括使用 YOLOv4 来检测染色体并去除每张图像中的碎片，然后使用分类器来区分可分析染色体和不可分析染色体。图像是根据 WHO-BIODOSNET 描述的协议从 YOLOv4 中提取的。可分析染色体被分类为单着丝粒或双着丝粒，并且接受图像以考虑基于可分析染色体计数的剂量估计。我们报告双着丝粒和单着丝粒染色体 1:1 分割的双着丝粒鉴定准确率为 94.33%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的自动检测双着丝粒染色体的方法。
AI.motivation: 在事故情况下，需要快速处理大量数据以制定医疗方案，但目前的方法需要人工干预，效率较低。
AI.method: 使用YOLOv4检测染色体并去除图像中的杂质，然后通过分类器区分可分析的染色体与不可分析的染色体。
AI.result: 在双着丝粒与单着丝粒染色体1:1的划分下，双着丝粒染色体的识别准确率达到94.33%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效减少专家干预，适用于紧急情况下的生物剂量估算系统。

authors_text: Xuejiao Tang,Wenbin Zhang
title: Attention Mechanism based Cognition-level Scene Understanding
title_zh: 基于注意力机制的认知级场景理解
abstract: Given a question-image input, the Visual Commonsense Reasoning (VCR) model can predict an answer with the corresponding rationale, which requires inference ability from the real world. The VCR task, which calls for exploiting the multi-source information as well as learning different levels of understanding and extensive commonsense knowledge, is a cognition-level scene understanding task. The VCR task has aroused researchers' interest due to its wide range of applications, including visual question answering, automated vehicle systems, and clinical decision support. Previous approaches to solving the VCR task generally rely on pre-training or exploiting memory with long dependency relationship encoded models. However, these approaches suffer from a lack of generalizability and losing information in long sequences. In this paper, we propose a parallel attention-based cognitive VCR network PAVCR, which fuses visual-textual information efficiently and encodes semantic information in parallel to enable the model to capture rich information for cognition-level inference. Extensive experiments show that the proposed model yields significant improvements over existing methods on the benchmark VCR dataset. Moreover, the proposed model provides intuitive interpretation into visual commonsense reasoning.
summary: Given a question-image input, the Visual Commonsense Reasoning (VCR) model can predict an answer with the corresponding rationale, which requires inference ability from the real world. The VCR task, which calls for exploiting the multi-source information as well as learning different levels of understanding and extensive commonsense knowledge, is a cognition-level scene understanding task. The VCR task has aroused researchers' interest due to its wide range of applications, including visual question answering, automated vehicle systems, and clinical decision support. Previous approaches to solving the VCR task generally rely on pre-training or exploiting memory with long dependency relationship encoded models. However, these approaches suffer from a lack of generalizability and losing information in long sequences. In this paper, we propose a parallel attention-based cognitive VCR network PAVCR, which fuses visual-textual information efficiently and encodes semantic information in parallel to enable the model to capture rich information for cognition-level inference. Extensive experiments show that the proposed model yields significant improvements over existing methods on the benchmark VCR dataset. Moreover, the proposed model provides intuitive interpretation into visual commonsense reasoning.
abstract_zh: 给定一个问题图像输入，视觉常识推理（VCR）模型可以预测具有相应原理的答案，这需要来自现实世界的推理能力。 VCR任务需要利用多源信息并学习不同层次的理解和广泛的常识知识，是一个认知级的场景理解任务。 VCR任务因其广泛的应用而引起了研究人员的兴趣，包括视觉问答、自动车辆系统和临床决策支持。以前解决 VCR 任务的方法通常依赖于预训练或利用具有长依赖关系编码模型的内存。然而，这些方法缺乏通用性并且在长序列中丢失信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于并行注意力的认知VCR网络PAVCR，它有效地融合视觉文本信息并并行编码语义信息，使模型能够捕获丰富的信息以进行认知级推理。大量实验表明，所提出的模型比基准 VCR 数据集上的现有方法有了显着改进。此外，所提出的模型为视觉常识推理提供了直观的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于注意力机制的认知级场景理解模型PAVCR，用于解决视觉常识推理任务，通过融合视觉-文本信息提升认知推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在长序列信息处理中存在泛化能力不足和信息丢失问题，需设计更高效的多模态信息融合机制以实现认知级推理。
AI.method: 构建并行注意力认知网络PAVCR，通过并行编码语义信息与视觉-文本特征融合，增强模型对复杂场景的多粒度理解能力。
AI.result: 在VCR基准数据集上显著优于现有方法，同时提供可视化常识推理的直观解释。
AI.conclusion: PAVCR通过并行注意力机制有效解决了多源信息融合与长序列建模难题，为认知级视觉推理提供了新思路。

In this paper, we propose a parallel attention-based cognitive VCR network PAVCR, which fuses visual-textual information efficiently and encodes semantic information in parallel to enable the model to capture rich information for cognition-level inference. Extensive experiments show that the proposed model yields significant improvements over existing methods on the benchmark VCR dataset. Moreover, the proposed model provides intuitive interpretation into visual commonsense reasoning. 给定一个问题图像输入，视觉常识推理（VCR）模型可以预测具有相应原理的答案，这需要来自现实世界的推理能力。 VCR任务需要利用多源信息并学习不同层次的理解和广泛的常识知识，是一个认知级的场景理解任务。 VCR任务因其广泛的应用而引起了研究人员的兴趣，包括视觉问答、自动车辆系统和临床决策支持。以前解决 VCR 任务的方法通常依赖于预训练或利用具有长依赖关系编码模型的内存。然而，这些方法缺乏通用性并且在长序列中丢失信息。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于并行注意力的认知VCR网络PAVCR，它有效地融合视觉文本信息并并行编码语义信息，使模型能够捕获丰富的信息以进行认知级推理。大量实验表明，所提出的模型比基准 VCR 数据集上的现有方法有了显着改进。此外，所提出的模型为视觉常识推理提供了直观的解释。 本文提出基于注意力机制的认知级场景理解模型PAVCR，用于解决视觉常识推理任务，通过融合视觉-文本信息提升认知推理能力。 Xuejiao Tang,Wenbin Zhang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Eva Fineberg,Jack Walters,Joshua Reiss
title: Advances in Thunder Sound Synthesis
title_zh: 雷声合成的进展
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, conference paper accepted to the AES Europe Spring 2022 Audio Engineering 152nd Convention
comments: 9 pages, 6 figures, conference paper accepted to the AES Europe Spring 2022 Audio Engineering 152nd Convention
abstract: A recent comparative study evaluated all known thunder synthesis techniques in terms of their perceptual realness. The findings concluded that none of the synthesised audio extracts seemed as realistic as the genuine phenomenon. The work presented herein is motivated by those findings, and attempts to create a synthesised sound effect of thunder indistinguishable from a real recording. The technique supplements an existing implementation with physics-inspired, signal-based design elements intended to simulate environmental occurrences. In a listening test conducted with over 50 participants, this new implementation was perceived as the most realistic synthesised sound, though still distinguishable from a real recording. Further improvements to the model, based on insights from the listening test, were also implemented and described herein.
summary: A recent comparative study evaluated all known thunder synthesis techniques in terms of their perceptual realness. The findings concluded that none of the synthesised audio extracts seemed as realistic as the genuine phenomenon. The work presented herein is motivated by those findings, and attempts to create a synthesised sound effect of thunder indistinguishable from a real recording. The technique supplements an existing implementation with physics-inspired, signal-based design elements intended to simulate environmental occurrences. In a listening test conducted with over 50 participants, this new implementation was perceived as the most realistic synthesised sound, though still distinguishable from a real recording. Further improvements to the model, based on insights from the listening test, were also implemented and described herein.
abstract_zh: 最近的一项比较研究评估了所有已知的雷电合成技术的感知真实性。研究结果得出的结论是，没有任何合成音频摘录看起来像真实现象一样真实。本文提出的工作受到这些发现的启发，并试图创建与真实录音无法区分的合成雷声效果。该技术通过物理启发的、基于信号的设计元素补充了现有的实现，旨在模拟环境事件。在对 50 多名参与者进行的听力测试中，这种新实现被认为是最真实的合成声音，但仍与真实录音有区别。本文还根据听力测试的见解对模型进行了进一步改进。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在开发一种与真实雷声无法区分的合成技术。
AI.motivation: 现有雷声合成技术无法达到真实雷声的感知真实度，需改进合成方法。
AI.method: 在现有技术基础上引入物理启发的信号设计元素模拟环境效应。
AI.result: 新方法在50人听觉测试中被认为是最逼真的合成声，但仍可与真实录音区分。
AI.conclusion: 新方法提升合成真实度但未完全达到真实效果，需进一步优化模型。

authors_text: Bao Zhao,Xianyong Fang,Jiahui Yue,Xiaobo Chen,Xinyi Le,Chanjuan Zhao
title: The Z-axis, X-axis, Weight and Disambiguation Methods for Constructing Local Reference Frame in 3D Registration: An Evaluation
title_zh: 3D配准中构建局部参考系的Z轴、X轴、权重和消歧方法：评估
abstract: The local reference frame (LRF), as an independent coordinate system generated on a local 3D surface, is widely used in 3D local feature descriptor construction and 3D transformation estimation which are two key steps in the local method-based surface matching. There are numerous LRF methods have been proposed in literatures. In these methods, the x- and z-axis are commonly generated by different methods or strategies, and some x-axis methods are implemented on the basis of a z-axis being given. In addition, the weight and disambiguation methods are commonly used in these LRF methods. In existing evaluations of LRF, each LRF method is evaluated with a complete form. However, the merits and demerits of the z-axis, x-axis, weight and disambiguation methods in LRF construction are unclear. In this paper, we comprehensively analyze the z-axis, x-axis, weight and disambiguation methods in existing LRFs, and obtain six z-axis and eight x-axis, five weight and two disambiguation methods. The performance of these methods are comprehensively evaluated on six standard datasets with different application scenarios and nuisances. Considering the evaluation outcomes, the merits and demerits of different weight, disambiguation, z- and x-axis methods are analyzed and summarized. The experimental result also shows that some new designed LRF axes present superior performance compared with the state-of-the-art ones.
summary: The local reference frame (LRF), as an independent coordinate system generated on a local 3D surface, is widely used in 3D local feature descriptor construction and 3D transformation estimation which are two key steps in the local method-based surface matching. There are numerous LRF methods have been proposed in literatures. In these methods, the x- and z-axis are commonly generated by different methods or strategies, and some x-axis methods are implemented on the basis of a z-axis being given. In addition, the weight and disambiguation methods are commonly used in these LRF methods. In existing evaluations of LRF, each LRF method is evaluated with a complete form. However, the merits and demerits of the z-axis, x-axis, weight and disambiguation methods in LRF construction are unclear. In this paper, we comprehensively analyze the z-axis, x-axis, weight and disambiguation methods in existing LRFs, and obtain six z-axis and eight x-axis, five weight and two disambiguation methods. The performance of these methods are comprehensively evaluated on six standard datasets with different application scenarios and nuisances. Considering the evaluation outcomes, the merits and demerits of different weight, disambiguation, z- and x-axis methods are analyzed and summarized. The experimental result also shows that some new designed LRF axes present superior performance compared with the state-of-the-art ones.
abstract_zh: 局部参考系（LRF）作为在局部3D表面上生成的独立坐标系，广泛应用于3D局部特征描述符构建和3D变换估计，这是基于局部方法的表面匹配中的两个关键步骤。文献中已经提出了多种 LRF 方法。在这些方法中，x轴和z轴通常是通过不同的方法或策略生成的，并且一些x轴方法是在给定z轴的基础上实现的。另外，这些LRF方法中常用的是权重法和消歧法。在现有的LRF评估中，每种LRF方法都以完整的形式进行评估。然而，LRF构建中z轴、x轴、权重和消歧方法的优缺点尚不清楚。本文对现有LRF中的z轴、x轴、权重和消歧方法进行了综合分析，得到了6种z轴和8种x轴、5种权重和2种消歧方法。这些方法的性能在具有不同应用场景和干扰的六个标准数据集上进行了综合评估。结合评价结果，分析总结了不同权重法、消歧法、z轴法、x轴法的优缺点。实验结果还表明，一些新设计的 LRF 轴与最先进的轴相比具有更优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了3D配准中局部参考框架（LRF）构建所使用的Z轴、X轴、权重和消歧方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LRF方法的评估多针对整体方法，而各组成部分（如轴生成、权重、消歧）的优缺点缺乏系统分析。
AI.method: 系统分类并提取现有LRF方法中的Z轴（6种）、X轴（8种）、权重（5种）和消歧方法（2种），在六个标准数据集上进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明部分新设计的LRF轴方法在特定场景下优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 不同轴、权重和消歧方法在鲁棒性和精度上存在差异，需根据具体应用场景选择合适方案。

authors_text: Mingdeng Cao,Yanbo Fan,Yong Zhang,Jue Wang,Yujiu Yang
title: VDTR: Video Deblurring with Transformer
title_zh: VDTR：使用 Transformer 进行视频去模糊
abstract: Video deblurring is still an unsolved problem due to the challenging spatio-temporal modeling process. While existing convolutional neural network-based methods show a limited capacity for effective spatial and temporal modeling for video deblurring. This paper presents VDTR, an effective Transformer-based model that makes the first attempt to adapt Transformer for video deblurring. VDTR exploits the superior long-range and relation modeling capabilities of Transformer for both spatial and temporal modeling. However, it is challenging to design an appropriate Transformer-based model for video deblurring due to the complicated non-uniform blurs, misalignment across multiple frames and the high computational costs for high-resolution spatial modeling. To address these problems, VDTR advocates performing attention within non-overlapping windows and exploiting the hierarchical structure for long-range dependencies modeling. For frame-level spatial modeling, we propose an encoder-decoder Transformer that utilizes multi-scale features for deblurring. For multi-frame temporal modeling, we adapt Transformer to fuse multiple spatial features efficiently. Compared with CNN-based methods, the proposed method achieves highly competitive results on both synthetic and real-world video deblurring benchmarks, including DVD, GOPRO, REDS and BSD. We hope such a Transformer-based architecture can serve as a powerful alternative baseline for video deblurring and other video restoration tasks. The source code will be available at \url{https://github.com/ljzycmd/VDTR}.
summary: Video deblurring is still an unsolved problem due to the challenging spatio-temporal modeling process. While existing convolutional neural network-based methods show a limited capacity for effective spatial and temporal modeling for video deblurring. This paper presents VDTR, an effective Transformer-based model that makes the first attempt to adapt Transformer for video deblurring. VDTR exploits the superior long-range and relation modeling capabilities of Transformer for both spatial and temporal modeling. However, it is challenging to design an appropriate Transformer-based model for video deblurring due to the complicated non-uniform blurs, misalignment across multiple frames and the high computational costs for high-resolution spatial modeling. To address these problems, VDTR advocates performing attention within non-overlapping windows and exploiting the hierarchical structure for long-range dependencies modeling. For frame-level spatial modeling, we propose an encoder-decoder Transformer that utilizes multi-scale features for deblurring. For multi-frame temporal modeling, we adapt Transformer to fuse multiple spatial features efficiently. Compared with CNN-based methods, the proposed method achieves highly competitive results on both synthetic and real-world video deblurring benchmarks, including DVD, GOPRO, REDS and BSD. We hope such a Transformer-based architecture can serve as a powerful alternative baseline for video deblurring and other video restoration tasks. The source code will be available at \url{https://github.com/ljzycmd/VDTR}.
abstract_zh: 由于时空建模过程具有挑战性，视频去模糊仍然是一个未解决的问题。虽然现有的基于卷积神经网络的方法在视频去模糊的有效空间和时间建模方面表现出有限的能力。本文提出了 VDTR，一种基于 Transformer 的有效模型，首次尝试采用 Transformer 进行视频去模糊。 VDTR 利用 Transformer 卓越的远程和关系建模功能进行空间和时间建模。然而，由于复杂的非均匀模糊、多帧之间的错位以及高分辨率空间建模的高计算成本，设计合适的基于 Transformer 的视频去模糊模型具有挑战性。为了解决这些问题，VDTR 提倡在不重叠的窗口内进行关注，并利用分层结构进行远程依赖建模。对于帧级空间建模，我们提出了一种编码器-解码器 Transformer，它利用多尺度特征进行去模糊。对于多帧时间建模，我们采用 Transformer 来有效地融合多个空间特征。与基于 CNN 的方法相比，所提出的方法在合成和现实世界视频去模糊基准（包括 DVD、GOPRO、REDS 和 BSD）上都取得了极具竞争力的结果。我们希望这种基于 Transformer 的架构能够作为视频去模糊和其他视频恢复任务的强大替代基线。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ljzycmd/VDTR} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VDTR，一种基于Transformer的视频去模糊模型，旨在解决现有卷积神经网络在时空建模上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN方法在视频去模糊任务中难以有效建模复杂的时空关系，而Transformer在长距离依赖建模方面具有优势，因此需要设计适合视频去模糊的Transformer架构。
AI.method: VDTR通过非重叠窗口内注意力机制和分层结构处理长距离依赖，采用编码器-解码器Transformer进行帧级空间建模，并适配Transformer融合多帧空间特征以实现时序建模。
AI.result: 在DVD、GOPRO、REDS和BSD等合成与真实视频去模糊基准测试中，VDTR相较CNN方法取得具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: VDTR为视频去模糊及其它视频修复任务提供了高效的Transformer基线模型，源代码已开源。

search_text: VDTR: Video Deblurring with Transformer VDTR：使用 Transformer 进行视频去模糊 Video deblurring is still an unsolved problem due to the challenging spatio-temporal modeling process. While existing convolutional neural network-based methods show a limited capacity for effective spatial and temporal modeling for video deblurring. This paper presents VDTR, an effective Transformer-based model that makes the first attempt to adapt Transformer for video deblurring. VDTR exploits the superior long-range and relation modeling capabilities of Transformer for both spatial and temporal modeling. However, it is challenging to design an appropriate Transformer-based model for video deblurring due to the complicated non-uniform blurs, misalignment across multiple frames and the high computational costs for high-resolution spatial modeling. To address these problems, VDTR advocates performing attention within non-overlapping windows and exploiting the hierarchical structure for long-range dependencies modeling. For frame-level spatial modeling, we propose an encoder-decoder Transformer that utilizes multi-scale features for deblurring. For multi-frame temporal modeling, we adapt Transformer to fuse multiple spatial features efficiently. Compared with CNN-based methods, the proposed method achieves highly competitive results on both synthetic and real-world video deblurring benchmarks, including DVD, GOPRO, REDS and BSD. We hope such a Transformer-based architecture can serve as a powerful alternative baseline for video deblurring and other video restoration tasks. The source code will be available at \url{https://github.com/ljzycmd/VDTR}. 由于时空建模过程具有挑战性，视频去模糊仍然是一个未解决的问题。虽然现有的基于卷积神经网络的方法在视频去模糊的有效空间和时间建模方面表现出有限的能力。本文提出了 VDTR，一种基于 Transformer 的有效模型，首次尝试采用 Transformer 进行视频去模糊。 VDTR 利用 Transformer 卓越的远程和关系建模功能进行空间和时间建模。然而，由于复杂的非均匀模糊、多帧之间的错位以及高分辨率空间建模的高计算成本，设计合适的基于 Transformer 的视频去模糊模型具有挑战性。为了解决这些问题，VDTR 提倡在不重叠的窗口内进行关注，并利用分层结构进行远程依赖建模。对于帧级空间建模，我们提出了一种编码器-解码器 Transformer，它利用多尺度特征进行去模糊。对于多帧时间建模，我们采用 Transformer 来有效地融合多个空间特征。与基于 CNN 的方法相比，所提出的方法在合成和现实世界视频去模糊基准（包括 DVD、GOPRO、REDS 和 BSD）上都取得了极具竞争力的结果。我们希望这种基于 Transformer 的架构能够作为视频去模糊和其他视频恢复任务的强大替代基线。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/ljzycmd/VDTR} 获取。 本文提出VDTR，一种基于Transformer的视频去模糊模型，旨在解决现有卷积神经网络在时空建模上的不足。 Mingdeng Cao,Yanbo Fan,Yong Zhang,Jue Wang,Yujiu Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Navid Abapour,Mohsen Ebadpour
title: PiouCrypt: Decentralized Lattice-based Method for Visual Symmetric Cryptography
title_zh: PiouCrypt：基于分散格的视觉对称密码学方法
comment: 21 pages, 23 figures, for accessing source code, see https://bitbucket.org/my_piou/pioucrypt
comments: 21 pages, 23 figures, for accessing source code, see https://bitbucket.org/my_piou/pioucrypt
abstract: In recent years, establishing secure visual communications has turned into one of the essential problems for security engineers and researchers. However, only limited novel solutions are provided for image encryption, and limiting the visual cryptography to only limited schemes can bring up negative consequences, especially with emerging quantum computational systems. This paper presents a novel algorithm for establishing secure private visual communication. The proposed method has a layered architecture with several cohesive components, and corresponded with an NP-hard problem, despite its symmetric structure. This two-step technique is not limited to gray-scale pictures, and furthermore, utilizing a lattice structure causes to proposed method has optimal resistance for the post-quantum era, and is relatively secure from the theoretical dimension.
summary: In recent years, establishing secure visual communications has turned into one of the essential problems for security engineers and researchers. However, only limited novel solutions are provided for image encryption, and limiting the visual cryptography to only limited schemes can bring up negative consequences, especially with emerging quantum computational systems. The proposed method has a layered architecture with several cohesive components, and corresponded with an NP-hard problem, despite its symmetric structure. This two-step technique is not limited to gray-scale pictures, and furthermore, utilizing a lattice structure causes to proposed method has optimal resistance for the post-quantum era, and is relatively secure from the theoretical dimension.
abstract_zh: 近年来，建立安全的视觉通信已成为安全工程师和研究人员面临的重要问题之一。然而，仅为图像加密提供了有限的新颖解决方案，并且将视觉密码学限制为仅限有限的方案可能会带来负面后果，尤其是对于新兴的量子计算系统。本文提出了一种用于建立安全私人视觉通信的新颖算法。所提出的方法具有具有多个内聚组件的分层架构，并且尽管其结构对称，但仍对应于 NP 困难问题。这种两步技术不仅限于灰度图片，而且利用晶格结构使得所提出的方法对于后量子时代具有最佳的抵抗力，并且从理论维度上相对安全。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于格结构的去中心化视觉对称加密方法PiouCrypt，以应对后量子计算时代的安全挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉加密方案有限且难以应对量子计算带来的安全威胁，亟需新型抗量子攻击的图像加密技术。
AI.method: 采用分层架构结合NP难问题，通过两步加密流程处理灰度图像，利用格结构实现理论上的后量子安全性。
AI.result: 该方法在理论层面展现了对后量子计算的最优抗性，且具备相对较高的安全性保障。
AI.conclusion: PiouCrypt为视觉加密提供了新的解决方案，其格结构设计有效应对了量子计算带来的安全风险。

authors_text: Dina Pisarevskaya,Tatiana Shavrina
title: WikiOmnia: generative QA corpus on the whole Russian Wikipedia
title_zh: WikiOmnia：整个俄语维基百科的生成式问答语料库
abstract: The General QA field has been developing the methodology referencing the Stanford Question answering dataset (SQuAD) as the significant benchmark. However, compiling factual questions is accompanied by time- and labour-consuming annotation, limiting the training data's potential size. We present the WikiOmnia dataset, a new publicly available set of QA-pairs and corresponding Russian Wikipedia article summary sections, composed with a fully automated generative pipeline. The dataset includes every available article from Wikipedia for the Russian language. The WikiOmnia pipeline is available open-source and is also tested for creating SQuAD-formatted QA on other domains, like news texts, fiction, and social media. The resulting dataset includes two parts: raw data on the whole Russian Wikipedia (7,930,873 QA pairs with paragraphs for ruGPT-3 XL and 7,991,040 QA pairs with paragraphs for ruT5-large) and cleaned data with strict automatic verification (over 160,000 QA pairs with paragraphs for ruGPT-3 XL and over 3,400,000 QA pairs with paragraphs for ruT5-large).
summary: The General QA field has been developing the methodology referencing the Stanford Question answering dataset (SQuAD) as the significant benchmark. However, compiling factual questions is accompanied by time- and labour-consuming annotation, limiting the training data's potential size. We present the WikiOmnia dataset, a new publicly available set of QA-pairs and corresponding Russian Wikipedia article summary sections, composed with a fully automated generative pipeline. The dataset includes every available article from Wikipedia for the Russian language. The WikiOmnia pipeline is available open-source and is also tested for creating SQuAD-formatted QA on other domains, like news texts, fiction, and social media. The resulting dataset includes two parts: raw data on the whole Russian Wikipedia (7,930,873 QA pairs with paragraphs for ruGPT-3 XL and 7,991,040 QA pairs with paragraphs for ruT5-large) and cleaned data with strict automatic verification (over 160,000 QA pairs with paragraphs for ruGPT-3 XL and over 3,400,000 QA pairs with paragraphs for ruT5-large).
abstract_zh: 通用 QA 领域一直在开发参考斯坦福问答数据集 (SQuAD) 作为重要基准的方法。然而，编译事实问题伴随着耗时和费力的注释，限制了训练数据的潜在大小。我们展示了 WikiOmnia 数据集，这是一组新的公开可用的 QA 对和相应的俄语维基百科文章摘要部分，由完全自动化的生成管道组成。该数据集包括维基百科中所有可用的俄语文章。 WikiOmnia 管道是开源的，并且还经过测试，可以在其他领域（例如新闻文本、小说和社交媒体）创建 SQuAD 格式的 QA。生成的数据集包括两部分：整个俄语维基百科的原始数据（7,930,873 个带有 ruGPT-3 XL 段落的 QA 对和 7,991,040 个带有 ruT5-large 段落的 QA 对）和经过严格自动验证的清理数据（超过 160,000 个带有 ruGPT-3 XL 段落的 QA 对和超过 3,400,000 个带有段落的 QA 对）对于 ruT5-大）。

AI.tldr: 构建一个基于整个俄语维基百科的生成式问答语料库
AI.motivation: 传统问答数据集依赖人工标注导致效率低下且规模受限，需自动化方法生成大规模训练数据
AI.method: 采用全自动生成流水线，基于维基百科文章生成问答对，并进行自动验证
AI.result: 生成790万原始QA对和清洗后160万高质量QA对，覆盖新闻、小说等多领域
AI.conclusion: 为俄语NLP任务提供大规模基准数据，验证了生成流水线在多领域的可扩展性

authors_text: Ekansh Chauhan,Swathi Guptha,Likith Reddy,Bapi Raju
title: LRH-Net: A Multi-Level Knowledge Distillation Approach for Low-Resource Heart Network
title_zh: LRH-Net：低资源心脏网络的多层次知识蒸馏方法
abstract: An electrocardiogram (ECG) monitors the electrical activity generated by the heart and is used to detect fatal cardiovascular diseases (CVDs). Conventionally, to capture the precise electrical activity, clinical experts use multiple-lead ECGs (typically 12 leads). But in recent times, large-size deep learning models have been used to detect these diseases. However, such models require heavy compute resources like huge memory and long inference time. To alleviate these shortcomings, we propose a low-parameter model, named Low Resource Heart-Network (LRH-Net), which uses fewer leads to detect ECG anomalies in a resource-constrained environment. A multi-level knowledge distillation process is used on top of that to get better generalization performance on our proposed model. The multi-level knowledge distillation process distills the knowledge to LRH-Net trained on a reduced number of leads from higher parameter (teacher) models trained on multiple leads to reduce the performance gap. The proposed model is evaluated on the PhysioNet-2020 challenge dataset with constrained input. The parameters of the LRH-Net are 106x less than our teacher model for detecting CVDs. The performance of the LRH-Net was scaled up to 3.2% and the inference time scaled down by 75% compared to the teacher model. In contrast to the compute- and parameter-intensive deep learning techniques, the proposed methodology uses a subset of ECG leads using the low resource LRH-Net, making it eminently suitable for deployment on edge devices.
summary: An electrocardiogram (ECG) monitors the electrical activity generated by the heart and is used to detect fatal cardiovascular diseases (CVDs). Conventionally, to capture the precise electrical activity, clinical experts use multiple-lead ECGs (typically 12 leads). But in recent times, large-size deep learning models have been used to detect these diseases. However, such models require heavy compute resources like huge memory and long inference time. To alleviate these shortcomings, we propose a low-parameter model, named Low Resource Heart-Network (LRH-Net), which uses fewer leads to detect ECG anomalies in a resource-constrained environment. A multi-level knowledge distillation process is used on top of that to get better generalization performance on our proposed model. The multi-level knowledge distillation process distills the knowledge to LRH-Net trained on a reduced number of leads from higher parameter (teacher) models trained on multiple leads to reduce the performance gap. The proposed model is evaluated on the PhysioNet-2020 challenge dataset with constrained input. The parameters of the LRH-Net are 106x less than our teacher model for detecting CVDs. The performance of the LRH-Net was scaled up to 3.2% and the inference time scaled down by 75% compared to the teacher model. In contrast to the compute- and parameter-intensive deep learning techniques, the proposed methodology uses a subset of ECG leads using the low resource LRH-Net, making it eminently suitable for deployment on edge devices.
abstract_zh: 心电图 (ECG) 监测心脏产生的电活动，用于检测致命的心血管疾病 (CVD)。传统上，为了捕获精确的电活动，临床专家使用多导联心电图（通常为 12 导联）。但近年来，大型深度学习模型已被用来检测这些疾病。然而，此类模型需要大量的计算资源，例如巨大的内存和较长的推理时间。为了缓解这些缺点，我们提出了一种低参数模型，称为低资源心脏网络（LRH-Net），该模型使用更少的导联在资源有限的环境中检测心电图异常。在此基础上使用多级知识蒸馏过程，以便在我们提出的模型上获得更好的泛化性能。多级知识提炼过程将知识从在多个线索上训练的较高参数（教师）模型中提炼到在减少数量的线索上训练的 LRH-Net，以缩小性能差距。所提出的模型在输入受限的 PhysioNet-2020 挑战数据集上进行评估。 LRH-Net 的参数比我们用于检测 CVD 的教师模型小 106 倍。与教师模型相比，LRH-Net 的性能提高了 3.2%，推理时间缩短了 75%。与计算和参数密集型深度学习技术相比，所提出的方法使用低资源 LRH-Net 的 ECG 导联子集，使其非常适合在边缘设备上部署。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为LRH-Net的低资源心电图异常检测模型，通过多级知识蒸馏技术减少参数量并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多导联心电图检测模型计算资源消耗大，难以部署于边缘设备，需开发轻量化模型以满足资源受限环境需求。
AI.method: 基于知识蒸馏框架，从多导联大模型中提取知识并迁移至少导联轻量模型LRH-Net，采用多级蒸馏策略优化模型泛化能力。
AI.result: LRH-Net参数量仅为教师模型的1/106，在PhysioNet-2020数据集上性能提升3.2%，推理速度加快75%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过知识蒸馏有效缩小模型性能差距，证明LRH-Net在边缘设备部署中的高效性与实用性。

search_text: LRH-Net: A Multi-Level Knowledge Distillation Approach for Low-Resource Heart Network LRH-Net：低资源心脏网络的多层次知识蒸馏方法 An electrocardiogram (ECG) monitors the electrical activity generated by the heart and is used to detect fatal cardiovascular diseases (CVDs). Conventionally, to capture the precise electrical activity, clinical experts use multiple-lead ECGs (typically 12 leads). But in recent times, large-size deep learning models have been used to detect these diseases. However, such models require heavy compute resources like huge memory and long inference time. To alleviate these shortcomings, we propose a low-parameter model, named Low Resource Heart-Network (LRH-Net), which uses fewer leads to detect ECG anomalies in a resource-constrained environment. A multi-level knowledge distillation process is used on top of that to get better generalization performance on our proposed model. The multi-level knowledge distillation process distills the knowledge to LRH-Net trained on a reduced number of leads from higher parameter (teacher) models trained on multiple leads to reduce the performance gap. The proposed model is evaluated on the PhysioNet-2020 challenge dataset with constrained input. The parameters of the LRH-Net are 106x less than our teacher model for detecting CVDs. The performance of the LRH-Net was scaled up to 3.2% and the inference time scaled down by 75% compared to the teacher model. In contrast to the compute- and parameter-intensive deep learning techniques, the proposed methodology uses a subset of ECG leads using the low resource LRH-Net, making it eminently suitable for deployment on edge devices. 心电图 (ECG) 监测心脏产生的电活动，用于检测致命的心血管疾病 (CVD)。传统上，为了捕获精确的电活动，临床专家使用多导联心电图（通常为 12 导联）。但近年来，大型深度学习模型已被用来检测这些疾病。然而，此类模型需要大量的计算资源，例如巨大的内存和较长的推理时间。为了缓解这些缺点，我们提出了一种低参数模型，称为低资源心脏网络（LRH-Net），该模型使用更少的导联在资源有限的环境中检测心电图异常。在此基础上使用多级知识蒸馏过程，以便在我们提出的模型上获得更好的泛化性能。多级知识提炼过程将知识从在多个线索上训练的较高参数（教师）模型中提炼到在减少数量的线索上训练的 LRH-Net，以缩小性能差距。所提出的模型在输入受限的 PhysioNet-2020 挑战数据集上进行评估。 LRH-Net 的参数比我们用于检测 CVD 的教师模型小 106 倍。与教师模型相比，LRH-Net 的性能提高了 3.2%，推理时间缩短了 75%。与计算和参数密集型深度学习技术相比，所提出的方法使用低资源 LRH-Net 的 ECG 导联子集，使其非常适合在边缘设备上部署。 本文提出一种名为LRH-Net的低资源心电图异常检测模型，通过多级知识蒸馏技术减少参数量并提升性能。 Ekansh Chauhan,Swathi Guptha,Likith Reddy,Bapi Raju physics.med-ph,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Cunxiang Wang,Fuli Luo,Yanyang Li,Runxin Xu,Fei Huang,Yue Zhang
title: Knowledgeable Salient Span Mask for Enhancing Language Models as Knowledge Base
title_zh: 用于增强作为知识库的语言模型的知识丰富的显着跨度掩模
abstract: Pre-trained language models (PLMs) like BERT have made significant progress in various downstream NLP tasks. However, by asking models to do cloze-style tests, recent work finds that PLMs are short in acquiring knowledge from unstructured text. To understand the internal behaviour of PLMs in retrieving knowledge, we first define knowledge-baring (K-B) tokens and knowledge-free (K-F) tokens for unstructured text and ask professional annotators to label some samples manually. Then, we find that PLMs are more likely to give wrong predictions on K-B tokens and attend less attention to those tokens inside the self-attention module. Based on these observations, we develop two solutions to help the model learn more knowledge from unstructured text in a fully self-supervised manner. Experiments on knowledge-intensive tasks show the effectiveness of the proposed methods. To our best knowledge, we are the first to explore fully self-supervised learning of knowledge in continual pre-training.
summary: Pre-trained language models (PLMs) like BERT have made significant progress in various downstream NLP tasks. However, by asking models to do cloze-style tests, recent work finds that PLMs are short in acquiring knowledge from unstructured text. To understand the internal behaviour of PLMs in retrieving knowledge, we first define knowledge-baring (K-B) tokens and knowledge-free (K-F) tokens for unstructured text and ask professional annotators to label some samples manually. Then, we find that PLMs are more likely to give wrong predictions on K-B tokens and attend less attention to those tokens inside the self-attention module. Based on these observations, we develop two solutions to help the model learn more knowledge from unstructured text in a fully self-supervised manner. Experiments on knowledge-intensive tasks show the effectiveness of the proposed methods. To our best knowledge, we are the first to explore fully self-supervised learning of knowledge in continual pre-training.
abstract_zh: BERT 等预训练语言模型 (PLM) 在各种下游 NLP 任务中取得了重大进展。然而，通过要求模型进行完形填空式测试，最近的研究发现 PLM 在从非结构化文本中获取知识方面存在不足。为了理解 PLM 在检索知识方面的内部行为，我们首先为非结构化文本定义知识裸露（K-B）标记和知识自由（K-F）标记，并要求专业注释者手动标记一些样本。然后，我们发现 PLM 更有可能对 K-B 令牌给出错误的预测，并且较少关注自注意力模块内的这些令牌。基于这些观察，我们开发了两种解决方案来帮助模型以完全自我监督的方式从非结构化文本中学习更多知识。知识密集型任务的实验表明了所提出方法的有效性。据我们所知，我们是第一个在持续预训练中探索完全自我监督的知识学习的人。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Knowledgeable Salient Span Mask的方法，旨在通过改进语言模型的自监督学习机制，使其更有效地从非结构化文本中获取知识并作为知识库使用。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练语言模型（PLMs）在多项任务中表现优异，但现有研究发现其在从非结构化文本中提取知识时存在缺陷，表现为对关键知识标记（K-B tokens）的预测错误率较高且注意力分配不足。
AI.method: 通过人工标注定义知识承载（K-B）和知识无关（K-F）标记，分析模型在K-B标记上的表现缺陷，进而提出两种完全自监督的解决方案：1）设计针对性的掩码策略强化知识学习；2）优化自注意力机制以增强对K-B标记的关注度。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在知识密集型任务中显著提升了模型性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次在持续预训练框架中探索完全自监督的知识学习，为增强语言模型作为知识库的能力提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sha Lu,Xuecheng Xu,Huan Yin,Zexi Chen,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang
title: One RING to Rule Them All: Radon Sinogram for Place Recognition, Orientation and Translation Estimation
title_zh: 一环主宰一切：氡正弦图用于位置识别、定向和平移估计
comment: Paper accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: Paper accepted at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: LiDAR-based global localization is a fundamental problem for mobile robots. It consists of two stages, place recognition and pose estimation, which yields the current orientation and translation, using only the current scan as query and a database of map scans. Inspired by the definition of a recognized place, we consider that a good global localization solution should keep the pose estimation accuracy with a lower place density. Following this idea, we propose a novel framework towards sparse place-based global localization, which utilizes a unified and learning-free representation, Radon sinogram (RING), for all sub-tasks. Based on the theoretical derivation, a translation invariant descriptor and an orientation invariant metric are proposed for place recognition, achieving certifiable robustness against arbitrary orientation and large translation between query and map scan. In addition, we also utilize the property of RING to propose a global convergent solver for both orientation and translation estimation, arriving at global localization. Evaluation of the proposed RING based framework validates the feasibility and demonstrates a superior performance even under a lower place density.
summary: LiDAR-based global localization is a fundamental problem for mobile robots. It consists of two stages, place recognition and pose estimation, which yields the current orientation and translation, using only the current scan as query and a database of map scans. Inspired by the definition of a recognized place, we consider that a good global localization solution should keep the pose estimation accuracy with a lower place density. Following this idea, we propose a novel framework towards sparse place-based global localization, which utilizes a unified and learning-free representation, Radon sinogram (RING), for all sub-tasks. Based on the theoretical derivation, a translation invariant descriptor and an orientation invariant metric are proposed for place recognition, achieving certifiable robustness against arbitrary orientation and large translation between query and map scan. In addition, we also utilize the property of RING to propose a global convergent solver for both orientation and translation estimation, arriving at global localization. Evaluation of the proposed RING based framework validates the feasibility and demonstrates a superior performance even under a lower place density.
abstract_zh: 基于激光雷达的全球定位是移动机器人的一个基本问题。它由位置识别和姿态估计两个阶段组成，仅使用当前扫描作为查询和地图扫描数据库来生成当前方向和平移。受识别地点定义的启发，我们认为良好的全局定位解决方案应该以较低的地点密度保持姿态估计的准确性。遵循这个想法，我们提出了一种基于稀疏位置的全局定位的新颖框架，该框架对所有子任务使用统一且无需学习的表示形式氡正弦图（RING）。基于理论推导，提出了用于地点识别的平移不变描述符和方向不变度量，实现了针对任意方向以及查询和地图扫描之间的大平移的可证明的鲁棒性。此外，我们还利用 RING 的特性提出了一种用于方向和平移估计的全局收敛求解器，从而实现全局定位。对所提出的基于 RING 的框架的评估验证了可行性，并展示了即使在较低的位置密度下也具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Radon正弦图（RING）的框架，用于LiDAR全局定位中的地点识别、方向和位移估计。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在稀疏地点密度下定位精度下降，需设计一种无需学习且鲁棒的全局定位方案。
AI.method: 利用RING的理论特性，提出平移不变描述子和方向不变度量，结合全局收敛求解器实现稀疏场景下的定位。
AI.result: 实验验证了RING框架在低密度场景下的有效性，表现出优于现有方法的鲁棒性与精度。
AI.conclusion: RING框架通过统一表示和理论推导，为稀疏环境下的全局定位提供了高效且无需学习的解决方案。

search_text: One RING to Rule Them All: Radon Sinogram for Place Recognition, Orientation and Translation Estimation 一环主宰一切：氡正弦图用于位置识别、定向和平移估计 LiDAR-based global localization is a fundamental problem for mobile robots. It consists of two stages, place recognition and pose estimation, which yields the current orientation and translation, using only the current scan as query and a database of map scans. Inspired by the definition of a recognized place, we consider that a good global localization solution should keep the pose estimation accuracy with a lower place density. Following this idea, we propose a novel framework towards sparse place-based global localization, which utilizes a unified and learning-free representation, Radon sinogram (RING), for all sub-tasks. Based on the theoretical derivation, a translation invariant descriptor and an orientation invariant metric are proposed for place recognition, achieving certifiable robustness against arbitrary orientation and large translation between query and map scan. In addition, we also utilize the property of RING to propose a global convergent solver for both orientation and translation estimation, arriving at global localization. Evaluation of the proposed RING based framework validates the feasibility and demonstrates a superior performance even under a lower place density. 基于激光雷达的全球定位是移动机器人的一个基本问题。它由位置识别和姿态估计两个阶段组成，仅使用当前扫描作为查询和地图扫描数据库来生成当前方向和平移。受识别地点定义的启发，我们认为良好的全局定位解决方案应该以较低的地点密度保持姿态估计的准确性。遵循这个想法，我们提出了一种基于稀疏位置的全局定位的新颖框架，该框架对所有子任务使用统一且无需学习的表示形式氡正弦图（RING）。基于理论推导，提出了用于地点识别的平移不变描述符和方向不变度量，实现了针对任意方向以及查询和地图扫描之间的大平移的可证明的鲁棒性。此外，我们还利用 RING 的特性提出了一种用于方向和平移估计的全局收敛求解器，从而实现全局定位。对所提出的基于 RING 的框架的评估验证了可行性，并展示了即使在较低的位置密度下也具有优越的性能。 本文提出了一种基于Radon正弦图（RING）的框架，用于LiDAR全局定位中的地点识别、方向和位移估计。 Sha Lu,Xuecheng Xu,Huan Yin,Zexi Chen,Rong Xiong,Yue Wang cs.RO

authors_text: Zhichao Liu,Liyue Qian,Wenke Jing,Desen Zhou,Xuming He,Edmond Lou,Rui Zheng
title: Automatic spinal curvature measurement on ultrasound spine images using Faster R-CNN
title_zh: 使用 Faster R-CNN 对超声脊柱图像进行自动脊柱曲率测量
abstract: Ultrasound spine imaging technique has been applied to the assessment of spine deformity. However, manual measurements of scoliotic angles on ultrasound images are time-consuming and heavily rely on raters experience. The objectives of this study are to construct a fully automatic framework based on Faster R-CNN for detecting vertebral lamina and to measure the fitting spinal curves from the detected lamina pairs. The framework consisted of two closely linked modules: 1) the lamina detector for identifying and locating each lamina pairs on ultrasound coronal images, and 2) the spinal curvature estimator for calculating the scoliotic angles based on the chain of detected lamina. Two hundred ultrasound images obtained from AIS patients were identified and used for the training and evaluation of the proposed method. The experimental results showed the 0.76 AP on the test set, and the Mean Absolute Difference (MAD) between automatic and manual measurement which was within the clinical acceptance error. Meanwhile the correlation between automatic measurement and Cobb angle from radiographs was 0.79. The results revealed that our proposed technique could provide accurate and reliable automatic curvature measurements on ultrasound spine images for spine deformities.
summary: Ultrasound spine imaging technique has been applied to the assessment of spine deformity. However, manual measurements of scoliotic angles on ultrasound images are time-consuming and heavily rely on raters experience. The objectives of this study are to construct a fully automatic framework based on Faster R-CNN for detecting vertebral lamina and to measure the fitting spinal curves from the detected lamina pairs. The framework consisted of two closely linked modules: 1) the lamina detector for identifying and locating each lamina pairs on ultrasound coronal images, and 2) the spinal curvature estimator for calculating the scoliotic angles based on the chain of detected lamina. Two hundred ultrasound images obtained from AIS patients were identified and used for the training and evaluation of the proposed method. The experimental results showed the 0.76 AP on the test set, and the Mean Absolute Difference (MAD) between automatic and manual measurement which was within the clinical acceptance error. Meanwhile the correlation between automatic measurement and Cobb angle from radiographs was 0.79. The results revealed that our proposed technique could provide accurate and reliable automatic curvature measurements on ultrasound spine images for spine deformities.
abstract_zh: 超声脊柱成像技术已应用于脊柱畸形的评估。然而，手动测量超声图像上的脊柱侧凸角度非常耗时，并且严重依赖于评估者的经验。本研究的目的是构建一个基于 Faster R-CNN 的全自动框架，用于检测椎板，并根据检测到的椎板对测量拟合脊柱曲线。该框架由两个紧密相连的模块组成：1）椎板检测器，用于在超声冠状图像上识别和定位每个椎板对；2）脊柱曲率估计器，用于根据检测到的椎板链计算脊柱侧凸角度。识别了从 AIS 患者获得的 200 幅超声图像，并将其用于所提出方法的训练和评估。实验结果显示，测试集上的AP为0.76，自动测量与手动测量之间的平均绝对差（MAD）在临床可接受误差范围内。同时自动测量与射线照片Cobb角之间的相关性为0.79。结果表明，我们提出的技术可以为脊柱畸形的超声脊柱图像提供准确可靠的自动曲率测量。

AI.tldr: 本研究提出基于Faster R-CNN的全自动框架，用于超声脊柱图像中脊柱曲度的自动测量。
AI.motivation: 传统超声脊柱图像手动测量脊柱侧弯角度耗时且依赖操作者经验，亟需自动化解决方案提高效率和一致性。
AI.method: 构建包含两个模块的框架：1）使用Faster R-CNN检测超声冠状位图像中的椎板对；2）基于检测到的椎板链估算脊柱曲率。
AI.result: 测试集达到0.76 AP值，自动测量与人工测量的平均绝对误差在临床可接受范围内，与X光Cobb角相关性达0.79。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可提供准确可靠的超声脊柱曲度自动测量，适用于脊柱畸形的临床评估。

authors_text: Daniel Bogdoll,Maximilian Nitsche,J. Marius Zöllner
title: Anomaly Detection in Autonomous Driving: A Survey
title_zh: 自动驾驶中的异常检测：调查
comment: Daniel Bogdoll and Maximilian Nitsche contributed equally. Accepted for publication at CVPR 2022 WAD workshop
comments: Daniel Bogdoll and Maximilian Nitsche contributed equally. Accepted for publication at CVPR 2022 WAD workshop
abstract: Nowadays, there are outstanding strides towards a future with autonomous vehicles on our roads. While the perception of autonomous vehicles performs well under closed-set conditions, they still struggle to handle the unexpected. This survey provides an extensive overview of anomaly detection techniques based on camera, lidar, radar, multimodal and abstract object level data. We provide a systematization including detection approach, corner case level, ability for an online application, and further attributes. We outline the state-of-the-art and point out current research gaps.
summary: Nowadays, there are outstanding strides towards a future with autonomous vehicles on our roads. While the perception of autonomous vehicles performs well under closed-set conditions, they still struggle to handle the unexpected. This survey provides an extensive overview of anomaly detection techniques based on camera, lidar, radar, multimodal and abstract object level data. We provide a systematization including detection approach, corner case level, ability for an online application, and further attributes. We outline the state-of-the-art and point out current research gaps.
abstract_zh: 如今，自动驾驶汽车在我们道路上的未来已经取得了显着的进步。尽管自动驾驶汽车的感知在封闭条件下表现良好，但它们仍然难以应对意外情况。这项调查对基于摄像头、激光雷达、雷达、多模态和抽象对象级数据的异常检测技术进行了广泛的概述。我们提供系统化，包括检测方法、极端案例级别、在线应用程序的能力以及其他属性。我们概述了最先进的技术并指出了当前的研究差距。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了自动驾驶中的异常检测技术，系统分类并分析了不同方法及研究空白。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在复杂环境中需应对意外情况，现有感知系统在开放场景下存在局限，亟需有效异常检测方法。
AI.method: 通过系统化分类，从检测方法、边缘情况级别、在线应用能力等维度对现有异常检测技术进行梳理与比较。
AI.result: 总结了基于多传感器及多模态数据的异常检测技术现状，明确了当前研究在实时性、泛化能力等方面存在的不足。
AI.conclusion: 异常检测对提升自动驾驶安全性至关重要，未来需在跨模态融合、在线学习等方向进一步突破。

authors_text: Antonio Tavera,Edoardo Arnaudo,Carlo Masone,Barbara Caputo
title: Augmentation Invariance and Adaptive Sampling in Semantic Segmentation of Agricultural Aerial Images
title_zh: 农业航空图像语义分割中的增强不变性和自适应采样
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the problem of Semantic Segmentation for agricultural aerial imagery. We observe that the existing methods used for this task are designed without considering two characteristics of the aerial data: (i) the top-down perspective implies that the model cannot rely on a fixed semantic structure of the scene, because the same scene may be experienced with different rotations of the sensor; (ii) there can be a strong imbalance in the distribution of semantic classes because the relevant objects of the scene may appear at extremely different scales (e.g., a field of crops and a small vehicle). We propose a solution to these problems based on two ideas: (i) we use together a set of suitable augmentation and a consistency loss to guide the model to learn semantic representations that are invariant to the photometric and geometric shifts typical of the top-down perspective (Augmentation Invariance); (ii) we use a sampling method (Adaptive Sampling) that selects the training images based on a measure of pixel-wise distribution of classes and actual network confidence. With an extensive set of experiments conducted on the Agriculture-Vision dataset, we demonstrate that our proposed strategies improve the performance of the current state-of-the-art method.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the problem of Semantic Segmentation for agricultural aerial imagery. We observe that the existing methods used for this task are designed without considering two characteristics of the aerial data: (i) the top-down perspective implies that the model cannot rely on a fixed semantic structure of the scene, because the same scene may be experienced with different rotations of the sensor; (ii) there can be a strong imbalance in the distribution of semantic classes because the relevant objects of the scene may appear at extremely different scales (e.g., a field of crops and a small vehicle). We propose a solution to these problems based on two ideas: (i) we use together a set of suitable augmentation and a consistency loss to guide the model to learn semantic representations that are invariant to the photometric and geometric shifts typical of the top-down perspective (Augmentation Invariance); (ii) we use a sampling method (Adaptive Sampling) that selects the training images based on a measure of pixel-wise distribution of classes and actual network confidence. With an extensive set of experiments conducted on the Agriculture-Vision dataset, we demonstrate that our proposed strategies improve the performance of the current state-of-the-art method.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了农业航空图像的语义分割问题。我们观察到，用于此任务的现有方法的设计没有考虑航空数据的两个特征：（i）自上而下的视角意味着模型不能依赖于场景的固定语义结构，因为传感器的不同旋转可能会经历相同的场景； (ii) 语义类别的分布可能存在严重不平衡，因为场景的相关对象可能以极其不同的尺度出现（例如，一片庄稼地和一辆小型车辆）。我们基于两个想法提出了这些问题的解决方案：（i）我们一起使用一组合适的增强和一致性损失来指导模型学习语义表示，这些语义表示对于自上而下视角中典型的光度和几何变化保持不变（增强不变性）； (ii) 我们使用采样方法（自适应采样），根据类的像素分布和实际网络置信度的度量来选择训练图像。通过在农业视觉数据集上进行的大量实验，我们证明了我们提出的策略提高了当前最先进方法的性能。

AI.motivation: 现有语义分割方法未充分考虑航拍图像的视角变化特性及类别分布不平衡问题，导致模型鲁棒性和性能不足。

AI.result: 在Agriculture-Vision数据集上的实验表明，所提策略提升了现有最先进方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 增强不变性与自适应采样有效应对航拍图像视角变化和类别不平衡问题，显著提升语义分割性能。

search_text: Augmentation Invariance and Adaptive Sampling in Semantic Segmentation of Agricultural Aerial Images 农业航空图像语义分割中的增强不变性和自适应采样 In this paper, we investigate the problem of Semantic Segmentation for agricultural aerial imagery. We observe that the existing methods used for this task are designed without considering two characteristics of the aerial data: (i) the top-down perspective implies that the model cannot rely on a fixed semantic structure of the scene, because the same scene may be experienced with different rotations of the sensor; (ii) there can be a strong imbalance in the distribution of semantic classes because the relevant objects of the scene may appear at extremely different scales (e.g., a field of crops and a small vehicle). We propose a solution to these problems based on two ideas: (i) we use together a set of suitable augmentation and a consistency loss to guide the model to learn semantic representations that are invariant to the photometric and geometric shifts typical of the top-down perspective (Augmentation Invariance); (ii) we use a sampling method (Adaptive Sampling) that selects the training images based on a measure of pixel-wise distribution of classes and actual network confidence. With an extensive set of experiments conducted on the Agriculture-Vision dataset, we demonstrate that our proposed strategies improve the performance of the current state-of-the-art method. 在本文中，我们研究了农业航空图像的语义分割问题。我们观察到，用于此任务的现有方法的设计没有考虑航空数据的两个特征：（i）自上而下的视角意味着模型不能依赖于场景的固定语义结构，因为传感器的不同旋转可能会经历相同的场景； (ii) 语义类别的分布可能存在严重不平衡，因为场景的相关对象可能以极其不同的尺度出现（例如，一片庄稼地和一辆小型车辆）。我们基于两个想法提出了这些问题的解决方案：（i）我们一起使用一组合适的增强和一致性损失来指导模型学习语义表示，这些语义表示对于自上而下视角中典型的光度和几何变化保持不变（增强不变性）； (ii) 我们使用采样方法（自适应采样），根据类的像素分布和实际网络置信度的度量来选择训练图像。通过在农业视觉数据集上进行的大量实验，我们证明了我们提出的策略提高了当前最先进方法的性能。 本文研究农业航拍图像语义分割问题，针对俯视视角下的旋转变化和类别分布不平衡问题，提出增强不变性与自适应采样方法。 Antonio Tavera,Edoardo Arnaudo,Carlo Masone,Barbara Caputo cs.CV

authors_text: Jiaxi Wu,Jiaxin Chen,Di Huang
title: Entropy-based Active Learning for Object Detection with Progressive Diversity Constraint
title_zh: 具有渐进多样性约束的基于熵的主动学习目标检测
abstract: Active learning is a promising alternative to alleviate the issue of high annotation cost in the computer vision tasks by consciously selecting more informative samples to label. Active learning for object detection is more challenging and existing efforts on it are relatively rare. In this paper, we propose a novel hybrid approach to address this problem, where the instance-level uncertainty and diversity are jointly considered in a bottom-up manner. To balance the computational complexity, the proposed approach is designed as a two-stage procedure. At the first stage, an Entropy-based Non-Maximum Suppression (ENMS) is presented to estimate the uncertainty of every image, which performs NMS according to the entropy in the feature space to remove predictions with redundant information gains. At the second stage, a diverse prototype (DivProto) strategy is explored to ensure the diversity across images by progressively converting it into the intra-class and inter-class diversities of the entropy-based class-specific prototypes. Extensive experiments are conducted on MS COCO and Pascal VOC, and the proposed approach achieves state of the art results and significantly outperforms the other counterparts, highlighting its superiority.
summary: Active learning is a promising alternative to alleviate the issue of high annotation cost in the computer vision tasks by consciously selecting more informative samples to label. Active learning for object detection is more challenging and existing efforts on it are relatively rare. In this paper, we propose a novel hybrid approach to address this problem, where the instance-level uncertainty and diversity are jointly considered in a bottom-up manner. To balance the computational complexity, the proposed approach is designed as a two-stage procedure. At the first stage, an Entropy-based Non-Maximum Suppression (ENMS) is presented to estimate the uncertainty of every image, which performs NMS according to the entropy in the feature space to remove predictions with redundant information gains. At the second stage, a diverse prototype (DivProto) strategy is explored to ensure the diversity across images by progressively converting it into the intra-class and inter-class diversities of the entropy-based class-specific prototypes. Extensive experiments are conducted on MS COCO and Pascal VOC, and the proposed approach achieves state of the art results and significantly outperforms the other counterparts, highlighting its superiority.
abstract_zh: 主动学习是一种有前途的替代方案，可以通过有意识地选择更多信息样本进行标记来缓解计算机视觉任务中高注释成本的问题。目标检测的主动学习更具挑战性，现有的努力相对较少。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的混合方法来解决这个问题，其中实例级的不确定性和多样性以自下而上的方式共同考虑。为了平衡计算复杂性，所提出的方法被设计为两阶段过程。第一阶段，提出一种基于熵的非极大值抑制（ENMS）来估计每幅图像的不确定性，根据特征空间中的熵进行NMS，以消除具有冗余信息增益的预测。在第二阶段，探索多样化原型（DivProto）策略，通过逐步将其转换为基于熵的特定类原型的类内和类间多样性来确保图像之间的多样性。在 MS COCO 和 Pascal VOC 上进行了大量的实验，所提出的方法取得了最先进的结果，并且显着优于其他同行，凸显了其优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合实例级不确定性和多样性的主动学习方法，用于改进目标检测任务中的样本选择策略。
AI.motivation: 目标检测的主动学习面临样本选择效率低、多样性不足的问题，现有方法难以平衡不确定性与多样性约束。
AI.method: 设计两阶段框架：第一阶段通过熵值引导的非极大值抑制（ENMS）筛选高不确定性的图像；第二阶段利用渐进式多样性约束（DivProto）策略，将图像级多样性转化为类内/类间原型的熵约束。
AI.result: 在MS COCO和Pascal VOC数据集上达到SOTA性能，相比现有方法在标注效率和检测精度上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过有效结合不确定性度量与多样性约束，为资源受限场景下的目标检测提供了更优的主动学习解决方案。

authors_text: Jiaxi Wu,Jiaxin Chen,Mengzhe He,Yiru Wang,Bo Li,Bingqi Ma,Weihao Gan,Wei Wu,Yali Wang,Di Huang
title: Target-Relevant Knowledge Preservation for Multi-Source Domain Adaptive Object Detection
title_zh: 多源域自适应目标检测的目标相关知识保存
abstract: Domain adaptive object detection (DAOD) is a promising way to alleviate performance drop of detectors in new scenes. Albeit great effort made in single source domain adaptation, a more generalized task with multiple source domains remains not being well explored, due to knowledge degradation during their combination. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach, namely target-relevant knowledge preservation (TRKP), to unsupervised multi-source DAOD. Specifically, TRKP adopts the teacher-student framework, where the multi-head teacher network is built to extract knowledge from labeled source domains and guide the student network to learn detectors in unlabeled target domain. The teacher network is further equipped with an adversarial multi-source disentanglement (AMSD) module to preserve source domain-specific knowledge and simultaneously perform cross-domain alignment. Besides, a holistic target-relevant mining (HTRM) scheme is developed to re-weight the source images according to the source-target relevance. By this means, the teacher network is enforced to capture target-relevant knowledge, thus benefiting decreasing domain shift when mentoring object detection in the target domain. Extensive experiments are conducted on various widely used benchmarks with new state-of-the-art scores reported, highlighting the effectiveness.
summary: Domain adaptive object detection (DAOD) is a promising way to alleviate performance drop of detectors in new scenes. Albeit great effort made in single source domain adaptation, a more generalized task with multiple source domains remains not being well explored, due to knowledge degradation during their combination. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach, namely target-relevant knowledge preservation (TRKP), to unsupervised multi-source DAOD. Specifically, TRKP adopts the teacher-student framework, where the multi-head teacher network is built to extract knowledge from labeled source domains and guide the student network to learn detectors in unlabeled target domain. The teacher network is further equipped with an adversarial multi-source disentanglement (AMSD) module to preserve source domain-specific knowledge and simultaneously perform cross-domain alignment. Besides, a holistic target-relevant mining (HTRM) scheme is developed to re-weight the source images according to the source-target relevance. By this means, the teacher network is enforced to capture target-relevant knowledge, thus benefiting decreasing domain shift when mentoring object detection in the target domain. Extensive experiments are conducted on various widely used benchmarks with new state-of-the-art scores reported, highlighting the effectiveness.
abstract_zh: 域自适应目标检测（DAOD）是缓解新场景中检测器性能下降的一种有前途的方法。尽管在单源域适应方面做出了巨大努力，但由于组合过程中的知识退化，具有多个源域的更通用的任务仍未得到很好的探索。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的方法，即目标相关知识保存（TRKP），用于无监督的多源 DAOD。具体来说，TRKP采用师生框架，建立多头教师网络来从标记的源域中提取知识，并指导学生网络学习未标记的目标域中的检测器。教师网络还配备了对抗性多源解缠（AMSD）模块，以保留源域特定知识并同时执行跨域对齐。此外，还开发了整体目标相关挖掘（HTRM）方案，根据源目标相关性对源图像重新加权。通过这种方式，教师网络被强制捕获与目标相关的知识，从而有利于在指导目标域中的对象检测时减少域转移。对各种广泛使用的基准进行了广泛的实验，报告了新的最先进的分数，突出了有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多源领域自适应目标检测方法，通过保持目标相关知识解决多源领域结合时的知识退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单源领域自适应方法在处理多源领域时，因知识融合过程中的退化现象导致检测性能下降，亟需更有效的多源知识保持策略。
AI.method: 基于教师-学生框架，设计多头教师网络提取源领域知识，并引入对抗性多源解耦模块（AMSD）和整体目标相关挖掘（HTRM）方案，通过源-目标相关性加权提升目标领域检测能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实现新状态-of-the-art性能，验证了方法在减少领域偏移和提升检测精度方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: TRKP方法通过结构化知识保持机制，有效解决了多源领域自适应目标检测中的知识退化问题，为跨领域检测提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种多源领域自适应目标检测方法，通过保持目标相关知识解决多源领域结合时的知识退化问题。
ai_content.motivation: 现有单源领域自适应方法在处理多源领域时，因知识融合过程中的退化现象导致检测性能下降，亟需更有效的多源知识保持策略。
ai_content.method: 基于教师-学生框架，设计多头教师网络提取源领域知识，并引入对抗性多源解耦模块（AMSD）和整体目标相关挖掘（HTRM）方案，通过源-目标相关性加权提升目标领域检测能力。
ai_content.result: 在多个基准数据集上实现新状态-of-the-art性能，验证了方法在减少领域偏移和提升检测精度方面的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: TRKP方法通过结构化知识保持机制，有效解决了多源领域自适应目标检测中的知识退化问题，为跨领域检测提供了新思路。

search_text: Target-Relevant Knowledge Preservation for Multi-Source Domain Adaptive Object Detection 多源域自适应目标检测的目标相关知识保存 Domain adaptive object detection (DAOD) is a promising way to alleviate performance drop of detectors in new scenes. Albeit great effort made in single source domain adaptation, a more generalized task with multiple source domains remains not being well explored, due to knowledge degradation during their combination. To address this issue, we propose a novel approach, namely target-relevant knowledge preservation (TRKP), to unsupervised multi-source DAOD. Specifically, TRKP adopts the teacher-student framework, where the multi-head teacher network is built to extract knowledge from labeled source domains and guide the student network to learn detectors in unlabeled target domain. The teacher network is further equipped with an adversarial multi-source disentanglement (AMSD) module to preserve source domain-specific knowledge and simultaneously perform cross-domain alignment. Besides, a holistic target-relevant mining (HTRM) scheme is developed to re-weight the source images according to the source-target relevance. By this means, the teacher network is enforced to capture target-relevant knowledge, thus benefiting decreasing domain shift when mentoring object detection in the target domain. Extensive experiments are conducted on various widely used benchmarks with new state-of-the-art scores reported, highlighting the effectiveness. 域自适应目标检测（DAOD）是缓解新场景中检测器性能下降的一种有前途的方法。尽管在单源域适应方面做出了巨大努力，但由于组合过程中的知识退化，具有多个源域的更通用的任务仍未得到很好的探索。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的方法，即目标相关知识保存（TRKP），用于无监督的多源 DAOD。具体来说，TRKP采用师生框架，建立多头教师网络来从标记的源域中提取知识，并指导学生网络学习未标记的目标域中的检测器。教师网络还配备了对抗性多源解缠（AMSD）模块，以保留源域特定知识并同时执行跨域对齐。此外，还开发了整体目标相关挖掘（HTRM）方案，根据源目标相关性对源图像重新加权。通过这种方式，教师网络被强制捕获与目标相关的知识，从而有利于在指导目标域中的对象检测时减少域转移。对各种广泛使用的基准进行了广泛的实验，报告了新的最先进的分数，突出了有效性。 本文提出一种多源领域自适应目标检测方法，通过保持目标相关知识解决多源领域结合时的知识退化问题。 Jiaxi Wu,Jiaxin Chen,Mengzhe He,Yiru Wang,Bo Li,Bingqi Ma,Weihao Gan,Wei Wu,Yali Wang,Di Huang cs.CV

authors_text: Haote Xu,Yunlong Zhang,Liyan Sun,Chenxin Li,Yue Huang,Xinghao Ding
title: AFSC: Adaptive Fourier Space Compression for Anomaly Detection
title_zh: AFSC：用于异常检测的自适应傅立叶空间压缩
abstract: Anomaly Detection (AD) on medical images enables a model to recognize any type of anomaly pattern without lesion-specific supervised learning. Data augmentation based methods construct pseudo-healthy images by "pasting" fake lesions on real healthy ones, and a network is trained to predict healthy images in a supervised manner. The lesion can be found by difference between the unhealthy input and pseudo-healthy output. However, using only manually designed fake lesions fail to approximate to irregular real lesions, hence limiting the model generalization. We assume by exploring the intrinsic data property within images, we can distinguish previously unseen lesions from healthy regions in an unhealthy image. In this study, we propose an Adaptive Fourier Space Compression (AFSC) module to distill healthy feature for AD. The compression of both magnitude and phase in frequency domain addresses the hyper intensity and diverse position of lesions. Experimental results on the BraTS and MS-SEG datasets demonstrate an AFSC baseline is able to produce promising detection results, and an AFSC module can be effectively embedded into existing AD methods.
summary: Anomaly Detection (AD) on medical images enables a model to recognize any type of anomaly pattern without lesion-specific supervised learning. Data augmentation based methods construct pseudo-healthy images by "pasting" fake lesions on real healthy ones, and a network is trained to predict healthy images in a supervised manner. The lesion can be found by difference between the unhealthy input and pseudo-healthy output. However, using only manually designed fake lesions fail to approximate to irregular real lesions, hence limiting the model generalization. We assume by exploring the intrinsic data property within images, we can distinguish previously unseen lesions from healthy regions in an unhealthy image. In this study, we propose an Adaptive Fourier Space Compression (AFSC) module to distill healthy feature for AD. The compression of both magnitude and phase in frequency domain addresses the hyper intensity and diverse position of lesions. Experimental results on the BraTS and MS-SEG datasets demonstrate an AFSC baseline is able to produce promising detection results, and an AFSC module can be effectively embedded into existing AD methods.
abstract_zh: 医学图像上的异常检测 (AD) 使模型能够识别任何类型的异常模式，而无需针对特定病变的监督学习。基于数据增强的方法通过将假病变“粘贴”在真实健康图像上来构建伪健康图像，并训练网络以监督方式预测健康图像。通过不健康输入和伪健康输出之间的差异可以发现病变。然而，仅使用手动设计的假病变无法近似不规则的真实病变，因此限制了模型的泛化。我们假设通过探索图像中的内在数据属性，我们可以将以前未见过的病变与不健康图像中的健康区域区分开来。在本研究中，我们提出了一种自适应傅里叶空间压缩（AFSC）模块来提取 AD 的健康特征。频域中幅度和相位的压缩解决了病变的高强度和不同位置。 BraTS 和 MS-SEG 数据集上的实验结果表明 AFSC 基线能够产生有希望的检测结果，并且 AFSC 模块可以有效地嵌入到现有的 AD 方法中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自适应傅里叶空间压缩（AFSC）模块，用于医学图像的无监督异常检测，通过频域特征压缩区分健康与病变区域。
AI.motivation: 现有数据增强方法依赖手动设计的假病变生成伪健康图像，难以模拟真实病变的不规则性和多样性，导致模型泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 设计AFSC模块，在频域中同时压缩幅度和相位信息，提取健康特征以应对病变的高亮强度和位置多样性，并可嵌入现有AD方法中。
AI.result: 在BraTS和MS-SEG数据集上验证，AFSC基线模型取得有竞争力的检测效果，且模块能有效提升现有方法性能。
AI.conclusion: AFSC通过频域自适应压缩机制有效捕捉健康特征，为无监督医学图像异常检测提供了通用且高效的解决方案。
