search_text: MST++: Multi-stage Spectral-wise Transformer for Efficient Spectral Reconstruction MST++：用于高效频谱重建的多级频谱变换器 Existing leading methods for spectral reconstruction (SR) focus on designing deeper or wider convolutional neural networks (CNNs) to learn the end-to-end mapping from the RGB image to its hyperspectral image (HSI). These CNN-based methods achieve impressive restoration performance while showing limitations in capturing the long-range dependencies and self-similarity prior. To cope with this problem, we propose a novel Transformer-based method, Multi-stage Spectral-wise Transformer (MST++), for efficient spectral reconstruction. In particular, we employ Spectral-wise Multi-head Self-attention (S-MSA) that is based on the HSI spatially sparse while spectrally self-similar nature to compose the basic unit, Spectral-wise Attention Block (SAB). Then SABs build up Single-stage Spectral-wise Transformer (SST) that exploits a U-shaped structure to extract multi-resolution contextual information. Finally, our MST++, cascaded by several SSTs, progressively improves the reconstruction quality from coarse to fine. Comprehensive experiments show that our MST++ significantly outperforms other state-of-the-art methods. In the NTIRE 2022 Spectral Reconstruction Challenge, our approach won the First place. Code and pre-trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/caiyuanhao1998/MST-plus-plus. 现有领先的光谱重建 (SR) 方法侧重于设计更深或更宽的卷积神经网络 (CNN)，以学习从 RGB 图像到高光谱图像 (HSI) 的端到端映射。这些基于 CNN 的方法实现了令人印象深刻的恢复性能，同时在捕获长程依赖性和自相似性先验方面显示出局限性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的基于 Transformer 的方法，即多级 Spectral-wise Transformer (MST++)，用于高效的谱重建。特别是，我们采用基于 HSI 空间稀疏而频谱自相似性质的频谱多头自注意力（S-MSA）来组成基本单元，频谱明智注意块（SAB）。然后，SAB 构建单级频谱变换器 (SST)，利用 U 形结构来提取多分辨率上下文信息。最后，我们的 MST++ 由多个 SST 级联而成，从粗略到精细逐步提高重建质量。综合实验表明，我们的 MST++ 显着优于其他最先进的方法。在 NTIRE 2022 光谱重建挑战赛中，我们的方法获得了第一名。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/caiyuanhao1998/MST-plus-plus 上公开获取。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的多阶段光谱感知模型MST++，用于高效的光谱重建。 Yuanhao Cai,Jing Lin,Zudi Lin,Haoqian Wang,Yulun Zhang,Hanspeter Pfister,Radu Timofte,Luc Van Gool cs.CV

authors_text: Damian G. Kelty-Stephen,Madhur Mangalam
title: Turing's cascade instability supports the coordination of the mind, brain, and behavior
title_zh: 图灵的级联不稳定性支持思想、大脑和行为的协调
abstract: Turing inspired a computer metaphor of the mind and brain that has been handy and has spawned decades of empirical investigation, but he did much more and offered behavioral and cognitive sciences another metaphor--that of the cascade. The time has come to confront Turing's cascading instability, which suggests a geometrical framework driven by power laws and can be studied using multifractal formalism and multiscale probability density function analysis. Here, we review a rapidly growing body of scientific investigations revealing signatures of cascade instability and their consequences for a perceiving, acting, and thinking organism. We review work related to executive functioning (planning to act), postural control (bodily poise for turning plans into action), and effortful perception (action to gather information in a single modality and action to blend multimodal information). We also review findings on neuronal avalanches in the brain, specifically about neural participation in body-wide cascades. Turing's cascade instability blends the mind, brain, and behavior across space and time scales and provides an alternative to the dominant computer metaphor.
summary: Turing inspired a computer metaphor of the mind and brain that has been handy and has spawned decades of empirical investigation, but he did much more and offered behavioral and cognitive sciences another metaphor--that of the cascade. The time has come to confront Turing's cascading instability, which suggests a geometrical framework driven by power laws and can be studied using multifractal formalism and multiscale probability density function analysis. Here, we review a rapidly growing body of scientific investigations revealing signatures of cascade instability and their consequences for a perceiving, acting, and thinking organism. We review work related to executive functioning (planning to act), postural control (bodily poise for turning plans into action), and effortful perception (action to gather information in a single modality and action to blend multimodal information). We also review findings on neuronal avalanches in the brain, specifically about neural participation in body-wide cascades. Turing's cascade instability blends the mind, brain, and behavior across space and time scales and provides an alternative to the dominant computer metaphor.
abstract_zh: 图灵启发了一种关于心灵和大脑的计算机隐喻，这种隐喻很方便，并催生了数十年的实证研究，但他做了更多的事情，并为行为和认知科学提供了另一个隐喻——级联隐喻。现在是时候面对图灵的级联不稳定性了，它提出了一个由幂律驱动的几何框架，并且可以使用多重分形形式主义和多尺度概率密度函数分析来研究。在这里，我们回顾了快速增长的科学研究，揭示了级联不稳定性的特征及其对感知、行动和思维有机体的影响。我们回顾与执行功能（计划采取行动）、姿势控制（将计划转化为行动的身体平衡）和努力感知（以单一模式收集信息的行动和混合多模式信息的行动）相关的工作。我们还回顾了大脑中神经元雪崩的发现，特别是关于神经参与全身级联的发现。图灵的级联不稳定性将思想、大脑和跨空间和时间尺度的行为融合在一起，并为占主导地位的计算机隐喻提供了替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了图灵级联不稳定性在协调心智、大脑和行为中的作用，提出其作为替代计算机隐喻的几何框架。
AI.motivation: 传统计算机隐喻无法充分解释大脑的复杂动态，需通过图灵级联不稳定性探索跨时空尺度的协调机制。
AI.method: 通过多分形形式主义和多尺度概率密度函数分析，综述执行功能、姿势控制、感知及神经元雪崩等领域的实证研究。
AI.result: 发现级联不稳定性在计划执行、身体平衡、信息整合及全身心神经活动中的显著特征，揭示其跨尺度整合机制。
AI.conclusion: 图灵级联不稳定性为心智、大脑与行为的统一提供了新范式，需超越传统计算机隐喻以理解复杂系统动态。

authors_text: Naba Rizvi,Khalil Mrini
title: Using HCI to Tackle Race and Gender Bias in ADHD Diagnosis
title_zh: 使用 HCI 解决 ADHD 诊断中的种族和性别偏见
abstract: Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) is a behavioral disorder that impacts an individual's education, relationships, career, and ability to acquire fair and just police interrogations. Yet, traditional methods used to diagnose ADHD in children and adults are known to have racial and gender bias. In recent years, diagnostic technology has been studied by both HCI and ML researchers. However, these studies fail to take into consideration racial and gender stereotypes that may impact the accuracy of their results. We highlight the importance of taking race and gender into consideration when creating diagnostic technology for ADHD and provide HCI researchers with suggestions for future studies.
summary: Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) is a behavioral disorder that impacts an individual's education, relationships, career, and ability to acquire fair and just police interrogations. Yet, traditional methods used to diagnose ADHD in children and adults are known to have racial and gender bias. In recent years, diagnostic technology has been studied by both HCI and ML researchers. However, these studies fail to take into consideration racial and gender stereotypes that may impact the accuracy of their results. We highlight the importance of taking race and gender into consideration when creating diagnostic technology for ADHD and provide HCI researchers with suggestions for future studies.
abstract_zh: 注意力缺陷多动障碍 (ADHD) 是一种行为障碍，会影响个人的教育、人际关系、职业以及接受公平公正的警察审讯的能力。然而，众所周知，用于诊断儿童和成人多动症的传统方法存在种族和性别偏见。近年来，人机交互和机器学习研究人员都在研究诊断技术。然而，这些研究未能考虑到可能影响其结果准确性的种族和性别刻板印象。我们强调在创建 ADHD 诊断技术时考虑种族和性别的重要性，并为 HCI 研究人员提供未来研究的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何利用人机交互（HCI）方法解决ADHD诊断中的种族和性别偏见问题，并为未来研究提供方向。
AI.motivation: 传统ADHD诊断方法存在种族和性别偏见，而现有HCI与机器学习研究未充分考虑这些因素对诊断结果的影响，导致公平性不足。
AI.method: 通过文献综述与案例分析，指出当前诊断技术的不足，并提出HCI研究者需在设计阶段纳入种族和性别因素的建议。
AI.result: 强调种族和性别偏见对ADHD诊断准确性的影响，为HCI领域未来研究提供减少偏见的技术设计框架。
AI.conclusion: 未来ADHD诊断技术需整合HCI与机器学习方法，系统性消除种族和性别偏见，以提升诊断公平性与可靠性。

We highlight the importance of taking race and gender into consideration when creating diagnostic technology for ADHD and provide HCI researchers with suggestions for future studies. 注意力缺陷多动障碍 (ADHD) 是一种行为障碍，会影响个人的教育、人际关系、职业以及接受公平公正的警察审讯的能力。然而，众所周知，用于诊断儿童和成人多动症的传统方法存在种族和性别偏见。近年来，人机交互和机器学习研究人员都在研究诊断技术。然而，这些研究未能考虑到可能影响其结果准确性的种族和性别刻板印象。我们强调在创建 ADHD 诊断技术时考虑种族和性别的重要性，并为 HCI 研究人员提供未来研究的建议。 本文探讨如何利用人机交互（HCI）方法解决ADHD诊断中的种族和性别偏见问题，并为未来研究提供方向。 Naba Rizvi,Khalil Mrini cs.HC

authors_text: Naba Rizvi,Reggie Casanova-Perez,Harshini Ramaswamy,Emily Bascom,Lisa Dirks,Nadir Weibel
title: QTBIPOC PD: Exploring the Intersections of Race, Gender, and Sexual Orientation in Participatory Design
title_zh: QTBIPOC PD：探索参与式设计中种族、性别和性取向的交叉点
abstract: As Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) research aims to be inclusive and representative of many marginalized identities, there is still a lack of available literature and research on intersectional considerations of race, gender, and sexual orientation, especially when it comes to participatory design. We aim to create a space to generate community recommendations for effectively and appropriately engaging Queer, Transgender, Black, Indigenous, People of Color (QTBIPOC) populations in participatory design, and discuss methods of dissemination for recommendations. Workshop participants will engage with critical race theory, queer theory, and feminist theory to reflect on current exclusionary HCI and participatory design methods and practices.
summary: As Human-Computer Interaction (HCI) research aims to be inclusive and representative of many marginalized identities, there is still a lack of available literature and research on intersectional considerations of race, gender, and sexual orientation, especially when it comes to participatory design. We aim to create a space to generate community recommendations for effectively and appropriately engaging Queer, Transgender, Black, Indigenous, People of Color (QTBIPOC) populations in participatory design, and discuss methods of dissemination for recommendations. Workshop participants will engage with critical race theory, queer theory, and feminist theory to reflect on current exclusionary HCI and participatory design methods and practices.
abstract_zh: 由于人机交互（HCI）研究旨在包容并代表许多边缘化身份，因此仍然缺乏关于种族、性别和性取向交叉考虑的可用文献和研究，特别是在参与式设计方面。我们的目标是创建一个空间来生成社区建议，以便有效且适当地让酷儿、跨性别者、黑人、土著、有色人种 (QTBIPOC) 人群参与参与式设计，并讨论建议的传播方法。研讨会参与者将利用批判种族理论、酷儿理论和女权主义理论来反思当前排他性的人机交互和参与式设计方法和实践。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探索在参与式设计中，针对酷儿、跨性别、黑人、原住民及有色人种（QTBIPOC）群体，种族、性别和性取向的交叉性问题，并提出社区参与建议。
AI.motivation: 当前人机交互（HCI）研究虽追求包容性，但缺乏针对QTBIPOC群体的交叉性考虑，导致参与式设计方法存在排他性。
AI.method: 通过工作坊形式，结合批判种族理论、酷儿理论和女性主义理论，分析现有设计方法的不足并生成社区推荐方案。
AI.result: 提出了针对QTBIPOC群体的参与式设计改进策略，并探讨了推荐方案的传播方法。
AI.conclusion: 交叉性视角对设计实践至关重要，需通过理论结合社区参与来优化包容性设计方法。

authors_text: Naba Rizvi,Harshini Ramaswamy,Reggie Casanova-Perez,Andrea Hartzler,Nadir Weibel
title: Making Hidden Bias Visible: Designing a Feedback Ecosystem for Primary Care Providers
title_zh: 让隐藏的偏见变得可见：为初级保健提供者设计反馈生态系统
comment: 6 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, CHI 2022 Workshop Publication (Complex Health Ecosystems)
comments: 6 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables, CHI 2022 Workshop Publication (Complex Health Ecosystems)
abstract: Implicit bias may perpetuate healthcare disparities for marginalized patient populations. Such bias is expressed in communication between patients and their providers. We design an ecosystem with guidance from providers to make this bias explicit in patient-provider communication. Our end users are providers seeking to improve their quality of care for patients who are Black, Indigenous, People of Color (BIPOC) and/or Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender, and Queer (LGBTQ). We present wireframes displaying communication metrics that negatively impact patient-centered care divided into the following categories: digital nudge, dashboard, and guided reflection. Our wireframes provide quantitative, real-time, and conversational feedback promoting provider reflection on their interactions with patients. This is the first design iteration toward the development of a tool to raise providers' awareness of their own implicit biases.
summary: Implicit bias may perpetuate healthcare disparities for marginalized patient populations. Such bias is expressed in communication between patients and their providers. We design an ecosystem with guidance from providers to make this bias explicit in patient-provider communication. Our end users are providers seeking to improve their quality of care for patients who are Black, Indigenous, People of Color (BIPOC) and/or Lesbian, Gay, Bisexual, Transgender, and Queer (LGBTQ). We present wireframes displaying communication metrics that negatively impact patient-centered care divided into the following categories: digital nudge, dashboard, and guided reflection. Our wireframes provide quantitative, real-time, and conversational feedback promoting provider reflection on their interactions with patients. This is the first design iteration toward the development of a tool to raise providers' awareness of their own implicit biases.
abstract_zh: 隐性偏见可能会导致边缘化患者群体的医疗保健差异长期存在。这种偏见体现在患者与其提供者之间的沟通中。我们在提供者的指导下设计了一个生态系统，以使这种偏见在患者与提供者的沟通中明确化。我们的最终用户是寻求提高黑人、原住民、有色人种 (BIPOC) 和/或女同性恋、男同性恋、双性恋、跨性别者和酷儿 (LGBTQ) 患者护理质量的提供商。我们展示的线框图显示了对以患者为中心的护理产生负面影响的沟通指标，分为以下几类：数字助推、仪表板和引导反思。我们的线框图提供定量、实时和对话式反馈，促进提供者反思他们与患者的互动。这是旨在开发工具的第一次设计迭代，以提高提供商对其自身隐性偏见的认识。

AI.tldr: 设计一个反馈生态系统，帮助初级护理提供者识别和减少与BIPOC及LGBTQ患者交流中的隐性偏见。
AI.motivation: 隐性偏见可能导致医疗资源分配不均，损害边缘化群体的医疗体验，需通过工具提升提供者自我反思能力。
AI.method: 基于提供者需求设计三类反馈工具：数字提示、实时仪表板及引导反思线框图，通过量化沟通数据促进偏见意识。
AI.result: 完成工具首版原型，展示如何通过可视化指标与互动反馈帮助提供者识别潜在偏见，但尚未验证实际效果。
AI.conclusion: 该生态系统为减少医疗偏见提供可行路径，后续需结合真实场景迭代优化工具有效性。

authors_text: Rajat Modi,Aayush Jung Rana,Akash Kumar,Praveen Tirupattur,Shruti Vyas,Yogesh Singh Rawat,Mubarak Shah
title: Video Action Detection: Analysing Limitations and Challenges
title_zh: 视频动作检测：分析局限性和挑战
abstract: Beyond possessing large enough size to feed data hungry machines (eg, transformers), what attributes measure the quality of a dataset? Assuming that the definitions of such attributes do exist, how do we quantify among their relative existences? Our work attempts to explore these questions for video action detection. The task aims to spatio-temporally localize an actor and assign a relevant action class. We first analyze the existing datasets on video action detection and discuss their limitations. Next, we propose a new dataset, Multi Actor Multi Action (MAMA) which overcomes these limitations and is more suitable for real world applications. In addition, we perform a biasness study which analyzes a key property differentiating videos from static images: the temporal aspect. This reveals if the actions in these datasets really need the motion information of an actor, or whether they predict the occurrence of an action even by looking at a single frame. Finally, we investigate the widely held assumptions on the importance of temporal ordering: is temporal ordering important for detecting these actions? Such extreme experiments show existence of biases which have managed to creep into existing methods inspite of careful modeling.
summary: Beyond possessing large enough size to feed data hungry machines (eg, transformers), what attributes measure the quality of a dataset? Assuming that the definitions of such attributes do exist, how do we quantify among their relative existences? Our work attempts to explore these questions for video action detection. The task aims to spatio-temporally localize an actor and assign a relevant action class. We first analyze the existing datasets on video action detection and discuss their limitations. Next, we propose a new dataset, Multi Actor Multi Action (MAMA) which overcomes these limitations and is more suitable for real world applications. In addition, we perform a biasness study which analyzes a key property differentiating videos from static images: the temporal aspect. This reveals if the actions in these datasets really need the motion information of an actor, or whether they predict the occurrence of an action even by looking at a single frame. Finally, we investigate the widely held assumptions on the importance of temporal ordering: is temporal ordering important for detecting these actions? Such extreme experiments show existence of biases which have managed to creep into existing methods inspite of careful modeling.
abstract_zh: 除了拥有足够大的大小来满足需要数据的机器（例如，变压器）之外，还有哪些属性可以衡量数据集的质量？假设这些属性的定义确实存在，我们如何量化它们的相对存在？我们的工作试图探索视频动作检测的这些问题。该任务旨在时空定位参与者并分配相关的动作类。我们首先分析现有的视频动作检测数据集并讨论它们的局限性。接下来，我们提出了一个新的数据集，多参与者多动作（MAMA），它克服了这些限制，更适合现实世界的应用。此外，我们还进行了一项偏差研究，分析了区分视频与静态图像的关键属性：时间方面。这揭示了这些数据集中的动作是否确实需要演员的运动信息，或者它们是否甚至通过查看单个帧来预测动作的发生。最后，我们研究了关于时间排序重要性的广泛假设：时间排序对于检测这些动作重要吗？这种极端的实验表明存在偏差，尽管经过了仔细的建模，但这些偏差已经渗透到现有的方法中。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了视频动作检测数据集的局限性，并提出新的多演员多动作数据集MAMA以改进现实应用。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集虽规模足够，但缺乏对质量属性的量化标准，影响模型性能与泛化能力。
AI.method: 分析现有数据集缺陷，构建MAMA数据集；通过偏差研究验证时间因素对动作检测的必要性，并检验时间顺序假设。
AI.result: 发现现有数据集存在对单帧预测的依赖偏差，且时间顺序对动作检测的重要性被高估。
AI.conclusion: 需更注重数据集质量属性设计，并深入分析时间信息在动作检测中的真实作用。

motivation: 现有数据集虽规模足够，但缺乏对质量属性的量化标准，影响模型性能与泛化能力。
method: 分析现有数据集缺陷，构建MAMA数据集；通过偏差研究验证时间因素对动作检测的必要性，并检验时间顺序假设。
result: 发现现有数据集存在对单帧预测的依赖偏差，且时间顺序对动作检测的重要性被高估。
conclusion: 需更注重数据集质量属性设计，并深入分析时间信息在动作检测中的真实作用。
search_text: Video Action Detection: Analysing Limitations and Challenges 视频动作检测：分析局限性和挑战 Beyond possessing large enough size to feed data hungry machines (eg, transformers), what attributes measure the quality of a dataset? Assuming that the definitions of such attributes do exist, how do we quantify among their relative existences? Our work attempts to explore these questions for video action detection. The task aims to spatio-temporally localize an actor and assign a relevant action class. We first analyze the existing datasets on video action detection and discuss their limitations. Next, we propose a new dataset, Multi Actor Multi Action (MAMA) which overcomes these limitations and is more suitable for real world applications. In addition, we perform a biasness study which analyzes a key property differentiating videos from static images: the temporal aspect. This reveals if the actions in these datasets really need the motion information of an actor, or whether they predict the occurrence of an action even by looking at a single frame. Finally, we investigate the widely held assumptions on the importance of temporal ordering: is temporal ordering important for detecting these actions? Such extreme experiments show existence of biases which have managed to creep into existing methods inspite of careful modeling. 除了拥有足够大的大小来满足需要数据的机器（例如，变压器）之外，还有哪些属性可以衡量数据集的质量？假设这些属性的定义确实存在，我们如何量化它们的相对存在？我们的工作试图探索视频动作检测的这些问题。该任务旨在时空定位参与者并分配相关的动作类。我们首先分析现有的视频动作检测数据集并讨论它们的局限性。接下来，我们提出了一个新的数据集，多参与者多动作（MAMA），它克服了这些限制，更适合现实世界的应用。此外，我们还进行了一项偏差研究，分析了区分视频与静态图像的关键属性：时间方面。这揭示了这些数据集中的动作是否确实需要演员的运动信息，或者它们是否甚至通过查看单个帧来预测动作的发生。最后，我们研究了关于时间排序重要性的广泛假设：时间排序对于检测这些动作重要吗？这种极端的实验表明存在偏差，尽管经过了仔细的建模，但这些偏差已经渗透到现有的方法中。 本文分析了视频动作检测数据集的局限性，并提出新的多演员多动作数据集MAMA以改进现实应用。 Rajat Modi,Aayush Jung Rana,Akash Kumar,Praveen Tirupattur,Shruti Vyas,Yogesh Singh Rawat,Mubarak Shah cs.CV

authors_text: Hayk Martiros,Aaron Miller,Nathan Bucki,Bradley Solliday,Ryan Kennedy,Jack Zhu,Tung Dang,Dominic Pattison,Harrison Zheng,Teo Tomic,Peter Henry,Gareth Cross,Josiah VanderMey,Alvin Sun,Samuel Wang,Kristen Holtz
title: SymForce: Symbolic Computation and Code Generation for Robotics
title_zh: SymForce：机器人的符号计算和代码生成
abstract: We present SymForce, a library for fast symbolic computation, code generation, and nonlinear optimization for robotics applications like computer vision, motion planning, and controls. SymForce combines the development speed and flexibility of symbolic math with the performance of autogenerated, highly optimized code in C++ or any target runtime language. SymForce provides geometry and camera types, Lie group operations, and branchless singularity handling for creating and analyzing complex symbolic expressions in Python, built on top of SymPy. Generated functions can be integrated as factors into our tangent-space nonlinear optimizer, which is highly optimized for real-time production use. We introduce novel methods to automatically compute tangent-space Jacobians, eliminating the need for bug-prone handwritten derivatives. This workflow enables faster runtime code, faster development time, and fewer lines of handwritten code versus the state-of-the-art. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach can yield order of magnitude speedups on computational tasks core to robotics. Code is available at https://github.com/symforce-org/symforce.
summary: We present SymForce, a library for fast symbolic computation, code generation, and nonlinear optimization for robotics applications like computer vision, motion planning, and controls. SymForce combines the development speed and flexibility of symbolic math with the performance of autogenerated, highly optimized code in C++ or any target runtime language. SymForce provides geometry and camera types, Lie group operations, and branchless singularity handling for creating and analyzing complex symbolic expressions in Python, built on top of SymPy. Generated functions can be integrated as factors into our tangent-space nonlinear optimizer, which is highly optimized for real-time production use. We introduce novel methods to automatically compute tangent-space Jacobians, eliminating the need for bug-prone handwritten derivatives. This workflow enables faster runtime code, faster development time, and fewer lines of handwritten code versus the state-of-the-art. Our experiments demonstrate that our approach can yield order of magnitude speedups on computational tasks core to robotics. Code is available at https://github.com/symforce-org/symforce.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 SymForce，这是一个用于计算机视觉、运动规划和控制等机器人应用的快速符号计算、代码生成和非线性优化的库。 SymForce 将符号数学的开发速度和灵活性与 C++ 或任何目标运行时语言自动生成、高度优化的代码的性能相结合。 SymForce 提供几何和相机类型、李群运算和无分支奇点处理，用于在 Python 中创建和分析复杂的符号表达式，构建在 SymPy 之上。生成的函数可以作为因子集成到我们的切线空间非线性优化器中，该优化器针对实时生产使用进行了高度优化。我们引入了自动计算切线空间雅可比行列式的新颖方法，从而消除了容易出错的手写导数的需要。与最先进的技术相比，该工作流程可以实现更快的运行时代码、更快的开发时间以及更少的手写代码行。我们的实验表明，我们的方法可以在机器人技术核心计算任务上产生数量级的加速。代码可在 https://github.com/symforce-org/symforce 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为SymForce的库，该库用于机器人应用中的快速符号计算、代码生成和非线性优化。
AI.motivation: 在机器人应用中，符号计算和代码生成通常需要高性能和灵活性，而现有工具难以兼顾这两方面，因此需要一种新的方法。
AI.method: SymForce结合了符号数学的开发速度与灵活性，以及自动生成的高性能C++代码，提供了几何和相机类型、李群运算和无分支奇异处理功能，并引入了自动计算切空间雅可比矩阵的新方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，SymForce的方法在机器人核心计算任务上可实现数量级的速度提升。
AI.conclusion: SymForce为机器人应用提供了一种高效的符号计算和代码生成工具，显著提高了运行时性能和开发效率。

authors_text: Sven Richter,Frank Bieder,Sascha Wirges,Christoph Stiller
title: Mapping LiDAR and Camera Measurements in a Dual Top-View Grid Representation Tailored for Automated Vehicles
title_zh: 在专为自动驾驶汽车定制的双顶视图网格表示中映射 LiDAR 和相机测量
abstract: We present a generic evidential grid mapping pipeline designed for imaging sensors such as LiDARs and cameras. Our grid-based evidential model contains semantic estimates for cell occupancy and ground separately. We specify the estimation steps for input data represented by point sets, but mainly focus on input data represented by images such as disparity maps or LiDAR range images. Instead of relying on an external ground segmentation only, we deduce occupancy evidence by analyzing the surface orientation around measurements. We conduct experiments and evaluate the presented method using LiDAR and stereo camera data recorded in real traffic scenarios. Our method estimates cell occupancy robustly and with a high level of detail while maximizing efficiency and minimizing the dependency to external processing modules.
summary: We present a generic evidential grid mapping pipeline designed for imaging sensors such as LiDARs and cameras. Our grid-based evidential model contains semantic estimates for cell occupancy and ground separately. We specify the estimation steps for input data represented by point sets, but mainly focus on input data represented by images such as disparity maps or LiDAR range images. Instead of relying on an external ground segmentation only, we deduce occupancy evidence by analyzing the surface orientation around measurements. We conduct experiments and evaluate the presented method using LiDAR and stereo camera data recorded in real traffic scenarios. Our method estimates cell occupancy robustly and with a high level of detail while maximizing efficiency and minimizing the dependency to external processing modules.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种专为激光雷达和相机等成像传感器设计的通用证据网格映射管道。我们基于网格的证据模型包含分别对单元占用和地面进行语义估计。我们指定了由点集表示的输入数据的估计步骤，但主要关注由视差图或激光雷达距离图像等图像表示的输入数据。我们不只依赖外部地面分割，而是通过分析测量周围的表面方向来推断占用证据。我们使用在真实交通场景中记录的激光雷达和立体摄像机数据进行实验并评估所提出的方法。我们的方法可以稳健且详细地估计单元占用率，同时最大限度地提高效率并最大限度地减少对外部处理模块的依赖。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于自动驾驶车辆的双顶视图网格映射方法，结合LiDAR和摄像头数据，实现对单元格占用状态和地面的语义估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖外部分割模块处理地面信息，导致效率低下且鲁棒性不足，需开发一种更高效且减少外部依赖的映射方法。
AI.method: 基于网格的证据模型，通过分析测量点周围表面方向推断占用证据，分别估计单元格占用状态与地面信息，并主要处理图像形式的输入数据（如视差图）。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在真实交通场景中能高效、高精度地估计单元格占用状态，同时显著降低对外部处理模块的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为自动驾驶车辆提供了鲁棒且高效的多传感器数据映射方案，适用于复杂动态环境下的实时感知需求。

authors_text: Saira Soomro,Arjumand Bano Soomro,Tarique Bhatti,Yonis Gulzar
title: Gender-Wise Perception of Students Towards Blended Learning in Higher Education: Pakistan
title_zh: 巴基斯坦学生对高等教育混合式学习的性别认知
abstract: Blended learning (BL) is a recent tread among many options that can best fit learners' needs, regardless of time and place. This study aimed to discover students' perceptions of BL and the challenges faced by them while using technology. This quantitative study used data gathered from 300 students enrolled in four public universities in the Sindh province of Pakistan. the finding shows that students were compatible with the use of technology, and it has a positive effect on their academic experience. The study also showed that the use of technology encourages peer collaboration. The challenges found include: neither teacher support nor a training program was provided to the students for the course which needed to shift from a traditional face to face paradigm to a blended format, a lake of space lies with skills in a laboratory assistants for the courses with a blended format and as shortage of high tech computer laboratories / computer units to run these courses. Therefore, it is recommended that the authorities must develop and incorporate a comprehensive mechanism for the effective implementation of BL in the learning teaching-learning process heads of the departments should also provide additional computing infrastructure to their departments.
summary: Blended learning (BL) is a recent tread among many options that can best fit learners' needs, regardless of time and place. This study aimed to discover students' perceptions of BL and the challenges faced by them while using technology. This quantitative study used data gathered from 300 students enrolled in four public universities in the Sindh province of Pakistan. the finding shows that students were compatible with the use of technology, and it has a positive effect on their academic experience. The study also showed that the use of technology encourages peer collaboration. The challenges found include: neither teacher support nor a training program was provided to the students for the course which needed to shift from a traditional face to face paradigm to a blended format, a lake of space lies with skills in a laboratory assistants for the courses with a blended format and as shortage of high tech computer laboratories / computer units to run these courses. Therefore, it is recommended that the authorities must develop and incorporate a comprehensive mechanism for the effective implementation of BL in the learning teaching-learning process heads of the departments should also provide additional computing infrastructure to their departments.
abstract_zh: 混合学习 (BL) 是众多选择中最新出现的一种，它可以最适合学习者的需求，无论时间和地点。本研究旨在了解学生对 BL 的看法以及他们在使用技术时面临的挑战。这项定量研究使用了从巴基斯坦信德省四所公立大学就读的 300 名学生收集的数据。研究结果表明，学生能够接受技术的使用，这对他们的学术经历产生了积极的影响。研究还表明，技术的使用鼓励同行协作。发现的挑战包括：该课程需要从传统的面对面范式转变为混合格式，既没有为学生提供教师支持，也没有提供培训计划，混合格式课程的实验室助理技能空间不足，以及缺乏运行这些课程的高科技计算机实验室/计算机单元。因此，建议当局必须制定并纳入一个全面的机制，以便在学习教学过程中有效实施BL，各部门负责人还应为其部门提供额外的计算基础设施。

AI.tldr: 本研究调查了巴基斯坦高等教育中学生对混合式学习的感知及其面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 混合式学习作为适应学习者需求的新趋势，其在巴基斯坦高等教育中的实施效果及挑战尚未明确，需通过量化研究进行探讨。
AI.method: 通过问卷调查收集巴基斯坦信德省四所公立大学300名学生的数据，采用定量研究方法分析其对混合式学习的感知与技术使用挑战。
AI.result: 学生普遍认可技术对学术体验的积极影响并促进同伴协作，但面临教师支持不足、培训缺失、实验设备短缺及高科技计算机资源不足等挑战。
AI.conclusion: 建议教育管理部门完善混合式学习实施机制，部门负责人需加强计算基础设施建设以支持教学转型。

search_text: Gender-Wise Perception of Students Towards Blended Learning in Higher Education: Pakistan 巴基斯坦学生对高等教育混合式学习的性别认知 Blended learning (BL) is a recent tread among many options that can best fit learners' needs, regardless of time and place. This study aimed to discover students' perceptions of BL and the challenges faced by them while using technology. This quantitative study used data gathered from 300 students enrolled in four public universities in the Sindh province of Pakistan. the finding shows that students were compatible with the use of technology, and it has a positive effect on their academic experience. The study also showed that the use of technology encourages peer collaboration. The challenges found include: neither teacher support nor a training program was provided to the students for the course which needed to shift from a traditional face to face paradigm to a blended format, a lake of space lies with skills in a laboratory assistants for the courses with a blended format and as shortage of high tech computer laboratories / computer units to run these courses. Therefore, it is recommended that the authorities must develop and incorporate a comprehensive mechanism for the effective implementation of BL in the learning teaching-learning process heads of the departments should also provide additional computing infrastructure to their departments. 混合学习 (BL) 是众多选择中最新出现的一种，它可以最适合学习者的需求，无论时间和地点。本研究旨在了解学生对 BL 的看法以及他们在使用技术时面临的挑战。这项定量研究使用了从巴基斯坦信德省四所公立大学就读的 300 名学生收集的数据。研究结果表明，学生能够接受技术的使用，这对他们的学术经历产生了积极的影响。研究还表明，技术的使用鼓励同行协作。发现的挑战包括：该课程需要从传统的面对面范式转变为混合格式，既没有为学生提供教师支持，也没有提供培训计划，混合格式课程的实验室助理技能空间不足，以及缺乏运行这些课程的高科技计算机实验室/计算机单元。因此，建议当局必须制定并纳入一个全面的机制，以便在学习教学过程中有效实施BL，各部门负责人还应为其部门提供额外的计算基础设施。 本研究调查了巴基斯坦高等教育中学生对混合式学习的感知及其面临的挑战。 Saira Soomro,Arjumand Bano Soomro,Tarique Bhatti,Yonis Gulzar cs.HC

authors_text: Yili Ren,Jie Yang
title: 3D Human Pose Estimation for Free-from and Moving Activities Using WiFi
title_zh: 使用 WiFi 进行自由活动和移动活动的 3D 人体姿势估计
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 19th ACM Conference on Embedded Networked Sensor Systems, 2021
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 19th ACM Conference on Embedded Networked Sensor Systems, 2021
abstract: This paper presents GoPose, a 3D skeleton-based human pose estimation system that uses WiFi devices at home. Our system leverages the WiFi signals reflected off the human body for 3D pose estimation. In contrast to prior systems that need specialized hardware or dedicated sensors, our system does not require a user to wear or carry any sensors and can reuse the WiFi devices that already exist in a home environment for mass adoption. To realize such a system, we leverage the 2D AoA spectrum of the signals reflected from the human body and the deep learning techniques. In particular, the 2D AoA spectrum is proposed to locate different parts of the human body as well as to enable environment-independent pose estimation. Deep learning is incorporated to model the complex relationship between the 2D AoA spectrums and the 3D skeletons of the human body for pose tracking. Our evaluation results show GoPose achieves around 4.7cm of accuracy under various scenarios including tracking unseen activities and under NLoS scenarios.
summary: This paper presents GoPose, a 3D skeleton-based human pose estimation system that uses WiFi devices at home. Our system leverages the WiFi signals reflected off the human body for 3D pose estimation. In contrast to prior systems that need specialized hardware or dedicated sensors, our system does not require a user to wear or carry any sensors and can reuse the WiFi devices that already exist in a home environment for mass adoption. To realize such a system, we leverage the 2D AoA spectrum of the signals reflected from the human body and the deep learning techniques. In particular, the 2D AoA spectrum is proposed to locate different parts of the human body as well as to enable environment-independent pose estimation. Deep learning is incorporated to model the complex relationship between the 2D AoA spectrums and the 3D skeletons of the human body for pose tracking. Our evaluation results show GoPose achieves around 4.7cm of accuracy under various scenarios including tracking unseen activities and under NLoS scenarios.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 GoPose，一种基于 3D 骨架的人体姿势估计系统，该系统在家里使用 WiFi 设备。我们的系统利用人体反射的 WiFi 信号进行 3D 姿势估计。与之前需要专门硬件或专用传感器的系统相比，我们的系统不需要用户佩戴或携带任何传感器，并且可以重复使用家庭环境中已有的 WiFi 设备以供大规模采用。为了实现这样的系统，我们利用了人体反射信号的 2D AoA 频谱和深度学习技术。特别是，提出了 2D AoA 频谱来定位人体的不同部位，并实现与环境无关的姿态估计。结合深度学习对 2D AoA 频谱与人体 3D 骨骼之间的复杂关系进行建模，以进行姿势跟踪。我们的评估结果显示，GoPose 在各种场景下（包括跟踪看不见的活动和 NLoS 场景下）实现了约 4.7 厘米的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于3D骨架的人体姿态估计系统GoPose，利用家庭中的WiFi设备进行人体姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有系统需要专用硬件或传感器，而GoPose无需用户佩戴或携带任何传感器，可以复用家庭中的WiFi设备，便于大规模应用。
AI.method: 该系统利用从人体反射的WiFi信号的2D AoA光谱，并结合深度学习技术，建模2D AoA光谱与人体3D骨架之间的复杂关系，以实现姿态跟踪。
AI.result: 评估结果表明，GoPose在各种场景下（包括跟踪未见过的活动和NLoS场景）的精度约为4.7厘米。
AI.conclusion: GoPose提供了一种无需专用硬件的人体姿态估计方法，利用现有WiFi设备实现高精度的3D姿态估计。

authors_text: Deepthi Raghunandan,Zhe Cui,Kartik Krishnan,Segen Tirfe,Shenzhi Shi,Tejaswi Darshan Shrestha,Leilani Battle,Niklas Elmqvist
title: Lodestar: Supporting Independent Learning and Rapid Experimentation Through Data-Driven Analysis Recommendations
title_zh: Lodestar：通过数据驱动的分析建议支持独立学习和快速实验
comment: This paper was presented as part of the workshop called Visualization in Data Science (at ACM KDD and IEEE VIS)
comments: This paper was presented as part of the workshop called Visualization in Data Science (at ACM KDD and IEEE VIS)
abstract: Keeping abreast of current trends, technologies, and best practices in visualization and data analysis is becoming increasingly difficult, especially for fledgling data scientists. In this paper, we propose Lodestar, an interactive computational notebook that allows users to quickly explore and construct new data science workflows by selecting from a list of automated analysis recommendations. We derive our recommendations from directed graphs of known analysis states, with two input sources: one manually curated from online data science tutorials, and another extracted through semi-automatic analysis of a corpus of over 6,000 Jupyter notebooks. We evaluate Lodestar in a formative study guiding our next set of improvements to the tool. Our results suggest that users find Lodestar useful for rapidly creating data science workflows.
summary: Keeping abreast of current trends, technologies, and best practices in visualization and data analysis is becoming increasingly difficult, especially for fledgling data scientists. In this paper, we propose Lodestar, an interactive computational notebook that allows users to quickly explore and construct new data science workflows by selecting from a list of automated analysis recommendations. We derive our recommendations from directed graphs of known analysis states, with two input sources: one manually curated from online data science tutorials, and another extracted through semi-automatic analysis of a corpus of over 6,000 Jupyter notebooks. We evaluate Lodestar in a formative study guiding our next set of improvements to the tool. Our results suggest that users find Lodestar useful for rapidly creating data science workflows.
abstract_zh: 跟上可视化和数据分析领域的当前趋势、技术和最佳实践变得越来越困难，尤其是对于初出茅庐的数据科学家而言。在本文中，我们提出了 Lodestar，一种交互式计算笔记本，允许用户通过从自动分析建议列表中进行选择来快速探索和构建新的数据科学工作流程。我们从已知分析状态的有向图中得出建议，有两个输入源：一个是从在线数据科学教程中手动策划的，另一个是通过对超过 6,000 个 Jupyter 笔记本的语料库进行半自动分析而提取的。我们在一项形成性研究中对 Lodestar 进行了评估，指导我们对该工具的下一步改进。我们的结果表明，用户发现 Lodestar 对于快速创建数据科学工作流程非常有用。

AI.tldr: 提出Lodestar工具，通过数据驱动的分析推荐帮助用户快速构建数据科学工作流。
AI.motivation: 新手数据科学家难以掌握最新技术和最佳实践，需要工具辅助快速构建分析流程。
AI.method: 基于有向图的分析状态，结合手动整理的教程和半自动提取的Jupyter笔记本内容生成推荐。
AI.result: 用户认为Lodestar在快速构建数据科学工作流方面有效。
AI.conclusion: Lodestar通过数据驱动的推荐有效支持了数据科学工作流的快速构建和学习。

search_text: Lodestar: Supporting Independent Learning and Rapid Experimentation Through Data-Driven Analysis Recommendations Lodestar：通过数据驱动的分析建议支持独立学习和快速实验 Keeping abreast of current trends, technologies, and best practices in visualization and data analysis is becoming increasingly difficult, especially for fledgling data scientists. In this paper, we propose Lodestar, an interactive computational notebook that allows users to quickly explore and construct new data science workflows by selecting from a list of automated analysis recommendations. We derive our recommendations from directed graphs of known analysis states, with two input sources: one manually curated from online data science tutorials, and another extracted through semi-automatic analysis of a corpus of over 6,000 Jupyter notebooks. We evaluate Lodestar in a formative study guiding our next set of improvements to the tool. Our results suggest that users find Lodestar useful for rapidly creating data science workflows. 跟上可视化和数据分析领域的当前趋势、技术和最佳实践变得越来越困难，尤其是对于初出茅庐的数据科学家而言。在本文中，我们提出了 Lodestar，一种交互式计算笔记本，允许用户通过从自动分析建议列表中进行选择来快速探索和构建新的数据科学工作流程。我们从已知分析状态的有向图中得出建议，有两个输入源：一个是从在线数据科学教程中手动策划的，另一个是通过对超过 6,000 个 Jupyter 笔记本的语料库进行半自动分析而提取的。我们在一项形成性研究中对 Lodestar 进行了评估，指导我们对该工具的下一步改进。我们的结果表明，用户发现 Lodestar 对于快速创建数据科学工作流程非常有用。 提出Lodestar工具，通过数据驱动的分析推荐帮助用户快速构建数据科学工作流。 Deepthi Raghunandan,Zhe Cui,Kartik Krishnan,Segen Tirfe,Shenzhi Shi,Tejaswi Darshan Shrestha,Leilani Battle,Niklas Elmqvist cs.HC,eess.SY

authors_text: Wei Sun
title: Enabling Relative Localization for Nanodrone Swarm Platooning
title_zh: 实现纳米无人机集群编队的相对定位
abstract: Nanodrone swarm is formulated by multiple light-weight and low-cost nanodrones to perform the tasks in very challenging environments. Therefore, it is essential to estimate the relative position of nanodrones in the swarm for accurate and safe platooning in inclement indoor environment. However, the vision and infrared sensors are constrained by the line-of-sight perception, and instrumenting extra motion sensors on drone's body is constrained by the nanodrone's form factor and energy-efficiency. This paper presents the design, implementation and evaluation of RFDrone, a system that can sense the relative position of nanodrone in the swarm using wireless signals, which can naturally identify each individual nanodrone. To do so, each light-weight nanodrone is attached with a RF sticker (i.e., called RFID tag), which will be localized by the external RFID reader in the inclement indoor environment. Instead of accurately localizing each RFID-tagged nanodrone, we propose to estimate the relative position of all the RFID-tagged nanodrones in the swarm based on the spatial-temporal phase profiling. We implement an end-to-end physical prototype of RFDrone. Our experimental results show that RFDrone can accurately estimate the relative position of nanodrones in the swarm with average relative localization accuracy of around 0.95 across x, y and z axis, and average accuracy of around 0.93 for nanodrone swarm's geometry estimation.
summary: Nanodrone swarm is formulated by multiple light-weight and low-cost nanodrones to perform the tasks in very challenging environments. Therefore, it is essential to estimate the relative position of nanodrones in the swarm for accurate and safe platooning in inclement indoor environment. However, the vision and infrared sensors are constrained by the line-of-sight perception, and instrumenting extra motion sensors on drone's body is constrained by the nanodrone's form factor and energy-efficiency. This paper presents the design, implementation and evaluation of RFDrone, a system that can sense the relative position of nanodrone in the swarm using wireless signals, which can naturally identify each individual nanodrone. To do so, each light-weight nanodrone is attached with a RF sticker (i.e., called RFID tag), which will be localized by the external RFID reader in the inclement indoor environment. Instead of accurately localizing each RFID-tagged nanodrone, we propose to estimate the relative position of all the RFID-tagged nanodrones in the swarm based on the spatial-temporal phase profiling. We implement an end-to-end physical prototype of RFDrone. Our experimental results show that RFDrone can accurately estimate the relative position of nanodrones in the swarm with average relative localization accuracy of around 0.95 across x, y and z axis, and average accuracy of around 0.93 for nanodrone swarm's geometry estimation.
abstract_zh: Nanodrone Swarm 由多个轻型、低成本纳米无人机组成，可在极具挑战性的环境中执行任务。因此，有必要估计纳米无人机在群体中的相对位置，以便在恶劣的室内环境中准确、安全地编排。然而，视觉和红外传感器受到视线感知的限制，而在无人机机身上安装额外的运动传感器则受到纳米无人机的外形尺寸和能源效率的限制。本文介绍了 RFDrone 的设计、实现和评估，该系统可以使用无线信号感知群体中纳米无人机的相对位置，从而自然地识别每个单独的纳米无人机。为此，每个轻型纳米无人机都贴有射频标签（即称为 RFID 标签），该标签将由外部 RFID 读取器在恶劣的室内环境中进行定位。我们建议根据时空相位分析来估计群中所有带有 RFID 标签的纳米无人机的相对位置，而不是精确定位每个带有 RFID 标签的纳米无人机。我们实现了 RFDrone 的端到端物理原型。我们的实验结果表明，RFDrone 可以准确估计无人机群中纳米无人机的相对位置，在 x、y 和 z 轴上的平均相对定位精度约为 0.95，纳米无人机群几何估计的平均精度约为 0.93。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RFDrone系统，利用无线电信号实现纳米无人机群的相对定位，解决室内复杂环境下传统传感器的局限性。
AI.motivation: 纳米无人机群在恶劣室内环境中需精准相对定位，但视觉/红外传感器受视距限制，额外加装运动传感器受体积和能耗约束。
AI.method: 为每架无人机安装RFID标签，通过外部读取器获取空间-时间相位特征，基于相位剖面估算群内无人机相对位置。
AI.result: 实验显示RFDrone在x/y/z轴的相对定位平均精度达0.95，群几何结构估计平均精度0.93。
AI.conclusion: RFDrone通过无线信号实现无需额外传感器的高效相对定位，为纳米无人机群编队提供可行解决方案。

Therefore, it is essential to estimate the relative position of nanodrones in the swarm for accurate and safe platooning in inclement indoor environment. However, the vision and infrared sensors are constrained by the line-of-sight perception, and instrumenting extra motion sensors on drone's body is constrained by the nanodrone's form factor and energy-efficiency. Our experimental results show that RFDrone can accurately estimate the relative position of nanodrones in the swarm with average relative localization accuracy of around 0.95 across x, y and z axis, and average accuracy of around 0.93 for nanodrone swarm's geometry estimation. authors_text: Ben Lowe,Hadi Salman,Justin Zhan
title: GHM Wavelet Transform for Deep Image Super Resolution
title_zh: 用于深度图像超分辨率的 GHM 小波变换
abstract: The GHM multi-level discrete wavelet transform is proposed as preprocessing for image super resolution with convolutional neural networks. Previous works perform analysis with the Haar wavelet only. In this work, 37 single-level wavelets are experimentally analyzed from Haar, Daubechies, Biorthogonal, Reverse Biorthogonal, Coiflets, and Symlets wavelet families. All single-level wavelets report similar results indicating that the convolutional neural network is invariant to choice of wavelet in a single-level filter approach. However, the GHM multi-level wavelet achieves higher quality reconstructions than the single-level wavelets. Three large data sets are used for the experiments: DIV2K, a dataset of textures, and a dataset of satellite images. The approximate high resolution images are compared using seven objective error measurements. A convolutional neural network based approach using wavelet transformed images has good results in the literature.
summary: The GHM multi-level discrete wavelet transform is proposed as preprocessing for image super resolution with convolutional neural networks. Previous works perform analysis with the Haar wavelet only. In this work, 37 single-level wavelets are experimentally analyzed from Haar, Daubechies, Biorthogonal, Reverse Biorthogonal, Coiflets, and Symlets wavelet families. All single-level wavelets report similar results indicating that the convolutional neural network is invariant to choice of wavelet in a single-level filter approach. However, the GHM multi-level wavelet achieves higher quality reconstructions than the single-level wavelets. Three large data sets are used for the experiments: DIV2K, a dataset of textures, and a dataset of satellite images. The approximate high resolution images are compared using seven objective error measurements. A convolutional neural network based approach using wavelet transformed images has good results in the literature.
abstract_zh: 提出 GHM 多级离散小波变换作为卷积神经网络图像超分辨率的预处理。以前的作品仅使用 Haar 小波进行分析。在这项工作中，对来自 Haar、Daubechies、双正交、逆双正交、Coiflets 和 Symlets 小波族的 37 个单层小波进行了实验分析。所有单级小波报告相似的结果，表明卷积神经网络对于单级滤波器方法中小波的选择是不变的。然而，GHM 多级小波比单级小波实现了更高质量的重建。实验使用三个大型数据集：DIV2K、纹理数据集和卫星图像数据集。使用七个客观误差测量来比较近似高分辨率图像。使用小波变换图像的基于卷积神经网络的方法在文献中取得了良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于GHM多级离散小波变换的深度图像超分辨率方法，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅使用Haar小波进行图像超分辨率预处理，而本文旨在探索不同小波基对卷积神经网络性能的影响，并验证多级小波变换的优势。
AI.method: 从Haar、Daubechies等家族中选取37种单级小波进行实验，对比单级与GHM多级小波在DIV2K、纹理和卫星图像数据集上的表现，使用七种客观误差指标评估结果。
AI.result: 单级小波结果相似（CNN对此不敏感），但GHM多级小波在重建质量上显著优于单级方法。
AI.conclusion: 在单级小波滤波方法中，CNN对小波基选择不敏感，但GHM多级小波能有效提升超分辨率效果，建议采用多级变换策略。

authors_text: Torben Teepe,Johannes Gilg,Fabian Herzog,Stefan Hörmann,Gerhard Rigoll
title: Towards a Deeper Understanding of Skeleton-based Gait Recognition
title_zh: 更深入地理解基于骨骼的步态识别
comment: 8 Pages, 5 figures, Accepted at 17th IEEE Computer Society Workshop on Biometrics 2022 (CVPRW'22)
comments: 8 Pages, 5 figures, Accepted at 17th IEEE Computer Society Workshop on Biometrics 2022 (CVPRW'22)
abstract: Gait recognition is a promising biometric with unique properties for identifying individuals from a long distance by their walking patterns. In recent years, most gait recognition methods used the person's silhouette to extract the gait features. However, silhouette images can lose fine-grained spatial information, suffer from (self) occlusion, and be challenging to obtain in real-world scenarios. Furthermore, these silhouettes also contain other visual clues that are not actual gait features and can be used for identification, but also to fool the system. Model-based methods do not suffer from these problems and are able to represent the temporal motion of body joints, which are actual gait features. The advances in human pose estimation started a new era for model-based gait recognition with skeleton-based gait recognition. In this work, we propose an approach based on Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) that combines higher-order inputs, and residual networks to an efficient architecture for gait recognition. Extensive experiments on the two popular gait datasets, CASIA-B and OUMVLP-Pose, show a massive improvement (3x) of the state-of-the-art (SotA) on the largest gait dataset OUMVLP-Pose and strong temporal modeling capabilities. Finally, we visualize our method to understand skeleton-based gait recognition better and to show that we model real gait features.
summary: Gait recognition is a promising biometric with unique properties for identifying individuals from a long distance by their walking patterns. In recent years, most gait recognition methods used the person's silhouette to extract the gait features. However, silhouette images can lose fine-grained spatial information, suffer from (self) occlusion, and be challenging to obtain in real-world scenarios. Furthermore, these silhouettes also contain other visual clues that are not actual gait features and can be used for identification, but also to fool the system. Model-based methods do not suffer from these problems and are able to represent the temporal motion of body joints, which are actual gait features. The advances in human pose estimation started a new era for model-based gait recognition with skeleton-based gait recognition. In this work, we propose an approach based on Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) that combines higher-order inputs, and residual networks to an efficient architecture for gait recognition. Extensive experiments on the two popular gait datasets, CASIA-B and OUMVLP-Pose, show a massive improvement (3x) of the state-of-the-art (SotA) on the largest gait dataset OUMVLP-Pose and strong temporal modeling capabilities. Finally, we visualize our method to understand skeleton-based gait recognition better and to show that we model real gait features.
abstract_zh: 步态识别是一种很有前途的生物识别技术，具有独特的特性，可以通过步行模式远距离识别个体。近年来，大多数步态识别方法都是利用人的轮廓来提取步态特征。然而，剪影图像可能会丢失细粒度的空间信息，遭受（自）遮挡，并且在现实场景中很难获得。此外，这些轮廓还包含其他视觉线索，这些线索不是实际的步态特征，可以用于识别，但也可以欺骗系统。基于模型的方法不会遇到这些问题，并且能够表示身体关节的时间运动，这是实际的步态特征。人体姿势估计的进步开启了基于模型的步态识别和基于骨架的步态识别的新时代。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的方法，该方法将高阶输入和残差网络结合到一个有效的步态识别架构中。对两个流行的步态数据集 CASIA-B 和 OUMVLP-Pose 进行的广泛实验表明，最大步态数据集 OUMVLP-Pose 的最新技术 (SotA) 有了巨大的改进 (3 倍)，并且具有强大的时间建模功能。最后，我们将我们的方法可视化，以更好地理解基于骨架的步态识别，并表明我们模拟了真实的步态特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络和残差网络的骨架数据步态识别方法，以解决传统轮廓图像方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统轮廓图像方法存在空间信息丢失、遮挡问题且包含非步态特征，而骨架数据能更准确捕捉关节运动等真实步态特征。
AI.method: 结合图卷积网络（GCNs）与残差网络，构建包含高阶输入和残差连接的高效架构，建模骨架序列的时序运动特征。
AI.result: 在OUMVLP-Pose数据集上较现有方法提升3倍性能，展现强时间建模能力，并通过可视化验证了真实步态特征的建模效果。
AI.conclusion: 骨架数据能有效提升步态识别性能，所提模型通过GCN与残差结构的结合实现了显著改进，为该领域提供新思路。

search_text: Towards a Deeper Understanding of Skeleton-based Gait Recognition 更深入地理解基于骨骼的步态识别 Gait recognition is a promising biometric with unique properties for identifying individuals from a long distance by their walking patterns. In recent years, most gait recognition methods used the person's silhouette to extract the gait features. However, silhouette images can lose fine-grained spatial information, suffer from (self) occlusion, and be challenging to obtain in real-world scenarios. Furthermore, these silhouettes also contain other visual clues that are not actual gait features and can be used for identification, but also to fool the system. Model-based methods do not suffer from these problems and are able to represent the temporal motion of body joints, which are actual gait features. The advances in human pose estimation started a new era for model-based gait recognition with skeleton-based gait recognition. In this work, we propose an approach based on Graph Convolutional Networks (GCNs) that combines higher-order inputs, and residual networks to an efficient architecture for gait recognition. Extensive experiments on the two popular gait datasets, CASIA-B and OUMVLP-Pose, show a massive improvement (3x) of the state-of-the-art (SotA) on the largest gait dataset OUMVLP-Pose and strong temporal modeling capabilities. Finally, we visualize our method to understand skeleton-based gait recognition better and to show that we model real gait features. 步态识别是一种很有前途的生物识别技术，具有独特的特性，可以通过步行模式远距离识别个体。近年来，大多数步态识别方法都是利用人的轮廓来提取步态特征。然而，剪影图像可能会丢失细粒度的空间信息，遭受（自）遮挡，并且在现实场景中很难获得。此外，这些轮廓还包含其他视觉线索，这些线索不是实际的步态特征，可以用于识别，但也可以欺骗系统。基于模型的方法不会遇到这些问题，并且能够表示身体关节的时间运动，这是实际的步态特征。人体姿势估计的进步开启了基于模型的步态识别和基于骨架的步态识别的新时代。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于图卷积网络（GCN）的方法，该方法将高阶输入和残差网络结合到一个有效的步态识别架构中。对两个流行的步态数据集 CASIA-B 和 OUMVLP-Pose 进行的广泛实验表明，最大步态数据集 OUMVLP-Pose 的最新技术 (SotA) 有了巨大的改进 (3 倍)，并且具有强大的时间建模功能。最后，我们将我们的方法可视化，以更好地理解基于骨架的步态识别，并表明我们模拟了真实的步态特征。 本文提出一种基于图卷积网络和残差网络的骨架数据步态识别方法，以解决传统轮廓图像方法的局限性。 Torben Teepe,Johannes Gilg,Fabian Herzog,Stefan Hörmann,Gerhard Rigoll cs.CV

authors_text: Maha Driss,Iman Almomani,Leen Alahmadi,Linah Alhajjam,Raghad Alharbi,Shahad Alanazi
title: COVIBOT: A Smart Chatbot for Assistance and E-Awareness during COVID-19 Pandemic
title_zh: COVIBOT：在 COVID-19 大流行期间提供援助和电子意识的智能聊天机器人
comment: SMARTTECH 2022: The Second International Conference of Smart Systems and Emerging Technologies
comments: SMARTTECH 2022: The Second International Conference of Smart Systems and Emerging Technologies
abstract: The coronavirus pandemic has spread over the past two years in our highly connected and information-dense society. Nonetheless, disseminating accurate and up-to-date information on the spread of this pandemic remains a challenge. In this context, opting for a solution based on conversational artificial intelligence, also known under the name of the chatbot, is proving to be an unavoidable solution, especially since it has already shown its effectiveness in fighting the coronavirus crisis in several countries. This work proposes to design and implement a smart chatbot on the theme of COVID-19, called COVIBOT, which will be useful in the context of Saudi Arabia. COVIBOT is a generative-based contextual chatbot, which is built using machine learning APIs that are offered by the cloud-based Azure Cognitive Services. Two versions of COVIBOT are offered: English and Arabic versions. Use cases of COVIBOT are tested and validated using a scenario-based approach.
summary: The coronavirus pandemic has spread over the past two years in our highly connected and information-dense society. Nonetheless, disseminating accurate and up-to-date information on the spread of this pandemic remains a challenge. In this context, opting for a solution based on conversational artificial intelligence, also known under the name of the chatbot, is proving to be an unavoidable solution, especially since it has already shown its effectiveness in fighting the coronavirus crisis in several countries. This work proposes to design and implement a smart chatbot on the theme of COVID-19, called COVIBOT, which will be useful in the context of Saudi Arabia. COVIBOT is a generative-based contextual chatbot, which is built using machine learning APIs that are offered by the cloud-based Azure Cognitive Services. Two versions of COVIBOT are offered: English and Arabic versions. Use cases of COVIBOT are tested and validated using a scenario-based approach.
abstract_zh: 过去两年，冠状病毒大流行在我们高度互联、信息密集的社会中蔓延。尽管如此，传播有关这一流行病传播的准确和最新信息仍然是一个挑战。在这种背景下，选择基于会话人工智能（也称为聊天机器人）的解决方案被证明是不可避免的解决方案，特别是因为它已经在多个国家显示出其在应对冠状病毒危机方面的有效性。这项工作建议设计和实现一个以 COVID-19 为主题的智能聊天机器人，称为 COVIBOT，这将在沙特阿拉伯的背景下有用。 COVIBOT 是一种基于生成的上下文聊天机器人，它是使用基于云的 Azure 认知服务提供的机器学习 API 构建的。 COVIBOT 提供两个版本：英语和阿拉伯语版本。 COVIBOT 的用例使用基于场景的方法进行测试和验证。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实现了一个名为COVIBOT的智能聊天机器人，旨在为沙特阿拉伯的新冠疫情提供信息支持和电子意识服务。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情信息传播面临挑战，而聊天机器人已被证明在疫情应对中有效，因此需要开发针对沙特阿拉伯的多语言智能聊天机器人。
AI.method: 基于Azure认知服务的机器学习API构建生成式上下文聊天机器人，提供英语和阿拉伯语两个版本，并通过场景化方法验证其使用案例。
AI.result: COVIBOT的使用案例通过场景化测试得到验证，证明其在提供准确信息和电子意识方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: COVIBOT展示了聊天机器人在公共卫生危机中提供及时信息和提高公众意识的潜力，为类似场景提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Haoyu Fang,Yi Fang,Xiaofeng Yang
title: Multi-organ Segmentation Network with Adversarial Performance Validator
title_zh: 具有对抗性能验证器的多器官分割网络
abstract: CT organ segmentation on computed tomography (CT) images becomes a significant brick for modern medical image analysis, supporting clinic workflows in multiple domains. Previous segmentation methods include 2D convolution neural networks (CNN) based approaches, fed by CT image slices that lack the structural knowledge in axial view, and 3D CNN-based methods with the expensive computation cost in multi-organ segmentation applications. This paper introduces an adversarial performance validation network into a 2D-to-3D segmentation framework. The classifier and performance validator competition contribute to accurate segmentation results via back-propagation. The proposed network organically converts the 2D-coarse result to 3D high-quality segmentation masks in a coarse-to-fine manner, allowing joint optimization to improve segmentation accuracy. Besides, the structural information of one specific organ is depicted by a statistics-meaningful prior bounding box, which is transformed into a global feature leveraging the learning process in 3D fine segmentation. The experiments on the NIH pancreas segmentation dataset demonstrate the proposed network achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on small organ segmentation and outperforms the previous best. High accuracy is also reported on multi-organ segmentation in a dataset collected by ourselves.
summary: CT organ segmentation on computed tomography (CT) images becomes a significant brick for modern medical image analysis, supporting clinic workflows in multiple domains. Previous segmentation methods include 2D convolution neural networks (CNN) based approaches, fed by CT image slices that lack the structural knowledge in axial view, and 3D CNN-based methods with the expensive computation cost in multi-organ segmentation applications. This paper introduces an adversarial performance validation network into a 2D-to-3D segmentation framework. The classifier and performance validator competition contribute to accurate segmentation results via back-propagation. The proposed network organically converts the 2D-coarse result to 3D high-quality segmentation masks in a coarse-to-fine manner, allowing joint optimization to improve segmentation accuracy. Besides, the structural information of one specific organ is depicted by a statistics-meaningful prior bounding box, which is transformed into a global feature leveraging the learning process in 3D fine segmentation. The experiments on the NIH pancreas segmentation dataset demonstrate the proposed network achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on small organ segmentation and outperforms the previous best. High accuracy is also reported on multi-organ segmentation in a dataset collected by ourselves.
abstract_zh: 计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像上的 CT 器官分割成为现代医学图像分析的重要组成部分，支持多个领域的临床工作流程。以前的分割方法包括基于 2D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的方法，由缺乏轴向视图结构知识的 CT 图像切片提供，以及基于 3D CNN 的方法，在多器官分割应用中计算成本昂贵。本文将对抗性性能验证网络引入 2D 到 3D 分割框架。分类器和性能验证器竞赛通过反向传播有助于获得准确的分割结果。所提出的网络以从粗到细的方式将 2D 粗略结果有机地转换为 3D 高质量分割掩模，从而允许联合优化以提高分割精度。此外，一个特定器官的结构信息由具有统计意义的先验边界框描述，利用 3D 精细分割的学习过程将其转换为全局特征。在 NIH 胰腺分割数据集上的实验表明，所提出的网络在小器官分割方面实现了最先进的精度，并且优于之前的最佳网络。在我们自己收集的数据集中，多器官分割也具有很高的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合对抗性能验证器的多器官分割网络，用于提高CT图像的分割精度。
AI.motivation: 传统的2D和3D卷积神经网络在器官分割任务中存在结构信息缺失和计算成本高的问题，因此需要一种更高效且准确的分割方法。
AI.method: 该方法引入了对抗性能验证器，将2D粗分割结果转化为3D高质量分割掩码，并利用统计意义的先验边界框来增强结构信息。
AI.result: 在NIH胰腺分割数据集上，该网络在小器官分割任务中达到了最先进的精度，并在自建的多器官分割数据集上也表现出高精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过引入对抗性能验证器和结构信息增强，有效提升了多器官分割的准确性和效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合对抗性能验证器的多器官分割网络，用于提高CT图像的分割精度。
ai_content.motivation: 传统的2D和3D卷积神经网络在器官分割任务中存在结构信息缺失和计算成本高的问题，因此需要一种更高效且准确的分割方法。

search_text: Multi-organ Segmentation Network with Adversarial Performance Validator 具有对抗性能验证器的多器官分割网络 CT organ segmentation on computed tomography (CT) images becomes a significant brick for modern medical image analysis, supporting clinic workflows in multiple domains. Previous segmentation methods include 2D convolution neural networks (CNN) based approaches, fed by CT image slices that lack the structural knowledge in axial view, and 3D CNN-based methods with the expensive computation cost in multi-organ segmentation applications. This paper introduces an adversarial performance validation network into a 2D-to-3D segmentation framework. The classifier and performance validator competition contribute to accurate segmentation results via back-propagation. The proposed network organically converts the 2D-coarse result to 3D high-quality segmentation masks in a coarse-to-fine manner, allowing joint optimization to improve segmentation accuracy. Besides, the structural information of one specific organ is depicted by a statistics-meaningful prior bounding box, which is transformed into a global feature leveraging the learning process in 3D fine segmentation. The experiments on the NIH pancreas segmentation dataset demonstrate the proposed network achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on small organ segmentation and outperforms the previous best. High accuracy is also reported on multi-organ segmentation in a dataset collected by ourselves. 计算机断层扫描 (CT) 图像上的 CT 器官分割成为现代医学图像分析的重要组成部分，支持多个领域的临床工作流程。以前的分割方法包括基于 2D 卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的方法，由缺乏轴向视图结构知识的 CT 图像切片提供，以及基于 3D CNN 的方法，在多器官分割应用中计算成本昂贵。本文将对抗性性能验证网络引入 2D 到 3D 分割框架。分类器和性能验证器竞赛通过反向传播有助于获得准确的分割结果。所提出的网络以从粗到细的方式将 2D 粗略结果有机地转换为 3D 高质量分割掩模，从而允许联合优化以提高分割精度。此外，一个特定器官的结构信息由具有统计意义的先验边界框描述，利用 3D 精细分割的学习过程将其转换为全局特征。在 NIH 胰腺分割数据集上的实验表明，所提出的网络在小器官分割方面实现了最先进的精度，并且优于之前的最佳网络。在我们自己收集的数据集中，多器官分割也具有很高的准确性。 本文提出了一种结合对抗性能验证器的多器官分割网络，用于提高CT图像的分割精度。 Haoyu Fang,Yi Fang,Xiaofeng Yang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Saad Naeem,Omer Beg
title: STRATA: Word Boundaries & Phoneme Recognition From Continuous Urdu Speech using Transfer Learning, Attention, & Data Augmentation
title_zh: STRATA：使用迁移学习、注意力和数据增强从连续乌尔都语语音中进行单词边界和音素识别
abstract: Phoneme recognition is a largely unsolved problem in NLP, especially for low-resource languages like Urdu. The systems that try to extract the phonemes from audio speech require hand-labeled phonetic transcriptions. This requires expert linguists to annotate speech data with its relevant phonetic representation which is both an expensive and a tedious task. In this paper, we propose STRATA, a framework for supervised phoneme recognition that overcomes the data scarcity issue for low resource languages using a seq2seq neural architecture integrated with transfer learning, attention mechanism, and data augmentation. STRATA employs transfer learning to reduce the network loss in half. It uses attention mechanism for word boundaries and frame alignment detection which further reduces the network loss by 4% and is able to identify the word boundaries with 92.2% accuracy. STRATA uses various data augmentation techniques to further reduce the loss by 1.5% and is more robust towards new signals both in terms of generalization and accuracy. STRATA is able to achieve a Phoneme Error Rate of 16.5% and improves upon the state of the art by 1.1% for TIMIT dataset (English) and 11.5% for CSaLT dataset (Urdu).
summary: Phoneme recognition is a largely unsolved problem in NLP, especially for low-resource languages like Urdu. The systems that try to extract the phonemes from audio speech require hand-labeled phonetic transcriptions. This requires expert linguists to annotate speech data with its relevant phonetic representation which is both an expensive and a tedious task. In this paper, we propose STRATA, a framework for supervised phoneme recognition that overcomes the data scarcity issue for low resource languages using a seq2seq neural architecture integrated with transfer learning, attention mechanism, and data augmentation. STRATA employs transfer learning to reduce the network loss in half. It uses attention mechanism for word boundaries and frame alignment detection which further reduces the network loss by 4% and is able to identify the word boundaries with 92.2% accuracy. STRATA uses various data augmentation techniques to further reduce the loss by 1.5% and is more robust towards new signals both in terms of generalization and accuracy. STRATA is able to achieve a Phoneme Error Rate of 16.5% and improves upon the state of the art by 1.1% for TIMIT dataset (English) and 11.5% for CSaLT dataset (Urdu).
abstract_zh: 音素识别在 NLP 中很大程度上是一个尚未解决的问题，特别是对于像乌尔都语这样的资源匮乏的语言。尝试从音频语音中提取音素的系统需要手工标记的语音转录。这需要语言专家用相关的语音表示来注释语音数据，这是一项既昂贵又乏味的任务。在本文中，我们提出了 STRATA，这是一种监督音素识别框架，它使用集成了迁移学习、注意力机制和数据增强的 seq2seq 神经架构来克服低资源语言的数据稀缺问题。 STRATA 采用迁移学习将网络损耗减少一半。它使用注意力机制进行词边界和帧对齐检测，进一步减少了 4% 的网络损失，并且能够以 92.2% 的准确率识别词边界。 STRATA 使用各种数据增强技术，将损失进一步降低了 1.5%，并且在泛化性和准确性方面对新信号都更加稳健。 STRATA 能够实现 16.5% 的音素错误率，并且在 TIMIT 数据集（英语）和 CSaLT 数据集（乌尔都语）的现有技术基础上分别提高了 1.1% 和 11.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出STRATA框架，利用迁移学习、注意力机制和数据增强技术，解决低资源语言（如乌尔都语）的音素识别问题。
AI.motivation: 音素识别在自然语言处理中尚未完全解决，尤其对低资源语言需依赖昂贵的手动标注数据，而STRATA旨在通过技术手段缓解数据稀缺问题。
AI.method: 采用seq2seq神经网络架构，结合迁移学习降低网络损失，利用注意力机制检测词边界和帧对齐，并通过数据增强提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: STRATA在TIMIT数据集（英语）上将音素错误率降至16.5%，较之前方法提升1.1%；在CSaLT数据集（乌尔都语）上提升11.5%，词边界识别准确率达92.2%。
AI.conclusion: STRATA通过多技术融合有效解决了低资源语言音素识别难题，为相关领域提供了可推广的解决方案。

authors_text: Bowen Weng,Guillermo A. Castillo,Wei Zhang,Ayonga Hereid
title: On Safety Testing, Validation, and Characterization with Scenario-Sampling: A Case Study of Legged Robots
title_zh: 关于场景采样的安全测试、验证和表征：有腿机器人的案例研究
comment: ef:2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
abstract: The dynamic response of the legged robot locomotion is non-Lipschitz and can be stochastic due to environmental uncertainties. To test, validate, and characterize the safety performance of legged robots, existing solutions on observed and inferred risk can be incomplete and sampling inefficient. Some formal verification methods suffer from the model precision and other surrogate assumptions. In this paper, we propose a scenario sampling based testing framework that characterizes the overall safety performance of a legged robot by specifying (i) where (in terms of a set of states) the robot is potentially safe, and (ii) how safe the robot is within the specified set. The framework can also help certify the commercial deployment of the legged robot in real-world environment along with human and compare safety performance among legged robots with different mechanical structures and dynamic properties. The proposed framework is further deployed to evaluate a group of state-of-the-art legged robot locomotion controllers from various model-based, deep neural network involved, and reinforcement learning based methods in the literature. Among a series of intended work domains of the studied legged robots (e.g. tracking speed on sloped surface, with abrupt changes on demanded velocity, and against adversarial push-over disturbances), we show that the method can adequately capture the overall safety characterization and the subtle performance insights. Many of the observed safety outcomes, to the best of our knowledge, have never been reported by the existing work in the legged robot literature.
summary: The dynamic response of the legged robot locomotion is non-Lipschitz and can be stochastic due to environmental uncertainties. To test, validate, and characterize the safety performance of legged robots, existing solutions on observed and inferred risk can be incomplete and sampling inefficient. Some formal verification methods suffer from the model precision and other surrogate assumptions. In this paper, we propose a scenario sampling based testing framework that characterizes the overall safety performance of a legged robot by specifying (i) where (in terms of a set of states) the robot is potentially safe, and (ii) how safe the robot is within the specified set. The framework can also help certify the commercial deployment of the legged robot in real-world environment along with human and compare safety performance among legged robots with different mechanical structures and dynamic properties. The proposed framework is further deployed to evaluate a group of state-of-the-art legged robot locomotion controllers from various model-based, deep neural network involved, and reinforcement learning based methods in the literature. Among a series of intended work domains of the studied legged robots (e.g. tracking speed on sloped surface, with abrupt changes on demanded velocity, and against adversarial push-over disturbances), we show that the method can adequately capture the overall safety characterization and the subtle performance insights. Many of the observed safety outcomes, to the best of our knowledge, have never been reported by the existing work in the legged robot literature.
abstract_zh: 腿式机器人运动的动态响应是非利普希茨的，并且由于环境的不确定性可能是随机的。为了测试、验证和表征腿式机器人的安全性能，现有的观察和推断风险解决方案可能不完整且采样效率低下。一些形式验证方法会受到模型精度和其他替代假设的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于场景采样的测试框架，该框架通过指定（i）机器人在何处（就一组状态而言）潜在安全，以及（ii）机器人在指定组内的安全程度来表征腿式机器人的整体安全性能。该框架还可以帮助验证腿式机器人在现实环境中与人类一起的商业部署，并比较具有不同机械结构和动态特性的腿式机器人的安全性能。所提出的框架被进一步部署来评估一组最先进的腿式机器人运动控制器，这些控制器来自文献中各种基于模型、涉及的深度神经网络和基于强化学习的方法。在所研究的腿式机器人的一系列预期工作领域（例如，跟踪倾斜表面上的速度、所需速度的突然变化以及对抗对抗性推倒干扰）中，我们表明该方法可以充分捕获整体安全特征和微妙的性能洞察。据我们所知，有腿机器人文献中的现有工作从未报道过许多观察到的安全结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于场景采样的测试框架，用于表征腿足机器人的整体安全性能，并评估不同控制器在复杂环境中的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有腿足机器人安全评估方法存在采样效率低、模型依赖性强等问题，难以全面捕捉动态不确定性下的安全表现。
AI.method: 构建场景采样框架，通过定义安全状态集及其内部安全性指标，结合多类控制器在复杂任务中的表现进行验证。
AI.result: 框架有效表征了腿足机器人在斜坡速度跟踪、速度突变和对抗扰动等场景下的安全性能，揭示了多项未被报道的安全特性差异。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为腿足机器人实际部署提供了安全评估工具，同时为不同控制器的性能对比研究提供了新视角。

tldr: 本文提出一种基于场景采样的测试框架，用于表征腿足机器人的整体安全性能，并评估不同控制器在复杂环境中的安全性。
motivation: 现有腿足机器人安全评估方法存在采样效率低、模型依赖性强等问题，难以全面捕捉动态不确定性下的安全表现。
method: 构建场景采样框架，通过定义安全状态集及其内部安全性指标，结合多类控制器在复杂任务中的表现进行验证。
result: 框架有效表征了腿足机器人在斜坡速度跟踪、速度突变和对抗扰动等场景下的安全性能，揭示了多项未被报道的安全特性差异。
conclusion: 该方法为腿足机器人实际部署提供了安全评估工具，同时为不同控制器的性能对比研究提供了新视角。
search_text: On Safety Testing, Validation, and Characterization with Scenario-Sampling: A Case Study of Legged Robots 关于场景采样的安全测试、验证和表征：有腿机器人的案例研究 The dynamic response of the legged robot locomotion is non-Lipschitz and can be stochastic due to environmental uncertainties. To test, validate, and characterize the safety performance of legged robots, existing solutions on observed and inferred risk can be incomplete and sampling inefficient. Some formal verification methods suffer from the model precision and other surrogate assumptions. In this paper, we propose a scenario sampling based testing framework that characterizes the overall safety performance of a legged robot by specifying (i) where (in terms of a set of states) the robot is potentially safe, and (ii) how safe the robot is within the specified set. The framework can also help certify the commercial deployment of the legged robot in real-world environment along with human and compare safety performance among legged robots with different mechanical structures and dynamic properties. The proposed framework is further deployed to evaluate a group of state-of-the-art legged robot locomotion controllers from various model-based, deep neural network involved, and reinforcement learning based methods in the literature. Among a series of intended work domains of the studied legged robots (e.g. tracking speed on sloped surface, with abrupt changes on demanded velocity, and against adversarial push-over disturbances), we show that the method can adequately capture the overall safety characterization and the subtle performance insights. Many of the observed safety outcomes, to the best of our knowledge, have never been reported by the existing work in the legged robot literature. 腿式机器人运动的动态响应是非利普希茨的，并且由于环境的不确定性可能是随机的。为了测试、验证和表征腿式机器人的安全性能，现有的观察和推断风险解决方案可能不完整且采样效率低下。一些形式验证方法会受到模型精度和其他替代假设的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于场景采样的测试框架，该框架通过指定（i）机器人在何处（就一组状态而言）潜在安全，以及（ii）机器人在指定组内的安全程度来表征腿式机器人的整体安全性能。该框架还可以帮助验证腿式机器人在现实环境中与人类一起的商业部署，并比较具有不同机械结构和动态特性的腿式机器人的安全性能。所提出的框架被进一步部署来评估一组最先进的腿式机器人运动控制器，这些控制器来自文献中各种基于模型、涉及的深度神经网络和基于强化学习的方法。在所研究的腿式机器人的一系列预期工作领域（例如，跟踪倾斜表面上的速度、所需速度的突然变化以及对抗对抗性推倒干扰）中，我们表明该方法可以充分捕获整体安全特征和微妙的性能洞察。据我们所知，有腿机器人文献中的现有工作从未报道过许多观察到的安全结果。 本文提出一种基于场景采样的测试框架，用于表征腿足机器人的整体安全性能，并评估不同控制器在复杂环境中的安全性。 Bowen Weng,Guillermo A. Castillo,Wei Zhang,Ayonga Hereid cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Yu Zeng,Zhe Lin,Vishal M. Patel
title: Shape-guided Object Inpainting
title_zh: 形状引导的对象修复
abstract: Previous works on image inpainting mainly focus on inpainting background or partially missing objects, while the problem of inpainting an entire missing object remains unexplored. This work studies a new image inpainting task, i.e. shape-guided object inpainting. Given an incomplete input image, the goal is to fill in the hole by generating an object based on the context and implicit guidance given by the hole shape. Since previous methods for image inpainting are mainly designed for background inpainting, they are not suitable for this task. Therefore, we propose a new data preparation method and a novel Contextual Object Generator (CogNet) for the object inpainting task. On the data side, we incorporate object priors into training data by using object instances as holes. The CogNet has a two-stream architecture that combines the standard bottom-up image completion process with a top-down object generation process. A predictive class embedding module bridges the two streams by predicting the class of the missing object from the bottom-up features, from which a semantic object map is derived as the input of the top-down stream. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method can generate realistic objects that fit the context in terms of both visual appearance and semantic meanings. Code can be found at the project page \url{https://zengxianyu.github.io/objpaint}
summary: Previous works on image inpainting mainly focus on inpainting background or partially missing objects, while the problem of inpainting an entire missing object remains unexplored. This work studies a new image inpainting task, i.e. shape-guided object inpainting. Given an incomplete input image, the goal is to fill in the hole by generating an object based on the context and implicit guidance given by the hole shape. Since previous methods for image inpainting are mainly designed for background inpainting, they are not suitable for this task. Therefore, we propose a new data preparation method and a novel Contextual Object Generator (CogNet) for the object inpainting task. On the data side, we incorporate object priors into training data by using object instances as holes. The CogNet has a two-stream architecture that combines the standard bottom-up image completion process with a top-down object generation process. A predictive class embedding module bridges the two streams by predicting the class of the missing object from the bottom-up features, from which a semantic object map is derived as the input of the top-down stream. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed method can generate realistic objects that fit the context in terms of both visual appearance and semantic meanings. Code can be found at the project page \url{https://zengxianyu.github.io/objpaint}
abstract_zh: 先前的图像修复工作主要集中于修复背景或部分缺失的对象，而修复整个缺失对象的问题仍未得到探索。这项工作研究了一种新的图像修复任务，即形状引导的对象修复。给定不完整的输入图像，目标是通过基于上下文和孔形状给出的隐式指导生成对象来填充孔。由于以前的图像修复方法主要是针对背景修复而设计的，因此它们不适合此任务。因此，我们为对象修复任务提出了一种新的数据准备方法和一种新颖的上下文对象生成器（CogNet）。在数据方面，我们通过使用对象实例作为洞，将对象先验纳入训练数据中。 CogNet 具有双流架构，将标准的自下而上的图像完成过程与自上而下的对象生成过程相结合。预测类嵌入模块通过从自下而上的特征预测丢失对象的类来桥接两个流，从中导出语义对象映射作为自上而下流的输入。实验表明，所提出的方法可以生成在视觉外观和语义方面都适合上下文的真实对象。代码可以在项目页面\url{https://zengxianyu.github.io/objpaint}找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于形状引导的物体修复方法，旨在根据输入图像中的缺失区域形状生成符合上下文的完整物体。
AI.motivation: 传统图像修复方法主要针对背景或部分缺失物体，而对完全缺失物体的修复任务尚未被充分研究，现有方法难以满足该需求。
AI.method: 提出新的数据准备方法（利用物体实例作为缺失区域）和双流架构的上下文物体生成器CogNet，结合自底向上图像补全与自顶向下物体生成，并通过预测类别嵌入模块实现两流信息交互。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能生成视觉逼真且语义合理的物体，有效适应缺失区域的形状与上下文语义。
AI.conclusion: 通过形状引导的物体修复方法能够有效解决完整缺失物体的生成问题，为图像修复领域提供新思路。

authors_text: Guangxing Han,Long Chen,Jiawei Ma,Shiyuan Huang,Rama Chellappa,Shih-Fu Chang
title: Multi-Modal Few-Shot Object Detection with Meta-Learning-Based Cross-Modal Prompting
title_zh: 具有基于元学习的跨模态提示的多模态少样本目标检测
abstract: We study multi-modal few-shot object detection (FSOD) in this paper, using both few-shot visual examples and class semantic information for detection, which are complementary to each other by definition. Most of the previous works on multi-modal FSOD are fine-tuning-based which are inefficient for online applications. Moreover, these methods usually require expertise like class names to extract class semantic embedding, which are hard to get for rare classes. Our approach is motivated by the high-level conceptual similarity of (metric-based) meta-learning and prompt-based learning to learn generalizable few-shot and zero-shot object detection models respectively without fine-tuning. Specifically, we combine the few-shot visual classifier and text classifier learned via meta-learning and prompt-based learning respectively to build the multi-modal classifier and detection models. In addition, to fully exploit the pre-trained language models, we propose meta-learning-based cross-modal prompting to generate soft prompts for novel classes present in few-shot visual examples, which are then used to learn the text classifier. Knowledge distillation is introduced to learn the soft prompt generator without using human prior knowledge of class names, which may not be available for rare classes. Our insight is that the few-shot support images naturally include related context information and semantics of the class. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed multi-modal FSOD models on multiple few-shot object detection benchmarks, achieving promising results.
summary: We study multi-modal few-shot object detection (FSOD) in this paper, using both few-shot visual examples and class semantic information for detection, which are complementary to each other by definition. Most of the previous works on multi-modal FSOD are fine-tuning-based which are inefficient for online applications. Moreover, these methods usually require expertise like class names to extract class semantic embedding, which are hard to get for rare classes. Our approach is motivated by the high-level conceptual similarity of (metric-based) meta-learning and prompt-based learning to learn generalizable few-shot and zero-shot object detection models respectively without fine-tuning. Specifically, we combine the few-shot visual classifier and text classifier learned via meta-learning and prompt-based learning respectively to build the multi-modal classifier and detection models. In addition, to fully exploit the pre-trained language models, we propose meta-learning-based cross-modal prompting to generate soft prompts for novel classes present in few-shot visual examples, which are then used to learn the text classifier. Knowledge distillation is introduced to learn the soft prompt generator without using human prior knowledge of class names, which may not be available for rare classes. Our insight is that the few-shot support images naturally include related context information and semantics of the class. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed multi-modal FSOD models on multiple few-shot object detection benchmarks, achieving promising results.
abstract_zh: 我们在本文中研究了多模态少镜头目标检测（FSOD），使用少镜头视觉示例和类语义信息进行检测，它们在定义上是互补的。之前关于多模态 FSOD 的大部分工作都是基于微调的，对于在线应用来说效率低下。此外，这些方法通常需要类名称等专业知识来提取类语义嵌入，这对于稀有类来说很难获得。我们的方法受到（基于度量的）元学习和基于提示的学习的高级概念相似性的启发，分别学习可泛化的少样本和零样本对象检测模型，而无需进行微调。具体来说，我们结合分别通过元学习和基于提示的学习学习的少样本视觉分类器和文本分类器来构建多模态分类器和检测模型。此外，为了充分利用预先训练的语言模型，我们提出了基于元学习的跨模式提示，为少数视觉示例中出现的新类生成软提示，然后用于学习文本分类器。引入知识蒸馏来学习软提示生成器，而无需使用人类对类名称的先验知识，这对于稀有类可能不可用。我们的见解是，少数镜头支持图像自然包含相关的上下文信息和类的语义。我们在多个少镜头目标检测基准上全面评估了所提出的多模态 FSOD 模型，取得了有希望的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态少样本目标检测（FSOD），结合少量视觉样本和类别语义信息进行检测，无需微调即可实现高效模型学习。
AI.motivation: 传统多模态FSOD方法依赖微调效率低，且需人工提取类别语义嵌入，难以处理罕见类别。本文旨在通过元学习与提示学习结合，实现无需微调且无需人工先验知识的通用检测模型。
AI.method: 融合元学习的视觉分类器与提示学习的文本分类器构建多模态分类器，提出基于元学习的跨模态提示方法生成新类别的软提示，并利用知识蒸馏避免依赖类别名称的先验知识。
AI.result: 在多个少样本检测基准测试中取得有竞争力的性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法通过跨模态提示与知识蒸馏，实现了无需微调和人工先验知识的多模态FSOD，为罕见类别检测提供了新思路。
