method: 融合元学习的视觉分类器与提示学习的文本分类器构建多模态分类器，提出基于元学习的跨模态提示方法生成新类别的软提示，并利用知识蒸馏避免依赖类别名称的先验知识。
result: 在多个少样本检测基准测试中取得有竞争力的性能，验证了方法的有效性。
conclusion: 本文方法通过跨模态提示与知识蒸馏，实现了无需微调和人工先验知识的多模态FSOD，为罕见类别检测提供了新思路。
search_text: Multi-Modal Few-Shot Object Detection with Meta-Learning-Based Cross-Modal Prompting 具有基于元学习的跨模态提示的多模态少样本目标检测 We study multi-modal few-shot object detection (FSOD) in this paper, using both few-shot visual examples and class semantic information for detection, which are complementary to each other by definition. Most of the previous works on multi-modal FSOD are fine-tuning-based which are inefficient for online applications. Moreover, these methods usually require expertise like class names to extract class semantic embedding, which are hard to get for rare classes. Our approach is motivated by the high-level conceptual similarity of (metric-based) meta-learning and prompt-based learning to learn generalizable few-shot and zero-shot object detection models respectively without fine-tuning. Specifically, we combine the few-shot visual classifier and text classifier learned via meta-learning and prompt-based learning respectively to build the multi-modal classifier and detection models. In addition, to fully exploit the pre-trained language models, we propose meta-learning-based cross-modal prompting to generate soft prompts for novel classes present in few-shot visual examples, which are then used to learn the text classifier. Knowledge distillation is introduced to learn the soft prompt generator without using human prior knowledge of class names, which may not be available for rare classes. Our insight is that the few-shot support images naturally include related context information and semantics of the class. We comprehensively evaluate the proposed multi-modal FSOD models on multiple few-shot object detection benchmarks, achieving promising results. 我们在本文中研究了多模态少镜头目标检测（FSOD），使用少镜头视觉示例和类语义信息进行检测，它们在定义上是互补的。之前关于多模态 FSOD 的大部分工作都是基于微调的，对于在线应用来说效率低下。此外，这些方法通常需要类名称等专业知识来提取类语义嵌入，这对于稀有类来说很难获得。我们的方法受到（基于度量的）元学习和基于提示的学习的高级概念相似性的启发，分别学习可泛化的少样本和零样本对象检测模型，而无需进行微调。具体来说，我们结合分别通过元学习和基于提示的学习学习的少样本视觉分类器和文本分类器来构建多模态分类器和检测模型。此外，为了充分利用预先训练的语言模型，我们提出了基于元学习的跨模式提示，为少数视觉示例中出现的新类生成软提示，然后用于学习文本分类器。引入知识蒸馏来学习软提示生成器，而无需使用人类对类名称的先验知识，这对于稀有类可能不可用。我们的见解是，少数镜头支持图像自然包含相关的上下文信息和类的语义。我们在多个少镜头目标检测基准上全面评估了所提出的多模态 FSOD 模型，取得了有希望的结果。 本文研究多模态少样本目标检测（FSOD），结合少量视觉样本和类别语义信息进行检测，无需微调即可实现高效模型学习。 Guangxing Han,Long Chen,Jiawei Ma,Shiyuan Huang,Rama Chellappa,Shih-Fu Chang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.MM

authors_text: Aditya Kanade,Mansi Sharma,Manivannan Muniyandi
title: A Robust and Scalable Attention Guided Deep Learning Framework for Movement Quality Assessment
title_zh: 用于运动质量评估的稳健且可扩展的注意力引导深度学习框架
abstract: Physical rehabilitation programs frequently begin with a brief stay in the hospital and continue with home-based rehabilitation. Lack of feedback on exercise correctness is a significant issue in home-based rehabilitation. Automated movement quality assessment (MQA) using skeletal movement data (hereafter referred to as skeletal data) collected via depth imaging devices can assist with home-based rehabilitation by providing the necessary quantitative feedback. This paper aims to use recent advances in deep learning to address the problem of MQA. Movement quality score generation is an essential component of MQA. We propose three novel skeletal data augmentation schemes. We show that using the proposed augmentations for generating movement quality scores result in significant performance boosts over existing methods. Finally, we propose a novel transformer based architecture for MQA. Four novel feature extractors are proposed and studied that allow the transformer network to operate on skeletal data. We show that adding the attention mechanism in the design of the proposed feature extractor allows the transformer network to pay attention to specific body parts that make a significant contribution towards executing a movement. We report an improvement in movement quality score prediction of 12% on UI-PRMD dataset and 21% on KIMORE dataset compared to the existing methods.
summary: Physical rehabilitation programs frequently begin with a brief stay in the hospital and continue with home-based rehabilitation. Lack of feedback on exercise correctness is a significant issue in home-based rehabilitation. Automated movement quality assessment (MQA) using skeletal movement data (hereafter referred to as skeletal data) collected via depth imaging devices can assist with home-based rehabilitation by providing the necessary quantitative feedback. This paper aims to use recent advances in deep learning to address the problem of MQA. Movement quality score generation is an essential component of MQA. We propose three novel skeletal data augmentation schemes. We show that using the proposed augmentations for generating movement quality scores result in significant performance boosts over existing methods. Finally, we propose a novel transformer based architecture for MQA. Four novel feature extractors are proposed and studied that allow the transformer network to operate on skeletal data. We show that adding the attention mechanism in the design of the proposed feature extractor allows the transformer network to pay attention to specific body parts that make a significant contribution towards executing a movement. We report an improvement in movement quality score prediction of 12% on UI-PRMD dataset and 21% on KIMORE dataset compared to the existing methods.
abstract_zh: 身体康复计划通常从短暂住院开始，然后继续进行家庭康复。缺乏对运动正确性的反馈是家庭康复中的一个重要问题。使用通过深度成像设备收集的骨骼运动数据（以下简称骨骼数据）进行自动运动质量评估（MQA）可以通过提供必要的定量反馈来协助家庭康复。本文旨在利用深度学习的最新进展来解决 MQA 问题。运动质量评分生成是 MQA 的重要组成部分。我们提出了三种新颖的骨骼数据增强方案。我们表明，使用所提出的增强方法来生成运动质量分数可以比现有方法显着提高性能。最后，我们提出了一种新颖的基于 Transformer 的 MQA 架构。提出并研究了四种新颖的特征提取器，允许变压器网络对骨架数据进行操作。我们表明，在所提出的特征提取器的设计中添加注意力机制可以使变压器网络关注对执行运动做出重大贡献的特定身体部位。与现有方法相比，我们报告称，与现有方法相比，UI-PRMD 数据集上的运动质量得分预测提高了 12%，KIMORE 数据集上的运动质量得分预测提高了 21%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的运动质量评估框架，通过骨骼数据增强和Transformer架构改进家庭康复中的运动质量量化反馈。
AI.motivation: 家庭康复缺乏实时运动正确性反馈，传统方法难以提供有效量化评估，需借助深度学习提升自动化评估准确性。
AI.method: 设计三种骨骼数据增强方案，结合Transformer架构与四个特征提取器，利用注意力机制聚焦关键身体部位运动特征。
AI.result: 在UI-PRMD数据集上提升12%，KIMORE数据集上提升21%，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过注意力引导的深度学习方法显著提升运动质量评估性能，可有效支持家庭康复的智能化反馈需求。

authors_text: Hermish Mehta,Daniel Reichman
title: Local treewidth of random and noisy graphs with applications to stopping contagion in networks
title_zh: 随机和噪声图的局部树宽及其用于阻止网络传染的应用
abstract: We study the notion of local treewidth in sparse random graphs: the maximum treewidth over all $k$-vertex subgraphs of an $n$-vertex graph. When $k$ is not too large, we give nearly tight bounds for this local treewidth parameter; we also derive tight bounds for the local treewidth of noisy trees, trees where every non-edge is added independently with small probability. We apply our upper bounds on the local treewidth to obtain fixed parameter tractable algorithms (on random graphs and noisy trees) for edge-removal problems centered around containing a contagious process evolving over a network. In these problems, our main parameter of study is $k$, the number of initially ``infected'' vertices in the network. For the random graph models we consider and a certain range of parameters the running time of our algorithms on $n$-vertex graphs is $2^{o(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$, improving upon the $2^{Ω(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$ performance of the best-known algorithms designed for worst-case instances of these edge deletion problems.
summary: We study the notion of local treewidth in sparse random graphs: the maximum treewidth over all $k$-vertex subgraphs of an $n$-vertex graph. When $k$ is not too large, we give nearly tight bounds for this local treewidth parameter; we also derive tight bounds for the local treewidth of noisy trees, trees where every non-edge is added independently with small probability. We apply our upper bounds on the local treewidth to obtain fixed parameter tractable algorithms (on random graphs and noisy trees) for edge-removal problems centered around containing a contagious process evolving over a network. In these problems, our main parameter of study is $k$, the number of initially ``infected'' vertices in the network. For the random graph models we consider and a certain range of parameters the running time of our algorithms on $n$-vertex graphs is $2^{o(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$, improving upon the $2^{Ω(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$ performance of the best-known algorithms designed for worst-case instances of these edge deletion problems.
abstract_zh: 我们研究稀疏随机图中局部树宽的概念：$n$ 顶点图的所有 $k$ 顶点子图的最大树宽。当 $k$ 不太大时，我们为这个局部树宽参数给出近乎严格的界限；我们还得出了噪声树的局部树宽的严格界限，其中每个非边都是以小概率独立添加的。我们将上限应用于局部树宽，以获得固定参数易处理算法（在随机图和噪声树上），以解决以包含通过网络演变的传染过程为中心的边缘去除问题。在这些问题中，我们的主要研究参数是 $k$，即网络中最初“感染”的顶点数量。对于我们考虑的随机图模型和一定范围的参数，我们的算法在 $n$ 顶点图上的运行时间为 $2^{o(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$，改进了针对这些边缘删除问题的最坏情况实例设计的最著名算法的 $2^{Ω(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$ 性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究稀疏随机图和噪声树的局部树宽，并将其应用于网络中遏制传染过程的边删除问题。
AI.motivation: 局部树宽是图论中的重要参数，影响算法设计效率。在随机图和噪声树中，局部树宽的特性有助于开发更高效的参数化算法，解决网络传染控制问题。
AI.method: 通过分析稀疏随机图和噪声树的局部树宽上界，结合固定参数可解算法（FPT），设计针对边删除问题的高效算法。
AI.result: 在随机图模型和噪声树中，算法时间复杂度达到$2^{o(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$，优于传统最坏情况下的$2^{Ω(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$。
AI.conclusion: 局部树宽分析为网络传染控制提供了理论支持，证明在随机图模型下可实现更高效的参数化算法。

In these problems, our main parameter of study is $k$, the number of initially ``infected'' vertices in the network. For the random graph models we consider and a certain range of parameters the running time of our algorithms on $n$-vertex graphs is $2^{o(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$, improving upon the $2^{Ω(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$ performance of the best-known algorithms designed for worst-case instances of these edge deletion problems. 我们研究稀疏随机图中局部树宽的概念：$n$ 顶点图的所有 $k$ 顶点子图的最大树宽。当 $k$ 不太大时，我们为这个局部树宽参数给出近乎严格的界限；我们还得出了噪声树的局部树宽的严格界限，其中每个非边都是以小概率独立添加的。我们将上限应用于局部树宽，以获得固定参数易处理算法（在随机图和噪声树上），以解决以包含通过网络演变的传染过程为中心的边缘去除问题。在这些问题中，我们的主要研究参数是 $k$，即网络中最初“感染”的顶点数量。对于我们考虑的随机图模型和一定范围的参数，我们的算法在 $n$ 顶点图上的运行时间为 $2^{o(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$，改进了针对这些边缘删除问题的最坏情况实例设计的最著名算法的 $2^{Ω(k)}\textrm{poly}(n)$ 性能。 本文研究稀疏随机图和噪声树的局部树宽，并将其应用于网络中遏制传染过程的边删除问题。 Hermish Mehta,Daniel Reichman cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Ananth Reddy Bhimireddy,John Lee Burns,Saptarshi Purkayastha,Judy Wawira Gichoya
title: Few-Shot Transfer Learning to improve Chest X-Ray pathology detection using limited triplets
title_zh: 使用有限三元组的少样本迁移学习改进胸部 X 射线病理检测
abstract: Deep learning approaches applied to medical imaging have reached near-human or better-than-human performance on many diagnostic tasks. For instance, the CheXpert competition on detecting pathologies in chest x-rays has shown excellent multi-class classification performance. However, training and validating deep learning models require extensive collections of images and still produce false inferences, as identified by a human-in-the-loop. In this paper, we introduce a practical approach to improve the predictions of a pre-trained model through Few-Shot Learning (FSL). After training and validating a model, a small number of false inference images are collected to retrain the model using \textbf{\textit{Image Triplets}} - a false positive or false negative, a true positive, and a true negative. The retrained FSL model produces considerable gains in performance with only a few epochs and few images. In addition, FSL opens rapid retraining opportunities for human-in-the-loop systems, where a radiologist can relabel false inferences, and the model can be quickly retrained. We compare our retrained model performance with existing FSL approaches in medical imaging that train and evaluate models at once.
summary: Deep learning approaches applied to medical imaging have reached near-human or better-than-human performance on many diagnostic tasks. For instance, the CheXpert competition on detecting pathologies in chest x-rays has shown excellent multi-class classification performance. However, training and validating deep learning models require extensive collections of images and still produce false inferences, as identified by a human-in-the-loop. In this paper, we introduce a practical approach to improve the predictions of a pre-trained model through Few-Shot Learning (FSL). After training and validating a model, a small number of false inference images are collected to retrain the model using \textbf{\textit{Image Triplets}} - a false positive or false negative, a true positive, and a true negative. The retrained FSL model produces considerable gains in performance with only a few epochs and few images. In addition, FSL opens rapid retraining opportunities for human-in-the-loop systems, where a radiologist can relabel false inferences, and the model can be quickly retrained. We compare our retrained model performance with existing FSL approaches in medical imaging that train and evaluate models at once.
abstract_zh: 应用于医学成像的深度学习方法在许多诊断任务上已达到接近人类或优于人类的性能。例如，关于检测胸部 X 光病理的 CheXpert 竞赛表现出了出色的多类分类性能。然而，训练和验证深度学习模型需要大量图像收集，并且仍然会产生错误的推论，正如人在循环中所识别的那样。在本文中，我们介绍了一种通过少样本学习（FSL）改进预训练模型预测的实用方法。训练和验证模型后，收集少量错误推理图像，以使用 \textbf{\textit{Image Triplets}} - 假阳性或假阴性、真阳​​性和真阴性重新训练模型。重新训练的 FSL 模型仅用几个 epoch 和很少的图像就可以产生相当大的性能提升。此外，FSL 为人机交互系统提供了快速重新训练的机会，放射科医生可以重新标记错误的推论，并且模型可以快速重新训练。我们将重新训练的模型性能与医学成像中同时训练和评估模型的现有 FSL 方法进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于少量样本迁移学习的方法，通过使用图像三元组（假阳性/假阴性、真阳性、真阴性）改进胸部X光病理检测模型的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在医学影像诊断中表现优异，但模型仍存在误判问题，且获取大量标注数据成本高昂，需探索高效的小样本微调方法。
AI.method: 在预训练模型基础上，收集少量误判样本构成三元组，利用Few-Shot Learning（FSL）框架进行快速微调，结合放射科医生反馈实现模型迭代。
AI.result: 实验表明，仅需少量图像和少量训练周期即可显著提升模型性能，且支持人类在环系统中的快速再训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为医学影像领域提供了高效的小样本模型优化方案，可在保证诊断准确性的同时降低数据获取和模型更新成本。

authors_text: Suiyi Zhao,Zhao Zhang,Richang Hong,Mingliang Xu,Yi Yang,Meng Wang
title: FCL-GAN: A Lightweight and Real-Time Baseline for Unsupervised Blind Image Deblurring
title_zh: FCL-GAN：无监督盲图像去模糊的轻量级实时基线
comment: Please cite this work as: Suiyi Zhao, Zhao Zhang, Richang Hong, Mingliang Xu, Yi Yang and Meng Wang, "FCL-GAN: A Lightweight and Real-Time Baseline for Unsupervised Blind Image Deblurring," In: Proceedings of the 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM), Lisbon, Portugal, June 2022
comments: Please cite this work as: Suiyi Zhao, Zhao Zhang, Richang Hong, Mingliang Xu, Yi Yang and Meng Wang, "FCL-GAN: A Lightweight and Real-Time Baseline for Unsupervised Blind Image Deblurring," In: Proceedings of the 30th ACM International Conference on Multimedia (ACM MM), Lisbon, Portugal, June 2022
abstract: Blind image deblurring (BID) remains a challenging and significant task. Benefiting from the strong fitting ability of deep learning, paired data-driven supervised BID method has obtained great progress. However, paired data are usually synthesized by hand, and the realistic blurs are more complex than synthetic ones, which makes the supervised methods inept at modeling realistic blurs and hinders their real-world applications. As such, unsupervised deep BID method without paired data offers certain advantages, but current methods still suffer from some drawbacks, e.g., bulky model size, long inference time, and strict image resolution and domain requirements. In this paper, we propose a lightweight and real-time unsupervised BID baseline, termed Frequency-domain Contrastive Loss Constrained Lightweight CycleGAN (shortly, FCL-GAN), with attractive properties, i.e., no image domain limitation, no image resolution limitation, 25x lighter than SOTA, and 5x faster than SOTA. To guarantee the lightweight property and performance superiority, two new collaboration units called lightweight domain conversion unit(LDCU) and parameter-free frequency-domain contrastive unit(PFCU) are designed. LDCU mainly implements inter-domain conversion in lightweight manner. PFCU further explores the similarity measure, external difference and internal connection between the blurred domain and sharp domain images in frequency domain, without involving extra parameters. Extensive experiments on several image datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our FCL-GAN in terms of performance, model size and reference time.
summary: Blind image deblurring (BID) remains a challenging and significant task. Benefiting from the strong fitting ability of deep learning, paired data-driven supervised BID method has obtained great progress. However, paired data are usually synthesized by hand, and the realistic blurs are more complex than synthetic ones, which makes the supervised methods inept at modeling realistic blurs and hinders their real-world applications. As such, unsupervised deep BID method without paired data offers certain advantages, but current methods still suffer from some drawbacks, e.g., bulky model size, long inference time, and strict image resolution and domain requirements. In this paper, we propose a lightweight and real-time unsupervised BID baseline, termed Frequency-domain Contrastive Loss Constrained Lightweight CycleGAN (shortly, FCL-GAN), with attractive properties, i.e., no image domain limitation, no image resolution limitation, 25x lighter than SOTA, and 5x faster than SOTA. To guarantee the lightweight property and performance superiority, two new collaboration units called lightweight domain conversion unit(LDCU) and parameter-free frequency-domain contrastive unit(PFCU) are designed. LDCU mainly implements inter-domain conversion in lightweight manner. PFCU further explores the similarity measure, external difference and internal connection between the blurred domain and sharp domain images in frequency domain, without involving extra parameters. Extensive experiments on several image datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our FCL-GAN in terms of performance, model size and reference time.
abstract_zh: 盲图像去模糊（BID）仍然是一项具有挑战性且重要的任务。得益于深度学习强大的拟合能力，配对数据驱动的监督BID方法取得了长足的进步。然而，配对数据通常是手工合成的，而真实的模糊比合成的更加复杂，这使得监督方法无法对真实的模糊进行建模，并阻碍了它们在现实世界中的应用。因此，没有配对数据的无监督深度 BID 方法具有一定的优势，但当前的方法仍然存在一些缺点，例如模型大小庞大、推理时间长以及严格的图像分辨率和域要求。在本文中，我们提出了一种轻量级、实时的无监督 BID 基线，称为频域对比损失约束轻量级 CycleGAN（简称 FCL-GAN），具有吸引人的特性，即没有图像域限制、没有图像分辨率限制、比 SOTA 轻 25 倍、比 SOTA 快 5 倍。为了保证轻量级特性和性能优势，设计了两个新的协作单元：轻量级域转换单元（LDCU）和无参数频域对比单元（PFCU）。 LDCU主要以轻量级的方式实现域间转换。 PFCU在不涉及额外参数的情况下，进一步探索了频域中模糊域和清晰域图像之间的相似性度量、外部差异和内部联系。对多个图像数据集的大量实验证明了我们的 FCL-GAN 在性能、模型大小和参考时间方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量且实时的无监督盲图像去模糊方法FCL-GAN，解决现有方法在模型大小、推理速度和真实场景适应性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有监督学习方法依赖合成数据难以处理真实模糊，无监督方法存在模型臃肿、推理慢、分辨率和领域限制等问题，需开发更高效实用的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计轻量领域转换单元(LDCU)和无参数频域对比单元(PFCU)，通过频域分析模糊域与清晰域图像的相似性与差异性，构建轻量级CycleGAN框架。
AI.result: FCL-GAN在多个数据集上验证有效，模型体积仅为SOTA的1/25，推理速度达5倍于SOTA，且无分辨率和领域限制。
AI.conclusion: FCL-GAN通过创新网络结构和频域约束，在保持性能的同时显著提升效率，为真实场景盲去模糊提供实用化方案。

LDCU mainly implements inter-domain conversion in lightweight manner. PFCU further explores the similarity measure, external difference and internal connection between the blurred domain and sharp domain images in frequency domain, without involving extra parameters. Extensive experiments on several image datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our FCL-GAN in terms of performance, model size and reference time. 盲图像去模糊（BID）仍然是一项具有挑战性且重要的任务。得益于深度学习强大的拟合能力，配对数据驱动的监督BID方法取得了长足的进步。然而，配对数据通常是手工合成的，而真实的模糊比合成的更加复杂，这使得监督方法无法对真实的模糊进行建模，并阻碍了它们在现实世界中的应用。因此，没有配对数据的无监督深度 BID 方法具有一定的优势，但当前的方法仍然存在一些缺点，例如模型大小庞大、推理时间长以及严格的图像分辨率和域要求。在本文中，我们提出了一种轻量级、实时的无监督 BID 基线，称为频域对比损失约束轻量级 CycleGAN（简称 FCL-GAN），具有吸引人的特性，即没有图像域限制、没有图像分辨率限制、比 SOTA 轻 25 倍、比 SOTA 快 5 倍。为了保证轻量级特性和性能优势，设计了两个新的协作单元：轻量级域转换单元（LDCU）和无参数频域对比单元（PFCU）。 LDCU主要以轻量级的方式实现域间转换。 PFCU在不涉及额外参数的情况下，进一步探索了频域中模糊域和清晰域图像之间的相似性度量、外部差异和内部联系。对多个图像数据集的大量实验证明了我们的 FCL-GAN 在性能、模型大小和参考时间方面的有效性。 本文提出一种轻量且实时的无监督盲图像去模糊方法FCL-GAN，解决现有方法在模型大小、推理速度和真实场景适应性方面的不足。 Suiyi Zhao,Zhao Zhang,Richang Hong,Mingliang Xu,Yi Yang,Meng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Di Wu,Yi He,Xin Luo
title: Graph-incorporated Latent Factor Analysis for High-dimensional and Sparse Matrices
title_zh: 高维稀疏矩阵的图结合潜在因子分析
abstract: A High-dimensional and sparse (HiDS) matrix is frequently encountered in a big data-related application like an e-commerce system or a social network services system. To perform highly accurate representation learning on it is of great significance owing to the great desire of extracting latent knowledge and patterns from it. Latent factor analysis (LFA), which represents an HiDS matrix by learning the low-rank embeddings based on its observed entries only, is one of the most effective and efficient approaches to this issue. However, most existing LFA-based models perform such embeddings on a HiDS matrix directly without exploiting its hidden graph structures, thereby resulting in accuracy loss. To address this issue, this paper proposes a graph-incorporated latent factor analysis (GLFA) model. It adopts two-fold ideas: 1) a graph is constructed for identifying the hidden high-order interaction (HOI) among nodes described by an HiDS matrix, and 2) a recurrent LFA structure is carefully designed with the incorporation of HOI, thereby improving the representa-tion learning ability of a resultant model. Experimental results on three real-world datasets demonstrate that GLFA outperforms six state-of-the-art models in predicting the missing data of an HiDS matrix, which evidently supports its strong representation learning ability to HiDS data.
summary: A High-dimensional and sparse (HiDS) matrix is frequently encountered in a big data-related application like an e-commerce system or a social network services system. To perform highly accurate representation learning on it is of great significance owing to the great desire of extracting latent knowledge and patterns from it. Latent factor analysis (LFA), which represents an HiDS matrix by learning the low-rank embeddings based on its observed entries only, is one of the most effective and efficient approaches to this issue. However, most existing LFA-based models perform such embeddings on a HiDS matrix directly without exploiting its hidden graph structures, thereby resulting in accuracy loss. To address this issue, this paper proposes a graph-incorporated latent factor analysis (GLFA) model. It adopts two-fold ideas: 1) a graph is constructed for identifying the hidden high-order interaction (HOI) among nodes described by an HiDS matrix, and 2) a recurrent LFA structure is carefully designed with the incorporation of HOI, thereby improving the representa-tion learning ability of a resultant model. Experimental results on three real-world datasets demonstrate that GLFA outperforms six state-of-the-art models in predicting the missing data of an HiDS matrix, which evidently supports its strong representation learning ability to HiDS data.
abstract_zh: 高维稀疏（HiDS）矩阵在大数据相关应用（如电子商务系统或社交网络服务系统）中经常遇到。由于人们迫切希望从中提取潜在知识和模式，对其进行高精度的表示学习具有重要意义。潜在因子分析 (LFA) 是解决此问题最有效和高效的方法之一，它通过仅基于观察到的条目学习低秩嵌入来表示 HiDS 矩阵。然而，大多数现有的基于 LFA 的模型直接在 HiDS 矩阵上执行此类嵌入，而没有利用其隐藏的图结构，从而导致准确性损失。为了解决这个问题，本文提出了一种图合并潜在因素分析（GLFA）模型。它采用两重思想：1）构建一个图来识别由 HiDS 矩阵描述的节点之间隐藏的高阶交互（HOI），2）结合 HOI 精心设计循环 LFA 结构，从而提高所得模型的表示学习能力。在三个真实数据集上的实验结果表明，GLFA 在预测 HiDS 矩阵缺失数据方面优于六种最先进的模型，这显然支持了其对 HiDS 数据的强大表示学习能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合图结构的潜在因子分析方法（GLFA），用于提升高维稀疏矩阵的表示学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有潜在因子分析（LFA）方法在处理高维稀疏矩阵时未有效利用其隐藏的图结构，导致表示学习精度不足。
AI.method: 通过构建图结构挖掘节点的高阶交互关系，并设计融合高阶交互的递归LFA框架，增强模型对稀疏数据的表征能力。
AI.result: 在三个真实数据集上的实验表明，GLFA在预测高维稀疏矩阵缺失数据的任务中优于六个最先进模型。
AI.conclusion: 将图结构与潜在因子分析结合能显著提升高维稀疏矩阵的表示学习性能，验证了GLFA方法的有效性。

authors_text: Chi-Yeh Chen
title: Scheduling Coflows for Minimizing the Total Weighted Completion Time in Heterogeneous Parallel Networks
title_zh: 调度协流以最小化异构并行网络中的总加权完成时间
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.02651
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2204.02651
abstract: Coflow is a network abstraction used to represent communication patterns in data centers. The coflow scheduling problem in large data centers is one of the most important $NP$-hard problems. Many previous studies on coflow scheduling mainly focus on the single-core model. However, with the growth of data centers, this single-core model is no longer sufficient. This paper considers the coflow scheduling problem in heterogeneous parallel networks. The heterogeneous parallel network is an architecture based on multiple network cores running in parallel. In this paper, two polynomial-time approximation algorithms are developed for scheduling divisible and indivisible coflows in heterogeneous parallel networks, respectively. Considering the divisible coflow scheduling problem, the proposed algorithm achieve an approximation ratio of $O(\log m/ \log \log m)$ with arbitrary release times, where $m$ is the number of network cores. On the other hand, when coflow is indivisible, the proposed algorithm achieve an approximation ratio of $O\left(m\left(\log m/ \log \log m\right)^2\right)$ with arbitrary release times.
summary: Coflow is a network abstraction used to represent communication patterns in data centers. The coflow scheduling problem in large data centers is one of the most important $NP$-hard problems. Many previous studies on coflow scheduling mainly focus on the single-core model. However, with the growth of data centers, this single-core model is no longer sufficient. This paper considers the coflow scheduling problem in heterogeneous parallel networks. The heterogeneous parallel network is an architecture based on multiple network cores running in parallel. In this paper, two polynomial-time approximation algorithms are developed for scheduling divisible and indivisible coflows in heterogeneous parallel networks, respectively. Considering the divisible coflow scheduling problem, the proposed algorithm achieve an approximation ratio of $O(\log m/ \log \log m)$ with arbitrary release times, where $m$ is the number of network cores. On the other hand, when coflow is indivisible, the proposed algorithm achieve an approximation ratio of $O\left(m\left(\log m/ \log \log m\right)^2\right)$ with arbitrary release times.
abstract_zh: Coflow 是一种网络抽象，用于表示数据中心中的通信模式。大型数据中心的协流调度问题是最重要的$NP$难题之一。以往许多关于协流调度的研究主要集中在单核模型上。然而，随着数据中心的增长，这种单核模型已经不够用了。本文考虑异构并行网络中的协流调度问题。异构并行网络是一种基于多个网络核心并行运行的架构。本文提出了两种多项式时间近似算法，分别用于异构并行网络中可分和不可分协流的调度。考虑到可分协流调度问题，该算法在任意释放次数下实现了$O(\log m/ \log \log m)$的近似比率，其中$m$是网络核心的数量。另一方面，当coflow不可分时，所提出的算法在任意释放时间下实现了$O\left(m\left(\log m/ \log \log m\right)^2\right)$的近似率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在异构并行网络中调度可分和不可分coflow以最小化总加权完成时间的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统单核模型无法满足大规模数据中心需求，需针对异构并行网络架构设计更高效的coflow调度算法。
AI.method: 提出两种多项式时间近似算法，分别处理可分和不可分coflow，考虑任意释放时间约束。
AI.result: 可分coflow算法达到O(log m / log log m)近似比，不可分coflow算法达到O(m(log m / log log m)^2)近似比。
AI.conclusion: 所提算法有效解决了异构并行网络中的coflow调度难题，为实际数据中心提供了理论支撑。

authors_text: Guancheng Chen,Junli Lin,Huabiao Qin
title: UAMD-Net: A Unified Adaptive Multimodal Neural Network for Dense Depth Completion
title_zh: UAMD-Net：用于密集深度补全的统一自适应多模态神经网络
abstract: Depth prediction is a critical problem in robotics applications especially autonomous driving. Generally, depth prediction based on binocular stereo matching and fusion of monocular image and laser point cloud are two mainstream methods. However, the former usually suffers from overfitting while building cost volume, and the latter has a limited generalization due to the lack of geometric constraint. To solve these problems, we propose a novel multimodal neural network, namely UAMD-Net, for dense depth completion based on fusion of binocular stereo matching and the weak constrain from the sparse point clouds. Specifically, the sparse point clouds are converted to sparse depth map and sent to the multimodal feature encoder (MFE) with binocular image, constructing a cross-modal cost volume. Then, it will be further processed by the multimodal feature aggregator (MFA) and the depth regression layer. Furthermore, the existing multimodal methods ignore the problem of modal dependence, that is, the network will not work when a certain modal input has a problem. Therefore, we propose a new training strategy called Modal-dropout which enables the network to be adaptively trained with multiple modal inputs and inference with specific modal inputs. Benefiting from the flexible network structure and adaptive training method, our proposed network can realize unified training under various modal input conditions. Comprehensive experiments conducted on KITTI depth completion benchmark demonstrate that our method produces robust results and outperforms other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Depth prediction is a critical problem in robotics applications especially autonomous driving. Generally, depth prediction based on binocular stereo matching and fusion of monocular image and laser point cloud are two mainstream methods. However, the former usually suffers from overfitting while building cost volume, and the latter has a limited generalization due to the lack of geometric constraint. To solve these problems, we propose a novel multimodal neural network, namely UAMD-Net, for dense depth completion based on fusion of binocular stereo matching and the weak constrain from the sparse point clouds. Specifically, the sparse point clouds are converted to sparse depth map and sent to the multimodal feature encoder (MFE) with binocular image, constructing a cross-modal cost volume. Then, it will be further processed by the multimodal feature aggregator (MFA) and the depth regression layer. Furthermore, the existing multimodal methods ignore the problem of modal dependence, that is, the network will not work when a certain modal input has a problem. Therefore, we propose a new training strategy called Modal-dropout which enables the network to be adaptively trained with multiple modal inputs and inference with specific modal inputs. Benefiting from the flexible network structure and adaptive training method, our proposed network can realize unified training under various modal input conditions. Comprehensive experiments conducted on KITTI depth completion benchmark demonstrate that our method produces robust results and outperforms other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 深度预测是机器人应用尤其是自动驾驶中的一个关键问题。一般来说，基于双目立体匹配的深度预测以及单目图像与激光点云的融合是两种主流方法。然而，前者在构建成本量时通常会出现过度拟合，而后者由于缺乏几何约束，泛化能力有限。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态神经网络，即 UAMD-Net，用于基于双目立体匹配和稀疏点云弱约束融合的密集深度完成。具体来说，稀疏点云被转换为稀疏深度图，并与双目图像一起发送到多模态特征编码器（MFE），构建跨模态成本体积。然后，它将由多模态特征聚合器（MFA）和深度回归层进一步处理。此外，现有的多模态方法忽略了模态依赖性问题，即当某个模态输入出现问题时网络将无法工作。因此，我们提出了一种称为 Modal-dropout 的新训练策略，该策略使网络能够使用多个模态输入进行自适应训练，并使用特定模态输入进行推理。得益于灵活的网络结构和自适应训练方法，我们提出的网络可以实现各种模态输入条件下的统一训练。在 KITTI 深度完成基准上进行的综合实验表明，我们的方法产生了稳健的结果，并且优于其他最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的自适应多模态神经网络UAMD-Net，用于结合双目视觉与稀疏点云数据的密集深度补全任务。
AI.motivation: 传统双目匹配易过拟合，单目图像与激光点云融合缺乏几何约束且泛化能力差，且现有方法未解决模态依赖问题（某模态失效时网络失效）。
AI.method: 将稀疏点云转换为深度图，与双目图像输入多模态特征编码器（MFE）构建跨模态代价体，经多模态特征聚合器（MFA）和深度回归层处理；提出Modal-dropout训练策略，实现多模态自适应训练与特定模态推理。
AI.result: 在KITTI深度补全基准测试中，该方法在鲁棒性和精度上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: UAMD-Net通过融合双目视觉与稀疏点云、引入模态自适应训练策略，有效解决了深度补全中的模态依赖与几何约束问题。

search_text: UAMD-Net: A Unified Adaptive Multimodal Neural Network for Dense Depth Completion UAMD-Net：用于密集深度补全的统一自适应多模态神经网络 Depth prediction is a critical problem in robotics applications especially autonomous driving. Generally, depth prediction based on binocular stereo matching and fusion of monocular image and laser point cloud are two mainstream methods. However, the former usually suffers from overfitting while building cost volume, and the latter has a limited generalization due to the lack of geometric constraint. To solve these problems, we propose a novel multimodal neural network, namely UAMD-Net, for dense depth completion based on fusion of binocular stereo matching and the weak constrain from the sparse point clouds. Specifically, the sparse point clouds are converted to sparse depth map and sent to the multimodal feature encoder (MFE) with binocular image, constructing a cross-modal cost volume. Then, it will be further processed by the multimodal feature aggregator (MFA) and the depth regression layer. Furthermore, the existing multimodal methods ignore the problem of modal dependence, that is, the network will not work when a certain modal input has a problem. Therefore, we propose a new training strategy called Modal-dropout which enables the network to be adaptively trained with multiple modal inputs and inference with specific modal inputs. Benefiting from the flexible network structure and adaptive training method, our proposed network can realize unified training under various modal input conditions. Comprehensive experiments conducted on KITTI depth completion benchmark demonstrate that our method produces robust results and outperforms other state-of-the-art methods. 深度预测是机器人应用尤其是自动驾驶中的一个关键问题。一般来说，基于双目立体匹配的深度预测以及单目图像与激光点云的融合是两种主流方法。然而，前者在构建成本量时通常会出现过度拟合，而后者由于缺乏几何约束，泛化能力有限。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态神经网络，即 UAMD-Net，用于基于双目立体匹配和稀疏点云弱约束融合的密集深度完成。具体来说，稀疏点云被转换为稀疏深度图，并与双目图像一起发送到多模态特征编码器（MFE），构建跨模态成本体积。然后，它将由多模态特征聚合器（MFA）和深度回归层进一步处理。此外，现有的多模态方法忽略了模态依赖性问题，即当某个模态输入出现问题时网络将无法工作。因此，我们提出了一种称为 Modal-dropout 的新训练策略，该策略使网络能够使用多个模态输入进行自适应训练，并使用特定模态输入进行推理。得益于灵活的网络结构和自适应训练方法，我们提出的网络可以实现各种模态输入条件下的统一训练。在 KITTI 深度完成基准上进行的综合实验表明，我们的方法产生了稳健的结果，并且优于其他最先进的方法。 本文提出一种统一的自适应多模态神经网络UAMD-Net，用于结合双目视觉与稀疏点云数据的密集深度补全任务。 Guancheng Chen,Junli Lin,Huabiao Qin cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Iván Vallés-Pérez,Emilio Soria-Olivas,Marcelino Martínez-Sober,Antonio J. Serrano-López,Juan Gómez-Sanchís,Fernando Mateo
title: Approaching sales forecasting using recurrent neural networks and transformers
title_zh: 使用循环神经网络和变压器进行销售预测
comment: Accepted for publication in Expert Systems and Applications
comments: Accepted for publication in Expert Systems and Applications
abstract: Accurate and fast demand forecast is one of the hot topics in supply chain for enabling the precise execution of the corresponding downstream processes (inbound and outbound planning, inventory placement, network planning, etc). We develop three alternatives to tackle the problem of forecasting the customer sales at day/store/item level using deep learning techniques and the Corporación Favorita data set, published as part of a Kaggle competition. Our empirical results show how good performance can be achieved by using a simple sequence to sequence architecture with minimal data preprocessing effort. Additionally, we describe a training trick for making the model more time independent and hence improving generalization over time. The proposed solution achieves a RMSLE of around 0.54, which is competitive with other more specific solutions to the problem proposed in the Kaggle competition.
summary: Accurate and fast demand forecast is one of the hot topics in supply chain for enabling the precise execution of the corresponding downstream processes (inbound and outbound planning, inventory placement, network planning, etc). We develop three alternatives to tackle the problem of forecasting the customer sales at day/store/item level using deep learning techniques and the Corporación Favorita data set, published as part of a Kaggle competition. Our empirical results show how good performance can be achieved by using a simple sequence to sequence architecture with minimal data preprocessing effort. Additionally, we describe a training trick for making the model more time independent and hence improving generalization over time. The proposed solution achieves a RMSLE of around 0.54, which is competitive with other more specific solutions to the problem proposed in the Kaggle competition.
abstract_zh: 准确、快速的需求预测是供应链中的热门话题之一，以实现相应下游流程（进出库计划、库存布局、网络规划等）的精确执行。我们开发了三种替代方案，使用深度学习技术和作为 Kaggle 竞赛的一部分发布的 Corporación Favorita 数据集来解决预测日/商店/商品级别的客户销售问题。我们的实证结果表明，通过使用简单的序列到序列架构，以最少的数据预处理工作，可以实现良好的性能。此外，我们描述了一种训练技巧，可以使模型更加独立于时间，从而随着时间的推移提高泛化能力。所提出的解决方案的 RMSLE 约为 0.54，这与 Kaggle 竞赛中提出的问题的其他更具体的解决方案具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用循环神经网络和变换器模型，对客户在商店和商品级别的销售数据进行预测。
AI.motivation: 供应链中准确快速的需求预测对于下游流程的精准执行至关重要，但现有方法存在不足，需探索更高效的深度学习解决方案。
AI.method: 基于序列到序列架构，结合深度学习技术与Corporación Favorita数据集，采用最小化数据预处理策略，并引入时间独立性训练技巧以提升泛化能力。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到RMSLE 0.54的预测精度，与Kaggle竞赛中其他特定方法表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 简单序列模型配合数据预处理优化可实现有效预测，时间独立性训练策略有助于提升模型泛化能力，为后续研究提供可行方向。

authors_text: Gen Luo,Yiyi Zhou,Xiaoshuai Sun,Yan Wang,Liujuan Cao,Yongjian Wu,Feiyue Huang,Rongrong Ji
title: Towards Lightweight Transformer via Group-wise Transformation for Vision-and-Language Tasks
title_zh: 通过视觉和语言任务的分组转换迈向轻量级 Transformer
abstract: Despite the exciting performance, Transformer is criticized for its excessive parameters and computation cost. However, compressing Transformer remains as an open problem due to its internal complexity of the layer designs, i.e., Multi-Head Attention (MHA) and Feed-Forward Network (FFN). To address this issue, we introduce Group-wise Transformation towards a universal yet lightweight Transformer for vision-and-language tasks, termed as LW-Transformer. LW-Transformer applies Group-wise Transformation to reduce both the parameters and computations of Transformer, while also preserving its two main properties, i.e., the efficient attention modeling on diverse subspaces of MHA, and the expanding-scaling feature transformation of FFN. We apply LW-Transformer to a set of Transformer-based networks, and quantitatively measure them on three vision-and-language tasks and six benchmark datasets. Experimental results show that while saving a large number of parameters and computations, LW-Transformer achieves very competitive performance against the original Transformer networks for vision-and-language tasks. To examine the generalization ability, we also apply our optimization strategy to a recently proposed image Transformer called Swin-Transformer for image classification, where the effectiveness can be also confirmed
summary: Despite the exciting performance, Transformer is criticized for its excessive parameters and computation cost. However, compressing Transformer remains as an open problem due to its internal complexity of the layer designs, i.e., Multi-Head Attention (MHA) and Feed-Forward Network (FFN). To address this issue, we introduce Group-wise Transformation towards a universal yet lightweight Transformer for vision-and-language tasks, termed as LW-Transformer. LW-Transformer applies Group-wise Transformation to reduce both the parameters and computations of Transformer, while also preserving its two main properties, i.e., the efficient attention modeling on diverse subspaces of MHA, and the expanding-scaling feature transformation of FFN. We apply LW-Transformer to a set of Transformer-based networks, and quantitatively measure them on three vision-and-language tasks and six benchmark datasets. Experimental results show that while saving a large number of parameters and computations, LW-Transformer achieves very competitive performance against the original Transformer networks for vision-and-language tasks. To examine the generalization ability, we also apply our optimization strategy to a recently proposed image Transformer called Swin-Transformer for image classification, where the effectiveness can be also confirmed
abstract_zh: 尽管性能令人兴奋，但 Transformer 因其过多的参数和计算成本而受到批评。然而，由于层设计的内部复杂性，即多头注意力（MHA）和前馈网络（FFN），压缩 Transformer 仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了针对视觉和语言任务的通用且轻量级 Transformer 的 Group-wise Transformation，称为 LW-Transformer。 LW-Transformer应用Group-wise Transformation来减少Transformer的参数和计算量，同时保留了它的两个主要特性，即MHA的不同子空间上的高效注意力建模和FFN的扩展缩放特征变换。我们将 LW-Transformer 应用于一组基于 Transformer 的网络，并在三个视觉和语言任务和六个基准数据集上对它们进行定量测量。实验结果表明，在节省大量参数和计算量的同时，LW-Transformer 在视觉和语言任务上实现了与原始 Transformer 网络相比非常有竞争力的性能。为了检验泛化能力，我们还将我们的优化策略应用到最近提出的用于图像分类的图像 Transformer（称为 Swin-Transformer），其有效性也得到了证实

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量化Transformer架构LW-Transformer，通过组内变换机制在保持性能的同时减少参数和计算量，适用于视觉-语言任务。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型参数量大且计算成本高，现有压缩方法难以处理其复杂的层设计（如多头注意力和前馈网络），亟需高效压缩方案。
AI.method: 设计组内变换机制，对多头注意力和前馈网络进行参数共享与计算优化，在减少参数量的同时保留子空间注意力建模和特征变换能力，并在多个视觉-语言任务中验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明LW-Transformer在节省大量参数和计算量的情况下，性能与原始Transformer相当；应用于Swin-Transformer时也验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 组内变换机制能有效压缩Transformer模型，为视觉-语言任务提供高效且性能优越的轻量化解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量化Transformer架构LW-Transformer，通过组内变换机制在保持性能的同时减少参数和计算量，适用于视觉-语言任务。
ai_content.motivation: Transformer模型参数量大且计算成本高，现有压缩方法难以处理其复杂的层设计（如多头注意力和前馈网络），亟需高效压缩方案。
ai_content.method: 设计组内变换机制，对多头注意力和前馈网络进行参数共享与计算优化，在减少参数量的同时保留子空间注意力建模和特征变换能力，并在多个视觉-语言任务中验证效果。
ai_content.result: 实验表明LW-Transformer在节省大量参数和计算量的情况下，性能与原始Transformer相当；应用于Swin-Transformer时也验证了方法有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 组内变换机制能有效压缩Transformer模型，为视觉-语言任务提供高效且性能优越的轻量化解决方案。

search_text: Towards Lightweight Transformer via Group-wise Transformation for Vision-and-Language Tasks 通过视觉和语言任务的分组转换迈向轻量级 Transformer Despite the exciting performance, Transformer is criticized for its excessive parameters and computation cost. However, compressing Transformer remains as an open problem due to its internal complexity of the layer designs, i.e., Multi-Head Attention (MHA) and Feed-Forward Network (FFN). To address this issue, we introduce Group-wise Transformation towards a universal yet lightweight Transformer for vision-and-language tasks, termed as LW-Transformer. LW-Transformer applies Group-wise Transformation to reduce both the parameters and computations of Transformer, while also preserving its two main properties, i.e., the efficient attention modeling on diverse subspaces of MHA, and the expanding-scaling feature transformation of FFN. We apply LW-Transformer to a set of Transformer-based networks, and quantitatively measure them on three vision-and-language tasks and six benchmark datasets. Experimental results show that while saving a large number of parameters and computations, LW-Transformer achieves very competitive performance against the original Transformer networks for vision-and-language tasks. To examine the generalization ability, we also apply our optimization strategy to a recently proposed image Transformer called Swin-Transformer for image classification, where the effectiveness can be also confirmed 尽管性能令人兴奋，但 Transformer 因其过多的参数和计算成本而受到批评。然而，由于层设计的内部复杂性，即多头注意力（MHA）和前馈网络（FFN），压缩 Transformer 仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了针对视觉和语言任务的通用且轻量级 Transformer 的 Group-wise Transformation，称为 LW-Transformer。 LW-Transformer应用Group-wise Transformation来减少Transformer的参数和计算量，同时保留了它的两个主要特性，即MHA的不同子空间上的高效注意力建模和FFN的扩展缩放特征变换。我们将 LW-Transformer 应用于一组基于 Transformer 的网络，并在三个视觉和语言任务和六个基准数据集上对它们进行定量测量。实验结果表明，在节省大量参数和计算量的同时，LW-Transformer 在视觉和语言任务上实现了与原始 Transformer 网络相比非常有竞争力的性能。为了检验泛化能力，我们还将我们的优化策略应用到最近提出的用于图像分类的图像 Transformer（称为 Swin-Transformer），其有效性也得到了证实 本文提出一种轻量化Transformer架构LW-Transformer，通过组内变换机制在保持性能的同时减少参数和计算量，适用于视觉-语言任务。 Gen Luo,Yiyi Zhou,Xiaoshuai Sun,Yan Wang,Liujuan Cao,Yongjian Wu,Feiyue Huang,Rongrong Ji cs.CV

authors_text: Liang Xie,Hongxiang Yu,Yinghao Zhao,Haodong Zhang,Zhongxiang Zhou,Minhang Wang,Yue Wang,Rong Xiong
title: Learning to Fill the Seam by Vision: Sub-millimeter Peg-in-hole on Unseen Shapes in Real World
title_zh: 学习通过视觉填充接缝：在现实世界中看不见的形状上进行亚毫米钉孔
comment: 6 pages; accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2022 (ICRA 2022)
comments: 6 pages; accepted to IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation 2022 (ICRA 2022)
abstract: In the peg insertion task, human pays attention to the seam between the peg and the hole and tries to fill it continuously with visual feedback. By imitating the human behavior, we design architectures with position and orientation estimators based on the seam representation for pose alignment, which proves to be general to the unseen peg geometries. By putting the estimators into the closed-loop control with reinforcement learning, we further achieve a higher or comparable success rate, efficiency, and robustness compared with the baseline methods. The policy is trained totally in simulation without any manual intervention. To achieve sim-to-real, a learnable segmentation module with automatic data collecting and labeling can be easily trained to decouple the perception and the policy, which helps the model trained in simulation quickly adapt to the real world with negligible effort. Results are presented in simulation and on a physical robot. Code, videos, and supplemental material are available at https://github.com/xieliang555/SFN.git
summary: In the peg insertion task, human pays attention to the seam between the peg and the hole and tries to fill it continuously with visual feedback. By imitating the human behavior, we design architectures with position and orientation estimators based on the seam representation for pose alignment, which proves to be general to the unseen peg geometries. By putting the estimators into the closed-loop control with reinforcement learning, we further achieve a higher or comparable success rate, efficiency, and robustness compared with the baseline methods. The policy is trained totally in simulation without any manual intervention. To achieve sim-to-real, a learnable segmentation module with automatic data collecting and labeling can be easily trained to decouple the perception and the policy, which helps the model trained in simulation quickly adapt to the real world with negligible effort. Results are presented in simulation and on a physical robot. Code, videos, and supplemental material are available at https://github.com/xieliang555/SFN.git
abstract_zh: 在钉子插入任务中，人类会注意钉子和孔之间的接缝，并尝试通过视觉反馈不断填充它。通过模仿人类行为，我们设计了具有位置和方向估计器的架构，该估计器基于用于姿势对齐的接缝表示，这被证明对于看不见的钉几何形状是通用的。通过将估计器放入强化学习的闭环控制中，与基线方法相比，我们进一步实现了更高或相当的成功率、效率和鲁棒性。该策略完全在模拟中进行训练，无需任何人工干预。为了实现模拟到真实，可以轻松训练具有自动数据收集和标记功能的可学习分割模块，以解耦感知和策略，这有助于在模拟中训练的模型以微不足道的努力快速适应现实世界。结果以仿真和物理机器人的形式呈现。代码、视频和补充材料可在 https://github.com/xieliang555/SFN.git 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉的亚毫米级peg-in-hole方法，通过模仿人类关注peg与hole之间缝隙的行为，实现对未知形状的精准对齐。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理未知几何形状的peg-in-hole任务时存在局限性，需模仿人类通过视觉反馈持续填充缝隙的行为以提升通用性与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计基于缝隙表征的位置和方向估计器，结合强化学习的闭环控制；通过可学习的分割模块实现仿真到现实的自动数据收集与标注，解耦感知与策略。
AI.result: 在仿真与物理机器人实验中均达到或超越基线方法的成功率、效率和鲁棒性，且无需人工干预即可快速适应真实环境。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视觉缝隙估计与强化学习结合，有效解决了未知形状peg-in-hole任务的通用性问题，并实现了高效的仿真到现实迁移。

By imitating the human behavior, we design architectures with position and orientation estimators based on the seam representation for pose alignment, which proves to be general to the unseen peg geometries. The policy is trained totally in simulation without any manual intervention. To achieve sim-to-real, a learnable segmentation module with automatic data collecting and labeling can be easily trained to decouple the perception and the policy, which helps the model trained in simulation quickly adapt to the real world with negligible effort. Results are presented in simulation and on a physical robot. authors_text: Ania Wróblewska,Agnieszka Kaliska,Maciej Pawłowski,Dawid Wiśniewski,Witold Sosnowski,Agnieszka Ławrynowicz
title: TASTEset -- Recipe Dataset and Food Entities Recognition Benchmark
title_zh: TASTEset——食谱数据集和食品实体识别基准
abstract: Food Computing is currently a fast-growing field of research. Natural language processing (NLP) is also increasingly essential in this field, especially for recognising food entities. However, there are still only a few well-defined tasks that serve as benchmarks for solutions in this area. We introduce a new dataset -- called \textit{TASTEset} -- to bridge this gap. In this dataset, Named Entity Recognition (NER) models are expected to find or infer various types of entities helpful in processing recipes, e.g.~food products, quantities and their units, names of cooking processes, physical quality of ingredients, their purpose, taste. The dataset consists of 700 recipes with more than 13,000 entities to extract. We provide a few state-of-the-art baselines of named entity recognition models, which show that our dataset poses a solid challenge to existing models. The best model achieved, on average, 0.95 $F_1$ score, depending on the entity type -- from 0.781 to 0.982. We share the dataset and the task to encourage progress on more in-depth and complex information extraction from recipes.
summary: Food Computing is currently a fast-growing field of research. Natural language processing (NLP) is also increasingly essential in this field, especially for recognising food entities. However, there are still only a few well-defined tasks that serve as benchmarks for solutions in this area. We introduce a new dataset -- called \textit{TASTEset} -- to bridge this gap. In this dataset, Named Entity Recognition (NER) models are expected to find or infer various types of entities helpful in processing recipes, e.g.~food products, quantities and their units, names of cooking processes, physical quality of ingredients, their purpose, taste. The dataset consists of 700 recipes with more than 13,000 entities to extract. We provide a few state-of-the-art baselines of named entity recognition models, which show that our dataset poses a solid challenge to existing models. The best model achieved, on average, 0.95 $F_1$ score, depending on the entity type -- from 0.781 to 0.982. We share the dataset and the task to encourage progress on more in-depth and complex information extraction from recipes.
abstract_zh: 食品计算目前是一个快速发展的研究领域。自然语言处理（NLP）在这一领域也越来越重要，特别是在识别食品实体方面。然而，仍然只有少数明确的任务可以作为该领域解决方案的基准。我们引入了一个新的数据集——称为 \textit{TASTEset}——来弥补这一差距。在此数据集中，命名实体识别（NER）模型有望找到或推断有助于处理食谱的各种类型的实体，例如食品、数量及其单位、烹饪过程的名称、成分的物理质量、其用途、味道。该数据集由 700 个食谱组成，有超过 13,000 个要提取的实体。我们提供了一些最先进的命名实体识别模型基线，这表明我们的数据集对现有模型提出了坚实的挑战。最佳模型平均获得 0.95 $F_1$ 分数，具体取决于实体类型 - 从 0.781 到 0.982。我们共享数据集和任务，以鼓励从食谱中提取更深入、更复杂的信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为TASTEset的食谱数据集，用于食品实体识别的基准测试，包含700个食谱和超过13,000个实体。
AI.motivation: 当前食品计算领域缺乏明确的基准任务，尤其是针对食谱中的食品实体识别，亟需建立标准化数据集推动研究进展。
AI.method: 构建包含700个食谱的数据集，标注多种实体类型（如食材、用量、烹饪过程等），并采用先进命名实体识别模型进行基准测试。
AI.result: 最佳模型在不同实体类型上的F1分数平均达0.95，最高为0.982，最低为0.781，验证了数据集对现有模型的挑战性。
AI.conclusion: TASTEset为食谱信息提取提供了高质量基准，有助于推动更复杂、深入的食品相关自然语言处理研究。

search_text: TASTEset -- Recipe Dataset and Food Entities Recognition Benchmark TASTEset——食谱数据集和食品实体识别基准 Food Computing is currently a fast-growing field of research. Natural language processing (NLP) is also increasingly essential in this field, especially for recognising food entities. However, there are still only a few well-defined tasks that serve as benchmarks for solutions in this area. We introduce a new dataset -- called \textit{TASTEset} -- to bridge this gap. In this dataset, Named Entity Recognition (NER) models are expected to find or infer various types of entities helpful in processing recipes, e.g.~food products, quantities and their units, names of cooking processes, physical quality of ingredients, their purpose, taste. The dataset consists of 700 recipes with more than 13,000 entities to extract. We provide a few state-of-the-art baselines of named entity recognition models, which show that our dataset poses a solid challenge to existing models. The best model achieved, on average, 0.95 $F_1$ score, depending on the entity type -- from 0.781 to 0.982. We share the dataset and the task to encourage progress on more in-depth and complex information extraction from recipes. 食品计算目前是一个快速发展的研究领域。自然语言处理（NLP）在这一领域也越来越重要，特别是在识别食品实体方面。然而，仍然只有少数明确的任务可以作为该领域解决方案的基准。我们引入了一个新的数据集——称为 \textit{TASTEset}——来弥补这一差距。在此数据集中，命名实体识别（NER）模型有望找到或推断有助于处理食谱的各种类型的实体，例如食品、数量及其单位、烹饪过程的名称、成分的物理质量、其用途、味道。该数据集由 700 个食谱组成，有超过 13,000 个要提取的实体。我们提供了一些最先进的命名实体识别模型基线，这表明我们的数据集对现有模型提出了坚实的挑战。最佳模型平均获得 0.95 $F_1$ 分数，具体取决于实体类型 - 从 0.781 到 0.982。我们共享数据集和任务，以鼓励从食谱中提取更深入、更复杂的信息。 本文提出一个名为TASTEset的食谱数据集，用于食品实体识别的基准测试，包含700个食谱和超过13,000个实体。 Ania Wróblewska,Agnieszka Kaliska,Maciej Pawłowski,Dawid Wiśniewski,Witold Sosnowski,Agnieszka Ławrynowicz cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Chang Gao,Wenxuan Zhang,Wai Lam
title: UniGDD: A Unified Generative Framework for Goal-Oriented Document-Grounded Dialogue
title_zh: UniGDD：面向目标的基于文档的对话的统一生成框架
abstract: The goal-oriented document-grounded dialogue aims at responding to the user query based on the dialogue context and supporting document. Existing studies tackle this problem by decomposing it into two sub-tasks: knowledge identification and response generation. However, such pipeline methods would unavoidably suffer from the error propagation issue. This paper proposes to unify these two sub-tasks via sequentially generating the grounding knowledge and the response. We further develop a prompt-connected multi-task learning strategy to model the characteristics and connections of different tasks and introduce linear temperature scheduling to reduce the negative effect of irrelevant document information. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework.
summary: The goal-oriented document-grounded dialogue aims at responding to the user query based on the dialogue context and supporting document. Existing studies tackle this problem by decomposing it into two sub-tasks: knowledge identification and response generation. However, such pipeline methods would unavoidably suffer from the error propagation issue. This paper proposes to unify these two sub-tasks via sequentially generating the grounding knowledge and the response. We further develop a prompt-connected multi-task learning strategy to model the characteristics and connections of different tasks and introduce linear temperature scheduling to reduce the negative effect of irrelevant document information. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework.
abstract_zh: 面向目标的基于文档的对话旨在基于对话上下文和支持文档来响应用户查询。现有的研究通过将其分解为两个子任务来解决这个问题：知识识别和响应生成。然而，这种管道方法将不可避免地遭受错误传播问题。本文提出通过顺序生成基础知识和响应来统一这两个子任务。我们进一步开发了一种即时连接的多任务学习策略来建模不同任务的特征和连接，并引入线性温度调度来减少不相关文档信息的负面影响。实验结果证明了我们框架的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一生成框架UniGDD，用于解决基于文档的定向对话任务，通过整合知识识别与响应生成子任务以减少错误传播。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将问题拆分为知识识别和响应生成两个独立子任务，导致错误传播问题，影响对话系统性能。
AI.method: 采用顺序生成接地知识与响应的统一框架，结合提示连接的多任务学习策略，并引入线性温度调度以过滤无关文档信息。
AI.result: 实验验证了UniGDD框架在目标导向型文档对话任务中的有效性，优于传统分步处理方法。
AI.conclusion: 统一生成框架能有效缓解错误传播问题，通过任务关联建模和温度调度优化，提升了文档对话系统的整体表现。

authors_text: Venus Pasandi,Hamid Sadeghian,Mehdi Keshmiri,Daniele Pucci
title: An Integrated Programmable CPG with Bounded Output
title_zh: 具有有限输出的集成可编程 CPG
abstract: Cyclic motions are fundamental patterns in robotic applications including industrial manipulation and legged robot locomotion. This paper proposes an approach for the online modulation of cyclic motions in robotic applications. For this purpose, we present an integrated programmable Central Pattern Generator (CPG) for the online generation of the reference joint trajectory of a robotic system out of a library of desired periodic motions. The reference trajectory is then followed by the lower-level controller of the robot. The proposed CPG generates a smooth reference joint trajectory convergence to the desired one while preserving the position and velocity joint limits of the robot. The integrated programmable CPG consists of one novel bounded output programmable oscillator. We design the programmable oscillator for encoding the desired multidimensional periodic trajectory as a stable limit cycle. We also use the state transformation method to ensure that the oscillator's output and its first-time derivative preserve the joint position and velocity limits of the robot. With the help of Lyapunov-based arguments, We prove that the proposed CPG provides the global stability and convergence of the desired trajectory. The effectiveness of the proposed integrated CPG for trajectory generation is shown in a passive rehabilitation scenario on the Kuka iiwa robot arm, and also in a walking simulation on a seven-link bipedal robot.
summary: Cyclic motions are fundamental patterns in robotic applications including industrial manipulation and legged robot locomotion. This paper proposes an approach for the online modulation of cyclic motions in robotic applications. For this purpose, we present an integrated programmable Central Pattern Generator (CPG) for the online generation of the reference joint trajectory of a robotic system out of a library of desired periodic motions. The reference trajectory is then followed by the lower-level controller of the robot. The proposed CPG generates a smooth reference joint trajectory convergence to the desired one while preserving the position and velocity joint limits of the robot. The integrated programmable CPG consists of one novel bounded output programmable oscillator. We design the programmable oscillator for encoding the desired multidimensional periodic trajectory as a stable limit cycle. We also use the state transformation method to ensure that the oscillator's output and its first-time derivative preserve the joint position and velocity limits of the robot. With the help of Lyapunov-based arguments, We prove that the proposed CPG provides the global stability and convergence of the desired trajectory. The effectiveness of the proposed integrated CPG for trajectory generation is shown in a passive rehabilitation scenario on the Kuka iiwa robot arm, and also in a walking simulation on a seven-link bipedal robot.
abstract_zh: 循环运动是机器人应用中的基本模式，包括工业操纵和腿式机器人运动。本文提出了一种在机器人应用中在线调制循环运动的方法。为此，我们提出了一种集成的可编程中央模式生成器（CPG），用于从所需的周期性运动库中在线生成机器人系统的参考关节轨迹。然后机器人的下层控制器遵循参考轨迹。所提出的 CPG 生成平滑的参考关节轨迹，收敛到所需的轨迹，同时保留机器人的位置和速度关节限制。集成可编程 CPG 由一种新颖的有界输出可编程振荡器组成。我们设计了可编程振荡器，用于将所需的多维周期性轨迹编码为稳定的极限环。我们还使用状态转换方法来确保振荡器的输出及其一阶导数保持机器人的关节位置和速度限制。在基于 Lyapunov 的论证的帮助下，我们证明了所提出的 CPG 提供了所需轨迹的全局稳定性和收敛性。所提出的集成 CPG 用于轨迹生成的有效性在 Kuka iiwa 机器人手臂的被动康复场景以及七连杆双足机器人的步行模拟中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种集成可编程CPG（中枢模式发生器），用于生成满足机器人关节限制的平滑参考轨迹，以实现在线运动调节。
AI.motivation: 机器人应用中需要动态调节周期性运动（如工业操作和腿式机器人行走），但传统方法难以同时保证轨迹精度与关节物理限制。
AI.method: 设计具有有界输出的可编程振荡器作为CPG核心，通过状态变换方法确保输出轨迹符合关节位置和速度限制，并利用李雅普诺夫理论证明全局稳定性。
AI.result: 在Kuka iiwa机械臂康复场景和七连杆双足机器人行走仿真中验证了方法有效性，展示了轨迹生成的稳定性与适应性。
AI.conclusion: 该集成CPG框架为机器人在线轨迹生成提供了兼顾精度与安全性的解决方案，适用于复杂动态场景。

authors_text: Marcos Faundez-Zanuy
title: Biometric verification of humans by means of hand geometry
title_zh: 通过手部几何形状对人体进行生物识别验证
comment: 8 pages, published in Proceedings 39th Annual 2005 International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology ICCST2005 Las Palmas, Spain. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.03925
comments: 8 pages, published in Proceedings 39th Annual 2005 International Carnahan Conference on Security Technology ICCST2005 Las Palmas, Spain. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2204.03925
abstract: This paper describes a hand geometry biometric identification system. We have acquired a database of 22 people, 10 acquisitions per person, using a conventional document scanner. We propose a feature extraction and classifier. The experimental results reveal a maximum identification rate equal to 93.64%, and a minimum value of the detection cost function equal to 2.92% using a multi layer perceptron classifier.
summary: This paper describes a hand geometry biometric identification system. We have acquired a database of 22 people, 10 acquisitions per person, using a conventional document scanner. We propose a feature extraction and classifier. The experimental results reveal a maximum identification rate equal to 93.64%, and a minimum value of the detection cost function equal to 2.92% using a multi layer perceptron classifier.
abstract_zh: 本文描述了一种手部几何生物特征识别系统。我们使用传统的文档扫描仪获取了 22 人的数据库，每人 10 次获取。我们提出了特征提取和分类器。实验结果表明，使用多层感知器分类器，最大识别率为93.64%，检测成本函数的最小值为2.92%。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于手部几何特征的生物识别系统。
AI.motivation: 本文的动机是开发一种可靠的生物识别方法，以提高身份验证的准确性。
AI.method: 本文使用常规文档扫描仪获取22人的手部几何数据，每人的数据采集10次，并提出了一种特征提取和分类方法，使用多层感知机分类器进行实验。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该系统的最大识别率为93.64%，检测成本函数的最小值为2.92%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在手部几何生物识别领域表现出较高的准确性和可行性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文介绍了一种基于手部几何特征的生物识别系统。
ai_content.motivation: 本文的动机是开发一种可靠的生物识别方法，以提高身份验证的准确性。
ai_content.method: 本文使用常规文档扫描仪获取22人的手部几何数据，每人的数据采集10次，并提出了一种特征提取和分类方法，使用多层感知机分类器进行实验。

search_text: Biometric verification of humans by means of hand geometry 通过手部几何形状对人体进行生物识别验证 This paper describes a hand geometry biometric identification system. We have acquired a database of 22 people, 10 acquisitions per person, using a conventional document scanner. We propose a feature extraction and classifier. The experimental results reveal a maximum identification rate equal to 93.64%, and a minimum value of the detection cost function equal to 2.92% using a multi layer perceptron classifier. 本文描述了一种手部几何生物特征识别系统。我们使用传统的文档扫描仪获取了 22 人的数据库，每人 10 次获取。我们提出了特征提取和分类器。实验结果表明，使用多层感知器分类器，最大识别率为93.64%，检测成本函数的最小值为2.92%。 本文介绍了一种基于手部几何特征的生物识别系统。 Marcos Faundez-Zanuy cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Jiangeng Chang,Yucheng Ruan,Cui Shaoze,John Soong Tshon Yit,Mengling Feng
title: UFRC: A Unified Framework for Reliable COVID-19 Detection on Crowdsourced Cough Audio
title_zh: UFRC：针对众包咳嗽音频进行可靠的 COVID-19 检测的统一框架
abstract: We suggested a unified system with core components of data augmentation, ImageNet-pretrained ResNet-50, cost-sensitive loss, deep ensemble learning, and uncertainty estimation to quickly and consistently detect COVID-19 using acoustic evidence. To increase the model's capacity to identify a minority class, data augmentation and cost-sensitive loss are incorporated (infected samples). In the COVID-19 detection challenge, ImageNet-pretrained ResNet-50 has been found to be effective. The unified framework also integrates deep ensemble learning and uncertainty estimation to integrate predictions from various base classifiers for generalisation and reliability. We ran a series of tests using the DiCOVA2021 challenge dataset to assess the efficacy of our proposed method, and the results show that our method has an AUC-ROC of 85.43 percent, making it a promising method for COVID-19 detection. The unified framework also demonstrates that audio may be used to quickly diagnose different respiratory disorders.
summary: We suggested a unified system with core components of data augmentation, ImageNet-pretrained ResNet-50, cost-sensitive loss, deep ensemble learning, and uncertainty estimation to quickly and consistently detect COVID-19 using acoustic evidence. To increase the model's capacity to identify a minority class, data augmentation and cost-sensitive loss are incorporated (infected samples). In the COVID-19 detection challenge, ImageNet-pretrained ResNet-50 has been found to be effective. The unified framework also integrates deep ensemble learning and uncertainty estimation to integrate predictions from various base classifiers for generalisation and reliability. We ran a series of tests using the DiCOVA2021 challenge dataset to assess the efficacy of our proposed method, and the results show that our method has an AUC-ROC of 85.43 percent, making it a promising method for COVID-19 detection. The unified framework also demonstrates that audio may be used to quickly diagnose different respiratory disorders.
abstract_zh: 我们建议采用一个统一的系统，其核心组件包括数据增强、ImageNet 预训练的 ResNet-50、成本敏感的损失、深度集成学习和不确定性估计，以使用声学证据快速、一致地检测 COVID-19。为了提高模型识别少数类别的能力，纳入了数据增强和成本敏感的损失（受感染的样本）。在 COVID-19 检测挑战中，ImageNet 预训练的 ResNet-50 被发现是有效的。该统一框架还集成了深度集成学习和不确定性估计，以集成来自各种基分类器的预测，以实现泛化和可靠性。我们使用 DiCOVA2021 挑战数据集进行了一系列测试来评估我们提出的方法的有效性，结果表明我们的方法的 AUC-ROC 为 85.43%，使其成为一种有前途的 COVID-19 检测方法。统一框架还表明音频可用于快速诊断不同的呼吸系统疾病。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一框架UFRC，利用众包咳嗽音频进行可靠且高效的COVID-19检测。
AI.motivation: 针对COVID-19检测中音频数据不平衡、模型泛化能力不足的问题，需开发一种鲁棒且高效的检测方法。
AI.method: 结合数据增强、ImageNet预训练ResNet-50、代价敏感损失、深度集成学习和不确定性估计，构建统一框架以提升少数类（感染样本）识别能力与模型可靠性。
AI.result: 在DiCOVA2021数据集上实现AUC-ROC 85.43%，验证了方法在COVID-19检测中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架证明了音频数据在快速诊断呼吸道疾病中的潜力，为可靠检测提供了可行方案。

authors_text: David Rozenberszki,Or Litany,Angela Dai
title: Language-Grounded Indoor 3D Semantic Segmentation in the Wild
title_zh: 基于语言的室内 3D 语义分割
abstract: Recent advances in 3D semantic segmentation with deep neural networks have shown remarkable success, with rapid performance increase on available datasets. However, current 3D semantic segmentation benchmarks contain only a small number of categories -- less than 30 for ScanNet and SemanticKITTI, for instance, which are not enough to reflect the diversity of real environments (e.g., semantic image understanding covers hundreds to thousands of classes). Thus, we propose to study a larger vocabulary for 3D semantic segmentation with a new extended benchmark on ScanNet data with 200 class categories, an order of magnitude more than previously studied. This large number of class categories also induces a large natural class imbalance, both of which are challenging for existing 3D semantic segmentation methods. To learn more robust 3D features in this context, we propose a language-driven pre-training method to encourage learned 3D features that might have limited training examples to lie close to their pre-trained text embeddings. Extensive experiments show that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art 3D pre-training for 3D semantic segmentation on our proposed benchmark (+9% relative mIoU), including limited-data scenarios with +25% relative mIoU using only 5% annotations.
summary: Recent advances in 3D semantic segmentation with deep neural networks have shown remarkable success, with rapid performance increase on available datasets. However, current 3D semantic segmentation benchmarks contain only a small number of categories -- less than 30 for ScanNet and SemanticKITTI, for instance, which are not enough to reflect the diversity of real environments (e.g., semantic image understanding covers hundreds to thousands of classes). Thus, we propose to study a larger vocabulary for 3D semantic segmentation with a new extended benchmark on ScanNet data with 200 class categories, an order of magnitude more than previously studied. This large number of class categories also induces a large natural class imbalance, both of which are challenging for existing 3D semantic segmentation methods. To learn more robust 3D features in this context, we propose a language-driven pre-training method to encourage learned 3D features that might have limited training examples to lie close to their pre-trained text embeddings. Extensive experiments show that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art 3D pre-training for 3D semantic segmentation on our proposed benchmark (+9% relative mIoU), including limited-data scenarios with +25% relative mIoU using only 5% annotations.
abstract_zh: 利用深度神经网络进行 3D 语义分割的最新进展已经取得了显着的成功，可用数据集的性能快速提高。然而，当前的 3D 语义分割基准仅包含少量类别，例如 ScanNet 和 SemanticKITTI 的类别少于 30 个，这不足以反映真实环境的多样性（例如，语义图像理解涵盖数百到数千个类别）。因此，我们建议使用包含 200 个类别的 ScanNet 数据的新扩展基准来研究更大的 3D 语义分割词汇量，比之前研究的数量级多。如此大量的类类别也导致了很大的自然类不平衡，这对于现有的 3D 语义分割方法来说都是挑战。为了在这种情况下学习更强大的 3D 特征，我们提出了一种语言驱动的预训练方法，以鼓励学习的 3D 特征可能具有有限的训练示例，以接近其预训练的文本嵌入。大量实验表明，我们的方法在我们提出的基准上始终优于最先进的 3D 语义分割 3D 预训练（+9% 相对 mIoU），包括仅使用 5% 注释的有限数据场景，+25% 相对 mIoU。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语言的室内3D语义分割方法，通过构建包含200个类别的新基准，解决现有数据集类别不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有3D语义分割基准数据集类别数量有限（如ScanNet和SemanticKITTI不足30类），无法反映真实环境的多样性，且大规模类别导致严重的类不平衡问题。
AI.method: 提出语言驱动的预训练方法，通过将3D特征与预训练文本嵌入对齐，增强有限样本类别的表征能力，并构建包含200类的新基准。
AI.result: 在新基准上相较现有方法mIoU提升9%，在仅使用5%标注数据时提升25%，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 语言引导的预训练能有效提升大规模类别3D语义分割性能，尤其在数据稀缺场景下表现优异。

authors_text: Mohammed Hassanin,Saeed Anwar,Ibrahim Radwan,Fahad S Khan,Ajmal Mian
title: Visual Attention Methods in Deep Learning: An In-Depth Survey
title_zh: 深度学习中的视觉注意方法：深入调查
abstract: Inspired by the human cognitive system, attention is a mechanism that imitates the human cognitive awareness about specific information, amplifying critical details to focus more on the essential aspects of data. Deep learning has employed attention to boost performance for many applications. Interestingly, the same attention design can suit processing different data modalities and can easily be incorporated into large networks. Furthermore, multiple complementary attention mechanisms can be incorporated into one network. Hence, attention techniques have become extremely attractive. However, the literature lacks a comprehensive survey on attention techniques to guide researchers in employing attention in their deep models. Note that, besides being demanding in terms of training data and computational resources, transformers only cover a single category in self-attention out of the many categories available. We fill this gap and provide an in-depth survey of 50 attention techniques, categorizing them by their most prominent features. We initiate our discussion by introducing the fundamental concepts behind the success of the attention mechanism. Next, we furnish some essentials such as the strengths and limitations of each attention category, describe their fundamental building blocks, basic formulations with primary usage, and applications specifically for computer vision. We also discuss the challenges and general open questions related to attention mechanisms. Finally, we recommend possible future research directions for deep attention. All the information about visual attention methods in deep learning is provided at \href{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention}{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention}

We also discuss the challenges and general open questions related to attention mechanisms. Finally, we recommend possible future research directions for deep attention. All the information about visual attention methods in deep learning is provided at \href{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention}{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention}
abstract_zh: 受人类认知系统的启发，注意力是一种模仿人类对特定信息的认知意识的机制，放大关键细节以更多地关注数据的本质方面。深度学习已引起人们的注意，以提高许多应用程序的性能。有趣的是，相同的注意力设计可以适合处理不同的数据模式，并且可以轻松地合并到大型网络中。此外，多个互补的注意力机制可以合并到一个网络中。因此，注意力技术变得非常有吸引力。然而，文献缺乏对注意力技术的全面调查来指导研究人员在其深层模型中使用注意力。请注意，除了在训练数据和计算资源方面要求较高之外，变压器仅涵盖许多可用类别中的自注意力类别。我们填补了这一空白，并对 50 种注意力技术进行了深入调查，并根据其最突出的特征对它们进行了分类。我们通过介绍注意力机制成功背后的基本概念来开始我们的讨论。接下来，我们提供一些要点，例如每个注意力类别的优点和局限性，描述它们的基本构建块、主要用途的基本公式以及专门针对计算机视觉的应用。我们还讨论了与注意力机制相关的挑战和一般性开放问题。最后，我们推荐未来可能的研究方向以供深度关注。有关深度学习中视觉注意方法的所有信息均在 \href{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention}{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention} 提供

search_text: Visual Attention Methods in Deep Learning: An In-Depth Survey 深度学习中的视觉注意方法：深入调查 Inspired by the human cognitive system, attention is a mechanism that imitates the human cognitive awareness about specific information, amplifying critical details to focus more on the essential aspects of data. Deep learning has employed attention to boost performance for many applications. Interestingly, the same attention design can suit processing different data modalities and can easily be incorporated into large networks. Furthermore, multiple complementary attention mechanisms can be incorporated into one network. Hence, attention techniques have become extremely attractive. However, the literature lacks a comprehensive survey on attention techniques to guide researchers in employing attention in their deep models. Note that, besides being demanding in terms of training data and computational resources, transformers only cover a single category in self-attention out of the many categories available. We fill this gap and provide an in-depth survey of 50 attention techniques, categorizing them by their most prominent features. We initiate our discussion by introducing the fundamental concepts behind the success of the attention mechanism. Next, we furnish some essentials such as the strengths and limitations of each attention category, describe their fundamental building blocks, basic formulations with primary usage, and applications specifically for computer vision. We also discuss the challenges and general open questions related to attention mechanisms. Finally, we recommend possible future research directions for deep attention. All the information about visual attention methods in deep learning is provided at \href{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention}{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention} 受人类认知系统的启发，注意力是一种模仿人类对特定信息的认知意识的机制，放大关键细节以更多地关注数据的本质方面。深度学习已引起人们的注意，以提高许多应用程序的性能。有趣的是，相同的注意力设计可以适合处理不同的数据模式，并且可以轻松地合并到大型网络中。此外，多个互补的注意力机制可以合并到一个网络中。因此，注意力技术变得非常有吸引力。然而，文献缺乏对注意力技术的全面调查来指导研究人员在其深层模型中使用注意力。请注意，除了在训练数据和计算资源方面要求较高之外，变压器仅涵盖许多可用类别中的自注意力类别。我们填补了这一空白，并对 50 种注意力技术进行了深入调查，并根据其最突出的特征对它们进行了分类。我们通过介绍注意力机制成功背后的基本概念来开始我们的讨论。接下来，我们提供一些要点，例如每个注意力类别的优点和局限性，描述它们的基本构建块、主要用途的基本公式以及专门针对计算机视觉的应用。我们还讨论了与注意力机制相关的挑战和一般性开放问题。最后，我们推荐未来可能的研究方向以供深度关注。有关深度学习中视觉注意方法的所有信息均在 \href{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention}{https://github.com/saeed-anwar/VisualAttention} 提供 本文对深度学习中的视觉注意力方法进行全面调查，分类并分析了50种注意力技术。 Mohammed Hassanin,Saeed Anwar,Ibrahim Radwan,Fahad S Khan,Ajmal Mian cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Leena Alghamdi,Ashwaq Alsoubai,Mamtaj Akter,Faisal Alghamdi,Pamela Wisniewski
title: A User Study to Evaluate a Web-based Prototype for Smart Home Internet of Things Device Management
title_zh: 用于评估智能家居物联网设备管理的基于 Web 原型的用户研究
abstract: With the growing advances in the Internet of Things (IoT) technology, IoT device management platforms are becoming increasingly important. We conducted a web-based survey and usability study with 43 participants who use IoT devices frequently to: 1) examine their smart home IoT usage patterns and privacy preferences, and 2) evaluate a web-based prototype for smart home IoT device management. We found that participants perceived privacy as more important than the convenience afforded by the IoT devices. Based on their average scores of privacy vs. convenience importance, participants with low privacy and low convenience significantly reported less privacy control and convenience preferences than participants with high privacy and high convenience. Overall, all participants were satisfied with the proposed website prototype and their actual usability evaluation demonstrated a good understanding of the website features. This paper provides an empirical examination of the privacy versus convenience trade-offs smart home users make when managing their IoT devices.
summary: With the growing advances in the Internet of Things (IoT) technology, IoT device management platforms are becoming increasingly important. We conducted a web-based survey and usability study with 43 participants who use IoT devices frequently to: 1) examine their smart home IoT usage patterns and privacy preferences, and 2) evaluate a web-based prototype for smart home IoT device management. We found that participants perceived privacy as more important than the convenience afforded by the IoT devices. Based on their average scores of privacy vs. convenience importance, participants with low privacy and low convenience significantly reported less privacy control and convenience preferences than participants with high privacy and high convenience. Overall, all participants were satisfied with the proposed website prototype and their actual usability evaluation demonstrated a good understanding of the website features. This paper provides an empirical examination of the privacy versus convenience trade-offs smart home users make when managing their IoT devices.
abstract_zh: 随着物联网 (IoT) 技术的不断进步，物联网设备管理平台变得越来越重要。我们对 43 名经常使用物联网设备的参与者进行了一项基于网络的调查和可用性研究，目的是：1) 检查他们的智能家居物联网使用模式和隐私偏好，2) 评估基于网络的智能家居物联网设备管理原型。我们发现参与者认为隐私比物联网设备提供的便利更重要。根据隐私与便利重要性的平均得分，低隐私和低便利性的参与者明显报告比高隐私性和高便利性的参与者更少的隐私控制和便利性偏好。总体而言，所有参与者都对所提出的网站原型感到满意，他们的实际可用性评估表明他们对网站功能有很好的了解。本文对智能家居用户在管理物联网设备时进行的隐私与便利性权衡进行了实证检验。

AI.tldr: 评估基于网络的智能家居物联网设备管理原型，并分析用户隐私与便利的权衡
AI.motivation: 随着物联网技术的发展，设备管理平台的重要性增加，但用户隐私与便利的权衡尚不明确，需通过实证研究来探讨
AI.method: 通过网络调查和可用性研究，对43名经常使用物联网设备的用户进行评估，分析其使用模式、隐私偏好及原型可用性
AI.result: 用户更重视隐私而非便利，低隐私和低便利组的隐私控制与便利偏好较低，所有参与者对原型满意且理解其功能
AI.conclusion: 用户在管理物联网设备时存在隐私与便利的权衡，原型的可用性良好，但需优化隐私控制功能
