authors_text: Mamtaj Akter,Amy Godfrey,Jess Kropczynski,Heather Lipford,Pamela Wisniewski
title: From Parental Control to Joint Family Oversight: Can Parents and Teens Manage Mobile Online Safety and Privacy as Equals?
title_zh: 从家长控制到家庭联合监督：家长和青少年能否平等管理移动在线安全和隐私？
abstract: Our research aims to highlight and alleviate the complex tensions around online safety, privacy, and smartphone usage in families so that parents and teens can work together to better manage mobile privacy and security-related risks. We developed a mobile application ("app") for Community Oversight of Privacy and Security ("CO-oPS") and had parents and teens assess whether it would be applicable for use with their families. CO-oPS is an Android app that allows a group of users to co-monitor the apps installed on one another's devices and the privacy permissions granted to those apps. We conducted a study with 19 parent-teen (ages 13-17) pairs to understand how they currently managed mobile safety and app privacy within their family and then had them install, use, and evaluate the CO-oPS app. We found that both parents and teens gave little consideration to online safety and privacy before installing new apps or granting privacy permissions. When using CO-oPS, participants liked how the app increased transparency into one another's devices in a way that facilitated communication, but were less inclined to use features for in-app messaging or to hide apps from one another. Key themes related to power imbalances between parents and teens surfaced that made co-management challenging. Parents were more open to collaborative oversight than teens, who felt that it was not their place to monitor their parents, even though both often believed parents lacked the technological expertise to monitor themselves. Our study sheds light on why collaborative practices for managing online safety and privacy within families may be beneficial but also quite difficult to implement in practice. We provide recommendations for overcoming these challenges based on the insights gained from our study.
summary: Our research aims to highlight and alleviate the complex tensions around online safety, privacy, and smartphone usage in families so that parents and teens can work together to better manage mobile privacy and security-related risks. We developed a mobile application ("app") for Community Oversight of Privacy and Security ("CO-oPS") and had parents and teens assess whether it would be applicable for use with their families. CO-oPS is an Android app that allows a group of users to co-monitor the apps installed on one another's devices and the privacy permissions granted to those apps. We conducted a study with 19 parent-teen (ages 13-17) pairs to understand how they currently managed mobile safety and app privacy within their family and then had them install, use, and evaluate the CO-oPS app. We found that both parents and teens gave little consideration to online safety and privacy before installing new apps or granting privacy permissions. When using CO-oPS, participants liked how the app increased transparency into one another's devices in a way that facilitated communication, but were less inclined to use features for in-app messaging or to hide apps from one another. Key themes related to power imbalances between parents and teens surfaced that made co-management challenging. Parents were more open to collaborative oversight than teens, who felt that it was not their place to monitor their parents, even though both often believed parents lacked the technological expertise to monitor themselves. Our study sheds light on why collaborative practices for managing online safety and privacy within families may be beneficial but also quite difficult to implement in practice. We provide recommendations for overcoming these challenges based on the insights gained from our study.
abstract_zh: 我们的研究旨在强调并缓解家庭中围绕在线安全、隐私和智能手机使用的复杂紧张局势，以便父母和青少年能够共同努力，更好地管理移动隐私和安全相关风险。我们开发了一款用于隐私和安全社区监督（“CO-oPS”）的移动应用程序（“应用程序”），并让家长和青少年评估该应用程序是否适合与家人一起使用。 CO-oPS 是一款 Android 应用程序，允许一组用户共同监控彼此设备上安装的应用程序以及授予这些应用程序的隐私权限。我们对 19 名家长与青少年（13-17 岁）进行了一项研究，了解他们目前如何管理家庭中的移动安全和应用程序隐私，然后让他们安装、使用和评估 CO-oPS 应用程序。我们发现，父母和青少年在安装新应用程序或授予隐私权限之前很少考虑在线安全和隐私。使用 CO-oPS 时，参与者喜欢该应用程序如何以一种促进通信的方式提高彼此设备的透明度，但不太愿意使用应用程序内消息传递功能或向彼此隐藏应用程序。与父母和青少年之间权力失衡相关的关键主题浮出水面，这使得共同管理面临挑战。父母比青少年更愿意合作监督，青少年认为他们没有权力监督父母，尽管他们都经常认为父母缺乏监督自己的技术专业知识。我们的研究揭示了为什么管理家庭内在线安全和隐私的协作实践可能是有益的，但在实践中却很难实施。我们根据我们的研究获得的见解提供克服这些挑战的建议。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一款名为CO-oPS的移动应用，旨在通过家长与青少年共同管理手机隐私和安全，缓解家庭中在线安全与隐私的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 家庭中家长与青少年在手机使用和隐私管理上存在权力失衡与认知差异，需探索协作式管理方案以提升数字安全。
AI.method: 设计CO-oPS应用，允许家庭成员共同监控设备安装的应用及隐私权限，并对19对家长-青少年组合进行实证研究，分析其使用反馈与协作效果。
AI.result: 用户认为应用提升了透明度与沟通，但对消息功能和隐藏应用功能使用意愿低；家长更支持协作监督，青少年则因权力感知和对家长技术能力的质疑而抗拒。
AI.conclusion: 协作式家庭数字管理具有潜力，但需解决权力动态、技术信任及功能设计等障碍，未来需优化工具以促进平等参与。

ai_content.tldr: 本文开发了一款名为CO-oPS的移动应用，旨在通过家长与青少年共同管理手机隐私和安全，缓解家庭中在线安全与隐私的矛盾。
ai_content.motivation: 家庭中家长与青少年在手机使用和隐私管理上存在权力失衡与认知差异，需探索协作式管理方案以提升数字安全。
ai_content.method: 设计CO-oPS应用，允许家庭成员共同监控设备安装的应用及隐私权限，并对19对家长-青少年组合进行实证研究，分析其使用反馈与协作效果。
ai_content.result: 用户认为应用提升了透明度与沟通，但对消息功能和隐藏应用功能使用意愿低；家长更支持协作监督，青少年则因权力感知和对家长技术能力的质疑而抗拒。
ai_content.conclusion: 协作式家庭数字管理具有潜力，但需解决权力动态、技术信任及功能设计等障碍，未来需优化工具以促进平等参与。

search_text: From Parental Control to Joint Family Oversight: Can Parents and Teens Manage Mobile Online Safety and Privacy as Equals? 从家长控制到家庭联合监督：家长和青少年能否平等管理移动在线安全和隐私？ Our research aims to highlight and alleviate the complex tensions around online safety, privacy, and smartphone usage in families so that parents and teens can work together to better manage mobile privacy and security-related risks. We developed a mobile application ("app") for Community Oversight of Privacy and Security ("CO-oPS") and had parents and teens assess whether it would be applicable for use with their families. CO-oPS is an Android app that allows a group of users to co-monitor the apps installed on one another's devices and the privacy permissions granted to those apps. We conducted a study with 19 parent-teen (ages 13-17) pairs to understand how they currently managed mobile safety and app privacy within their family and then had them install, use, and evaluate the CO-oPS app. We found that both parents and teens gave little consideration to online safety and privacy before installing new apps or granting privacy permissions. When using CO-oPS, participants liked how the app increased transparency into one another's devices in a way that facilitated communication, but were less inclined to use features for in-app messaging or to hide apps from one another. Key themes related to power imbalances between parents and teens surfaced that made co-management challenging. Parents were more open to collaborative oversight than teens, who felt that it was not their place to monitor their parents, even though both often believed parents lacked the technological expertise to monitor themselves. Our study sheds light on why collaborative practices for managing online safety and privacy within families may be beneficial but also quite difficult to implement in practice. We provide recommendations for overcoming these challenges based on the insights gained from our study. 我们的研究旨在强调并缓解家庭中围绕在线安全、隐私和智能手机使用的复杂紧张局势，以便父母和青少年能够共同努力，更好地管理移动隐私和安全相关风险。我们开发了一款用于隐私和安全社区监督（“CO-oPS”）的移动应用程序（“应用程序”），并让家长和青少年评估该应用程序是否适合与家人一起使用。 CO-oPS 是一款 Android 应用程序，允许一组用户共同监控彼此设备上安装的应用程序以及授予这些应用程序的隐私权限。我们对 19 名家长与青少年（13-17 岁）进行了一项研究，了解他们目前如何管理家庭中的移动安全和应用程序隐私，然后让他们安装、使用和评估 CO-oPS 应用程序。我们发现，父母和青少年在安装新应用程序或授予隐私权限之前很少考虑在线安全和隐私。使用 CO-oPS 时，参与者喜欢该应用程序如何以一种促进通信的方式提高彼此设备的透明度，但不太愿意使用应用程序内消息传递功能或向彼此隐藏应用程序。与父母和青少年之间权力失衡相关的关键主题浮出水面，这使得共同管理面临挑战。父母比青少年更愿意合作监督，青少年认为他们没有权力监督父母，尽管他们都经常认为父母缺乏监督自己的技术专业知识。我们的研究揭示了为什么管理家庭内在线安全和隐私的协作实践可能是有益的，但在实践中却很难实施。我们根据我们的研究获得的见解提供克服这些挑战的建议。 本文开发了一款名为CO-oPS的移动应用，旨在通过家长与青少年共同管理手机隐私和安全，缓解家庭中在线安全与隐私的矛盾。 Mamtaj Akter,Amy Godfrey,Jess Kropczynski,Heather Lipford,Pamela Wisniewski cs.HC

authors_text: Meng Xia,Qian Zhu,Xingbo Wang,Fei Nie,Huamin Qu,Xiaojuan Ma
title: Persua: A Visual Interactive System to Enhance the Persuasiveness of Arguments in Online Discussion
title_zh: Persua：增强在线讨论中论证说服力的视觉交互系统
comment: This paper will appear in CSCW 2022
comments: This paper will appear in CSCW 2022
abstract: Persuading people to change their opinions is a common practice in online discussion forums on topics ranging from political campaigns to relationship consultation. Enhancing people's ability to write persuasive arguments could not only practice their critical thinking and reasoning but also contribute to the effectiveness and civility in online communication. It is, however, not an easy task in online discussion settings where written words are the primary communication channel. In this paper, we derived four design goals for a tool that helps users improve the persuasiveness of arguments in online discussions through a survey with 123 online forum users and interviews with five debating experts. To satisfy these design goals, we analyzed and built a labeled dataset of fine-grained persuasive strategies (i.e., logos, pathos, ethos, and evidence) in 164 arguments with high ratings on persuasiveness from ChangeMyView, a popular online discussion forum. We then designed an interactive visual system, Persua, which provides example-based guidance on persuasive strategies to enhance the persuasiveness of arguments. In particular, the system constructs portfolios of arguments based on different persuasive strategies applied to a given discussion topic. It then presents concrete examples based on the difference between the portfolios of user input and high-quality arguments in the dataset. A between-subjects study shows suggestive evidence that Persua encourages users to submit more times for feedback and helps users improve more on the persuasiveness of their arguments than a baseline system. Finally, a set of design considerations was summarized to guide future intelligent systems that improve the persuasiveness in text.
summary: Persuading people to change their opinions is a common practice in online discussion forums on topics ranging from political campaigns to relationship consultation. Enhancing people's ability to write persuasive arguments could not only practice their critical thinking and reasoning but also contribute to the effectiveness and civility in online communication. It is, however, not an easy task in online discussion settings where written words are the primary communication channel. In this paper, we derived four design goals for a tool that helps users improve the persuasiveness of arguments in online discussions through a survey with 123 online forum users and interviews with five debating experts. To satisfy these design goals, we analyzed and built a labeled dataset of fine-grained persuasive strategies (i.e., logos, pathos, ethos, and evidence) in 164 arguments with high ratings on persuasiveness from ChangeMyView, a popular online discussion forum. We then designed an interactive visual system, Persua, which provides example-based guidance on persuasive strategies to enhance the persuasiveness of arguments. In particular, the system constructs portfolios of arguments based on different persuasive strategies applied to a given discussion topic. It then presents concrete examples based on the difference between the portfolios of user input and high-quality arguments in the dataset. A between-subjects study shows suggestive evidence that Persua encourages users to submit more times for feedback and helps users improve more on the persuasiveness of their arguments than a baseline system. Finally, a set of design considerations was summarized to guide future intelligent systems that improve the persuasiveness in text.
abstract_zh: 说服人们改变观点是在线讨论论坛的常见做法，话题涉及从政治运动到关系咨询等各种话题。提高人们撰写有说服力的论据的能力不仅可以练习他们的批判性思维和推理能力，还有助于提高在线交流的有效性和文明性。然而，在书面文字是主要沟通渠道的在线讨论环境中，这并不是一件容易的事。在本文中，我们通过对 123 名在线论坛用户的调查以及对五位辩论专家的采访，得出了一个帮助用户提高在线讨论中论点说服力的工具的四个设计目标。为了满足这些设计目标，我们分析并构建了一个细粒度说服策略（即徽标、情感、精神和证据）的标记数据集，其中包含来自热门在线讨论论坛 ChangeMyView 的说服力评级较高的 164 个论点。然后，我们设计了一个交互式视觉系统 Persua，它提供基于示例的说服策略指导，以增强论证的说服力。特别是，该系统根据应用于给定讨论主题的不同说服策略构建论点组合。然后，它根据用户输入的组合和数据集中的高质量参数之间的差异提供具体示例。一项受试者间研究表明，与基线系统相比，Persua 鼓励用户提交更多次反馈，并帮助用户提高其论点的说服力。最后，总结了一系列设计考虑因素，以指导未来提高文本说服力的智能系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Persua系统，通过可视化交互方式帮助用户提升在线讨论中论点的说服力。
AI.motivation: 在线讨论中，提升用户撰写有说服力论点的能力有助于增强批判性思维和沟通效果，但纯文本交流环境下的说服力提升具有挑战性。
AI.method: 通过123名用户调研和5位辩论专家访谈确定设计目标，构建包含164条高评分论点的细粒度说服策略标注数据集（如逻辑、情感、信誉等），开发基于案例对比的可视化交互系统Persua。
AI.result: 对比实验显示，使用Persua的用户提交反馈次数更多，论点说服力提升效果优于基准系统，同时总结出指导未来系统的交互设计原则。
AI.conclusion: Persua通过可视化策略对比和实例引导有效提升在线讨论的说服力，为智能文本增强系统提供设计参考。

authors_text: Shi Gong,Xiaoqing Ye,Xiao Tan,Jingdong Wang,Errui Ding,Yu Zhou,Xiang Bai
title: GitNet: Geometric Prior-based Transformation for Birds-Eye-View Segmentation
title_zh: GitNet：基于几何先验的鸟瞰图分割变换
abstract: Birds-eye-view (BEV) semantic segmentation is critical for autonomous driving for its powerful spatial representation ability. It is challenging to estimate the BEV semantic maps from monocular images due to the spatial gap, since it is implicitly required to realize both the perspective-to-BEV transformation and segmentation. We present a novel two-stage Geometry Prior-based Transformation framework named GitNet, consisting of (i) the geometry-guided pre-alignment and (ii) ray-based transformer. In the first stage, we decouple the BEV segmentation into the perspective image segmentation and geometric prior-based mapping, with explicit supervision by projecting the BEV semantic labels onto the image plane to learn visibility-aware features and learnable geometry to translate into BEV space. Second, the pre-aligned coarse BEV features are further deformed by ray-based transformers to take visibility knowledge into account. GitNet achieves the leading performance on the challenging nuScenes and Argoverse Datasets.
summary: Birds-eye-view (BEV) semantic segmentation is critical for autonomous driving for its powerful spatial representation ability. It is challenging to estimate the BEV semantic maps from monocular images due to the spatial gap, since it is implicitly required to realize both the perspective-to-BEV transformation and segmentation. We present a novel two-stage Geometry Prior-based Transformation framework named GitNet, consisting of (i) the geometry-guided pre-alignment and (ii) ray-based transformer. In the first stage, we decouple the BEV segmentation into the perspective image segmentation and geometric prior-based mapping, with explicit supervision by projecting the BEV semantic labels onto the image plane to learn visibility-aware features and learnable geometry to translate into BEV space. Second, the pre-aligned coarse BEV features are further deformed by ray-based transformers to take visibility knowledge into account. GitNet achieves the leading performance on the challenging nuScenes and Argoverse Datasets.
abstract_zh: 鸟瞰（BEV）语义分割因其强大的空间表示能力对于自动驾驶至关重要。由于空间间隙，从单目图像估计 BEV 语义图具有挑战性，因为隐含地需要实现透视到 BEV 的转换和分割。我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段基于几何先验的变换框架，名为 GitNet，由 (i) 几何引导的预对齐和 (ii) 基于射线的变换器组成。在第一阶段，我们将 BEV 分割解耦为透视图像分割和基于几何先验的映射，并通过将 BEV 语义标签投影到图像平面上来进行显式监督，以学习可见性感知特征和可学习几何图形以转换为 BEV 空间。其次，预对齐的粗略 BEV 特征通过基于光线的变换器进一步变形，以考虑可见性知识。 GitNet 在具有挑战性的 nuScenes 和 Argoverse 数据集上取得了领先的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GitNet框架，通过几何先验转换解决单目图像到鸟瞰图（BEV）语义分割的挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以同时处理视角图像到BEV的转换与分割，存在空间差距问题，需结合几何先验提升分割准确性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段方法：第一阶段通过几何引导预对齐，将BEV标签投影至图像平面学习可见性特征；第二阶段利用射线变压器优化粗略BEV特征。
AI.result: 在nuScenes和Argoverse数据集上达到领先性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: GitNet通过几何先验与变压器结合，有效解决了BEV分割中的空间转换与可见性问题。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出GitNet框架，通过几何先验转换解决单目图像到鸟瞰图（BEV）语义分割的挑战。
ai_content.motivation: 传统方法难以同时处理视角图像到BEV的转换与分割，存在空间差距问题，需结合几何先验提升分割准确性。

search_text: GitNet: Geometric Prior-based Transformation for Birds-Eye-View Segmentation GitNet：基于几何先验的鸟瞰图分割变换 Birds-eye-view (BEV) semantic segmentation is critical for autonomous driving for its powerful spatial representation ability. It is challenging to estimate the BEV semantic maps from monocular images due to the spatial gap, since it is implicitly required to realize both the perspective-to-BEV transformation and segmentation. We present a novel two-stage Geometry Prior-based Transformation framework named GitNet, consisting of (i) the geometry-guided pre-alignment and (ii) ray-based transformer. In the first stage, we decouple the BEV segmentation into the perspective image segmentation and geometric prior-based mapping, with explicit supervision by projecting the BEV semantic labels onto the image plane to learn visibility-aware features and learnable geometry to translate into BEV space. Second, the pre-aligned coarse BEV features are further deformed by ray-based transformers to take visibility knowledge into account. GitNet achieves the leading performance on the challenging nuScenes and Argoverse Datasets. 鸟瞰（BEV）语义分割因其强大的空间表示能力对于自动驾驶至关重要。由于空间间隙，从单目图像估计 BEV 语义图具有挑战性，因为隐含地需要实现透视到 BEV 的转换和分割。我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段基于几何先验的变换框架，名为 GitNet，由 (i) 几何引导的预对齐和 (ii) 基于射线的变换器组成。在第一阶段，我们将 BEV 分割解耦为透视图像分割和基于几何先验的映射，并通过将 BEV 语义标签投影到图像平面上来进行显式监督，以学习可见性感知特征和可学习几何图形以转换为 BEV 空间。其次，预对齐的粗略 BEV 特征通过基于光线的变换器进一步变形，以考虑可见性知识。 GitNet 在具有挑战性的 nuScenes 和 Argoverse 数据集上取得了领先的性能。 本文提出GitNet框架，通过几何先验转换解决单目图像到鸟瞰图（BEV）语义分割的挑战。 Shi Gong,Xiaoqing Ye,Xiao Tan,Jingdong Wang,Errui Ding,Yu Zhou,Xiang Bai cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Suwichaya Suwanwimolkul,Satoshi Komorita
title: Efficient Linear Attention for Fast and Accurate Keypoint Matching
title_zh: 高效线性注意力，实现快速准确的关键点匹配
comment: To be published in ACM ICMR 2022
comments: To be published in ACM ICMR 2022
abstract: Recently Transformers have provided state-of-the-art performance in sparse matching, crucial to realize high-performance 3D vision applications. Yet, these Transformers lack efficiency due to the quadratic computational complexity of their attention mechanism. To solve this problem, we employ an efficient linear attention for the linear computational complexity. Then, we propose a new attentional aggregation that achieves high accuracy by aggregating both the global and local information from sparse keypoints. To further improve the efficiency, we propose the joint learning of feature matching and description. Our learning enables simpler and faster matching than Sinkhorn, often used in matching the learned descriptors from Transformers. Our method achieves competitive performance with only 0.84M learnable parameters against the bigger SOTAs, SuperGlue (12M parameters) and SGMNet (30M parameters), on three benchmarks, HPatch, ETH, and Aachen Day-Night.
summary: Recently Transformers have provided state-of-the-art performance in sparse matching, crucial to realize high-performance 3D vision applications. Yet, these Transformers lack efficiency due to the quadratic computational complexity of their attention mechanism. To solve this problem, we employ an efficient linear attention for the linear computational complexity. Then, we propose a new attentional aggregation that achieves high accuracy by aggregating both the global and local information from sparse keypoints. To further improve the efficiency, we propose the joint learning of feature matching and description. Our learning enables simpler and faster matching than Sinkhorn, often used in matching the learned descriptors from Transformers. Our method achieves competitive performance with only 0.84M learnable parameters against the bigger SOTAs, SuperGlue (12M parameters) and SGMNet (30M parameters), on three benchmarks, HPatch, ETH, and Aachen Day-Night.
abstract_zh: 最近，Transformers 在稀疏匹配方面提供了最先进的性能，这对于实现高性能 3D 视觉应用至关重要。然而，由于注意力机制的二次计算复杂性，这些 Transformer 缺乏效率。为了解决这个问题，我们对线性计算复杂度采用有效的线性注意力。然后，我们提出了一种新的注意力聚合，通过聚合稀疏关键点的全局和局部信息来实现高精度。为了进一步提高效率，我们提出了特征匹配和描述的联合学习。我们的学习可以比 Sinkhorn 更简单、更快速地进行匹配，Sinkhorn 通常用于匹配从 Transformer 中学习到的描述符。我们的方法在 HPatch、ETH 和 Aachen Day-Night 三个基准测试中仅用 0.84M 可学习参数就实现了与更大的 SOTA、SuperGlue（12M 参数）和 SGMNet（30M 参数）相比的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的线性注意力机制，用于实现快速且准确的关键点匹配。
AI.motivation: 传统Transformer在关键点匹配中计算复杂度为二次方，效率不足，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 采用线性注意力降低复杂度，设计融合全局与局部信息的聚合方法，并联合学习特征匹配与描述。
AI.result: 在HPatch、ETH和Aachen Day-Night三个基准上，以0.84M参数达到与12M和30M参数模型相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高精度的同时显著提升效率，适合实时3D视觉应用。

authors_text: Yulei Lu,Yawei Luo,Li Zhang,Zheyang Li,Yi Yang,Jun Xiao
title: Bidirectional Self-Training with Multiple Anisotropic Prototypes for Domain Adaptive Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于领域自适应语义分割的多个各向异性原型的双向自训练
abstract: A thriving trend for domain adaptive segmentation endeavors to generate the high-quality pseudo labels for target domain and retrain the segmentor on them. Under this self-training paradigm, some competitive methods have sought to the latent-space information, which establishes the feature centroids (a.k.a prototypes) of the semantic classes and determines the pseudo label candidates by their distances from these centroids. In this paper, we argue that the latent space contains more information to be exploited thus taking one step further to capitalize on it. Firstly, instead of merely using the source-domain prototypes to determine the target pseudo labels as most of the traditional methods do, we bidirectionally produce the target-domain prototypes to degrade those source features which might be too hard or disturbed for the adaptation. Secondly, existing attempts simply model each category as a single and isotropic prototype while ignoring the variance of the feature distribution, which could lead to the confusion of similar categories. To cope with this issue, we propose to represent each category with multiple and anisotropic prototypes via Gaussian Mixture Model, in order to fit the de facto distribution of source domain and estimate the likelihood of target samples based on the probability density. We apply our method on GTA5->Cityscapes and Synthia->Cityscapes tasks and achieve 61.2 and 62.8 respectively in terms of mean IoU, substantially outperforming other competitive self-training methods. Noticeably, in some categories which severely suffer from the categorical confusion such as "truck" and "bus", our method achieves 56.4 and 68.8 respectively, which further demonstrates the effectiveness of our design.
summary: A thriving trend for domain adaptive segmentation endeavors to generate the high-quality pseudo labels for target domain and retrain the segmentor on them. Under this self-training paradigm, some competitive methods have sought to the latent-space information, which establishes the feature centroids (a.k.a prototypes) of the semantic classes and determines the pseudo label candidates by their distances from these centroids. In this paper, we argue that the latent space contains more information to be exploited thus taking one step further to capitalize on it. Firstly, instead of merely using the source-domain prototypes to determine the target pseudo labels as most of the traditional methods do, we bidirectionally produce the target-domain prototypes to degrade those source features which might be too hard or disturbed for the adaptation. Secondly, existing attempts simply model each category as a single and isotropic prototype while ignoring the variance of the feature distribution, which could lead to the confusion of similar categories. To cope with this issue, we propose to represent each category with multiple and anisotropic prototypes via Gaussian Mixture Model, in order to fit the de facto distribution of source domain and estimate the likelihood of target samples based on the probability density. We apply our method on GTA5->Cityscapes and Synthia->Cityscapes tasks and achieve 61.2 and 62.8 respectively in terms of mean IoU, substantially outperforming other competitive self-training methods. Noticeably, in some categories which severely suffer from the categorical confusion such as "truck" and "bus", our method achieves 56.4 and 68.8 respectively, which further demonstrates the effectiveness of our design.
abstract_zh: 域自适应分割的蓬勃发展趋势致力于为目标域生成高质量的伪标签并在其上重新训练分割器。在这种自我训练范式下，一些竞争方法寻求潜在空间信息，该信息建立语义类的特征质心（也称为原型），并根据与这些质心的距离来确定伪标签候选者。在本文中，我们认为潜在空间包含更多可供利用的信息，从而进一步利用它。首先，我们不像大多数传统方法那样仅仅使用源域原型来确定目标伪标签，而是双向生成目标域原型来降低那些对于适应来说可能太难或受到干扰的源特征。其次，现有的尝试简单地将每个类别建模为单一且各向同性的原型，而忽略了特征分布的方差，这可能导致相似类别的混乱。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过高斯混合模型用多个各向异性原型来表示每个类别，以拟合源域的实际分布并根据概率密度估计目标样本的可能性。我们将我们的方法应用于 GTA5->Cityscapes 和 Synthia->Cityscapes 任务，平均 IoU 分别达到 61.2 和 62.8，大大优于其他竞争性自我训练方法。值得注意的是，在一些类别混乱严重的类别中，例如“卡车”和“公共汽车”，我们的方法分别达到了 56.4 和 68.8，这进一步证明了我们设计的有效性。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于领域自适应语义分割的双向自训练方法，通过利用多向异性原型来提升目标域伪标签的质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅依赖源域原型生成目标域伪标签，未能充分挖掘潜在空间信息，且忽略特征分布方差导致类别混淆。
AI.method: 双向生成源域与目标域原型以优化特征对齐，采用高斯混合模型为每个类别构建多个向异性原型，通过概率密度估计提升伪标签可靠性。
AI.result: 在GTA5→Cityscapes和Synthia→Cityscapes任务中分别达到61.2和62.8的平均IoU，尤其在‘卡车’和‘巴士’等易混淆类别中表现显著优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过挖掘潜在空间信息并建模特征分布方差，所提方法有效缓解了领域自适应中的类别混淆问题，显著提升了分割性能。

To cope with this issue, we propose to represent each category with multiple and anisotropic prototypes via Gaussian Mixture Model, in order to fit the de facto distribution of source domain and estimate the likelihood of target samples based on the probability density. We apply our method on GTA5->Cityscapes and Synthia->Cityscapes tasks and achieve 61.2 and 62.8 respectively in terms of mean IoU, substantially outperforming other competitive self-training methods. Noticeably, in some categories which severely suffer from the categorical confusion such as "truck" and "bus", our method achieves 56.4 and 68.8 respectively, which further demonstrates the effectiveness of our design. 域自适应分割的蓬勃发展趋势致力于为目标域生成高质量的伪标签并在其上重新训练分割器。在这种自我训练范式下，一些竞争方法寻求潜在空间信息，该信息建立语义类的特征质心（也称为原型），并根据与这些质心的距离来确定伪标签候选者。在本文中，我们认为潜在空间包含更多可供利用的信息，从而进一步利用它。首先，我们不像大多数传统方法那样仅仅使用源域原型来确定目标伪标签，而是双向生成目标域原型来降低那些对于适应来说可能太难或受到干扰的源特征。其次，现有的尝试简单地将每个类别建模为单一且各向同性的原型，而忽略了特征分布的方差，这可能导致相似类别的混乱。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过高斯混合模型用多个各向异性原型来表示每个类别，以拟合源域的实际分布并根据概率密度估计目标样本的可能性。我们将我们的方法应用于 GTA5->Cityscapes 和 Synthia->Cityscapes 任务，平均 IoU 分别达到 61.2 和 62.8，大大优于其他竞争性自我训练方法。值得注意的是，在一些类别混乱严重的类别中，例如“卡车”和“公共汽车”，我们的方法分别达到了 56.4 和 68.8，这进一步证明了我们设计的有效性。 该论文提出了一种用于领域自适应语义分割的双向自训练方法，通过利用多向异性原型来提升目标域伪标签的质量。 Yulei Lu,Yawei Luo,Li Zhang,Zheyang Li,Yi Yang,Jun Xiao cs.CV

authors_text: Yujie Wang,Mike Izbicki
title: The Tree Loss: Improving Generalization with Many Classes
title_zh: 树损失：通过许多类提高泛化能力
abstract: Multi-class classification problems often have many semantically similar classes. For example, 90 of ImageNet's 1000 classes are for different breeds of dog. We should expect that these semantically similar classes will have similar parameter vectors, but the standard cross entropy loss does not enforce this constraint. We introduce the tree loss as a drop-in replacement for the cross entropy loss. The tree loss re-parameterizes the parameter matrix in order to guarantee that semantically similar classes will have similar parameter vectors. Using simple properties of stochastic gradient descent, we show that the tree loss's generalization error is asymptotically better than the cross entropy loss's. We then validate these theoretical results on synthetic data, image data (CIFAR100, ImageNet), and text data (Twitter).
summary: Multi-class classification problems often have many semantically similar classes. For example, 90 of ImageNet's 1000 classes are for different breeds of dog. We should expect that these semantically similar classes will have similar parameter vectors, but the standard cross entropy loss does not enforce this constraint. We introduce the tree loss as a drop-in replacement for the cross entropy loss. The tree loss re-parameterizes the parameter matrix in order to guarantee that semantically similar classes will have similar parameter vectors. Using simple properties of stochastic gradient descent, we show that the tree loss's generalization error is asymptotically better than the cross entropy loss's. We then validate these theoretical results on synthetic data, image data (CIFAR100, ImageNet), and text data (Twitter).
abstract_zh: 多类分类问题通常有许多语义相似的类。例如，ImageNet 的 1000 个类别中有 90 个类别针对不同品种的狗。我们应该期望这些语义相似的类将具有相似的参数向量，但标准交叉熵损失不会强制执行此约束。我们引入树损失作为交叉熵损失的直接替代品。树损失重新参数化参数矩阵，以保证语义相似的类将具有相似的参数向量。使用随机梯度下降的简单属性，我们表明树损失的泛化误差渐近优于交叉熵损失。然后，我们在合成数据、图像数据（CIFAR100、ImageNet）和文本数据（Twitter）上验证这些理论结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的损失函数——tree loss，用于改进多类别分类任务中存在大量语义相似类别时的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统交叉熵损失无法强制语义相似类别具有相似的参数向量，导致模型泛化能力受限，尤其在类别数量庞大且存在语义关联的情况下表现不足。
AI.method: 通过重新参数化参数矩阵，设计tree loss以确保语义相似类别具有相似参数向量，并基于SGD的理论分析证明其泛化误差的渐近优势。
AI.result: 理论分析与实验验证（包括合成数据、CIFAR100、ImageNet和Twitter文本数据）均表明tree loss在泛化性能上优于交叉熵损失。
AI.conclusion: tree loss能有效提升多类别分类模型的泛化能力，尤其适用于包含大量语义相似类别的场景。

authors_text: Hao Xu,Yuntian Chen,Dongxiao Zhang
title: Semantic interpretation for convolutional neural networks: What makes a cat a cat?
title_zh: 卷积神经网络的语义解释：是什么让猫成为猫？
abstract: The interpretability of deep neural networks has attracted increasing attention in recent years, and several methods have been created to interpret the "black box" model. Fundamental limitations remain, however, that impede the pace of understanding the networks, especially the extraction of understandable semantic space. In this work, we introduce the framework of semantic explainable AI (S-XAI), which utilizes row-centered principal component analysis to obtain the common traits from the best combination of superpixels discovered by a genetic algorithm, and extracts understandable semantic spaces on the basis of discovered semantically sensitive neurons and visualization techniques. Statistical interpretation of the semantic space is also provided, and the concept of semantic probability is proposed for the first time. Our experimental results demonstrate that S-XAI is effective in providing a semantic interpretation for the CNN, and offers broad usage, including trustworthiness assessment and semantic sample searching.
summary: The interpretability of deep neural networks has attracted increasing attention in recent years, and several methods have been created to interpret the "black box" model. Fundamental limitations remain, however, that impede the pace of understanding the networks, especially the extraction of understandable semantic space. In this work, we introduce the framework of semantic explainable AI (S-XAI), which utilizes row-centered principal component analysis to obtain the common traits from the best combination of superpixels discovered by a genetic algorithm, and extracts understandable semantic spaces on the basis of discovered semantically sensitive neurons and visualization techniques. Statistical interpretation of the semantic space is also provided, and the concept of semantic probability is proposed for the first time. Our experimental results demonstrate that S-XAI is effective in providing a semantic interpretation for the CNN, and offers broad usage, including trustworthiness assessment and semantic sample searching.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度神经网络的可解释性引起了越来越多的关注，并且已经创建了多种方法来解释“黑盒”模型。然而，基本的限制仍然存在，阻碍了理解网络的步伐，尤其是可理解语义空间的提取。在这项工作中，我们介绍了语义可解释人工智能（S-XAI）的框架，它利用以行为中心的主成分分析从遗传算法发现的超像素的最佳组合中获取共同特征，并在发现的语义敏感神经元和可视化技术的基础上提取可理解的语义空间。还提供了语义空间的统计解释，并首次提出了语义概率的概念。我们的实验结果表明，S-XAI 可以有效地为 CNN 提供语义解释，并提供广泛的用途，包括可信度评估和语义样本搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为S-XAI的语义可解释AI框架，旨在通过分析卷积神经网络（CNN）的语义空间来解释其决策过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有多种解释深度神经网络的方法，但现有技术在提取可理解的语义空间方面仍存在根本性限制，阻碍了对网络行为的深入理解。
AI.method: 结合遗传算法发现的超像素组合与行中心主成分分析（RPCA），提取语义敏感神经元并构建可视化技术，同时首次提出语义概率概念进行统计解释。
AI.result: 实验表明S-XAI能有效解释CNN的语义特征，支持信任度评估和语义样本检索等多样化应用。
AI.conclusion: S-XAI框架通过语义空间解析显著提升了CNN的可解释性，为模型可信度分析和语义级操作提供了新途径。

authors_text: Fanghui Xue,Biao Yang,Yingyong Qi,Jack Xin
title: Searching Intrinsic Dimensions of Vision Transformers
title_zh: 寻找视觉变压器的内在维度
abstract: It has been shown by many researchers that transformers perform as well as convolutional neural networks in many computer vision tasks. Meanwhile, the large computational costs of its attention module hinder further studies and applications on edge devices. Some pruning methods have been developed to construct efficient vision transformers, but most of them have considered image classification tasks only. Inspired by these results, we propose SiDT, a method for pruning vision transformer backbones on more complicated vision tasks like object detection, based on the search of transformer dimensions. Experiments on CIFAR-100 and COCO datasets show that the backbones with 20\% or 40\% dimensions/parameters pruned can have similar or even better performance than the unpruned models. Moreover, we have also provided the complexity analysis and comparisons with the previous pruning methods.
summary: It has been shown by many researchers that transformers perform as well as convolutional neural networks in many computer vision tasks. Meanwhile, the large computational costs of its attention module hinder further studies and applications on edge devices. Some pruning methods have been developed to construct efficient vision transformers, but most of them have considered image classification tasks only. Inspired by these results, we propose SiDT, a method for pruning vision transformer backbones on more complicated vision tasks like object detection, based on the search of transformer dimensions. Experiments on CIFAR-100 and COCO datasets show that the backbones with 20\% or 40\% dimensions/parameters pruned can have similar or even better performance than the unpruned models. Moreover, we have also provided the complexity analysis and comparisons with the previous pruning methods.
abstract_zh: 许多研究人员已经证明，变压器在许多计算机视觉任务中的表现与卷积神经网络一样好。同时，其注意力模块的巨大计算成本阻碍了在边缘设备上的进一步研究和应用。已经开发了一些修剪方法来构建高效的视觉变换器，但大多数方法仅考虑图像分类任务。受这些结果的启发，我们提出了 SiDT，一种基于 Transformer 维度的搜索，在更复杂的视觉任务（如目标检测）上修剪视觉 Transformer 主干的方法。在 CIFAR-100 和 COCO 数据集上的实验表明，修剪了 20\% 或 40\% 维度/参数的主干网可以比未修剪的模型具有相似甚至更好的性能。此外，我们还提供了复杂度分析以及与之前的剪枝方法的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SiDT的剪枝方法，用于在复杂视觉任务中高效压缩视觉Transformer模型。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法多针对图像分类任务，而视觉Transformer在复杂任务（如目标检测）中的计算成本过高，限制了边缘设备应用。
AI.method: 基于搜索Transformer维度的剪枝方法SiDT，专门针对复杂视觉任务进行模型压缩。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-100和COCO数据集上，剪枝后模型（20%或40%参数量）性能与原始模型相当或更优，并提供了复杂度分析对比。
AI.conclusion: SiDT方法有效降低视觉Transformer计算成本，在保持性能的同时适用于复杂视觉任务。

search_text: Searching Intrinsic Dimensions of Vision Transformers 寻找视觉变压器的内在维度 It has been shown by many researchers that transformers perform as well as convolutional neural networks in many computer vision tasks. Meanwhile, the large computational costs of its attention module hinder further studies and applications on edge devices. Some pruning methods have been developed to construct efficient vision transformers, but most of them have considered image classification tasks only. Inspired by these results, we propose SiDT, a method for pruning vision transformer backbones on more complicated vision tasks like object detection, based on the search of transformer dimensions. Experiments on CIFAR-100 and COCO datasets show that the backbones with 20\% or 40\% dimensions/parameters pruned can have similar or even better performance than the unpruned models. Moreover, we have also provided the complexity analysis and comparisons with the previous pruning methods. 许多研究人员已经证明，变压器在许多计算机视觉任务中的表现与卷积神经网络一样好。同时，其注意力模块的巨大计算成本阻碍了在边缘设备上的进一步研究和应用。已经开发了一些修剪方法来构建高效的视觉变换器，但大多数方法仅考虑图像分类任务。受这些结果的启发，我们提出了 SiDT，一种基于 Transformer 维度的搜索，在更复杂的视觉任务（如目标检测）上修剪视觉 Transformer 主干的方法。在 CIFAR-100 和 COCO 数据集上的实验表明，修剪了 20\% 或 40\% 维度/参数的主干网可以比未修剪的模型具有相似甚至更好的性能。此外，我们还提供了复杂度分析以及与之前的剪枝方法的比较。 本文提出一种名为SiDT的剪枝方法，用于在复杂视觉任务中高效压缩视觉Transformer模型。 Fanghui Xue,Biao Yang,Yingyong Qi,Jack Xin cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yisi Sang,Xiangyang Mou,Mo Yu,Shunyu Yao,Jing Li,Jeffrey Stanton
title: TVShowGuess: Character Comprehension in Stories as Speaker Guessing
title_zh: TVShowGuess：故事中的人物理解作为说话者的猜测
abstract: We propose a new task for assessing machines' skills of understanding fictional characters in narrative stories. The task, TVShowGuess, builds on the scripts of TV series and takes the form of guessing the anonymous main characters based on the backgrounds of the scenes and the dialogues. Our human study supports that this form of task covers comprehension of multiple types of character persona, including understanding characters' personalities, facts and memories of personal experience, which are well aligned with the psychological and literary theories about the theory of mind (ToM) of human beings on understanding fictional characters during reading. We further propose new model architectures to support the contextualized encoding of long scene texts. Experiments show that our proposed approaches significantly outperform baselines, yet still largely lag behind the (nearly perfect) human performance. Our work serves as a first step toward the goal of narrative character comprehension.
summary: We propose a new task for assessing machines' skills of understanding fictional characters in narrative stories. The task, TVShowGuess, builds on the scripts of TV series and takes the form of guessing the anonymous main characters based on the backgrounds of the scenes and the dialogues. Our human study supports that this form of task covers comprehension of multiple types of character persona, including understanding characters' personalities, facts and memories of personal experience, which are well aligned with the psychological and literary theories about the theory of mind (ToM) of human beings on understanding fictional characters during reading. We further propose new model architectures to support the contextualized encoding of long scene texts. Experiments show that our proposed approaches significantly outperform baselines, yet still largely lag behind the (nearly perfect) human performance. Our work serves as a first step toward the goal of narrative character comprehension.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一项新任务来评估机器理解叙事故事中虚构人物的技能。 TVShowGuess 任务以电视剧剧本为基础，采用根据场景背景和对话猜测匿名主角的形式。我们的人类研究表明，这种形式的任务涵盖了对多种类型人物形象的理解，包括理解人物的个性、事实和个人经历的记忆，这与人类在阅读过程中理解虚构人物的心理理论（ToM）的心理学和文学理论非常吻合。我们进一步提出新的模型架构来支持长场景文本的上下文编码。实验表明，我们提出的方法明显优于基线，但仍然很大程度上落后于（近乎完美的）人类表现。我们的工作是实现叙事人物理解目标的第一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TVShowGuess任务，通过分析电视剧场景背景和对话内容，评估机器对叙事故事中虚构角色的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在理解角色心理和个性方面存在局限，需设计与人类心智理论（ToM）对齐的任务以评估机器叙事理解能力。
AI.method: 构建基于电视剧脚本的匿名角色猜测任务，设计新型模型架构实现长文本场景的上下文编码。
AI.result: 模型性能显著优于基线方法，但与人类接近完美的表现仍有较大差距。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为叙事角色理解研究提供了新方向，揭示了当前AI在深层角色认知层面的不足。

authors_text: Amnon Drory,Shai Avidan,Raja Giryes
title: Stress-Testing Point Cloud Registration on Automotive LiDAR
title_zh: 汽车激光雷达点云注册压力测试
comment: Accepted to the NeurIPS 2022 workshop on Machine Learning for Autonomous Driving. Project Page: https://github.com/AmnonDrory/LidarRegistration
comments: Accepted to the NeurIPS 2022 workshop on Machine Learning for Autonomous Driving. Project Page: https://github.com/AmnonDrory/LidarRegistration
abstract: Rigid Point Cloud Registration (PCR) algorithms aim to estimate the 6-DOF relative motion between two point clouds, which is important in various fields, including autonomous driving. Recent years have seen a significant improvement in global PCR algorithms, i.e. algorithms that can handle a large relative motion. This has been demonstrated in various scenarios, including indoor scenes, but has only been minimally tested in the Automotive setting, where point clouds are produced by vehicle-mounted LiDAR sensors. In this work, we aim to answer questions that are important for automotive applications, including: which of the new algorithms is the most accurate, and which is fastest? How transferable are deep-learning approaches, e.g. what happens when you train a network with data from Boston, and run it in a vehicle in Singapore? How small can the overlap between point clouds be before the algorithms start to deteriorate? To what extent are the algorithms rotation invariant? Our results are at times surprising. When comparing robust parameter estimation methods for registration, we find that the fastest and most accurate is not one of the newest approaches. Instead, it is a modern variant of the well known RANSAC technique. We also suggest a new outlier filtering method, Grid-Prioritized Filtering (GPF), to further improve it. An additional contribution of this work is an algorithm for selecting challenging sets of frame-pairs from automotive LiDAR datasets. This enables meaningful benchmarking in the Automotive LiDAR setting, and can also improve training for learning algorithms.
summary: Rigid Point Cloud Registration (PCR) algorithms aim to estimate the 6-DOF relative motion between two point clouds, which is important in various fields, including autonomous driving. Recent years have seen a significant improvement in global PCR algorithms, i.e. algorithms that can handle a large relative motion. This has been demonstrated in various scenarios, including indoor scenes, but has only been minimally tested in the Automotive setting, where point clouds are produced by vehicle-mounted LiDAR sensors. In this work, we aim to answer questions that are important for automotive applications, including: which of the new algorithms is the most accurate, and which is fastest? How transferable are deep-learning approaches, e.g. what happens when you train a network with data from Boston, and run it in a vehicle in Singapore? How small can the overlap between point clouds be before the algorithms start to deteriorate? To what extent are the algorithms rotation invariant? Our results are at times surprising. When comparing robust parameter estimation methods for registration, we find that the fastest and most accurate is not one of the newest approaches. Instead, it is a modern variant of the well known RANSAC technique. We also suggest a new outlier filtering method, Grid-Prioritized Filtering (GPF), to further improve it. An additional contribution of this work is an algorithm for selecting challenging sets of frame-pairs from automotive LiDAR datasets. This enables meaningful benchmarking in the Automotive LiDAR setting, and can also improve training for learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 刚性点云配准（PCR）算法旨在估计两个点云之间的六自由度相对运动，这在包括自动驾驶在内的各个领域都很重要。近年来，全局 PCR 算法（即可以处理较大相对运动的算法）有了显着改进。这已经在包括室内场景在内的各种场景中得到了证明，但仅在汽车环境中进行了最低限度的测试，其中点云由车载激光雷达传感器生成。在这项工作中，我们的目标是回答对汽车应用重要的问题，包括：哪种新算法最准确，哪种最快？深度学习方法的可移植性如何，例如当您使用波士顿的数据训练网络并在新加坡的车辆中运行时会发生什么？在算法开始恶化之前，点云之间的重叠可以有多小？算法在多大程度上具有旋转不变性？我们的结果有时令人惊讶。在比较稳健的配准参数估计方法时，我们发现最快和最准确的方法并不是最新的方法之一。相反，它是众所周知的 RANSAC 技术的现代变体。我们还建议使用一种新的异常值过滤方法，即网格优先过滤（GPF）来进一步改进它。这项工作的另一个贡献是一种从汽车 LiDAR 数据集中选择具有挑战性的帧对集的算法。这可以在汽车 LiDAR 设置中进行有意义的基准测试，并且还可以改进学习算法的训练。

AI.tldr: 本文对汽车激光雷达点云配准算法进行压力测试，评估其在自动驾驶场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管全局点云配准算法在室内场景中表现优异，但其在汽车激光雷达环境中的准确性、速度及泛化能力尚未充分验证，需针对实际应用需求进行系统评估。
AI.method: 通过对比实验分析最新算法性能，提出网格优先过滤（GPF）方法优化结果，并开发用于筛选具有挑战性的帧对数据集的算法以支持基准测试。
AI.result: 现代RANSAC变体在速度和精度上优于最新算法；GPF有效提升性能；深度学习模型在跨地区数据迁移时表现下降；算法对旋转具有一定鲁棒性但存在局限。
AI.conclusion: 汽车激光雷达场景下需谨慎选择配准算法，传统方法改进仍具价值，而数据集构建与算法鲁棒性研究对自动驾驶系统优化至关重要。

This has been demonstrated in various scenarios, including indoor scenes, but has only been minimally tested in the Automotive setting, where point clouds are produced by vehicle-mounted LiDAR sensors. In this work, we aim to answer questions that are important for automotive applications, including: which of the new algorithms is the most accurate, and which is fastest? Instead, it is a modern variant of the well known RANSAC technique. We also suggest a new outlier filtering method, Grid-Prioritized Filtering (GPF), to further improve it. An additional contribution of this work is an algorithm for selecting challenging sets of frame-pairs from automotive LiDAR datasets. This enables meaningful benchmarking in the Automotive LiDAR setting, and can also improve training for learning algorithms. 刚性点云配准（PCR）算法旨在估计两个点云之间的六自由度相对运动，这在包括自动驾驶在内的各个领域都很重要。近年来，全局 PCR 算法（即可以处理较大相对运动的算法）有了显着改进。这已经在包括室内场景在内的各种场景中得到了证明，但仅在汽车环境中进行了最低限度的测试，其中点云由车载激光雷达传感器生成。在这项工作中，我们的目标是回答对汽车应用重要的问题，包括：哪种新算法最准确，哪种最快？深度学习方法的可移植性如何，例如当您使用波士顿的数据训练网络并在新加坡的车辆中运行时会发生什么？在算法开始恶化之前，点云之间的重叠可以有多小？算法在多大程度上具有旋转不变性？我们的结果有时令人惊讶。在比较稳健的配准参数估计方法时，我们发现最快和最准确的方法并不是最新的方法之一。相反，它是众所周知的 RANSAC 技术的现代变体。我们还建议使用一种新的异常值过滤方法，即网格优先过滤（GPF）来进一步改进它。这项工作的另一个贡献是一种从汽车 LiDAR 数据集中选择具有挑战性的帧对集的算法。这可以在汽车 LiDAR 设置中进行有意义的基准测试，并且还可以改进学习算法的训练。 本文对汽车激光雷达点云配准算法进行压力测试，评估其在自动驾驶场景下的性能。 Amnon Drory,Shai Avidan,Raja Giryes cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xinpeng Liu,Yong-Lu Li,Xiaoqian Wu,Yu-Wing Tai,Cewu Lu,Chi-Keung Tang
title: Interactiveness Field in Human-Object Interactions
title_zh: 人机交互中的交互场
abstract: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection plays a core role in activity understanding. Though recent two/one-stage methods have achieved impressive results, as an essential step, discovering interactive human-object pairs remains challenging. Both one/two-stage methods fail to effectively extract interactive pairs instead of generating redundant negative pairs. In this work, we introduce a previously overlooked interactiveness bimodal prior: given an object in an image, after pairing it with the humans, the generated pairs are either mostly non-interactive, or mostly interactive, with the former more frequent than the latter. Based on this interactiveness bimodal prior we propose the "interactiveness field". To make the learned field compatible with real HOI image considerations, we propose new energy constraints based on the cardinality and difference in the inherent "interactiveness field" underlying interactive versus non-interactive pairs. Consequently, our method can detect more precise pairs and thus significantly boost HOI detection performance, which is validated on widely-used benchmarks where we achieve decent improvements over state-of-the-arts. Our code is available at https://github.com/Foruck/Interactiveness-Field.
summary: Human-Object Interaction (HOI) detection plays a core role in activity understanding. Though recent two/one-stage methods have achieved impressive results, as an essential step, discovering interactive human-object pairs remains challenging. Both one/two-stage methods fail to effectively extract interactive pairs instead of generating redundant negative pairs. In this work, we introduce a previously overlooked interactiveness bimodal prior: given an object in an image, after pairing it with the humans, the generated pairs are either mostly non-interactive, or mostly interactive, with the former more frequent than the latter. Based on this interactiveness bimodal prior we propose the "interactiveness field". To make the learned field compatible with real HOI image considerations, we propose new energy constraints based on the cardinality and difference in the inherent "interactiveness field" underlying interactive versus non-interactive pairs. Consequently, our method can detect more precise pairs and thus significantly boost HOI detection performance, which is validated on widely-used benchmarks where we achieve decent improvements over state-of-the-arts. Our code is available at https://github.com/Foruck/Interactiveness-Field.
abstract_zh: 人机交互（HOI）检测在活动理解中发挥着核心作用。尽管最近的两阶段/一阶段方法取得了令人印象深刻的结果，但作为一个重要步骤，发现交互式人与物体对仍然具有挑战性。两种一阶段/两阶段方法都无法有效地提取交互对，而不是生成冗余负对。在这项工作中，我们引入了之前被忽视的交互性双峰先验：给定图像中的一个对象，将其与人类配对后，生成的对要么大部分是非交互的，要么大部分是交互的，前者比后者更频繁。基于这种交互性双峰先验，我们提出了“交互性场”。为了使学习场与真实的 HOI 图像考虑因素兼容，我们基于交互与非交互对的固有“交互场”的基数和差异提出了新的能量约束。因此，我们的方法可以检测更精确的对，从而显着提高 HOI 检测性能，这在广泛使用的基准上得到了验证，在这些基准上，我们比最先进的技术取得了相当大的改进。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/Foruck/Interactiveness-Field 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的交互性场模型，用于改进人类-物体交互（HOI）检测中的交互对识别问题。
AI.motivation: 现有单阶段/双阶段方法在生成交互对时存在冗余负样本问题，难以有效区分交互与非交互对。
AI.method: 基于交互性双模先验提出交互性场模型，通过卡方约束和差异约束优化能量函数，提升交互对检测精度。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中显著超越现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 交互性场模型通过引入新的先验约束，有效解决了HOI检测中的冗余负样本问题，提升了检测性能。

authors_text: Caiyuan Zheng,Hui Li,Seon-Min Rhee,Seungju Han,Jae-Joon Han,Peng Wang
title: Pushing the Performance Limit of Scene Text Recognizer without Human Annotation
title_zh: 无需人工注释即可突破场景文本识别器的性能极限
abstract: Scene text recognition (STR) attracts much attention over the years because of its wide application. Most methods train STR model in a fully supervised manner which requires large amounts of labeled data. Although synthetic data contributes a lot to STR, it suffers from the real-tosynthetic domain gap that restricts model performance. In this work, we aim to boost STR models by leveraging both synthetic data and the numerous real unlabeled images, exempting human annotation cost thoroughly. A robust consistency regularization based semi-supervised framework is proposed for STR, which can effectively solve the instability issue due to domain inconsistency between synthetic and real images. A character-level consistency regularization is designed to mitigate the misalignment between characters in sequence recognition. Extensive experiments on standard text recognition benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. It can steadily improve existing STR models, and boost an STR model to achieve new state-of-the-art results. To our best knowledge, this is the first consistency regularization based framework that applies successfully to STR.
summary: Scene text recognition (STR) attracts much attention over the years because of its wide application. Most methods train STR model in a fully supervised manner which requires large amounts of labeled data. Although synthetic data contributes a lot to STR, it suffers from the real-tosynthetic domain gap that restricts model performance. In this work, we aim to boost STR models by leveraging both synthetic data and the numerous real unlabeled images, exempting human annotation cost thoroughly. A robust consistency regularization based semi-supervised framework is proposed for STR, which can effectively solve the instability issue due to domain inconsistency between synthetic and real images. A character-level consistency regularization is designed to mitigate the misalignment between characters in sequence recognition. Extensive experiments on standard text recognition benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. It can steadily improve existing STR models, and boost an STR model to achieve new state-of-the-art results. To our best knowledge, this is the first consistency regularization based framework that applies successfully to STR.
abstract_zh: 场景文本识别（STR）因其广泛的应用多年来备受关注。大多数方法以完全监督的方式训练 STR 模型，这需要大量的标记数据。尽管合成数据对 STR 贡献很大，但它受到限制模型性能的实际合成域差距的影响。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过利用合成数据和大量真实的未标记图像来增强 STR 模型，彻底免除人工注释成本。针对STR提出了一种基于鲁棒一致性正则化的半监督框架，可以有效解决由于合成图像与真实图像之间域不一致而导致的不稳定问题。字符级一致性正则化旨在减轻序列识别中字符之间的错位。标准文本识别基准的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。它可以稳步改进现有的 STR 模型，并提升 STR 模型以获得新的最先进结果。据我们所知，这是第一个成功应用于 STR 的基于一致性正则化的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需人工标注的半监督框架，通过结合合成数据和未标注真实图像提升场景文本识别（STR）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有STR方法依赖大量标注数据成本高，合成数据存在领域差距，需利用未标注数据降低标注成本并提升模型性能。
AI.method: 设计基于一致性正则化的半监督框架，通过字符级正则化缓解序列识别中的字符对齐问题，解决合成与真实图像领域不一致导致的不稳定问题。
AI.result: 在标准基准测试中显著提升现有STR模型性能，使某模型达到新的SOTA结果，且为首个成功应用于STR的一致性正则化框架。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过半监督学习有效利用未标注数据，无需人工标注即可提升STR性能，为领域适应性研究提供新思路。

search_text: Pushing the Performance Limit of Scene Text Recognizer without Human Annotation 无需人工注释即可突破场景文本识别器的性能极限 Scene text recognition (STR) attracts much attention over the years because of its wide application. Most methods train STR model in a fully supervised manner which requires large amounts of labeled data. Although synthetic data contributes a lot to STR, it suffers from the real-tosynthetic domain gap that restricts model performance. In this work, we aim to boost STR models by leveraging both synthetic data and the numerous real unlabeled images, exempting human annotation cost thoroughly. A robust consistency regularization based semi-supervised framework is proposed for STR, which can effectively solve the instability issue due to domain inconsistency between synthetic and real images. A character-level consistency regularization is designed to mitigate the misalignment between characters in sequence recognition. Extensive experiments on standard text recognition benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. It can steadily improve existing STR models, and boost an STR model to achieve new state-of-the-art results. To our best knowledge, this is the first consistency regularization based framework that applies successfully to STR. 场景文本识别（STR）因其广泛的应用多年来备受关注。大多数方法以完全监督的方式训练 STR 模型，这需要大量的标记数据。尽管合成数据对 STR 贡献很大，但它受到限制模型性能的实际合成域差距的影响。在这项工作中，我们的目标是通过利用合成数据和大量真实的未标记图像来增强 STR 模型，彻底免除人工注释成本。针对STR提出了一种基于鲁棒一致性正则化的半监督框架，可以有效解决由于合成图像与真实图像之间域不一致而导致的不稳定问题。字符级一致性正则化旨在减轻序列识别中字符之间的错位。标准文本识别基准的大量实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。它可以稳步改进现有的 STR 模型，并提升 STR 模型以获得新的最先进结果。据我们所知，这是第一个成功应用于 STR 的基于一致性正则化的框架。 本文提出一种无需人工标注的半监督框架，通过结合合成数据和未标注真实图像提升场景文本识别（STR）性能。 Caiyuan Zheng,Hui Li,Seon-Min Rhee,Seungju Han,Jae-Joon Han,Peng Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Yasiru Ranasinghe,Kavinga Weerasooriya,Roshan Godaliyadda,Vijitha Herath,Parakrama Ekanayake,Dhananjaya Jayasundara,Lakshitha Ramanayake,Neranjan Senarath,Dulantha Wickramasinghe
title: GAUSS: Guided Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Hyperspectral Unmixing with Spatial Smoothness
title_zh: GAUSS：用于具有空间平滑度的高光谱分解的引导编码器-解码器架构
abstract: In recent hyperspectral unmixing (HU) literature, the application of deep learning (DL) has become more prominent, especially with the autoencoder (AE) architecture. We propose a split architecture and use a pseudo-ground truth for abundances to guide the `unmixing network' (UN) optimization. Preceding the UN, an `approximation network' (AN) is proposed, which will improve the association between the centre pixel and its neighbourhood. Hence, it will accentuate spatial correlation in the abundances as its output is the input to the UN and the reference for the `mixing network' (MN). In the Guided Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Hyperspectral Unmixing with Spatial Smoothness (GAUSS), we proposed using one-hot encoded abundances as the pseudo-ground truth to guide the UN; computed using the k-means algorithm to exclude the use of prior HU methods. Furthermore, we release the single-layer constraint on MN by introducing the UN generated abundances in contrast to the standard AE for HU. Secondly, we experimented with two modifications on the pre-trained network using the GAUSS method. In GAUSS$_\textit{blind}$, we have concatenated the UN and the MN to back-propagate the reconstruction error gradients to the encoder. Then, in the GAUSS$_\textit{prime}$, abundance results of a signal processing (SP) method with reliable abundance results were used as the pseudo-ground truth with the GAUSS architecture. According to quantitative and graphical results for four experimental datasets, the three architectures either transcended or equated the performance of existing HU algorithms from both DL and SP domains.
summary: In recent hyperspectral unmixing (HU) literature, the application of deep learning (DL) has become more prominent, especially with the autoencoder (AE) architecture. We propose a split architecture and use a pseudo-ground truth for abundances to guide the `unmixing network' (UN) optimization. Preceding the UN, an `approximation network' (AN) is proposed, which will improve the association between the centre pixel and its neighbourhood. Hence, it will accentuate spatial correlation in the abundances as its output is the input to the UN and the reference for the `mixing network' (MN). In the Guided Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Hyperspectral Unmixing with Spatial Smoothness (GAUSS), we proposed using one-hot encoded abundances as the pseudo-ground truth to guide the UN; computed using the k-means algorithm to exclude the use of prior HU methods. Furthermore, we release the single-layer constraint on MN by introducing the UN generated abundances in contrast to the standard AE for HU. Secondly, we experimented with two modifications on the pre-trained network using the GAUSS method. In GAUSS$_\textit{blind}$, we have concatenated the UN and the MN to back-propagate the reconstruction error gradients to the encoder. Then, in the GAUSS$_\textit{prime}$, abundance results of a signal processing (SP) method with reliable abundance results were used as the pseudo-ground truth with the GAUSS architecture. According to quantitative and graphical results for four experimental datasets, the three architectures either transcended or equated the performance of existing HU algorithms from both DL and SP domains.
abstract_zh: 在最近的高光谱分解（HU）文献中，深度学习（DL）的应用变得更加突出，尤其是自动编码器（AE）架构。我们提出了一种分割架构，并使用丰度的伪地面事实来指导“分离网络”（UN）优化。在联合国之前，提出了“近似网络”（AN），它将改善中心像素与其邻域之间的关联。因此，它将强调丰度的空间相关性，因为其输出是联合国的输入和“混合网络”（MN）的参考。在Guided Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Hyperspectral Unmixing with Spatial Smoothness (GAUSS)中，我们建议使用one-hot编码丰度作为伪地面实况来指导UN；使用 k-means 算法计算以排除使用先前的 HU 方法。此外，我们通过引入 UN 生成的丰度来释放对 MN 的单层约束，与 HU 的标准 AE 相比。其次，我们使用 GAUSS 方法对预训练网络进行了两次修改。在 GAUSS$_\textit{blind}$ 中，我们连接了 UN 和 MN，将重构误差梯度反向传播到编码器。然后，在GAUSS$_\textit{prime}$中，具有可靠丰度结果的信号处理（SP）方法的丰度结果被用作GAUSS架构的伪地面实况。根据四个实验数据集的定量和图形结果，这三种架构超越或等同于 DL 和 SP 领域的现有 HU 算法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GAUSS的引导式编码-解码架构，用于高光谱解混，通过空间平滑性提升解混效果。
AI.motivation: 现有高光谱解混方法在捕捉空间相关性方面存在不足，需改进网络结构以增强解混精度。
AI.method: 设计包含近似网络(AN)和解混网络(UN)的分层架构，利用k-means生成伪真实值引导UN优化，并通过GAUSS_blind和GAUSS_prime两种改进方案增强模型性能。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上的定量和可视化结果表明，GAUSS系列方法在性能上超越或匹敌现有深度学习与信号处理领域的解混算法。
AI.conclusion: GAUSS架构通过空间引导机制有效提升了高光谱解混的准确性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: GAUSS: Guided Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Hyperspectral Unmixing with Spatial Smoothness GAUSS：用于具有空间平滑度的高光谱分解的引导编码器-解码器架构 In recent hyperspectral unmixing (HU) literature, the application of deep learning (DL) has become more prominent, especially with the autoencoder (AE) architecture. We propose a split architecture and use a pseudo-ground truth for abundances to guide the `unmixing network' (UN) optimization. Preceding the UN, an `approximation network' (AN) is proposed, which will improve the association between the centre pixel and its neighbourhood. Hence, it will accentuate spatial correlation in the abundances as its output is the input to the UN and the reference for the `mixing network' (MN). In the Guided Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Hyperspectral Unmixing with Spatial Smoothness (GAUSS), we proposed using one-hot encoded abundances as the pseudo-ground truth to guide the UN; computed using the k-means algorithm to exclude the use of prior HU methods. Furthermore, we release the single-layer constraint on MN by introducing the UN generated abundances in contrast to the standard AE for HU. Secondly, we experimented with two modifications on the pre-trained network using the GAUSS method. In GAUSS$_\textit{blind}$, we have concatenated the UN and the MN to back-propagate the reconstruction error gradients to the encoder. Then, in the GAUSS$_\textit{prime}$, abundance results of a signal processing (SP) method with reliable abundance results were used as the pseudo-ground truth with the GAUSS architecture. According to quantitative and graphical results for four experimental datasets, the three architectures either transcended or equated the performance of existing HU algorithms from both DL and SP domains. 在最近的高光谱分解（HU）文献中，深度学习（DL）的应用变得更加突出，尤其是自动编码器（AE）架构。我们提出了一种分割架构，并使用丰度的伪地面事实来指导“分离网络”（UN）优化。在联合国之前，提出了“近似网络”（AN），它将改善中心像素与其邻域之间的关联。因此，它将强调丰度的空间相关性，因为其输出是联合国的输入和“混合网络”（MN）的参考。在Guided Encoder-Decoder Architecture for Hyperspectral Unmixing with Spatial Smoothness (GAUSS)中，我们建议使用one-hot编码丰度作为伪地面实况来指导UN；使用 k-means 算法计算以排除使用先前的 HU 方法。此外，我们通过引入 UN 生成的丰度来释放对 MN 的单层约束，与 HU 的标准 AE 相比。其次，我们使用 GAUSS 方法对预训练网络进行了两次修改。在 GAUSS$_\textit{blind}$ 中，我们连接了 UN 和 MN，将重构误差梯度反向传播到编码器。然后，在GAUSS$_\textit{prime}$中，具有可靠丰度结果的信号处理（SP）方法的丰度结果被用作GAUSS架构的伪地面实况。根据四个实验数据集的定量和图形结果，这三种架构超越或等同于 DL 和 SP 领域的现有 HU 算法的性能。 本文提出了一种名为GAUSS的引导式编码-解码架构，用于高光谱解混，通过空间平滑性提升解混效果。 Yasiru Ranasinghe,Kavinga Weerasooriya,Roshan Godaliyadda,Vijitha Herath,Parakrama Ekanayake,Dhananjaya Jayasundara,Lakshitha Ramanayake,Neranjan Senarath,Dulantha Wickramasinghe cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: AprilPyone MaungMaung,Hitoshi Kiya
title: Privacy-Preserving Image Classification Using Isotropic Network
title_zh: 使用各向同性网络进行隐私保护图像分类
abstract: In this paper, we propose a privacy-preserving image classification method that uses encrypted images and an isotropic network such as the vision transformer. The proposed method allows us not only to apply images without visual information to deep neural networks (DNNs) for both training and testing but also to maintain a high classification accuracy. In addition, compressible encrypted images, called encryption-then-compression (EtC) images, can be used for both training and testing without any adaptation network. Previously, to classify EtC images, an adaptation network was required before a classification network, so methods with an adaptation network have been only tested on small images. To the best of our knowledge, previous privacy-preserving image classification methods have never considered image compressibility and patch embedding-based isotropic networks. In an experiment, the proposed privacy-preserving image classification was demonstrated to outperform state-of-the-art methods even when EtC images were used in terms of classification accuracy and robustness against various attacks under the use of two isotropic networks: vision transformer and ConvMixer.
summary: In this paper, we propose a privacy-preserving image classification method that uses encrypted images and an isotropic network such as the vision transformer. The proposed method allows us not only to apply images without visual information to deep neural networks (DNNs) for both training and testing but also to maintain a high classification accuracy. In addition, compressible encrypted images, called encryption-then-compression (EtC) images, can be used for both training and testing without any adaptation network. Previously, to classify EtC images, an adaptation network was required before a classification network, so methods with an adaptation network have been only tested on small images. To the best of our knowledge, previous privacy-preserving image classification methods have never considered image compressibility and patch embedding-based isotropic networks. In an experiment, the proposed privacy-preserving image classification was demonstrated to outperform state-of-the-art methods even when EtC images were used in terms of classification accuracy and robustness against various attacks under the use of two isotropic networks: vision transformer and ConvMixer.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用加密图像和视觉变换器等各向同性网络的隐私保护图像分类方法。所提出的方法不仅使我们能够将没有视觉信息的图像应用于深度神经网络（DNN）进行训练和测试，而且还能保持较高的分类精度。此外，可压缩的加密图像，称为加密然后压缩（EtC）图像，可以用于训练和测试，而无需任何适应网络。以前，为了对 EtC 图像进行分类，在分类网络之前需要一个适应网络，因此具有适应网络的方法仅在小图像上进行了测试。据我们所知，以前的隐私保护图像分类方法从未考虑过图像可压缩性和基于补丁嵌入的各向同性网络。在实验中，即使在使用 EtC 图像时，在使用视觉 Transformer 和 ConvMixer 两种各向同性网络的情况下，在分类准确性和针对各种攻击的鲁棒性方面，所提出的隐私保护图像分类也被证明优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于各向同性网络的隐私保护图像分类方法，通过加密图像和无需适应网络的压缩技术实现高准确率分类。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护方法需依赖适应网络处理压缩加密图像，且仅适用于小尺寸图像，未能考虑图像可压缩性与各向同性网络的结合。
AI.method: 采用加密-压缩（EtC）图像与视觉变换器、ConvMixer等各向同性网络直接进行训练测试，无需额外适应网络。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在EtC图像上分类准确率和抗攻击鲁棒性优于现有最优方法，且支持更大尺寸图像处理。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合图像加密压缩与各向同性网络特性，提出的新方法有效解决了隐私保护分类中的适应网络依赖问题，实现了更优性能。

The proposed method allows us not only to apply images without visual information to deep neural networks (DNNs) for both training and testing but also to maintain a high classification accuracy. In addition, compressible encrypted images, called encryption-then-compression (EtC) images, can be used for both training and testing without any adaptation network. Previously, to classify EtC images, an adaptation network was required before a classification network, so methods with an adaptation network have been only tested on small images. To the best of our knowledge, previous privacy-preserving image classification methods have never considered image compressibility and patch embedding-based isotropic networks. In an experiment, the proposed privacy-preserving image classification was demonstrated to outperform state-of-the-art methods even when EtC images were used in terms of classification accuracy and robustness against various attacks under the use of two isotropic networks: vision transformer and ConvMixer. 在本文中，我们提出了一种使用加密图像和视觉变换器等各向同性网络的隐私保护图像分类方法。所提出的方法不仅使我们能够将没有视觉信息的图像应用于深度神经网络（DNN）进行训练和测试，而且还能保持较高的分类精度。此外，可压缩的加密图像，称为加密然后压缩（EtC）图像，可以用于训练和测试，而无需任何适应网络。以前，为了对 EtC 图像进行分类，在分类网络之前需要一个适应网络，因此具有适应网络的方法仅在小图像上进行了测试。据我们所知，以前的隐私保护图像分类方法从未考虑过图像可压缩性和基于补丁嵌入的各向同性网络。在实验中，即使在使用 EtC 图像时，在使用视觉 Transformer 和 ConvMixer 两种各向同性网络的情况下，在分类准确性和针对各种攻击的鲁棒性方面，所提出的隐私保护图像分类也被证明优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于各向同性网络的隐私保护图像分类方法，通过加密图像和无需适应网络的压缩技术实现高准确率分类。 AprilPyone MaungMaung,Hitoshi Kiya cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yizhong Wang,Swaroop Mishra,Pegah Alipoormolabashi,Yeganeh Kordi,Amirreza Mirzaei,Anjana Arunkumar,Arjun Ashok,Arut Selvan Dhanasekaran,Atharva Naik,David Stap,Eshaan Pathak,Giannis Karamanolakis,Haizhi Gary Lai,Ishan Purohit,Ishani Mondal,Jacob Anderson,Kirby Kuznia,Krima Doshi,Maitreya Patel,Kuntal Kumar Pal,Mehrad Moradshahi,Mihir Parmar,Mirali Purohit,Neeraj Varshney,Phani Rohitha Kaza, et al. (15 additional authors not shown)
title: Super-NaturalInstructions: Generalization via Declarative Instructions on 1600+ NLP Tasks
title_zh: Super-NaturalInstructions：通过 1600 多个 NLP 任务的声明性指令进行泛化
abstract: How well can NLP models generalize to a variety of unseen tasks when provided with task instructions? To address this question, we first introduce Super-NaturalInstructions, a benchmark of 1,616 diverse NLP tasks and their expert-written instructions. Our collection covers 76 distinct task types, including but not limited to classification, extraction, infilling, sequence tagging, text rewriting, and text composition. This large and diverse collection of tasks enables rigorous benchmarking of cross-task generalization under instructions -- training models to follow instructions on a subset of tasks and evaluating them on the remaining unseen ones. Furthermore, we build Tk-Instruct, a transformer model trained to follow a variety of in-context instructions (plain language task definitions or k-shot examples). Our experiments show that Tk-Instruct outperforms existing instruction-following models such as InstructGPT by over 9% on our benchmark despite being an order of magnitude smaller. We further analyze generalization as a function of various scaling parameters, such as the number of observed tasks, the number of instances per task, and model sizes. We hope our dataset and model facilitate future progress towards more general-purpose NLP models.
summary: How well can NLP models generalize to a variety of unseen tasks when provided with task instructions? To address this question, we first introduce Super-NaturalInstructions, a benchmark of 1,616 diverse NLP tasks and their expert-written instructions. Our collection covers 76 distinct task types, including but not limited to classification, extraction, infilling, sequence tagging, text rewriting, and text composition. This large and diverse collection of tasks enables rigorous benchmarking of cross-task generalization under instructions -- training models to follow instructions on a subset of tasks and evaluating them on the remaining unseen ones. Furthermore, we build Tk-Instruct, a transformer model trained to follow a variety of in-context instructions (plain language task definitions or k-shot examples). Our experiments show that Tk-Instruct outperforms existing instruction-following models such as InstructGPT by over 9% on our benchmark despite being an order of magnitude smaller. We further analyze generalization as a function of various scaling parameters, such as the number of observed tasks, the number of instances per task, and model sizes. We hope our dataset and model facilitate future progress towards more general-purpose NLP models.
abstract_zh: 当提供任务指令时，NLP 模型能够如何很好地推广到各种看不见的任务？为了解决这个问题，我们首先介绍 Super-NaturalInstructions，这是 1,616 个不同 NLP 任务及其专家编写的指令的基准。我们的集合涵盖 76 种不同的任务类型，包括但不限于分类、提取、填充、序列标记、文本重写和文本合成。这种庞大且多样化的任务集合可以在指令下对跨任务泛化进行严格的基准测试——训练模型遵循任务子集的指令，并根据剩余的未见过的任务对其进行评估。此外，我们还构建了 Tk-Instruct，这是一个经过训练可以遵循各种上下文指令（简单语言任务定义或 k-shot 示例）的变压器模型。我们的实验表明，在我们的基准测试中，Tk-Instruct 的性能比 InstructGPT 等现有指令跟踪模型高出 9% 以上，尽管其数量级要小一些。我们进一步分析泛化作为各种缩放参数的函数，例如观察到的任务数量、每个任务的实例数量和模型大小。我们希望我们的数据集和模型能够促进未来更通用的 NLP 模型的进展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Super-NaturalInstructions基准和Tk-Instruct模型，通过1600+多样NLP任务评估模型在指令驱动下的跨任务泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型在指令遵循任务中泛化能力不足，且缺乏大规模任务基准，阻碍了通用NLP模型的发展。
AI.method: 构建包含1616个任务的基准（76种类型），开发Tk-Instruct模型通过上下文指令（自然语言定义或示例）训练，并对比不同规模模型与任务数量的泛化效果。
AI.result: Tk-Instruct在基准测试中超越InstructGPT达9%，且参数量更少；实验表明泛化能力与任务数量、样本量及模型规模呈正相关。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新基准和模型为研究通用NLP模型提供了有效工具，推动跨任务指令遵循能力的提升。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出Super-NaturalInstructions基准和Tk-Instruct模型，通过1600+多样NLP任务评估模型在指令驱动下的跨任务泛化能力。
ai_content.motivation: 现有模型在指令遵循任务中泛化能力不足，且缺乏大规模任务基准，阻碍了通用NLP模型的发展。
ai_content.method: 构建包含1616个任务的基准（76种类型），开发Tk-Instruct模型通过上下文指令（自然语言定义或示例）训练，并对比不同规模模型与任务数量的泛化效果。
ai_content.result: Tk-Instruct在基准测试中超越InstructGPT达9%，且参数量更少；实验表明泛化能力与任务数量、样本量及模型规模呈正相关。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的新基准和模型为研究通用NLP模型提供了有效工具，推动跨任务指令遵循能力的提升。

search_text: Super-NaturalInstructions: Generalization via Declarative Instructions on 1600+ NLP Tasks Super-NaturalInstructions：通过 1600 多个 NLP 任务的声明性指令进行泛化 How well can NLP models generalize to a variety of unseen tasks when provided with task instructions? To address this question, we first introduce Super-NaturalInstructions, a benchmark of 1,616 diverse NLP tasks and their expert-written instructions. Our collection covers 76 distinct task types, including but not limited to classification, extraction, infilling, sequence tagging, text rewriting, and text composition. This large and diverse collection of tasks enables rigorous benchmarking of cross-task generalization under instructions -- training models to follow instructions on a subset of tasks and evaluating them on the remaining unseen ones. Furthermore, we build Tk-Instruct, a transformer model trained to follow a variety of in-context instructions (plain language task definitions or k-shot examples). Our experiments show that Tk-Instruct outperforms existing instruction-following models such as InstructGPT by over 9% on our benchmark despite being an order of magnitude smaller. We further analyze generalization as a function of various scaling parameters, such as the number of observed tasks, the number of instances per task, and model sizes. We hope our dataset and model facilitate future progress towards more general-purpose NLP models. 当提供任务指令时，NLP 模型能够如何很好地推广到各种看不见的任务？为了解决这个问题，我们首先介绍 Super-NaturalInstructions，这是 1,616 个不同 NLP 任务及其专家编写的指令的基准。我们的集合涵盖 76 种不同的任务类型，包括但不限于分类、提取、填充、序列标记、文本重写和文本合成。这种庞大且多样化的任务集合可以在指令下对跨任务泛化进行严格的基准测试——训练模型遵循任务子集的指令，并根据剩余的未见过的任务对其进行评估。此外，我们还构建了 Tk-Instruct，这是一个经过训练可以遵循各种上下文指令（简单语言任务定义或 k-shot 示例）的变压器模型。我们的实验表明，在我们的基准测试中，Tk-Instruct 的性能比 InstructGPT 等现有指令跟踪模型高出 9% 以上，尽管其数量级要小一些。我们进一步分析泛化作为各种缩放参数的函数，例如观察到的任务数量、每个任务的实例数量和模型大小。我们希望我们的数据集和模型能够促进未来更通用的 NLP 模型的进展。 本文提出Super-NaturalInstructions基准和Tk-Instruct模型，通过1600+多样NLP任务评估模型在指令驱动下的跨任务泛化能力。 Yizhong Wang,Swaroop Mishra,Pegah Alipoormolabashi,Yeganeh Kordi,Amirreza Mirzaei,Anjana Arunkumar,Arjun Ashok,Arut Selvan Dhanasekaran,Atharva Naik,David Stap,Eshaan Pathak,Giannis Karamanolakis,Haizhi Gary Lai,Ishan Purohit,Ishani Mondal,Jacob Anderson,Kirby Kuznia,Krima Doshi,Maitreya Patel,Kuntal Kumar Pal,Mehrad Moradshahi,Mihir Parmar,Mirali Purohit,Neeraj Varshney,Phani Rohitha Kaza, et al. (15 additional authors not shown) cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Min Zhou,Bisheng Li,Menglin Yang,Lujia Pan
title: TeleGraph: A Benchmark Dataset for Hierarchical Link Prediction
title_zh: TeleGraph：分层链接预测的基准数据集
comment: Accepted by GLB 2022 @TheWebConf 2022;Data and codes are available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/benchmark/tree/main/TeleGraph
comments: Accepted by GLB 2022 @TheWebConf 2022;Data and codes are available at https://github.com/huawei-noah/benchmark/tree/main/TeleGraph
abstract: Link prediction is a key problem for network-structured data, attracting considerable research efforts owing to its diverse applications. The current link prediction methods focus on general networks and are overly dependent on either the closed triangular structure of networks or node attributes. Their performance on sparse or highly hierarchical networks has not been well studied. On the other hand, the available tree-like benchmark datasets are either simulated, with limited node information, or small in scale. To bridge this gap, we present a new benchmark dataset TeleGraph, a highly sparse and hierarchical telecommunication network associated with rich node attributes, for assessing and fostering the link inference techniques. Our empirical results suggest that most of the algorithms fail to produce a satisfactory performance on a nearly tree-like dataset, which calls for special attention when designing or deploying the link prediction algorithm in practice.
summary: Link prediction is a key problem for network-structured data, attracting considerable research efforts owing to its diverse applications. The current link prediction methods focus on general networks and are overly dependent on either the closed triangular structure of networks or node attributes. Their performance on sparse or highly hierarchical networks has not been well studied. On the other hand, the available tree-like benchmark datasets are either simulated, with limited node information, or small in scale. To bridge this gap, we present a new benchmark dataset TeleGraph, a highly sparse and hierarchical telecommunication network associated with rich node attributes, for assessing and fostering the link inference techniques. Our empirical results suggest that most of the algorithms fail to produce a satisfactory performance on a nearly tree-like dataset, which calls for special attention when designing or deploying the link prediction algorithm in practice.
abstract_zh: 链接预测是网络结构数据的一个关键问题，由于其多样化的应用吸引了大量的研究工作。当前的链路预测方法侧重于一般网络，并且过度依赖于网络的闭合三角形结构或节点属性。它们在稀疏或高度分层网络上的性能尚未得到充分研究。另一方面，可用的树状基准数据集要么是模拟的，节点信息有限，要么规模较小。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一个新的基准数据集 TeleGraph，这是一个与丰富节点属性相关的高度稀疏和分层的电信网络，用于评估和促进链路推理技术。我们的实证结果表明，大多数算法无法在近乎树状的数据集上产生令人满意的性能，这在实际设计或部署链接预测算法时需要特别注意。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为TeleGraph的基准数据集，用于评估和推动分层网络中的链接预测技术。
AI.motivation: 现有链接预测方法过度依赖网络三角形结构或节点属性，在稀疏/分层网络效果不佳，且现有树状数据集存在模拟数据少、规模小或信息有限的问题。
AI.method: 构建高度稀疏且具有丰富节点属性的电信网络数据集TeleGraph，作为分层链接预测的基准测试平台。
AI.result: 实验表明多数算法在接近树状结构的TeleGraph数据集上表现不理想，凸显现有方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 实际应用中需特别关注稀疏分层网络的链接预测算法设计，当前方法在该场景下存在显著改进空间。

authors_text: Bhargav Upadhyay,Akhilesh Sudhakar,Arjun Maheswaran
title: Efficient Reinforcement Learning for Unsupervised Controlled Text Generation
title_zh: 用于无监督受控文本生成的高效强化学习
abstract: Controlled text generation tasks such as unsupervised text style transfer have increasingly adopted the use of Reinforcement Learning (RL). A major challenge in applying RL to such tasks is the sparse reward, which is available only after the full text is generated. Sparse rewards, combined with a large action space make RL training sample-inefficient and difficult to converge. Recently proposed reward-shaping strategies to address this issue have shown only negligible gains. In contrast, this work proposes a novel approach that provides dense rewards to each generated token. We evaluate our approach by its usage in unsupervised text style transfer. Averaged across datasets, our style transfer system improves upon current state-of-art systems by 21\% on human evaluation and 12\% on automatic evaluation. Upon ablated comparison with the current reward shaping approach (the `roll-out strategy'), using dense rewards improves the overall style transfer quality by 22\% based on human evaluation. Further the RL training is 2.5 times as sample efficient, and 7 times faster.
summary: Controlled text generation tasks such as unsupervised text style transfer have increasingly adopted the use of Reinforcement Learning (RL). A major challenge in applying RL to such tasks is the sparse reward, which is available only after the full text is generated. Sparse rewards, combined with a large action space make RL training sample-inefficient and difficult to converge. Recently proposed reward-shaping strategies to address this issue have shown only negligible gains. In contrast, this work proposes a novel approach that provides dense rewards to each generated token. We evaluate our approach by its usage in unsupervised text style transfer. Averaged across datasets, our style transfer system improves upon current state-of-art systems by 21\% on human evaluation and 12\% on automatic evaluation. Upon ablated comparison with the current reward shaping approach (the `roll-out strategy'), using dense rewards improves the overall style transfer quality by 22\% based on human evaluation. Further the RL training is 2.5 times as sample efficient, and 7 times faster.
abstract_zh: 受控文本生成任务（例如无监督文本样式迁移）越来越多地采用强化学习（RL）。将强化学习应用于此类任务的一个主要挑战是稀疏奖励，只有在生成全文后才可用。稀疏的奖励加上较大的动作空间使得强化学习训练样本效率低下且难以收敛。最近提出的解决这个问题的奖励塑造策略仅显示出微不足道的收益。相比之下，这项工作提出了一种新颖的方法，为每个生成的代币提供密集的奖励。我们通过其在无监督文本样式传输中的使用来评估我们的方法。跨数据集平均，我们的风格迁移系统在人工评估方面比当前最先进的系统提高了 21%，在自动评估方面提高了 12%。与当前的奖励塑造方法（“推出策略”）进行对比后，根据人类评估，使用密集奖励将整体风格迁移质量提高了 22%。此外，RL 训练的样本效率是样本效率的 2.5 倍，速度提高了 7 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效强化学习方法，通过密集奖励机制解决无监督控制文本生成中的稀疏奖励问题，显著提升文本风格迁移效果。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在文本生成任务中面临稀疏奖励和大动作空间导致的样本效率低、收敛困难问题，现有奖励塑造策略改进有限。
AI.method: 设计新型密集奖励机制，为每个生成的文本标记提供即时反馈，替代传统稀疏奖励方案。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上，人类评估提升21%，自动评估提升12%，相较现有方法人类评估提升22%，训练效率提高2.5倍且速度加快7倍。
AI.conclusion: 密集奖励机制有效解决稀疏奖励难题，显著提升生成质量与训练效率，为控制文本生成任务提供新思路。
