Averaged across datasets, our style transfer system improves upon current state-of-art systems by 21\% on human evaluation and 12\% on automatic evaluation. Upon ablated comparison with the current reward shaping approach (the `roll-out strategy'), using dense rewards improves the overall style transfer quality by 22\% based on human evaluation. Further the RL training is 2.5 times as sample efficient, and 7 times faster. 受控文本生成任务（例如无监督文本样式迁移）越来越多地采用强化学习（RL）。将强化学习应用于此类任务的一个主要挑战是稀疏奖励，只有在生成全文后才可用。稀疏的奖励加上较大的动作空间使得强化学习训练样本效率低下且难以收敛。最近提出的解决这个问题的奖励塑造策略仅显示出微不足道的收益。相比之下，这项工作提出了一种新颖的方法，为每个生成的代币提供密集的奖励。我们通过其在无监督文本样式传输中的使用来评估我们的方法。跨数据集平均，我们的风格迁移系统在人工评估方面比当前最先进的系统提高了 21%，在自动评估方面提高了 12%。与当前的奖励塑造方法（“推出策略”）进行对比后，根据人类评估，使用密集奖励将整体风格迁移质量提高了 22%。此外，RL 训练的样本效率是样本效率的 2.5 倍，速度提高了 7 倍。 本文提出一种高效强化学习方法，通过密集奖励机制解决无监督控制文本生成中的稀疏奖励问题，显著提升文本风格迁移效果。 Bhargav Upadhyay,Akhilesh Sudhakar,Arjun Maheswaran cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Tao Sun,Cheng Lu,Tianshuo Zhang,Haibin Ling
title: Safe Self-Refinement for Transformer-based Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 基于 Transformer 的域适应的安全自我完善
abstract: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) aims to leverage a label-rich source domain to solve tasks on a related unlabeled target domain. It is a challenging problem especially when a large domain gap lies between the source and target domains. In this paper we propose a novel solution named SSRT (Safe Self-Refinement for Transformer-based domain adaptation), which brings improvement from two aspects. First, encouraged by the success of vision transformers in various vision tasks, we arm SSRT with a transformer backbone. We find that the combination of vision transformer with simple adversarial adaptation surpasses best reported Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based results on the challenging DomainNet benchmark, showing its strong transferable feature representation. Second, to reduce the risk of model collapse and improve the effectiveness of knowledge transfer between domains with large gaps, we propose a Safe Self-Refinement strategy. Specifically, SSRT utilizes predictions of perturbed target domain data to refine the model. Since the model capacity of vision transformer is large and predictions in such challenging tasks can be noisy, a safe training mechanism is designed to adaptively adjust learning configuration. Extensive evaluations are conducted on several widely tested UDA benchmarks and SSRT achieves consistently the best performances, including 85.43% on Office-Home, 88.76% on VisDA-2017 and 45.2% on DomainNet.
summary: Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) aims to leverage a label-rich source domain to solve tasks on a related unlabeled target domain. It is a challenging problem especially when a large domain gap lies between the source and target domains. In this paper we propose a novel solution named SSRT (Safe Self-Refinement for Transformer-based domain adaptation), which brings improvement from two aspects. First, encouraged by the success of vision transformers in various vision tasks, we arm SSRT with a transformer backbone. We find that the combination of vision transformer with simple adversarial adaptation surpasses best reported Convolutional Neural Network (CNN)-based results on the challenging DomainNet benchmark, showing its strong transferable feature representation. Second, to reduce the risk of model collapse and improve the effectiveness of knowledge transfer between domains with large gaps, we propose a Safe Self-Refinement strategy. Specifically, SSRT utilizes predictions of perturbed target domain data to refine the model. Since the model capacity of vision transformer is large and predictions in such challenging tasks can be noisy, a safe training mechanism is designed to adaptively adjust learning configuration. Extensive evaluations are conducted on several widely tested UDA benchmarks and SSRT achieves consistently the best performances, including 85.43% on Office-Home, 88.76% on VisDA-2017 and 45.2% on DomainNet.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）旨在利用标签丰富的源域来解决相关的未标记目标域上的任务。这是一个具有挑战性的问题，尤其是当源域和目标域之间存在较大域差距时。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 SSRT（基于 Transformer 的域自适应的安全自改进）的新颖解决方案，它从两个方面带来了改进。首先，受到视觉 Transformer 在各种视觉任务中取得成功的鼓舞，我们为 SSRT 配备了 Transformer 主干。我们发现，视觉变换器与简单对抗性适应的结合超过了在具有挑战性的 DomainNet 基准上最好报道的基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的结果，显示出其强大的可转移特征表示。其次，为了降低模型崩溃的风险并提高差距较大的领域之间知识转移的有效性，我们提出了安全自我改进策略。具体来说，SSRT 利用扰动目标域数据的预测来完善模型。由于视觉变换器的模型容量很大，并且在此类具有挑战性的任务中的预测可能会有噪声，因此设计了一种安全的训练机制来自适应地调整学习配置。对多个经过广泛测试的 UDA 基准进行了广泛的评估，SSRT 始终获得最佳性能，包括 Office-Home 上的 85.43%、VisDA-2017 上的 88.76% 和 DomainNet 上的 45.2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉Transformer的领域自适应方法SSRT，通过安全自优化策略提升模型在目标领域的适应能力。
AI.motivation: 无监督领域自适应（UDA）在源域与目标域存在显著差异时面临挑战，传统CNN方法难以有效应对。视觉Transformer在特征表示上具有优势，但需解决模型崩溃和跨领域知识迁移问题。
AI.method: 采用视觉Transformer作为主干网络，结合对抗性自适应方法；提出安全自优化策略，利用扰动目标数据的预测结果动态调整学习配置，防止噪声干扰。
AI.result: 在Office-Home（85.43%）、VisDA-2017（88.76%）和DomainNet（45.2%）等基准测试中均取得最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: SSRT通过视觉Transformer的强大特征表示能力和安全自优化机制，有效解决了跨领域适应中的模型崩溃问题，验证了方法的优越性。

authors_text: Michael Poli,Winnie Xu,Stefano Massaroli,Chenlin Meng,Kuno Kim,Stefano Ermon
title: Self-Similarity Priors: Neural Collages as Differentiable Fractal Representations
title_zh: 自相似先验：作为可微分形表示的神经拼贴
abstract: Many patterns in nature exhibit self-similarity: they can be compactly described via self-referential transformations. Said patterns commonly appear in natural and artificial objects, such as molecules, shorelines, galaxies and even images. In this work, we investigate the role of learning in the automated discovery of self-similarity and in its utilization for downstream tasks. To this end, we design a novel class of implicit operators, Neural Collages, which (1) represent data as the parameters of a self-referential, structured transformation, and (2) employ hypernetworks to amortize the cost of finding these parameters to a single forward pass. We investigate how to leverage the representations produced by Neural Collages in various tasks, including data compression and generation. Neural Collages image compressors are orders of magnitude faster than other self-similarity-based algorithms during encoding and offer compression rates competitive with implicit methods. Finally, we showcase applications of Neural Collages for fractal art and as deep generative models.
summary: Many patterns in nature exhibit self-similarity: they can be compactly described via self-referential transformations. Said patterns commonly appear in natural and artificial objects, such as molecules, shorelines, galaxies and even images. In this work, we investigate the role of learning in the automated discovery of self-similarity and in its utilization for downstream tasks. To this end, we design a novel class of implicit operators, Neural Collages, which (1) represent data as the parameters of a self-referential, structured transformation, and (2) employ hypernetworks to amortize the cost of finding these parameters to a single forward pass. We investigate how to leverage the representations produced by Neural Collages in various tasks, including data compression and generation. Neural Collages image compressors are orders of magnitude faster than other self-similarity-based algorithms during encoding and offer compression rates competitive with implicit methods. Finally, we showcase applications of Neural Collages for fractal art and as deep generative models.
abstract_zh: 自然界中的许多模式都表现出自相似性：它们可以通过自指变换来简洁地描述。所述图案通常出现在自然和人造物体中，例如分子、海岸线、星系甚至图像。在这项工作中，我们研究了学习在自动发现自相似性及其在下游任务中的利用的作用。为此，我们设计了一类新颖的隐式运算符：神经拼贴，它（1）将数据表示为自引用、结构化转换的参数，（2）采用超网络将查找这些参数的成本分摊到单个前向传递。我们研究如何在各种任务中利用神经拼贴产生的表示，包括数据压缩和生成。神经拼贴图像压缩器在编码过程中比其他基于自相似性的算法快几个数量级，并且提供与隐式方法竞争的压缩率。最后，我们展示了神经拼贴在分形艺术和深度生成模型中的应用。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于神经网络的自相似性表示方法Neural Collages，用于数据压缩、生成及分形艺术创作。
AI.motivation: 自然界与人工对象普遍存在自相似结构，但如何自动发现并高效利用此类模式仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 设计隐式算子Neural Collages，通过自参考变换参数化数据，并结合超网络实现参数优化的单次前向计算。
AI.result: 图像压缩速度较现有自相似性算法提升数量级，压缩率可与隐式方法媲美，并成功应用于分形艺术生成。
AI.conclusion: Neural Collages有效捕捉数据自相似性特征，为压缩、生成等任务提供差异化解决方案，展现广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Weiyan Shi,Ryan Shea,Si Chen,Chiyuan Zhang,Ruoxi Jia,Zhou Yu
title: Just Fine-tune Twice: Selective Differential Privacy for Large Language Models
title_zh: 只需微调两次：大型语言模型的选择性差分隐私
abstract: Protecting large language models from privacy leakage is becoming increasingly crucial with their wide adoption in real-world products. Yet applying differential privacy (DP), a canonical notion with provable privacy guarantees for machine learning models, to those models remains challenging due to the trade-off between model utility and privacy loss. Utilizing the fact that sensitive information in language data tends to be sparse, Shi et al. (2021) formalized a DP notion extension called Selective Differential Privacy (SDP) to protect only the sensitive tokens defined by a policy function. However, their algorithm only works for RNN-based models. In this paper, we develop a novel framework, Just Fine-tune Twice (JFT), that achieves SDP for state-of-the-art large transformer-based models. Our method is easy to implement: it first fine-tunes the model with redacted in-domain data, and then fine-tunes it again with the original in-domain data using a private training mechanism. Furthermore, we study the scenario of imperfect implementation of policy functions that misses sensitive tokens and develop systematic methods to handle it. Experiments show that our method achieves strong utility compared to previous baselines. We also analyze the SDP privacy guarantee empirically with the canary insertion attack.
summary: Protecting large language models from privacy leakage is becoming increasingly crucial with their wide adoption in real-world products. Yet applying differential privacy (DP), a canonical notion with provable privacy guarantees for machine learning models, to those models remains challenging due to the trade-off between model utility and privacy loss. Utilizing the fact that sensitive information in language data tends to be sparse, Shi et al. (2021) formalized a DP notion extension called Selective Differential Privacy (SDP) to protect only the sensitive tokens defined by a policy function. However, their algorithm only works for RNN-based models. In this paper, we develop a novel framework, Just Fine-tune Twice (JFT), that achieves SDP for state-of-the-art large transformer-based models. Our method is easy to implement: it first fine-tunes the model with redacted in-domain data, and then fine-tunes it again with the original in-domain data using a private training mechanism. Furthermore, we study the scenario of imperfect implementation of policy functions that misses sensitive tokens and develop systematic methods to handle it. Experiments show that our method achieves strong utility compared to previous baselines. We also analyze the SDP privacy guarantee empirically with the canary insertion attack.
abstract_zh: 随着大型语言模型在现实产品中的广泛采用，保护大型语言模型免遭隐私泄露变得越来越重要。然而，由于模型效用和隐私损失之间的权衡，将差分隐私（DP）（一种为机器学习模型提供可证明隐私保证的规范概念）应用于这些模型仍然具有挑战性。利用语言数据中敏感信息往往稀疏的事实，Shi 等人。 (2021) 正式提出了称为选择性差分隐私 (SDP) 的 DP 概念扩展，以仅保护策略函数定义的敏感令牌。然而，他们的算法仅适用于基于 RNN 的模型。在本文中，我们开发了一种新颖的框架 Just Fine-tune Twice (JFT)，它为最先进的基于变压器的大型模型实现了 SDP。我们的方法很容易实现：它首先使用经过编辑的域内数据对模型进行微调，然后使用私有训练机制使用原始域内数据再次对其进行微调。此外，我们研究了政策功能执行不完善而错过敏感代币的情况，并开发了系统方法来处理它。实验表明，与之前的基线相比，我们的方法具有很强的实用性。我们还通过金丝雀插入攻击对 SDP 隐私保证进行了实证分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为JFT的框架，通过两次微调实现选择性差分隐私（SDP），以保护大型语言模型中的敏感信息。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私（DP）在大型语言模型中的应用面临隐私损失与模型效用的权衡挑战，而现有SDP方法仅适用于RNN模型，无法适应主流的Transformer架构。
AI.method: JFT框架分两阶段微调：首先使用脱敏的领域数据微调模型，随后用原始数据结合隐私训练机制再次微调，并针对策略函数误漏敏感词的问题提出系统性解决方案。
AI.result: 实验表明，JFT在保持模型效用方面优于现有基线方法，且通过canary插入攻击验证了SDP的隐私保障效果。
AI.conclusion: JFT为Transformer模型提供了实用的选择性差分隐私保护方案，在隐私与效用间取得平衡，推动了LLM在现实场景中的安全应用。

search_text: Just Fine-tune Twice: Selective Differential Privacy for Large Language Models 只需微调两次：大型语言模型的选择性差分隐私 Protecting large language models from privacy leakage is becoming increasingly crucial with their wide adoption in real-world products. Yet applying differential privacy (DP), a canonical notion with provable privacy guarantees for machine learning models, to those models remains challenging due to the trade-off between model utility and privacy loss. Utilizing the fact that sensitive information in language data tends to be sparse, Shi et al. (2021) formalized a DP notion extension called Selective Differential Privacy (SDP) to protect only the sensitive tokens defined by a policy function. However, their algorithm only works for RNN-based models. In this paper, we develop a novel framework, Just Fine-tune Twice (JFT), that achieves SDP for state-of-the-art large transformer-based models. Our method is easy to implement: it first fine-tunes the model with redacted in-domain data, and then fine-tunes it again with the original in-domain data using a private training mechanism. Furthermore, we study the scenario of imperfect implementation of policy functions that misses sensitive tokens and develop systematic methods to handle it. Experiments show that our method achieves strong utility compared to previous baselines. We also analyze the SDP privacy guarantee empirically with the canary insertion attack. 随着大型语言模型在现实产品中的广泛采用，保护大型语言模型免遭隐私泄露变得越来越重要。然而，由于模型效用和隐私损失之间的权衡，将差分隐私（DP）（一种为机器学习模型提供可证明隐私保证的规范概念）应用于这些模型仍然具有挑战性。利用语言数据中敏感信息往往稀疏的事实，Shi 等人。 (2021) 正式提出了称为选择性差分隐私 (SDP) 的 DP 概念扩展，以仅保护策略函数定义的敏感令牌。然而，他们的算法仅适用于基于 RNN 的模型。在本文中，我们开发了一种新颖的框架 Just Fine-tune Twice (JFT)，它为最先进的基于变压器的大型模型实现了 SDP。我们的方法很容易实现：它首先使用经过编辑的域内数据对模型进行微调，然后使用私有训练机制使用原始域内数据再次对其进行微调。此外，我们研究了政策功能执行不完善而错过敏感代币的情况，并开发了系统方法来处理它。实验表明，与之前的基线相比，我们的方法具有很强的实用性。我们还通过金丝雀插入攻击对 SDP 隐私保证进行了实证分析。 本文提出一种名为JFT的框架，通过两次微调实现选择性差分隐私（SDP），以保护大型语言模型中的敏感信息。 Weiyan Shi,Ryan Shea,Si Chen,Chiyuan Zhang,Ruoxi Jia,Zhou Yu cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Jeba Rezwana,Mary Lou Maher
title: Designing Creative AI Partners with COFI: A Framework for Modeling Interaction in Human-AI Co-Creative Systems
title_zh: Designing Creative AI 与 COFI 合作：人类与人工智能共同创意系统交互建模框架
comment: This paper appears in the ACM Transactions on Computer-Human Interaction. Permission to make digital or hard copies of all or part of this work for personal or classroom use is granted. To copy otherwise, or republish, to post on servers or to redistribute to lists, requires prior specific permission from permissions@acm.org
comments: This paper appears in the ACM Transactions on Computer-Human Interaction. Permission to make digital or hard copies of all or part of this work for personal or classroom use is granted. To copy otherwise, or republish, to post on servers or to redistribute to lists, requires prior specific permission from permissions@acm.org
abstract: Human-AI co-creativity involves both humans and AI collaborating on a shared creative product as partners. In a creative collaboration, interaction dynamics, such as turn-taking, contribution type, and communication, are the driving forces of the co-creative process. Therefore the interaction model is a critical and essential component for effective co-creative systems. There is relatively little research about interaction design in the co-creativity field, which is reflected in a lack of focus on interaction design in many existing co-creative systems. The primary focus of co-creativity research has been on the abilities of the AI. This paper focuses on the importance of interaction design in co-creative systems with the development of the Co-Creative Framework for Interaction design (COFI) that describes the broad scope of possibilities for interaction design in co-creative systems. Researchers can use COFI for modeling interaction in co-creative systems by exploring alternatives in this design space of interaction. COFI can also be beneficial while investigating and interpreting the interaction design of existing co-creative systems. We coded a dataset of existing 92 co-creative systems using COFI and analyzed the data to show how COFI provides a basis to categorize the interaction models of existing co-creative systems. We identify opportunities to shift the focus of interaction models in co-creativity to enable more communication between the user and AI leading to human-AI partnerships.

In a creative collaboration, interaction dynamics, such as turn-taking, contribution type, and communication, are the driving forces of the co-creative process. Therefore the interaction model is a critical and essential component for effective co-creative systems. There is relatively little research about interaction design in the co-creativity field, which is reflected in a lack of focus on interaction design in many existing co-creative systems. The primary focus of co-creativity research has been on the abilities of the AI. This paper focuses on the importance of interaction design in co-creative systems with the development of the Co-Creative Framework for Interaction design (COFI) that describes the broad scope of possibilities for interaction design in co-creative systems. Researchers can use COFI for modeling interaction in co-creative systems by exploring alternatives in this design space of interaction. COFI can also be beneficial while investigating and interpreting the interaction design of existing co-creative systems. We coded a dataset of existing 92 co-creative systems using COFI and analyzed the data to show how COFI provides a basis to categorize the interaction models of existing co-creative systems. We identify opportunities to shift the focus of interaction models in co-creativity to enable more communication between the user and AI leading to human-AI partnerships.
abstract_zh: 人类与人工智能的共同创造力涉及人类和人工智能作为合作伙伴合作开发共享的创意产品。在创意协作中，交互动态，例如轮流、贡献类型和沟通，是共同创意过程的驱动力。因此，交互模型是有效的共同创意系统的关键和重要组成部分。共创领域关于交互设计的研究相对较少，这体现在现有的很多共创系统中对交互设计缺乏关注。共同创造力研究的主要焦点是人工智能的能力。本文重点讨论了交互设计在共同创意系统中的重要性，以及交互设计共同创意框架（COFI）的发展，该框架描述了共同创意系统中交互设计的广泛可能性。研究人员可以通过探索交互设计空间中的替代方案，使用 COFI 对共创系统中的交互进行建模。 COFI 在调查和解释现有共同创意系统的交互设计时也很有用。我们使用 COFI 编码了现有 92 个共创系统的数据集，并分析了数据，以展示 COFI 如何为现有共创系统的交互模型分类提供基础。我们寻找机会将交互模型的焦点转移到共同创造力中，以实现用户和人工智能之间的更多沟通，从而形成人与人工智能的伙伴关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COFI框架，用于建模人机协同创作系统中的交互设计，以提升人类与AI的合作效率。
AI.motivation: 现有协同创作系统过度关注AI能力，而忽视了交互设计的重要性，导致人机协作中沟通不足。
AI.method: 开发COFI框架描述交互设计的可能性空间，并用其对92个现有协同系统进行编码分析，分类其交互模型。
AI.result: COFI成功分类了现有系统的交互模式，并揭示了通过增强人机沟通优化协作模式的潜力。
AI.conclusion: COFI为改进协同创作系统的交互设计提供了理论基础，推动人机伙伴关系向更高效沟通方向发展。

authors_text: Youssef Mohamed,Faizan Farooq Khan,Kilichbek Haydarov,Mohamed Elhoseiny
title: It is Okay to Not Be Okay: Overcoming Emotional Bias in Affective Image Captioning by Contrastive Data Collection
title_zh: 不好也没关系：通过对比数据收集克服情感图像描述中的情感偏见
comment: 8 pages, Accepted at CVPR 22, for more details see https://www.artemisdataset-v2.org
comments: 8 pages, Accepted at CVPR 22, for more details see https://www.artemisdataset-v2.org
abstract: Datasets that capture the connection between vision, language, and affection are limited, causing a lack of understanding of the emotional aspect of human intelligence. As a step in this direction, the ArtEmis dataset was recently introduced as a large-scale dataset of emotional reactions to images along with language explanations of these chosen emotions. We observed a significant emotional bias towards instance-rich emotions, making trained neural speakers less accurate in describing under-represented emotions. We show that collecting new data, in the same way, is not effective in mitigating this emotional bias. To remedy this problem, we propose a contrastive data collection approach to balance ArtEmis with a new complementary dataset such that a pair of similar images have contrasting emotions (one positive and one negative). We collected 260,533 instances using the proposed method, we combine them with ArtEmis, creating a second iteration of the dataset. The new combined dataset, dubbed ArtEmis v2.0, has a balanced distribution of emotions with explanations revealing more fine details in the associated painting. Our experiments show that neural speakers trained on the new dataset improve CIDEr and METEOR evaluation metrics by 20% and 7%, respectively, compared to the biased dataset. Finally, we also show that the performance per emotion of neural speakers is improved across all the emotion categories, significantly on under-represented emotions. The collected dataset and code are available at https://artemisdataset-v2.org.
summary: Datasets that capture the connection between vision, language, and affection are limited, causing a lack of understanding of the emotional aspect of human intelligence. As a step in this direction, the ArtEmis dataset was recently introduced as a large-scale dataset of emotional reactions to images along with language explanations of these chosen emotions. We observed a significant emotional bias towards instance-rich emotions, making trained neural speakers less accurate in describing under-represented emotions. We show that collecting new data, in the same way, is not effective in mitigating this emotional bias. To remedy this problem, we propose a contrastive data collection approach to balance ArtEmis with a new complementary dataset such that a pair of similar images have contrasting emotions (one positive and one negative). We collected 260,533 instances using the proposed method, we combine them with ArtEmis, creating a second iteration of the dataset. The new combined dataset, dubbed ArtEmis v2.0, has a balanced distribution of emotions with explanations revealing more fine details in the associated painting. Our experiments show that neural speakers trained on the new dataset improve CIDEr and METEOR evaluation metrics by 20% and 7%, respectively, compared to the biased dataset. Finally, we also show that the performance per emotion of neural speakers is improved across all the emotion categories, significantly on under-represented emotions. The collected dataset and code are available at https://artemisdataset-v2.org.
abstract_zh: 捕捉视觉、语言和情感之间联系的数据集有限，导致人们缺乏对人类智力情感方面的理解。作为朝这个方向迈出的一步，ArtEmis 数据集最近被引入，作为对图像的情绪反应以及这些所选情绪的语言解释的大规模数据集。我们观察到对实例丰富的情绪存在显着的情绪偏见，这使得训练有素的神经说话者在描述代表性不足的情绪时不太准确。我们表明，以同样的方式收集新数据并不能有效减轻这种情绪偏见。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种对比数据收集方法，以平衡 ArtEmis 与新的互补数据集，以便一对相似的图像具有对比的情绪（一个积极，一个消极）。我们使用所提出的方法收集了 260,533 个实例，我们将它们与 ArtEmis 结合起来，创建数据集的第二次迭代。新的组合数据集被称为 ArtEmis v2.0，具有均衡的情感分布，并通过解释揭示了相关绘画中的更多细节。我们的实验表明，与有偏差的数据集相比，在新数据集上训练的神经说话人将 CIDEr 和 METEOR 评估指标分别提高了 20% 和 7%。最后，我们还表明，神经说话者的每种情绪的表现在所有情绪类别中都有所提高，尤其是在代表性不足的情绪上。收集的数据集和代码可在 https://artemisdataset-v2.org 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过对比数据收集方法解决情感图像描述中的情感偏差问题，构建更平衡的数据集以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有情感图像数据集存在情感分布不均问题，导致模型对欠代表情感的描述能力不足。
AI.method: 采用对比数据收集策略，生成相似图像但赋予相反情感标签，扩充原始ArtEmis数据集形成平衡的ArtEmis v2.0。
AI.result: 模型在CIDEr和METEOR指标上分别提升20%和7%，所有情感类别表现均改善，尤其是欠代表情感。
AI.conclusion: 新数据集有效缓解了情感偏差问题，为情感图像描述任务提供了更全面的数据支持。

search_text: It is Okay to Not Be Okay: Overcoming Emotional Bias in Affective Image Captioning by Contrastive Data Collection 不好也没关系：通过对比数据收集克服情感图像描述中的情感偏见 Datasets that capture the connection between vision, language, and affection are limited, causing a lack of understanding of the emotional aspect of human intelligence. As a step in this direction, the ArtEmis dataset was recently introduced as a large-scale dataset of emotional reactions to images along with language explanations of these chosen emotions. We observed a significant emotional bias towards instance-rich emotions, making trained neural speakers less accurate in describing under-represented emotions. We show that collecting new data, in the same way, is not effective in mitigating this emotional bias. To remedy this problem, we propose a contrastive data collection approach to balance ArtEmis with a new complementary dataset such that a pair of similar images have contrasting emotions (one positive and one negative). We collected 260,533 instances using the proposed method, we combine them with ArtEmis, creating a second iteration of the dataset. The new combined dataset, dubbed ArtEmis v2.0, has a balanced distribution of emotions with explanations revealing more fine details in the associated painting. Our experiments show that neural speakers trained on the new dataset improve CIDEr and METEOR evaluation metrics by 20% and 7%, respectively, compared to the biased dataset. Finally, we also show that the performance per emotion of neural speakers is improved across all the emotion categories, significantly on under-represented emotions. The collected dataset and code are available at https://artemisdataset-v2.org. 捕捉视觉、语言和情感之间联系的数据集有限，导致人们缺乏对人类智力情感方面的理解。作为朝这个方向迈出的一步，ArtEmis 数据集最近被引入，作为对图像的情绪反应以及这些所选情绪的语言解释的大规模数据集。我们观察到对实例丰富的情绪存在显着的情绪偏见，这使得训练有素的神经说话者在描述代表性不足的情绪时不太准确。我们表明，以同样的方式收集新数据并不能有效减轻这种情绪偏见。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种对比数据收集方法，以平衡 ArtEmis 与新的互补数据集，以便一对相似的图像具有对比的情绪（一个积极，一个消极）。我们使用所提出的方法收集了 260,533 个实例，我们将它们与 ArtEmis 结合起来，创建数据集的第二次迭代。新的组合数据集被称为 ArtEmis v2.0，具有均衡的情感分布，并通过解释揭示了相关绘画中的更多细节。我们的实验表明，与有偏差的数据集相比，在新数据集上训练的神经说话人将 CIDEr 和 METEOR 评估指标分别提高了 20% 和 7%。最后，我们还表明，神经说话者的每种情绪的表现在所有情绪类别中都有所提高，尤其是在代表性不足的情绪上。收集的数据集和代码可在 https://artemisdataset-v2.org 上获取。 本文提出通过对比数据收集方法解决情感图像描述中的情感偏差问题，构建更平衡的数据集以提升模型性能。 Youssef Mohamed,Faizan Farooq Khan,Kilichbek Haydarov,Mohamed Elhoseiny cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Ronak Mehta,Sourav Pal,Vikas Singh,Sathya N. Ravi
title: Deep Unlearning via Randomized Conditionally Independent Hessians
title_zh: 通过随机条件独立 Hessians 进行深度忘却
comment: CVPR 2022. Supplement appended to end of main paper (total 15 pages). Ronak Mehta and Sourav Pal equal contribution
comments: CVPR 2022. Supplement appended to end of main paper (total 15 pages). Ronak Mehta and Sourav Pal equal contribution
abstract: Recent legislation has led to interest in machine unlearning, i.e., removing specific training samples from a predictive model as if they never existed in the training dataset. Unlearning may also be required due to corrupted/adversarial data or simply a user's updated privacy requirement. For models which require no training (k-NN), simply deleting the closest original sample can be effective. But this idea is inapplicable to models which learn richer representations. Recent ideas leveraging optimization-based updates scale poorly with the model dimension d, due to inverting the Hessian of the loss function. We use a variant of a new conditional independence coefficient, L-CODEC, to identify a subset of the model parameters with the most semantic overlap on an individual sample level. Our approach completely avoids the need to invert a (possibly) huge matrix. By utilizing a Markov blanket selection, we premise that L-CODEC is also suitable for deep unlearning, as well as other applications in vision. Compared to alternatives, L-CODEC makes approximate unlearning possible in settings that would otherwise be infeasible, including vision models used for face recognition, person re-identification and NLP models that may require unlearning samples identified for exclusion. Code can be found at https://github.com/vsingh-group/LCODEC-deep-unlearning/
summary: Recent legislation has led to interest in machine unlearning, i.e., removing specific training samples from a predictive model as if they never existed in the training dataset. Unlearning may also be required due to corrupted/adversarial data or simply a user's updated privacy requirement. For models which require no training (k-NN), simply deleting the closest original sample can be effective. But this idea is inapplicable to models which learn richer representations. Recent ideas leveraging optimization-based updates scale poorly with the model dimension d, due to inverting the Hessian of the loss function. We use a variant of a new conditional independence coefficient, L-CODEC, to identify a subset of the model parameters with the most semantic overlap on an individual sample level. Our approach completely avoids the need to invert a (possibly) huge matrix. By utilizing a Markov blanket selection, we premise that L-CODEC is also suitable for deep unlearning, as well as other applications in vision. Compared to alternatives, L-CODEC makes approximate unlearning possible in settings that would otherwise be infeasible, including vision models used for face recognition, person re-identification and NLP models that may require unlearning samples identified for exclusion. Code can be found at https://github.com/vsingh-group/LCODEC-deep-unlearning/
abstract_zh: 最近的立法引起了人们对机器取消学习的兴趣，即从预测模型中删除特定的训练样本，就好像它们从未存在于训练数据集中一样。由于损坏/对抗性数据或仅仅是用户更新的隐私要求，也可能需要忘记。对于不需要训练的模型（k-NN），只需删除最接近的原始样本即可有效。但这个想法不适用于学习更丰富表示的模型。由于损失函数的 Hessian 矩阵反转，最近利用基于优化的更新的想法在模型维度 d 上的扩展性很差。我们使用新的条件独立系数 L-CODEC 的变体来识别在单个样本级别上语义重叠最多的模型参数子集。我们的方法完全避免了反转（可能）巨大矩阵的需要。通过利用马尔可夫毯子选择，我们假设 L-CODEC 也适用于深度遗忘以及视觉中的其他应用。与替代方案相比，L-CODEC 可以在原本不可行的环境中实现近似忘却，包括用于人脸识别的视觉模型、人员重新识别以及可能需要忘却已识别为排除样本的 NLP 模型。代码可以在 https://github.com/vsingh-group/LCODEC-deep-unlearning/ 找到

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件独立性系数L-CODEC的深度模型卸载方法，无需计算Hessian矩阵逆即可高效移除特定训练样本的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统模型卸载方法因需计算Hessian矩阵逆而面临高计算复杂度问题，尤其在深度学习场景下难以扩展。现有方法无法有效处理视觉识别和NLP等复杂模型的样本移除需求。
AI.method: 通过引入L-CODEC条件独立性系数识别参数语义重叠区域，结合马尔可夫毯选择策略，实现无需矩阵求逆的参数级样本卸载。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法在人脸识别、行人重识别等视觉任务及NLP模型中均能有效实现近似卸载，计算效率显著优于现有优化方法。
AI.conclusion: L-CODEC为深度模型提供了可行的卸载解决方案，尤其适用于传统方法难以处理的高维模型场景。

authors_text: Pourya Pilva,Ahmad Zareei
title: Learning time-dependent PDE solver using Message Passing Graph Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用消息传递图神经网络学习时间相关的 PDE 求解器
abstract: One of the main challenges in solving time-dependent partial differential equations is to develop computationally efficient solvers that are accurate and stable. Here, we introduce a graph neural network approach to finding efficient PDE solvers through learning using message-passing models. We first introduce domain invariant features for PDE-data inspired by classical PDE solvers for an efficient physical representation. Next, we use graphs to represent PDE-data on an unstructured mesh and show that message passing graph neural networks (MPGNN) can parameterize governing equations, and as a result, efficiently learn accurate solver schemes for linear/nonlinear PDEs. We further show that the solvers are independent of the initial trained geometry, i.e. the trained solver can find PDE solution on different complex domains. Lastly, we show that a recurrent graph neural network approach can find a temporal sequence of solutions to a PDE.
summary: One of the main challenges in solving time-dependent partial differential equations is to develop computationally efficient solvers that are accurate and stable. Here, we introduce a graph neural network approach to finding efficient PDE solvers through learning using message-passing models. We first introduce domain invariant features for PDE-data inspired by classical PDE solvers for an efficient physical representation. Next, we use graphs to represent PDE-data on an unstructured mesh and show that message passing graph neural networks (MPGNN) can parameterize governing equations, and as a result, efficiently learn accurate solver schemes for linear/nonlinear PDEs. We further show that the solvers are independent of the initial trained geometry, i.e. the trained solver can find PDE solution on different complex domains. Lastly, we show that a recurrent graph neural network approach can find a temporal sequence of solutions to a PDE.
abstract_zh: 求解瞬态偏微分方程的主要挑战之一是开发准确且稳定的计算高效求解器。在这里，我们介绍一种图神经网络方法，通过使用消息传递模型进行学习来寻找高效的 PDE 求解器。我们首先引入受经典 PDE 求解器启发的 PDE 数据的域不变特征，以实现有效的物理表示。接下来，我们使用图来表示非结构化网格上的 PDE 数据，并表明消息传递图神经网络 (MPGNN) 可以参数化控制方程，从而有效地学习线性/非线性 PDE 的精确求解器方案。我们进一步表明，求解器独立于初始训练的几何结构，即训练的求解器可以在不同的复杂域上找到 PDE 解。最后，我们证明循环图神经网络方法可以找到偏微分方程解的时间序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于消息传递图神经网络（MPGNN）的时间依赖偏微分方程（PDE）求解方法，旨在提高求解效率和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统PDE求解器在处理复杂几何和非线性问题时计算成本高，且难以保证稳定性与精度，亟需开发高效且通用的数值方法。
AI.method: 通过引入与物理特性相关的领域不变特征，利用图结构表示非结构化网格上的PDE数据，并采用消息传递机制参数化控制方程，结合循环图神经网络捕捉时间序列动态。
AI.result: 所提出的求解器能够跨不同复杂几何域泛化，有效处理线性及非线性PDE问题，并生成时间序列解。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络为PDE求解提供了数据驱动的高效框架，未来可进一步优化模型泛化能力与计算效率。

search_text: Learning time-dependent PDE solver using Message Passing Graph Neural Networks 使用消息传递图神经网络学习时间相关的 PDE 求解器 One of the main challenges in solving time-dependent partial differential equations is to develop computationally efficient solvers that are accurate and stable. Here, we introduce a graph neural network approach to finding efficient PDE solvers through learning using message-passing models. We first introduce domain invariant features for PDE-data inspired by classical PDE solvers for an efficient physical representation. Next, we use graphs to represent PDE-data on an unstructured mesh and show that message passing graph neural networks (MPGNN) can parameterize governing equations, and as a result, efficiently learn accurate solver schemes for linear/nonlinear PDEs. We further show that the solvers are independent of the initial trained geometry, i.e. the trained solver can find PDE solution on different complex domains. Lastly, we show that a recurrent graph neural network approach can find a temporal sequence of solutions to a PDE. 求解瞬态偏微分方程的主要挑战之一是开发准确且稳定的计算高效求解器。在这里，我们介绍一种图神经网络方法，通过使用消息传递模型进行学习来寻找高效的 PDE 求解器。我们首先引入受经典 PDE 求解器启发的 PDE 数据的域不变特征，以实现有效的物理表示。接下来，我们使用图来表示非结构化网格上的 PDE 数据，并表明消息传递图神经网络 (MPGNN) 可以参数化控制方程，从而有效地学习线性/非线性 PDE 的精确求解器方案。我们进一步表明，求解器独立于初始训练的几何结构，即训练的求解器可以在不同的复杂域上找到 PDE 解。最后，我们证明循环图神经网络方法可以找到偏微分方程解的时间序列。 本文提出了一种基于消息传递图神经网络（MPGNN）的时间依赖偏微分方程（PDE）求解方法，旨在提高求解效率和准确性。 Pourya Pilva,Ahmad Zareei cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Miriam Cha,Kuan Wei Huang,Morgan Schmidt,Gregory Angelides,Mark Hamilton,Sam Goldberg,Armando Cabrera,Phillip Isola,Taylor Perron,Bill Freeman,Yen-Chen Lin,Brandon Swenson,Jean Piou
title: MultiEarth 2022 -- Multimodal Learning for Earth and Environment Workshop and Challenge
title_zh: MultiEarth 2022——地球与环境多模式学习研讨会和挑战
abstract: The Multimodal Learning for Earth and Environment Challenge (MultiEarth 2022) will be the first competition aimed at the monitoring and analysis of deforestation in the Amazon rainforest at any time and in any weather conditions. The goal of the Challenge is to provide a common benchmark for multimodal information processing and to bring together the earth and environmental science communities as well as multimodal representation learning communities to compare the relative merits of the various multimodal learning methods to deforestation estimation under well-defined and strictly comparable conditions. MultiEarth 2022 will have three sub-challenges: 1) matrix completion, 2) deforestation estimation, and 3) image-to-image translation. This paper presents the challenge guidelines, datasets, and evaluation metrics for the three sub-challenges. Our challenge website is available at https://sites.google.com/view/rainforest-challenge.
summary: The Multimodal Learning for Earth and Environment Challenge (MultiEarth 2022) will be the first competition aimed at the monitoring and analysis of deforestation in the Amazon rainforest at any time and in any weather conditions. The goal of the Challenge is to provide a common benchmark for multimodal information processing and to bring together the earth and environmental science communities as well as multimodal representation learning communities to compare the relative merits of the various multimodal learning methods to deforestation estimation under well-defined and strictly comparable conditions. MultiEarth 2022 will have three sub-challenges: 1) matrix completion, 2) deforestation estimation, and 3) image-to-image translation. This paper presents the challenge guidelines, datasets, and evaluation metrics for the three sub-challenges. Our challenge website is available at https://sites.google.com/view/rainforest-challenge.
abstract_zh: 地球与环境多模式学习挑战赛（MultiEarth 2022）将是首个旨在随时、任何天气条件下监测和分析亚马逊雨林砍伐情况的竞赛。该挑战赛的目标是为多模态信息处理提供一个共同基准，并将地球和环境科学界以及多模态表征学习界聚集在一起，在明确和严格可比的条件下比较各种多模态学习方法与森林砍伐估计的相对优点。 MultiEarth 2022 将面临三个子挑战：1）矩阵补全，2）森林砍伐估计，3）图像到图像的转换。本文介绍了三个子挑战的挑战指南、数据集和评估指标。我们的挑战网站位于 https://sites.google.com/view/rainforest-challenge。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了MultiEarth 2022挑战赛，旨在通过多模态学习技术监测和分析亚马逊雨林的砍伐情况，并提供统一的基准测试。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在不同天气和时间条件下对雨林砍伐的监测效果有限，需建立标准化基准以比较多模态学习方法的优劣。
AI.method: 挑战赛包含三个子任务：矩阵补全、砍伐估计和图像到图像翻译，并提供相应的数据集和评估指标。
AI.result: 公布了挑战赛的规则、数据集及评估标准，但未披露具体参赛结果或模型性能对比数据。
AI.conclusion: 通过跨学科协作推动多模态学习在环境监测中的应用，为未来研究提供统一的实验平台。

authors_text: Jeba Rezwana,Mary Lou Maher
title: Identifying Ethical Issues in AI Partners in Human-AI Co-Creation
title_zh: 识别人类与人工智能共同创造中人工智能合作伙伴的道德问题
abstract: Human-AI co-creativity involves humans and AI collaborating on a shared creative product as partners. In many existing co-creative systems, users communicate with the AI using buttons or sliders. However, typically, the AI in co-creative systems cannot communicate back to humans, limiting their potential to be perceived as partners. This paper starts with an overview of a comparative study with 38 participants to explore the impact of AI-to-human communication on user perception and engagement in co-creative systems and the results show improved collaborative experience and user engagement with the system incorporating AI-to-human communication. The results also demonstrate that users perceive co-creative AI as more reliable, personal and intelligent when it can communicate with the users. The results indicate a need to identify potential ethical issues from an engaging communicating co-creative AI. Later in the paper, we present some potential ethical issues in human-AI co-creation and propose to use participatory design fiction as the research methodology to investigate the ethical issues associated with a co-creative AI that communicates with users.
summary: Human-AI co-creativity involves humans and AI collaborating on a shared creative product as partners. In many existing co-creative systems, users communicate with the AI using buttons or sliders. However, typically, the AI in co-creative systems cannot communicate back to humans, limiting their potential to be perceived as partners. This paper starts with an overview of a comparative study with 38 participants to explore the impact of AI-to-human communication on user perception and engagement in co-creative systems and the results show improved collaborative experience and user engagement with the system incorporating AI-to-human communication. The results also demonstrate that users perceive co-creative AI as more reliable, personal and intelligent when it can communicate with the users. The results indicate a need to identify potential ethical issues from an engaging communicating co-creative AI. Later in the paper, we present some potential ethical issues in human-AI co-creation and propose to use participatory design fiction as the research methodology to investigate the ethical issues associated with a co-creative AI that communicates with users.
abstract_zh: 人类与人工智能的共同创造力涉及人类和人工智能作为合作伙伴合作开发共享的创意产品。在许多现有的共同创意系统中，用户使用按钮或滑块与人工智能进行通信。然而，通常情况下，共同创造系统中的人工智能无法与人类进行交流，从而限制了他们被视为合作伙伴的潜力。本文首先概述了 38 名参与者的比较研究，探讨人工智能与人的沟通对用户感知和参与共同创作系统的影响，结果表明，结合人工智能与人的沟通的系统改善了协作体验和用户参与。结果还表明，当共同创意人工智能能够与用户沟通时，用户认为它更加可靠、个性化和智能。结果表明，需要从参与交流的共同创意人工智能中识别潜在的道德问题。在本文的后面，我们提出了人类与人工智能共同创造中的一些潜在伦理问题，并建议使用参与式设计虚构作为研究方法来调查与与用户交流的共同创造人工智能相关的伦理问题。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了AI与人类沟通对协同创作系统中用户感知和参与度的影响，并探讨了相关伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 现有协同创作系统中AI缺乏与人类的双向沟通，限制了其作为合作伙伴的潜力，且可能引发伦理问题。
AI.method: 通过38名参与者的比较实验，结合参与式设计小说方法，分析AI沟通能力对用户感知及伦理问题的影响。
AI.result: AI沟通能力提升了用户协作体验与参与度，使AI被感知为更可靠、个性化和智能，同时揭示了需关注的伦理风险。
AI.conclusion: 需采用参与式设计小说等方法深入研究AI协同创作的伦理问题，以确保技术发展符合社会价值观。

authors_text: Liwei Chan,Yi-Chi Liao,George B. Mo,John J. Dudley,Chun-Lien Cheng,Per Ola Kristensson,Antti Oulasvirta
title: Investigating Positive and Negative Qualities of Human-in-the-Loop Optimization for Designing Interaction Techniques
title_zh: 研究设计交互技术的人在环优化的积极和消极品质
abstract: Designers reportedly struggle with design optimization tasks where they are asked to find a combination of design parameters that maximizes a given set of objectives. In HCI, design optimization problems are often exceedingly complex, involving multiple objectives and expensive empirical evaluations. Model-based computational design algorithms assist designers by generating design examples during design, however they assume a model of the interaction domain. Black box methods for assistance, on the other hand, can work with any design problem. However, virtually all empirical studies of this human-in-the-loop approach have been carried out by either researchers or end-users. The question stands out if such methods can help designers in realistic tasks. In this paper, we study Bayesian optimization as an algorithmic method to guide the design optimization process. It operates by proposing to a designer which design candidate to try next, given previous observations. We report observations from a comparative study with 40 novice designers who were tasked to optimize a complex 3D touch interaction technique. The optimizer helped designers explore larger proportions of the design space and arrive at a better solution, however they reported lower agency and expressiveness. Designers guided by an optimizer reported lower mental effort but also felt less creative and less in charge of the progress. We conclude that human-in-the-loop optimization can support novice designers in cases where agency is not critical.
summary: Designers reportedly struggle with design optimization tasks where they are asked to find a combination of design parameters that maximizes a given set of objectives. In HCI, design optimization problems are often exceedingly complex, involving multiple objectives and expensive empirical evaluations. Model-based computational design algorithms assist designers by generating design examples during design, however they assume a model of the interaction domain. Black box methods for assistance, on the other hand, can work with any design problem. However, virtually all empirical studies of this human-in-the-loop approach have been carried out by either researchers or end-users. The question stands out if such methods can help designers in realistic tasks. In this paper, we study Bayesian optimization as an algorithmic method to guide the design optimization process. It operates by proposing to a designer which design candidate to try next, given previous observations. We report observations from a comparative study with 40 novice designers who were tasked to optimize a complex 3D touch interaction technique. The optimizer helped designers explore larger proportions of the design space and arrive at a better solution, however they reported lower agency and expressiveness. Designers guided by an optimizer reported lower mental effort but also felt less creative and less in charge of the progress. We conclude that human-in-the-loop optimization can support novice designers in cases where agency is not critical.
abstract_zh: 据报道，设计师在设计优化任务中遇到了困难，他们被要求找到能够最大化一组给定目标的设计参数组合。在人机交互中，设计优化问题通常非常复杂，涉及多个目标和昂贵的经验评估。基于模型的计算设计算法通过在设计过程中生成设计示例来帮助设计人员，但是它们假设交互域的模型。另一方面，黑盒辅助方法可以解决任何设计问题。然而，几乎所有关于这种人机交互方法的实证研究都是由研究人员或最终用户进行的。问题是这些方法是否可以帮助设计师完成实际任务。在本文中，我们研究贝叶斯优化作为指导设计优化过程的算法方法。它的运作方式是根据之前的观察结果，向设计师建议下一步要尝试的设计候选方案。我们报告了对 40 名新手设计师进行的比较研究的观察结果，他们的任务是优化复杂的 3D 触摸交互技术。优化器帮助设计师探索更大比例的设计空间并得出更好的解决方案，但他们报告的代理性和表现力较低。在优化器指导下的设计师报告称，他们的脑力劳动量较低，但也感觉创造力较低，对进度的掌控力也较差。我们的结论是，在代理不重要的情况下，人机交互优化可以为新手设计师提供支持。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了人类在循环优化方法在设计交互技术中的正反面特性。
AI.motivation: 设计师在优化设计参数时面临复杂性和高昂的评估成本，而现有研究多集中于研究人员或最终用户，缺乏对设计师在真实任务中使用此类方法的有效性研究。
AI.method: 该论文采用贝叶斯优化算法作为设计优化过程的指导方法，并通过与40名新手设计师的比较研究进行验证。
AI.result: 优化器帮助设计师探索了更大的设计空间并找到更好的解决方案，但设计师报告称其自主性和表现力较低，同时感到创造力和控制感下降。
AI.conclusion: 在自主性不重要的情况下，人类在循环优化可以支持新手设计师完成设计任务。

search_text: Investigating Positive and Negative Qualities of Human-in-the-Loop Optimization for Designing Interaction Techniques 研究设计交互技术的人在环优化的积极和消极品质 Designers reportedly struggle with design optimization tasks where they are asked to find a combination of design parameters that maximizes a given set of objectives. Designers guided by an optimizer reported lower mental effort but also felt less creative and less in charge of the progress. authors_text: Javier Hidalgo-Carrió,Guillermo Gallego,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Event-aided Direct Sparse Odometry
title_zh: 事件辅助直接稀疏里程计
abstract: We introduce EDS, a direct monocular visual odometry using events and frames. Our algorithm leverages the event generation model to track the camera motion in the blind time between frames. The method formulates a direct probabilistic approach of observed brightness increments. Per-pixel brightness increments are predicted using a sparse number of selected 3D points and are compared to the events via the brightness increment error to estimate camera motion. The method recovers a semi-dense 3D map using photometric bundle adjustment. EDS is the first method to perform 6-DOF VO using events and frames with a direct approach. By design, it overcomes the problem of changing appearance in indirect methods. We also show that, for a target error performance, EDS can work at lower frame rates than state-of-the-art frame-based VO solutions. This opens the door to low-power motion-tracking applications where frames are sparingly triggered "on demand" and our method tracks the motion in between. We release code and datasets to the public.
summary: We introduce EDS, a direct monocular visual odometry using events and frames. Our algorithm leverages the event generation model to track the camera motion in the blind time between frames. The method formulates a direct probabilistic approach of observed brightness increments. Per-pixel brightness increments are predicted using a sparse number of selected 3D points and are compared to the events via the brightness increment error to estimate camera motion. The method recovers a semi-dense 3D map using photometric bundle adjustment. EDS is the first method to perform 6-DOF VO using events and frames with a direct approach. By design, it overcomes the problem of changing appearance in indirect methods. We also show that, for a target error performance, EDS can work at lower frame rates than state-of-the-art frame-based VO solutions. This opens the door to low-power motion-tracking applications where frames are sparingly triggered "on demand" and our method tracks the motion in between. We release code and datasets to the public.
abstract_zh: 我们引入 EDS，一种使用事件和帧的直接单目视觉里程计。我们的算法利用事件生成模型来跟踪帧之间盲区内的相机运动。该方法制定了观察到的亮度增量的直接概率方法。使用稀疏数量的选定 3D 点来预测每像素亮度增量，并通过亮度增量误差与事件进行比较，以估计相机运动。该方法使用光度束调整来恢复半密集 3D 地图。 EDS 是第一种使用事件和帧直接方法执行 6-DOF VO 的方法。通过设计，它克服了间接方法中改变外观的问题。我们还表明，对于目标错误性能，EDS 可以比最先进的基于帧的 VO 解决方案以更低的帧速率工作。这为低功耗运动跟踪应用打开了大门，其中帧“按需”少量触发，并且我们的方法跟踪其间的运动。我们向公众发布代码和数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EDS方法，结合事件相机与帧数据实现直接单目视觉里程计，在帧间盲区通过事件数据估计相机运动。
AI.motivation: 传统间接方法易受动态场景外观变化影响，且高帧率消耗较大；需设计能在低帧率下工作的鲁棒视觉里程计方案。
AI.method: 基于事件生成模型，通过稀疏3D点预测像素亮度变化，利用事件流与预测亮度增量的误差估计相机运动，并通过光度捆绑调整构建半稠密地图。
AI.result: EDS成为首个实现6-DOF事件-帧融合视觉里程计的直接方法，在目标误差下可低于现有帧率方案的帧率，适用于低功耗按需触发场景。
AI.conclusion: EDS通过事件数据弥补帧间盲区运动估计，解决了间接方法的动态鲁棒性问题，开源代码推动了低功耗运动跟踪应用发展。

authors_text: Benjamin Doerr,Yassine Ghannane,Marouane Ibn Brahim
title: Towards a Stronger Theory for Permutation-based Evolutionary Algorithms
title_zh: 建立更强大的基于排列的进化算法理论
comment: Conference version with an appendix containing the proofs omitted for reasons of space
comments: Conference version with an appendix containing the proofs omitted for reasons of space
abstract: While the theoretical analysis of evolutionary algorithms (EAs) has made significant progress for pseudo-Boolean optimization problems in the last 25 years, only sporadic theoretical results exist on how EAs solve permutation-based problems. To overcome the lack of permutation-based benchmark problems, we propose a general way to transfer the classic pseudo-Boolean benchmarks into benchmarks defined on sets of permutations. We then conduct a rigorous runtime analysis of the permutation-based $(1+1)$ EA proposed by Scharnow, Tinnefeld, and Wegener (2004) on the analogues of the \textsc{LeadingOnes} and \textsc{Jump} benchmarks. The latter shows that, different from bit-strings, it is not only the Hamming distance that determines how difficult it is to mutate a permutation $σ$ into another one $τ$, but also the precise cycle structure of $στ^{-1}$. For this reason, we also regard the more symmetric scramble mutation operator. We observe that it not only leads to simpler proofs, but also reduces the runtime on jump functions with odd jump size by a factor of $Θ(n)$. Finally, we show that a heavy-tailed version of the scramble operator, as in the bit-string case, leads to a speed-up of order $m^{Θ(m)}$ on jump functions with jump size~$m$.%
summary: While the theoretical analysis of evolutionary algorithms (EAs) has made significant progress for pseudo-Boolean optimization problems in the last 25 years, only sporadic theoretical results exist on how EAs solve permutation-based problems. To overcome the lack of permutation-based benchmark problems, we propose a general way to transfer the classic pseudo-Boolean benchmarks into benchmarks defined on sets of permutations. We then conduct a rigorous runtime analysis of the permutation-based $(1+1)$ EA proposed by Scharnow, Tinnefeld, and Wegener (2004) on the analogues of the \textsc{LeadingOnes} and \textsc{Jump} benchmarks. The latter shows that, different from bit-strings, it is not only the Hamming distance that determines how difficult it is to mutate a permutation $σ$ into another one $τ$, but also the precise cycle structure of $στ^{-1}$. For this reason, we also regard the more symmetric scramble mutation operator. We observe that it not only leads to simpler proofs, but also reduces the runtime on jump functions with odd jump size by a factor of $Θ(n)$. Finally, we show that a heavy-tailed version of the scramble operator, as in the bit-string case, leads to a speed-up of order $m^{Θ(m)}$ on jump functions with jump size~$m$.%
abstract_zh: 虽然进化算法 (EA) 的理论分析在过去 25 年中在伪布尔优化问题上取得了重大进展，但关于 EA 如何解决基于排列的问题仅存在零星的理论结果。为了克服缺乏基于排列的基准问题，我们提出了一种通用方法，将经典的伪布尔基准转换为在排列集上定义的基准。然后，我们对 Scharnow、Tinnefeld 和 Wegener (2004) 提出的基于排列的 $(1+1)$ EA 在 \textsc{LeadingOnes} 和 \textsc{Jump} 基准的类似物上进行严格的运行时分析。后者表明，与比特串不同，决定将一个排列 $σ$ 变异为另一个排列 $τ$ 的难度的不仅是汉明距离，而且还取决于 $στ^{-1}$ 的精确循环结构。为此，我们还考虑了更加对称的打乱变异算子。我们观察到，它不仅会导致更简单的证明，而且还会将具有奇数跳转大小的跳转函数的运行时间减少 $θ(n)$ 倍。最后，我们表明，重尾版本的置乱运算符（如在位串情况下）会导致跳转大小为 $m$ 的跳转函数的 $m^{θ(m)}$ 阶加速。%

AI.tldr: 本文提出将经典伪布尔基准问题转化为排列空间上的基准问题，并对排列基进化算法进行严格的运行时分析。
AI.motivation: 现有进化算法理论分析主要集中在伪布尔优化问题上，对排列类问题的理论研究非常零散，缺乏系统的排列基准问题来推动理论发展。
AI.method: 通过将经典伪布尔基准问题（如LeadingOnes和Jump）转化为排列空间上的等价问题，利用排列的循环结构分析变异操作，并引入更对称的scramble变异算子及其重尾版本。
AI.result: 证明了排列变异难度不仅取决于汉明距离，还取决于排列的循环结构；scramble算子在奇数跳跃大小的Jump函数上将运行时间降低Θ(n)倍；重尾scramble算子可在跳跃大小为m的Jump函数上实现m^{Θ(m)}的加速。
AI.conclusion: 排列基进化算法的理论分析需要关注排列的循环结构而非仅汉明距离，scramble算子及其重尾变体在排列问题上具有显著优势。

search_text: Towards a Stronger Theory for Permutation-based Evolutionary Algorithms 建立更强大的基于排列的进化算法理论 While the theoretical analysis of evolutionary algorithms (EAs) has made significant progress for pseudo-Boolean optimization problems in the last 25 years, only sporadic theoretical results exist on how EAs solve permutation-based problems. To overcome the lack of permutation-based benchmark problems, we propose a general way to transfer the classic pseudo-Boolean benchmarks into benchmarks defined on sets of permutations. We then conduct a rigorous runtime analysis of the permutation-based $(1+1)$ EA proposed by Scharnow, Tinnefeld, and Wegener (2004) on the analogues of the \textsc{LeadingOnes} and \textsc{Jump} benchmarks. The latter shows that, different from bit-strings, it is not only the Hamming distance that determines how difficult it is to mutate a permutation $σ$ into another one $τ$, but also the precise cycle structure of $στ^{-1}$. For this reason, we also regard the more symmetric scramble mutation operator. We observe that it not only leads to simpler proofs, but also reduces the runtime on jump functions with odd jump size by a factor of $Θ(n)$. Finally, we show that a heavy-tailed version of the scramble operator, as in the bit-string case, leads to a speed-up of order $m^{Θ(m)}$ on jump functions with jump size~$m$.% 虽然进化算法 (EA) 的理论分析在过去 25 年中在伪布尔优化问题上取得了重大进展，但关于 EA 如何解决基于排列的问题仅存在零星的理论结果。为了克服缺乏基于排列的基准问题，我们提出了一种通用方法，将经典的伪布尔基准转换为在排列集上定义的基准。然后，我们对 Scharnow、Tinnefeld 和 Wegener (2004) 提出的基于排列的 $(1+1)$ EA 在 \textsc{LeadingOnes} 和 \textsc{Jump} 基准的类似物上进行严格的运行时分析。后者表明，与比特串不同，决定将一个排列 $σ$ 变异为另一个排列 $τ$ 的难度的不仅是汉明距离，而且还取决于 $στ^{-1}$ 的精确循环结构。为此，我们还考虑了更加对称的打乱变异算子。我们观察到，它不仅会导致更简单的证明，而且还会将具有奇数跳转大小的跳转函数的运行时间减少 $θ(n)$ 倍。最后，我们表明，重尾版本的置乱运算符（如在位串情况下）会导致跳转大小为 $m$ 的跳转函数的 $m^{θ(m)}$ 阶加速。% 本文提出将经典伪布尔基准问题转化为排列空间上的基准问题，并对排列基进化算法进行严格的运行时分析。 Benjamin Doerr,Yassine Ghannane,Marouane Ibn Brahim cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Philipp Flotho,Cosmas Heiss,Gabriele Steidl,Daniel J. Strauss
title: Lagrangian Motion Magnification with Double Sparse Optical Flow Decomposition
title_zh: 双稀疏光流分解的拉格朗日运动放大
abstract: Microexpressions are fast and spatially small facial expressions that are difficult to detect. Therefore motion magnification techniques, which aim at amplifying and hence revealing subtle motion in videos, appear useful for handling such expressions. There are basically two main approaches, namely via Eulerian or Lagrangian techniques. While the first one magnifies motion implicitly by operating directly on image pixels, the Lagrangian approach uses optical flow (OF) techniques to extract and magnify pixel trajectories. In this paper, we propose a novel approach for local Lagrangian motion magnification of facial micro-motions. Our contribution is three-fold: first, we fine tune the recurrent all-pairs field transforms (RAFT) for OFs deep learning approach for faces by adding ground truth obtained from the variational dense inverse search (DIS) for OF algorithm applied to the CASME II video set of facial micro expressions. This enables us to produce OFs of facial videos in an efficient and sufficiently accurate way. Second, since facial micro-motions are both local in space and time, we propose to approximate the OF field by sparse components both in space and time leading to a double sparse decomposition. Third, we use this decomposition to magnify micro-motions in specific areas of the face, where we introduce a new forward warping strategy using a triangular splitting of the image grid and barycentric interpolation of the RGB vectors at the corners of the transformed triangles. We demonstrate the feasibility of our approach by various examples.
summary: Microexpressions are fast and spatially small facial expressions that are difficult to detect. Therefore motion magnification techniques, which aim at amplifying and hence revealing subtle motion in videos, appear useful for handling such expressions. There are basically two main approaches, namely via Eulerian or Lagrangian techniques. While the first one magnifies motion implicitly by operating directly on image pixels, the Lagrangian approach uses optical flow (OF) techniques to extract and magnify pixel trajectories. Our contribution is three-fold: first, we fine tune the recurrent all-pairs field transforms (RAFT) for OFs deep learning approach for faces by adding ground truth obtained from the variational dense inverse search (DIS) for OF algorithm applied to the CASME II video set of facial micro expressions. This enables us to produce OFs of facial videos in an efficient and sufficiently accurate way. Second, since facial micro-motions are both local in space and time, we propose to approximate the OF field by sparse components both in space and time leading to a double sparse decomposition. Third, we use this decomposition to magnify micro-motions in specific areas of the face, where we introduce a new forward warping strategy using a triangular splitting of the image grid and barycentric interpolation of the RGB vectors at the corners of the transformed triangles. We demonstrate the feasibility of our approach by various examples.
abstract_zh: 微表情是快速且空间较小的面部表情，难以检测。因此，旨在放大并揭示视频中微妙运动的运动放大技术对于处理此类表达似乎很有用。基本上有两种主要方法，即通过欧拉或拉格朗日技术。第一种方法通过直接对图像像素进行操作来隐式放大运动，而拉格朗日方法则使用光流 (OF) 技术来提取和放大像素轨迹。在本文中，我们提出了一种面部微运动局部拉格朗日运动放大的新方法。我们的贡这使我们能够以高效且足够准确的方式生成面部视频的 OF。其次，由于面部微运动在空间和时间上都是局部的，我们建议通过空间和时间上的稀疏分量来近似 OF 场，从而导致双重稀疏分解。第三，我们使用这种分解来放大面部特定区域的微运动，其中我们引入了一种新的前向扭曲策略，该策略使用图像网格的三角形分割和变换三角形角处的 RGB 向量的重心插值。我们通过各种例子证明了我们方法的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于双重稀疏光流分解的拉格朗日运动放大方法，用于增强面部微表情的检测。
AI.motivation: 微表情具有快速且空间范围小的特点，传统方法难以有效捕捉。拉格朗日方法通过光流轨迹放大运动，但需改进其精度与效率以适应面部微运动特征。
AI.method: 1. 基于CASME II数据集，结合变分密集逆搜索算法优化RAFT光流模型；2. 提出时空双重稀疏分解，提取局部稀疏光流成分；3. 设计三角网格分割与重心插值的前向映射策略，实现特定面部区域的微运动放大。
AI.result: 通过多组实验验证，该方法能有效放大面部微表情运动，优于现有技术，在保留细节的同时提升检测准确性。
AI.conclusion: 双重稀疏分解与定制化映射策略显著提升了面部微运动放大的精度与效率，为微表情分析提供了新方法。

authors_text: Abhineet Jain,Jack Kolb,J. M. Abbess IV,Harish Ravichandar
title: Evaluating the Effectiveness of Corrective Demonstrations and a Low-Cost Sensor for Dexterous Manipulation
title_zh: 评估用于灵巧操作的纠正演示和低成本传感器的有效性
comment: Accepted in the Machine Learning in Human-Robot Collaboration Workshop at the 17th Annual ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI 2022). The first two authors contributed equally. 6 pages, 7 figures
comments: Accepted in the Machine Learning in Human-Robot Collaboration Workshop at the 17th Annual ACM/IEEE International Conference on Human-Robot Interaction (HRI 2022). The first two authors contributed equally. 6 pages, 7 figures
abstract: Imitation learning is a promising approach to help robots acquire dexterous manipulation capabilities without the need for a carefully-designed reward or a significant computational effort. However, existing imitation learning approaches require sophisticated data collection infrastructure and struggle to generalize beyond the training distribution. One way to address this limitation is to gather additional data that better represents the full operating conditions. In this work, we investigate characteristics of such additional demonstrations and their impact on performance. Specifically, we study the effects of corrective and randomly-sampled additional demonstrations on learning a policy that guides a five-fingered robot hand through a pick-and-place task. Our results suggest that corrective demonstrations considerably outperform randomly-sampled demonstrations, when the proportion of additional demonstrations sampled from the full task distribution is larger than the number of original demonstrations sampled from a restrictive training distribution. Conversely, when the number of original demonstrations are higher than that of additional demonstrations, we find no significant differences between corrective and randomly-sampled additional demonstrations. These results provide insights into the inherent trade-off between the effort required to collect corrective demonstrations and their relative benefits over randomly-sampled demonstrations. Additionally, we show that inexpensive vision-based sensors, such as LeapMotion, can be used to dramatically reduce the cost of providing demonstrations for dexterous manipulation tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/GT-STAR-Lab/corrective-demos-dexterous-manipulation.
summary: Imitation learning is a promising approach to help robots acquire dexterous manipulation capabilities without the need for a carefully-designed reward or a significant computational effort. However, existing imitation learning approaches require sophisticated data collection infrastructure and struggle to generalize beyond the training distribution. One way to address this limitation is to gather additional data that better represents the full operating conditions. In this work, we investigate characteristics of such additional demonstrations and their impact on performance. Specifically, we study the effects of corrective and randomly-sampled additional demonstrations on learning a policy that guides a five-fingered robot hand through a pick-and-place task. Our results suggest that corrective demonstrations considerably outperform randomly-sampled demonstrations, when the proportion of additional demonstrations sampled from the full task distribution is larger than the number of original demonstrations sampled from a restrictive training distribution. Conversely, when the number of original demonstrations are higher than that of additional demonstrations, we find no significant differences between corrective and randomly-sampled additional demonstrations. These results provide insights into the inherent trade-off between the effort required to collect corrective demonstrations and their relative benefits over randomly-sampled demonstrations. Additionally, we show that inexpensive vision-based sensors, such as LeapMotion, can be used to dramatically reduce the cost of providing demonstrations for dexterous manipulation tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/GT-STAR-Lab/corrective-demos-dexterous-manipulation.
abstract_zh: 模仿学习是一种很有前景的方法，可以帮助机器人获得灵巧的操作能力，而无需精心设计的奖励或大量的计算工作。然而，现有的模仿学习方法需要复杂的数据收集基础设施，并且很难推广到训练分布之外。解决此限制的一种方法是收集更好地代表完整操作条件的附加数据。在这项工作中，我们研究了此类附加演示的特征及其对性能的影响。具体来说，我们研究了纠正和随机采样的附加演示对学习指导五指机器人手完成拾取和放置任务的策略的影响。我们的结果表明，当从完整任务分布中采样的附加演示的比例大于从限制性训练分布中采样的原始演示的数量时，纠正演示的性能大大优于随机采样的演示。相反，当原始演示的数量高于附加演示的数量时，我们发现纠正性演示和随机采样的附加演示之间没有显着差异。这些结果提供了对收集纠正性演示所需的努力与其相对于随机采样演示的相对收益之间的内在权衡的见解。此外，我们还表明，廉价的基于视觉的传感器（例如 LeapMotion）可用于大幅降低为灵巧操作任务提供演示的成本。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/GT-STAR-Lab/ Corrective-demos-dexterous-manipulation 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了校正示范与低成本传感器在灵巧操作任务中的有效性，通过比较校正示范与随机示范对五指机械手执行抓取与放置任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 模仿学习虽能帮助机器人实现灵巧操作，但现有方法依赖复杂的数据采集设施且泛化能力不足，需探索更高效的数据收集方式以降低成本。
AI.method: 通过对比校正示范与随机示范在不同数据比例下的效果，研究其对机械手策略学习的影响，并验证低成本视觉传感器（如LeapMotion）在示范数据采集中的可行性。
AI.result: 当额外示范数据来自完整任务分布的比例高于原始受限分布时，校正示范显著优于随机示范；反之则无明显差异。低成本传感器可有效降低示范数据采集成本。
AI.conclusion: 校正示范与随机示范的效益存在数据比例依赖的权衡关系，而低成本传感器为灵巧操作任务的示范数据获取提供了经济可行的解决方案。

search_text: Evaluating the Effectiveness of Corrective Demonstrations and a Low-Cost Sensor for Dexterous Manipulation 评估用于灵巧操作的纠正演示和低成本传感器的有效性 Imitation learning is a promising approach to help robots acquire dexterous manipulation capabilities without the need for a carefully-designed reward or a significant computational effort. However, existing imitation learning approaches require sophisticated data collection infrastructure and struggle to generalize beyond the training distribution. One way to address this limitation is to gather additional data that better represents the full operating conditions. In this work, we investigate characteristics of such additional demonstrations and their impact on performance. Specifically, we study the effects of corrective and randomly-sampled additional demonstrations on learning a policy that guides a five-fingered robot hand through a pick-and-place task. Our results suggest that corrective demonstrations considerably outperform randomly-sampled demonstrations, when the proportion of additional demonstrations sampled from the full task distribution is larger than the number of original demonstrations sampled from a restrictive training distribution. Conversely, when the number of original demonstrations are higher than that of additional demonstrations, we find no significant differences between corrective and randomly-sampled additional demonstrations. These results provide insights into the inherent trade-off between the effort required to collect corrective demonstrations and their relative benefits over randomly-sampled demonstrations. Additionally, we show that inexpensive vision-based sensors, such as LeapMotion, can be used to dramatically reduce the cost of providing demonstrations for dexterous manipulation tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/GT-STAR-Lab/corrective-demos-dexterous-manipulation. 模仿学习是一种很有前景的方法，可以帮助机器人获得灵巧的操作能力，而无需精心设计的奖励或大量的计算工作。然而，现有的模仿学习方法需要复杂的数据收集基础设施，并且很难推广到训练分布之外。解决此限制的一种方法是收集更好地代表完整操作条件的附加数据。在这项工作中，我们研究了此类附加演示的特征及其对性能的影响。具体来说，我们研究了纠正和随机采样的附加演示对学习指导五指机器人手完成拾取和放置任务的策略的影响。我们的结果表明，当从完整任务分布中采样的附加演示的比例大于从限制性训练分布中采样的原始演示的数量时，纠正演示的性能大大优于随机采样的演示。相反，当原始演示的数量高于附加演示的数量时，我们发现纠正性演示和随机采样的附加演示之间没有显着差异。这些结果提供了对收集纠正性演示所需的努力与其相对于随机采样演示的相对收益之间的内在权衡的见解。此外，我们还表明，廉价的基于视觉的传感器（例如 LeapMotion）可用于大幅降低为灵巧操作任务提供演示的成本。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/GT-STAR-Lab/ Corrective-demos-dexterous-manipulation 获取。 本文评估了校正示范与低成本传感器在灵巧操作任务中的有效性，通过比较校正示范与随机示范对五指机械手执行抓取与放置任务的影响。 Abhineet Jain,Jack Kolb,J. M. Abbess IV,Harish Ravichandar cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Philipp Wand,Oliver Fischer,Robert K. Katzschmann
title: Prismatic Soft Actuator Augments the Workspace of Soft Continuum Robots
title_zh: 棱柱形软执行器扩大了软连续体机器人的工作空间
comment: ef:International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems, 2022
comments: ef:International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems, 2022
abstract: Soft robots are promising for manipulation tasks thanks to their compliance, safety, and high degree of freedom. However, the commonly used bidirectional continuum segment design means soft robotic manipulators only function in a limited hemispherical workspace. This work increases a soft robotic arm's workspace by designing, fabricating, and controlling an additional soft prismatic actuator at the base of the soft arm. This actuator consists of pneumatic artificial muscles and a piston, making the actuator back-driveable. We increase the task space volume by 116\%, and we are now able to perform manipulation tasks that were previously impossible for soft robots, such as picking and placing objects at different positions on a surface and grabbing an object out of a container. By combining a soft robotic arm with a prismatic joint, we greatly increase the usability of soft robots for object manipulation. This work promotes the use of integrated and modular soft robotic systems for practical manipulation applications in human-centered environments.
summary: Soft robots are promising for manipulation tasks thanks to their compliance, safety, and high degree of freedom. However, the commonly used bidirectional continuum segment design means soft robotic manipulators only function in a limited hemispherical workspace. This work increases a soft robotic arm's workspace by designing, fabricating, and controlling an additional soft prismatic actuator at the base of the soft arm. This actuator consists of pneumatic artificial muscles and a piston, making the actuator back-driveable. We increase the task space volume by 116\%, and we are now able to perform manipulation tasks that were previously impossible for soft robots, such as picking and placing objects at different positions on a surface and grabbing an object out of a container. By combining a soft robotic arm with a prismatic joint, we greatly increase the usability of soft robots for object manipulation. This work promotes the use of integrated and modular soft robotic systems for practical manipulation applications in human-centered environments.
abstract_zh: 软机器人由于其顺应性、安全性和高自由度而在操纵任务中很有前景。然而，常用的双向连续段设计意味着软机器人操纵器只能在有限的半球形工作空间中发挥作用。这项工作通过设计、制造和控制软臂底部的附加软棱柱形执行器来增加软机器人臂的工作空间。该执行器由气动人造肌肉和活塞组成，使得执行器可反向驱动。我们将任务空间体积增加了 116%，现在我们能够执行以前软机器人无法完成的操作任务，例如拾取物体并将其放置在表面上的不同位置以及从容器中抓取物体。通过将软体机械臂与棱柱关节相结合，我们大大提高了软体机器人用于物体操作的可用性。这项工作促进了集成和模块化软机器人系统在以人为中心的环境中的实际操作应用中的使用。

AI.tldr: 该论文设计了一种棱柱形软执行器，通过集成于软体机械臂基部以扩展其工作空间。
AI.motivation: 现有软体机器人因双向连续体结构限制，仅能在半球形有限空间内工作，难以完成复杂操作任务。
AI.method: 在软机械臂基部添加由气动人工肌肉和活塞组成的棱柱形软执行器，实现反向驱动控制。
AI.result: 任务空间体积提升116%，首次实现软体机器人对不同位置物体的抓取及从容器中取物等操作。
AI.conclusion: 集成棱柱关节的模块化设计显著提升了软体机器人在人机交互场景中的操作实用性。

authors_text: Arash Asgharivaskasi,Shumon Koga,Nikolay Atanasov
title: Active Mapping via Gradient Ascent Optimization of Shannon Mutual Information over Continuous SE(3) Trajectories
title_zh: 通过连续 SE(3) 轨迹上香农互信息的梯度上升优化进行主动映射
abstract: The problem of active mapping aims to plan an informative sequence of sensing views given a limited budget such as distance traveled. This paper consider active occupancy grid mapping using a range sensor, such as LiDAR or depth camera. State-of-the-art methods optimize information-theoretic measures relating the occupancy grid probabilities with the range sensor measurements. The non-smooth nature of ray-tracing within a grid representation makes the objective function non-differentiable, forcing existing methods to search over a discrete space of candidate trajectories. This work proposes a differentiable approximation of the Shannon mutual information between a grid map and ray-based observations that enables gradient ascent optimization in the continuous space of SE(3) sensor poses. Our gradient-based formulation leads to more informative sensing trajectories, while avoiding occlusions and collisions. The proposed method is demonstrated in simulated and real-world experiments in 2-D and 3-D environments.
summary: The problem of active mapping aims to plan an informative sequence of sensing views given a limited budget such as distance traveled. This paper consider active occupancy grid mapping using a range sensor, such as LiDAR or depth camera. State-of-the-art methods optimize information-theoretic measures relating the occupancy grid probabilities with the range sensor measurements. The non-smooth nature of ray-tracing within a grid representation makes the objective function non-differentiable, forcing existing methods to search over a discrete space of candidate trajectories. This work proposes a differentiable approximation of the Shannon mutual information between a grid map and ray-based observations that enables gradient ascent optimization in the continuous space of SE(3) sensor poses. Our gradient-based formulation leads to more informative sensing trajectories, while avoiding occlusions and collisions. The proposed method is demonstrated in simulated and real-world experiments in 2-D and 3-D environments.
abstract_zh: 主动映射的问题旨在在有限的预算（例如行驶距离）的情况下规划一系列信息丰富的感知视图。本文考虑使用距离传感器（例如激光雷达或深度相机）进行主动占用网格映射。最先进的方法优化了将占用网格概率与距离传感器测量结果相关的信息论测量。网格表示内光线追踪的非平滑性质使得目标函数不可微分，迫使现有方法在候选轨迹的离散空间上进行搜索。这项工作提出了网格图和基于射线的观测之间的香农互信息的可微近似，该近似能够在 SE(3) 传感器位姿的连续空间中进行梯度上升优化。我们基于梯度的公式可以产生更多信息的传感轨迹，同时避免遮挡和碰撞。所提出的方法在 2D 和 3D 环境中的模拟和现实实验中得到了证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过连续SE(3)轨迹的香农互信息梯度上升优化实现主动映射的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有主动映射方法因网格表示中的射线追踪非光滑特性，导致目标函数不可微，被迫在离散轨迹空间搜索，限制了优化效率与轨迹质量。
AI.method: 提出香农互信息的可微分近似，将网格地图与基于射线的观测之间的互信息转化为连续SE(3)空间中的可微函数，通过梯度上升法优化传感器位姿轨迹。
AI.result: 在2D和3D仿真及真实环境中验证了方法有效性，生成的轨迹更具信息量且能避免遮挡与碰撞。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过连续空间优化突破了传统离散搜索限制，为高维主动映射提供了更高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

method: 提出香农互信息的可微分近似，将网格地图与基于射线的观测之间的互信息转化为连续SE(3)空间中的可微函数，通过梯度上升法优化传感器位姿轨迹。
result: 在2D和3D仿真及真实环境中验证了方法有效性，生成的轨迹更具信息量且能避免遮挡与碰撞。
conclusion: 该方法通过连续空间优化突破了传统离散搜索限制，为高维主动映射提供了更高效且鲁棒的解决方案。
search_text: Active Mapping via Gradient Ascent Optimization of Shannon Mutual Information over Continuous SE(3) Trajectories 通过连续 SE(3) 轨迹上香农互信息的梯度上升优化进行主动映射 The problem of active mapping aims to plan an informative sequence of sensing views given a limited budget such as distance traveled. This paper consider active occupancy grid mapping using a range sensor, such as LiDAR or depth camera. State-of-the-art methods optimize information-theoretic measures relating the occupancy grid probabilities with the range sensor measurements. The non-smooth nature of ray-tracing within a grid representation makes the objective function non-differentiable, forcing existing methods to search over a discrete space of candidate trajectories. This work proposes a differentiable approximation of the Shannon mutual information between a grid map and ray-based observations that enables gradient ascent optimization in the continuous space of SE(3) sensor poses. Our gradient-based formulation leads to more informative sensing trajectories, while avoiding occlusions and collisions. The proposed method is demonstrated in simulated and real-world experiments in 2-D and 3-D environments. 主动映射的问题旨在在有限的预算（例如行驶距离）的情况下规划一系列信息丰富的感知视图。本文考虑使用距离传感器（例如激光雷达或深度相机）进行主动占用网格映射。最先进的方法优化了将占用网格概率与距离传感器测量结果相关的信息论测量。网格表示内光线追踪的非平滑性质使得目标函数不可微分，迫使现有方法在候选轨迹的离散空间上进行搜索。这项工作提出了网格图和基于射线的观测之间的香农互信息的可微近似，该近似能够在 SE(3) 传感器位姿的连续空间中进行梯度上升优化。我们基于梯度的公式可以产生更多信息的传感轨迹，同时避免遮挡和碰撞。所提出的方法在 2D 和 3D 环境中的模拟和现实实验中得到了证明。 本文提出了一种通过连续SE(3)轨迹的香农互信息梯度上升优化实现主动映射的方法。 Arash Asgharivaskasi,Shumon Koga,Nikolay Atanasov cs.RO

authors_text: Max Winkelmann,Constantin Vasconi,Steffen Müller
title: Transfer Importance Sampling -- How Testing Automated Vehicles in Multiple Test Setups Helps With the Bias-Variance Tradeoff
title_zh: 转移重要性采样——在多个测试设置中测试自动驾驶汽车如何帮助实现偏差-方差权衡
abstract: The promise of increased road safety is a key motivator for the development of automated vehicles (AV). Yet, demonstrating that an AV is as safe as, or even safer than, a human-driven vehicle has proven to be challenging. Should an AV be examined purely virtually, allowing large numbers of fully controllable tests? Or should it be tested under real environmental conditions on a proving ground? Since different test setups have different strengths and weaknesses, it is still an open question how virtual and real tests should be combined. On the way to answer this question, this paper proposes transfer importance sampling (TIS), a risk estimation method linking different test setups. Fusing the concepts of transfer learning and importance sampling, TIS uses a scalable, cost-effective test setup to comprehensively explore an AV's behavior. The insights gained then allow parameterizing tests in a more trustworthy test setup accurately reflecting risks. We show that when using a trustworthy test setup alone is prohibitively expensive, linking it to a scalable test setup can increase efficiency $\unicode{x2013}$ without sacrificing the result's validity. Thus, the test setups' individual deficiencies are compensated for by their systematic linkage.
summary: The promise of increased road safety is a key motivator for the development of automated vehicles (AV). Yet, demonstrating that an AV is as safe as, or even safer than, a human-driven vehicle has proven to be challenging. Should an AV be examined purely virtually, allowing large numbers of fully controllable tests? Or should it be tested under real environmental conditions on a proving ground? Since different test setups have different strengths and weaknesses, it is still an open question how virtual and real tests should be combined. On the way to answer this question, this paper proposes transfer importance sampling (TIS), a risk estimation method linking different test setups. Fusing the concepts of transfer learning and importance sampling, TIS uses a scalable, cost-effective test setup to comprehensively explore an AV's behavior. The insights gained then allow parameterizing tests in a more trustworthy test setup accurately reflecting risks. We show that when using a trustworthy test setup alone is prohibitively expensive, linking it to a scalable test setup can increase efficiency $\unicode{x2013}$ without sacrificing the result's validity. Thus, the test setups' individual deficiencies are compensated for by their systematic linkage.
abstract_zh: 提高道路安全性的承诺是自动驾驶汽车（AV）发展的关键动力。然而，证明自动驾驶汽车与人类驾驶车辆一样安全，甚至比人类驾驶车辆更安全，已被证明具有挑战性。是否应该纯粹虚拟地检查自动驾驶汽车，从而允许进行大量完全可控的测试？还是应该在试验场的真实环境条件下进行测试？由于不同的测试设置有不同的优点和缺点，因此如何将虚拟测试和真实测试结合起来仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。为了回答这个问题，本文提出了转移重要性抽样（TIS），这是一种连接不同测试设置的风险估计方法。 TIS 融合了迁移学习和重要性采样的概念，使用可扩展、经济高效的测试设置来全面探索 AV 的行为。然后，获得的见解允许在更值得信赖的测试设置中对测试进行参数化，从而准确地反映风险。我们表明，当单独使用值得信赖的测试设置过于昂贵时，将其链接到可扩展的测试设置可以提高效率 $\unicode{x2013}$ 而不会牺牲结果的有效性。因此，测试装置的个体缺陷可以通过它们的系统联系来弥补。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种称为转移重要性抽样（TIS）的风险评估方法，通过结合虚拟和现实测试环境来优化自动驾驶车辆（AV）的安全性验证。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆的安全性验证面临虚拟测试与现实测试的权衡问题：纯虚拟测试成本低但缺乏现实性，而现实测试成本高且受限。需解决如何有效结合不同测试环境以兼顾效率与准确性。
AI.method: 融合迁移学习与重要性抽样，利用可扩展的低成本测试环境（如虚拟仿真）全面探索AV行为，再将所得洞察应用于更可信的现实测试环境以精准评估风险。
AI.result: TIS方法在可信测试环境成本过高时，通过与可扩展环境的系统性结合，显著提升了测试效率，同时保持结果有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统性链接不同测试环境的缺陷，TIS方法为自动驾驶车辆的风险评估提供了兼顾效率与可信度的解决方案，优化了偏差-方差权衡。

authors_text: Vitor Guizilini,Rares Ambrus,Dian Chen,Sergey Zakharov,Adrien Gaidon
title: Multi-Frame Self-Supervised Depth with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 的多帧自监督深度
abstract: Multi-frame depth estimation improves over single-frame approaches by also leveraging geometric relationships between images via feature matching, in addition to learning appearance-based features. In this paper we revisit feature matching for self-supervised monocular depth estimation, and propose a novel transformer architecture for cost volume generation. We use depth-discretized epipolar sampling to select matching candidates, and refine predictions through a series of self- and cross-attention layers. These layers sharpen the matching probability between pixel features, improving over standard similarity metrics prone to ambiguities and local minima. The refined cost volume is decoded into depth estimates, and the whole pipeline is trained end-to-end from videos using only a photometric objective. Experiments on the KITTI and DDAD datasets show that our DepthFormer architecture establishes a new state of the art in self-supervised monocular depth estimation, and is even competitive with highly specialized supervised single-frame architectures. We also show that our learned cross-attention network yields representations transferable across datasets, increasing the effectiveness of pre-training strategies. Project page: https://sites.google.com/tri.global/depthformer
summary: Multi-frame depth estimation improves over single-frame approaches by also leveraging geometric relationships between images via feature matching, in addition to learning appearance-based features. In this paper we revisit feature matching for self-supervised monocular depth estimation, and propose a novel transformer architecture for cost volume generation. We use depth-discretized epipolar sampling to select matching candidates, and refine predictions through a series of self- and cross-attention layers. These layers sharpen the matching probability between pixel features, improving over standard similarity metrics prone to ambiguities and local minima. The refined cost volume is decoded into depth estimates, and the whole pipeline is trained end-to-end from videos using only a photometric objective. Experiments on the KITTI and DDAD datasets show that our DepthFormer architecture establishes a new state of the art in self-supervised monocular depth estimation, and is even competitive with highly specialized supervised single-frame architectures. We also show that our learned cross-attention network yields representations transferable across datasets, increasing the effectiveness of pre-training strategies. Project page: https://sites.google.com/tri.global/depthformer
abstract_zh: 除了学习基于外观的特征之外，多帧深度估计还通过特征匹配利用图像之间的几何关系，从而比单帧方法有所改进。在本文中，我们重新审视了自监督单目深度估计的特征匹配，并提出了一种用于成本量生成的新型变压器架构。我们使用深度离散极线采样来选择匹配候选者，并通过一系列自注意力和交叉注意力层来完善预测。这些层锐化了像素特征之间的匹配概率，改进了容易出现歧义和局部最小值的标准相似性度量。精炼的成本量被解码为深度估计，并且整个管道仅使用光度目标从视频进行端到端训练。 KITTI 和 DDAD 数据集上的实验表明，我们的 DepthFormer 架构在自监督单目深度估计方面建立了新的技术水平，甚至可以与高度专业化的监督单帧架构竞争。我们还表明，我们学习的交叉注意力网络产生了可跨数据集转移的表示，从而提高了预训练策略的有效性。项目页面：https://sites.google.com/tri.global/depthformer

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的多帧自监督单目深度估计方法，通过改进特征匹配和成本体积生成，提升深度预测精度。
AI.motivation: 传统单帧自监督深度估计方法依赖相似度度量易受歧义和局部最优影响，而多帧方法可通过几何关系提升性能，但现有方法在特征匹配和成本体积优化上仍有不足。
AI.method: 设计DepthFormer架构，采用深度离散化极线采样选择匹配候选，通过自注意力和交叉注意力层优化成本体积，结合光度目标端到端训练，生成深度估计。
AI.result: 在KITTI和DDAD数据集上达到自监督单目深度估计新SOTA，性能接近专业监督单帧模型，并证明跨数据集可迁移的特征表示有效性。
AI.conclusion: DepthFormer通过Transformer优化特征匹配和成本体积生成，显著提升自监督深度估计性能，同时增强预训练模型的跨数据集适应能力。
