In this paper we revisit feature matching for self-supervised monocular depth estimation, and propose a novel transformer architecture for cost volume generation. We use depth-discretized epipolar sampling to select matching candidates, and refine predictions through a series of self- and cross-attention layers. These layers sharpen the matching probability between pixel features, improving over standard similarity metrics prone to ambiguities and local minima. The refined cost volume is decoded into depth estimates, and the whole pipeline is trained end-to-end from videos using only a photometric objective. Experiments on the KITTI and DDAD datasets show that our DepthFormer architecture establishes a new state of the art in self-supervised monocular depth estimation, and is even competitive with highly specialized supervised single-frame architectures. We also show that our learned cross-attention network yields representations transferable across datasets, increasing the effectiveness of pre-training strategies. Project page: https://sites.google.com/tri.global/depthformer 除了学习基于外观的特征之外，多帧深度估计还通过特征匹配利用图像之间的几何关系，从而比单帧方法有所改进。在本文中，我们重新审视了自监督单目深度估计的特征匹配，并提出了一种用于成本量生成的新型变压器架构。我们使用深度离散极线采样来选择匹配候选者，并通过一系列自注意力和交叉注意力层来完善预测。这些层锐化了像素特征之间的匹配概率，改进了容易出现歧义和局部最小值的标准相似性度量。精炼的成本量被解码为深度估计，并且整个管道仅使用光度目标从视频进行端到端训练。 KITTI 和 DDAD 数据集上的实验表明，我们的 DepthFormer 架构在自监督单目深度估计方面建立了新的技术水平，甚至可以与高度专业化的监督单帧架构竞争。我们还表明，我们学习的交叉注意力网络产生了可跨数据集转移的表示，从而提高了预训练策略的有效性。项目页面：https://sites.google.com/tri.global/depthformer 本文提出一种基于Transformer的多帧自监督单目深度估计方法，通过改进特征匹配和成本体积生成，提升深度预测精度。 Vitor Guizilini,Rares Ambrus,Dian Chen,Sergey Zakharov,Adrien Gaidon cs.CV

authors_text: Azade Farshad,Yousef Yeganeh,Peter Gehlbach,Nassir Navab
title: Y-Net: A Spatiospectral Dual-Encoder Networkfor Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: Y-Net：用于医学图像分割的空间谱双编码器网络
abstract: Automated segmentation of retinal optical coherence tomography (OCT) images has become an important recent direction in machine learning for medical applications. We hypothesize that the anatomic structure of layers and their high-frequency variation in OCT images make retinal OCT a fitting choice for extracting spectral-domain features and combining them with spatial domain features. In this work, we present $Υ$-Net, an architecture that combines the frequency domain features with the image domain to improve the segmentation performance of OCT images. The results of this work demonstrate that the introduction of two branches, one for spectral and one for spatial domain features, brings a very significant improvement in fluid segmentation performance and allows outperformance as compared to the well-known U-Net model. Our improvement was 13% on the fluid segmentation dice score and 1.9% on the average dice score. Finally, removing selected frequency ranges in the spectral domain demonstrates the impact of these features on the fluid segmentation outperformance.
summary: Automated segmentation of retinal optical coherence tomography (OCT) images has become an important recent direction in machine learning for medical applications. We hypothesize that the anatomic structure of layers and their high-frequency variation in OCT images make retinal OCT a fitting choice for extracting spectral-domain features and combining them with spatial domain features. In this work, we present $Υ$-Net, an architecture that combines the frequency domain features with the image domain to improve the segmentation performance of OCT images. The results of this work demonstrate that the introduction of two branches, one for spectral and one for spatial domain features, brings a very significant improvement in fluid segmentation performance and allows outperformance as compared to the well-known U-Net model. Our improvement was 13% on the fluid segmentation dice score and 1.9% on the average dice score. Finally, removing selected frequency ranges in the spectral domain demonstrates the impact of these features on the fluid segmentation outperformance.
abstract_zh: 视网膜光学相干断层扫描（OCT）图像的自动分割已成为医疗应用机器学习的一个重要方向。我们假设 OCT 图像中各层的解剖结构及其高频变化使视网膜 OCT 成为提取谱域特征并将其与空间域特征相结合的合适选择。在这项工作中，我们提出了 $Y$-Net，一种将频域特征与图像域相结合的架构，以提高 OCT 图像的分割性能。这项工作的结果表明，引入两个分支（一个用于光谱特征，一个用于空间域特征），为流体分割性能带来了非常显着的改进，并且与众所周知的 U-Net 模型相比，性能更加出色。我们的流体分割骰子得分提高了 13%，平均骰子得分提高了 1.9%。最后，删除谱域中选定的频率范围证明了这些特征对流体分割性能的影响。

AI.tldr: 提出Y-Net网络，结合频域与空域特征提升OCT图像分割性能
AI.motivation: OCT图像的层结构和高频变化适合提取频域特征，结合空域特征可提升分割效果
AI.method: 设计双分支网络，分别提取频域和空域特征并融合，改进U-Net结构
AI.result: 流体分割Dice分数提升13%，平均Dice分数提升1.9%
AI.conclusion: 频域特征有效提升分割性能，验证了Y-Net的有效性

authors_text: Jennafer S. Roberts,Laura N. Montoya
title: Contextualizing Artificially Intelligent Morality: A Meta-Ethnography of Top-Down, Bottom-Up, and Hybrid Models for Theoretical and Applied Ethics in Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 人工智能道德的语境化：人工智能理论和应用伦理学的自上而下、自下而上和混合模型的元民族志
comment: 22 pages, 4 tables, accepted for publication in the Future of Information and Communication Conference (FICC) 2023 proceedings will be published in Springer series "Lecture Notes in Networks and Systems" and submitted for consideration to Web of Science, SCOPUS, INSPEC, WTI Frankfurt eG, zbMATH and SCImago
comments: 22 pages, 4 tables, accepted for publication in the Future of Information and Communication Conference (FICC) 2023 proceedings will be published in Springer series "Lecture Notes in Networks and Systems" and submitted for consideration to Web of Science, SCOPUS, INSPEC, WTI Frankfurt eG, zbMATH and SCImago
abstract: In this meta-ethnography, we explore three different angles of ethical artificial intelligence (AI) design implementation including the philosophical ethical viewpoint, the technical perspective, and framing through a political lens. Our qualitative research includes a literature review that highlights the cross-referencing of these angles by discussing the value and drawbacks of contrastive top-down, bottom-up, and hybrid approaches previously published. The novel contribution to this framework is the political angle, which constitutes ethics in AI either being determined by corporations and governments and imposed through policies or law (coming from the top), or ethics being called for by the people (coming from the bottom), as well as top-down, bottom-up, and hybrid technicalities of how AI is developed within a moral construct and in consideration of its users, with expected and unexpected consequences and long-term impact in the world. There is a focus on reinforcement learning as an example of a bottom-up applied technical approach and AI ethics principles as a practical top-down approach. This investigation includes real-world case studies to impart a global perspective, as well as philosophical debate on the ethics of AI and theoretical future thought experimentation based on historical facts, current world circumstances, and possible ensuing realities.
summary: In this meta-ethnography, we explore three different angles of ethical artificial intelligence (AI) design implementation including the philosophical ethical viewpoint, the technical perspective, and framing through a political lens. Our qualitative research includes a literature review that highlights the cross-referencing of these angles by discussing the value and drawbacks of contrastive top-down, bottom-up, and hybrid approaches previously published. The novel contribution to this framework is the political angle, which constitutes ethics in AI either being determined by corporations and governments and imposed through policies or law (coming from the top), or ethics being called for by the people (coming from the bottom), as well as top-down, bottom-up, and hybrid technicalities of how AI is developed within a moral construct and in consideration of its users, with expected and unexpected consequences and long-term impact in the world. There is a focus on reinforcement learning as an example of a bottom-up applied technical approach and AI ethics principles as a practical top-down approach. This investigation includes real-world case studies to impart a global perspective, as well as philosophical debate on the ethics of AI and theoretical future thought experimentation based on historical facts, current world circumstances, and possible ensuing realities.
abstract_zh: 在这个元民族志中，我们探索了道德人工智能（AI）设计实施的三个不同角度，包括哲学伦理观点、技术视角和政治视角的框架。我们的定性研究包括文献综述，通过讨论先前发表的对比自上而下、自下而上和混合方法的价值和缺点，强调这些角度的交叉引用。该框架的新颖贡献是政治角度，它构成了人工智能中的道德规范，要么由企业和政府决定，并通过政策或法律（来自顶层）强加，要么由人民呼吁的道德规范（来自底层），以及自上而下、自下而上和混合的技术细节，说明人工智能如何在道德结构内开发并考虑到其用户，对世界产生预期和意外的后果和长期影响。重点关注强化学习作为自下而上的应用技术方法的例子，以及人工智能伦理原则作为实用的自上而下的方法。这项调查包括传授全球视角的现实世界案例研究，以及基于历史事实、当前世界环境和可能发生的现实的人工智能伦理的哲学辩论和理论未来思想实验。

AI.tldr: 本文通过元民族志方法，探讨人工智能伦理设计中的自上而下、自下而上及混合模型，结合哲学、技术与政治视角进行分析。
AI.motivation: 现有AI伦理研究缺乏对政治视角与技术实现路径的系统整合，需通过跨学科分析明确不同伦理框架的适用性与局限性。
AI.method: 采用元民族志方法，结合文献综述、案例研究及哲学思辨，对比分析自上而下（如伦理原则）、自下而上（如强化学习）及混合模型的理论与实践差异。
AI.result: 揭示政治力量对AI伦理的塑造作用，指出自上而下模式易受权力结构影响，自下而上模式存在技术伦理盲区，混合模型需平衡多方利益与动态调整。
AI.conclusion: AI伦理需融合政治、技术与哲学视角，通过动态混合模型应对复杂社会影响，未来研究应关注伦理框架的实践适应性与全球协作机制。

authors_text: Odd Erik Gundersen,Kevin Coakley,Christine Kirkpatrick,Yolanda Gil
title: Sources of Irreproducibility in Machine Learning: A Review
title_zh: 机器学习不可重复性的来源：回顾
abstract: Background: Many published machine learning studies are irreproducible. Issues with methodology and not properly accounting for variation introduced by the algorithm themselves or their implementations are attributed as the main contributors to the irreproducibility.Problem: There exist no theoretical framework that relates experiment design choices to potential effects on the conclusions. Without such a framework, it is much harder for practitioners and researchers to evaluate experiment results and describe the limitations of experiments. The lack of such a framework also makes it harder for independent researchers to systematically attribute the causes of failed reproducibility experiments. Objective: The objective of this paper is to develop a framework that enable applied data science practitioners and researchers to understand which experiment design choices can lead to false findings and how and by this help in analyzing the conclusions of reproducibility experiments. Method: We have compiled an extensive list of factors reported in the literature that can lead to machine learning studies being irreproducible. These factors are organized and categorized in a reproducibility framework motivated by the stages of the scientific method. The factors are analyzed for how they can affect the conclusions drawn from experiments. A model comparison study is used as an example. Conclusion: We provide a framework that describes machine learning methodology from experimental design decisions to the conclusions inferred from them.
summary: Background: Many published machine learning studies are irreproducible. Issues with methodology and not properly accounting for variation introduced by the algorithm themselves or their implementations are attributed as the main contributors to the irreproducibility.Problem: There exist no theoretical framework that relates experiment design choices to potential effects on the conclusions. Without such a framework, it is much harder for practitioners and researchers to evaluate experiment results and describe the limitations of experiments. The lack of such a framework also makes it harder for independent researchers to systematically attribute the causes of failed reproducibility experiments. Objective: The objective of this paper is to develop a framework that enable applied data science practitioners and researchers to understand which experiment design choices can lead to false findings and how and by this help in analyzing the conclusions of reproducibility experiments. Method: We have compiled an extensive list of factors reported in the literature that can lead to machine learning studies being irreproducible. These factors are organized and categorized in a reproducibility framework motivated by the stages of the scientific method. The factors are analyzed for how they can affect the conclusions drawn from experiments. A model comparison study is used as an example. Conclusion: We provide a framework that describes machine learning methodology from experimental design decisions to the conclusions inferred from them.
abstract_zh: 背景：许多已发表的机器学习研究是不可重复的。方法论问题以及没有正确考虑算法本身或其实现引入的变化被认为是不可重复性的主要原因。问题：不存在将实验设计选择与对结论的潜在影响联系起来的理论框架。如果没有这样的框架，实践者和研究人员就很难评估实验结果并描述实验的局限性。缺乏这样的框架也使得独立研究人员更难系统地归因重复性实验失败的原因。目的：本文的目的是开发一个框架，使应用数据科学从业者和研究人员能够了解哪些实验设计选择可能导致错误的结果，以及如何以及通过此帮助分析可重复性实验的结论。方法：我们整理了文献中报告的一系列可能导致机器学习研究不可重复的因素。这些因素在受科学方法阶段启发的可重复性框架中进行组织和分类。分析这些因素如何影响实验得出的结论。以模型比较研究为例。结论：我们提供了一个框架，描述了从实验设计决策到从中推断出的结论的机器学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在构建一个框架，以识别机器学习研究中导致不可重复性的实验设计因素，并分析这些因素如何影响实验结论。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏理论框架将实验设计选择与结论的潜在影响联系起来，导致从业者和研究人员难以评估实验结果及独立复现失败的原因。
AI.method: 通过整理文献中报告的不可重复性因素，按科学方法阶段分类，分析其对实验结论的影响，并以模型比较研究为例进行验证。
AI.result: 提出了一个从实验设计到结论推断的机器学习方法论框架，明确了关键设计选择对结果可靠性的影响路径。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为理解机器学习实验的不可重复性根源提供了系统性工具，有助于改进实验设计和结果解释。

search_text: Sources of Irreproducibility in Machine Learning: A Review 机器学习不可重复性的来源：回顾 Background: Many published machine learning studies are irreproducible. Issues with methodology and not properly accounting for variation introduced by the algorithm themselves or their implementations are attributed as the main contributors to the irreproducibility.Problem: There exist no theoretical framework that relates experiment design choices to potential effects on the conclusions. Without such a framework, it is much harder for practitioners and researchers to evaluate experiment results and describe the limitations of experiments. The lack of such a framework also makes it harder for independent researchers to systematically attribute the causes of failed reproducibility experiments. Objective: The objective of this paper is to develop a framework that enable applied data science practitioners and researchers to understand which experiment design choices can lead to false findings and how and by this help in analyzing the conclusions of reproducibility experiments. Method: We have compiled an extensive list of factors reported in the literature that can lead to machine learning studies being irreproducible. These factors are organized and categorized in a reproducibility framework motivated by the stages of the scientific method. The factors are analyzed for how they can affect the conclusions drawn from experiments. A model comparison study is used as an example. Conclusion: We provide a framework that describes machine learning methodology from experimental design decisions to the conclusions inferred from them. 背景：许多已发表的机器学习研究是不可重复的。方法论问题以及没有正确考虑算法本身或其实现引入的变化被认为是不可重复性的主要原因。问题：不存在将实验设计选择与对结论的潜在影响联系起来的理论框架。如果没有这样的框架，实践者和研究人员就很难评估实验结果并描述实验的局限性。缺乏这样的框架也使得独立研究人员更难系统地归因重复性实验失败的原因。目的：本文的目的是开发一个框架，使应用数据科学从业者和研究人员能够了解哪些实验设计选择可能导致错误的结果，以及如何以及通过此帮助分析可重复性实验的结论。方法：我们整理了文献中报告的一系列可能导致机器学习研究不可重复的因素。这些因素在受科学方法阶段启发的可重复性框架中进行组织和分类。分析这些因素如何影响实验得出的结论。以模型比较研究为例。结论：我们提供了一个框架，描述了从实验设计决策到从中推断出的结论的机器学习方法。 本文旨在构建一个框架，以识别机器学习研究中导致不可重复性的实验设计因素，并分析这些因素如何影响实验结论。 Odd Erik Gundersen,Kevin Coakley,Christine Kirkpatrick,Yolanda Gil cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Oleh Shliazhko,Alena Fenogenova,Maria Tikhonova,Vladislav Mikhailov,Anastasia Kozlova,Tatiana Shavrina
title: mGPT: Few-Shot Learners Go Multilingual
title_zh: mGPT：少样本学习者多语言
comment: Accepted for publication at Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics (TACL) To be presented at the Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2023)
comments: Accepted for publication at Transactions of the Association for Computational Linguistics (TACL) To be presented at the Conference on Empirical Methods in Natural Language Processing (EMNLP 2023)
abstract: Recent studies report that autoregressive language models can successfully solve many NLP tasks via zero- and few-shot learning paradigms, which opens up new possibilities for using the pre-trained language models. This paper introduces two autoregressive GPT-like models with 1.3 billion and 13 billion parameters trained on 60 languages from 25 language families using Wikipedia and Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus. We reproduce the GPT-3 architecture using GPT-2 sources and the sparse attention mechanism; Deepspeed and Megatron frameworks allow us to parallelize the training and inference steps effectively. The resulting models show performance on par with the recently released XGLM models by Facebook, covering more languages and enhancing NLP possibilities for low resource languages of CIS countries and Russian small nations. We detail the motivation for the choices of the architecture design, thoroughly describe the data preparation pipeline, and train five small versions of the model to choose the most optimal multilingual tokenization strategy. We measure the model perplexity in all covered languages and evaluate it on the wide spectre of multilingual tasks, including classification, generative, sequence labeling and knowledge probing. The models were evaluated with the zero-shot and few-shot methods. Furthermore, we compared the classification tasks with the state-of-the-art multilingual model XGLM. source code and the mGPT XL model are publicly released.
summary: Recent studies report that autoregressive language models can successfully solve many NLP tasks via zero- and few-shot learning paradigms, which opens up new possibilities for using the pre-trained language models. This paper introduces two autoregressive GPT-like models with 1.3 billion and 13 billion parameters trained on 60 languages from 25 language families using Wikipedia and Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus. We reproduce the GPT-3 architecture using GPT-2 sources and the sparse attention mechanism; Deepspeed and Megatron frameworks allow us to parallelize the training and inference steps effectively. The resulting models show performance on par with the recently released XGLM models by Facebook, covering more languages and enhancing NLP possibilities for low resource languages of CIS countries and Russian small nations. We detail the motivation for the choices of the architecture design, thoroughly describe the data preparation pipeline, and train five small versions of the model to choose the most optimal multilingual tokenization strategy. We measure the model perplexity in all covered languages and evaluate it on the wide spectre of multilingual tasks, including classification, generative, sequence labeling and knowledge probing. The models were evaluated with the zero-shot and few-shot methods. Furthermore, we compared the classification tasks with the state-of-the-art multilingual model XGLM. source code and the mGPT XL model are publicly released.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，自回归语言模型可以通过零样本和少样本学习范式成功解决许多 NLP 任务，这为使用预训练语言模型开辟了新的可能性。本文介绍了两种类似 GPT 的自回归模型，分别使用 Wikipedia 和 Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus 对 25 个语系的 60 种语言进行了训练，分别具有 13 亿和 130 亿个参数。我们使用 GPT-2 源和稀疏注意力机制重现 GPT-3 架构； Deepspeed 和 Megatron 框架使我们能够有效地并行训练和推理步骤。由此产生的模型表现出与 Facebook 最近发布的 XGLM 模型相当的性能，涵盖了更多语言，并增强了独联体国家和俄罗斯小国家资源匮乏语言的 NLP 可能性。我们详细说明了选择架构设计的动机，彻底描述了数据准备流程，并训练了模型的五个小版本以选择最佳的多语言标记化策略。我们测量所有涵盖语言的模型困惑度，并在多语言任务的广泛范围内对其进行评估，包括分类、生成、序列标记和知识探索。使用零样本和少样本方法评估模型。此外，我们将分类任务与最先进的多语言模型 XGLM 进行了比较。源代码和 mGPT XL 模型已公开发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于GPT架构的多语言模型mGPT，通过少量样本学习解决多种自然语言处理任务。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示自回归语言模型可通过零样本和少样本学习解决NLP任务，但需针对多语言场景优化，尤其提升低资源语言的处理能力。
AI.method: 基于GPT-3架构与稀疏注意力机制，使用维基百科和Colossal Clean Crawled Corpus训练60种语言模型，结合Deepspeed和Megatron框架实现高效并行训练，并通过多版本模型对比选择最佳分词策略。
AI.result: 模型性能与Facebook的XGLM相当，覆盖更多语言，显著提升中亚及俄罗斯小语种等低资源语言的NLP任务表现，开源代码及XL模型。
AI.conclusion: mGPT验证了少样本学习在多语言场景的有效性，为低资源语言的自然语言处理提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Daisuke Niizumi,Daiki Takeuchi,Yasunori Ohishi,Noboru Harada,Kunio Kashino
title: BYOL for Audio: Exploring Pre-trained General-purpose Audio Representations
title_zh: 音频的 BYOL：探索预先训练的通用音频表示
comment: 15 pages, 6 figures, and 15 tables. Under the review process
comments: 15 pages, 6 figures, and 15 tables. Under the review process
abstract: Pre-trained models are essential as feature extractors in modern machine learning systems in various domains. In this study, we hypothesize that representations effective for general audio tasks should provide multiple aspects of robust features of the input sound. For recognizing sounds regardless of perturbations such as varying pitch or timbre, features should be robust to these perturbations. For serving the diverse needs of tasks such as recognition of emotions or music genres, representations should provide multiple aspects of information, such as local and global features. To implement our principle, we propose a self-supervised learning method: Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) for Audio (BYOL-A, pronounced "viola"). BYOL-A pre-trains representations of the input sound invariant to audio data augmentations, which makes the learned representations robust to the perturbations of sounds. Whereas the BYOL-A encoder combines local and global features and calculates their statistics to make the representation provide multi-aspect information. As a result, the learned representations should provide robust and multi-aspect information to serve various needs of diverse tasks. We evaluated the general audio task performance of BYOL-A compared to previous state-of-the-art methods, and BYOL-A demonstrated generalizability with the best average result of 72.4% and the best VoxCeleb1 result of 57.6%. Extensive ablation experiments revealed that the BYOL-A encoder architecture contributes to most performance, and the final critical portion resorts to the BYOL framework and BYOL-A augmentations. Our code is available online at https://github.com/nttcslab/byol-a for future studies.

To implement our principle, we propose a self-supervised learning method: Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) for Audio (BYOL-A, pronounced "viola"). BYOL-A pre-trains representations of the input sound invariant to audio data augmentations, which makes the learned representations robust to the perturbations of sounds. Whereas the BYOL-A encoder combines local and global features and calculates their statistics to make the representation provide multi-aspect information. As a result, the learned representations should provide robust and multi-aspect information to serve various needs of diverse tasks. We evaluated the general audio task performance of BYOL-A compared to previous state-of-the-art methods, and BYOL-A demonstrated generalizability with the best average result of 72.4% and the best VoxCeleb1 result of 57.6%. Extensive ablation experiments revealed that the BYOL-A encoder architecture contributes to most performance, and the final critical portion resorts to the BYOL framework and BYOL-A augmentations. Our code is available online at https://github.com/nttcslab/byol-a for future studies.
abstract_zh: 预训练模型作为各个领域的现代机器学习系统中的特征提取器至关重要。在本研究中，我们假设对一般音频任务有效的表示应该提供输入声音的鲁棒特征的多个方面。为了识别声音，而不管音调或音色变化等扰动如何，特征应该对这些扰动具有鲁棒性。为了满足任务的不同需求，例如情感或音乐流派的识别，表示应该提供多个方面的信息，例如局部和全局特征。为了实现我们的原则，我们提出了一种自我监督的学习方法：Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) for Audio（BYOL-A，发音为“viola”）。 BYOL-A 预训练对音频数据增强不变的输入声音的表示，这使得学习到的表示对于声音的扰动具有鲁棒性。而 BYOL-A 编码器结合了局部和全局特征并计算它们的统计数据以使表示提供多方面信息。因此，学习到的表示应该提供强大且多方面的信息，以满足不同任务的各种需求。我们与之前最先进的方法相比，评估了 BYOL-A 的一般音频任务性能，BYOL-A 展示了通用性，最佳平均结果为 72.4%，最佳 VoxCeleb1 结果为 57.6%。广泛的消融实验表明，BYOL-A 编码器架构对大部分性能有贡献，最后的关键部分依赖于 BYOL 框架和 BYOL-A 增强。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/nttcslab/byol-a 在线获取，以供将来研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督学习方法BYOL-A，用于生成鲁棒且多方面的通用音频表示，以提升音频任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 预训练模型作为特征提取器在多个领域至关重要，但现有方法在音频任务中面临鲁棒性和多方面信息提取的挑战，需设计能适应不同扰动并提供局部与全局信息的表示。
AI.method: 基于BYOL框架，提出BYOL-A方法，通过音频数据增强生成不变表示，结合局部与全局特征统计以提供多维度信息，并通过编码器架构优化提升性能。
AI.result: BYOL-A在通用音频任务中取得最佳平均72.4%和VoxCeleb1任务57.6%的准确率，消融实验证明编码器架构和增强策略是性能关键。
AI.conclusion: BYOL-A通过自监督学习有效生成鲁棒且多方面的音频表示，验证了其在多样化任务中的通用性和优越性。

search_text: BYOL for Audio: Exploring Pre-trained General-purpose Audio Representations 音频的 BYOL：探索预先训练的通用音频表示 Pre-trained models are essential as feature extractors in modern machine learning systems in various domains. In this study, we hypothesize that representations effective for general audio tasks should provide multiple aspects of robust features of the input sound. For recognizing sounds regardless of perturbations such as varying pitch or timbre, features should be robust to these perturbations. For serving the diverse needs of tasks such as recognition of emotions or music genres, representations should provide multiple aspects of information, such as local and global features. To implement our principle, we propose a self-supervised learning method: Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) for Audio (BYOL-A, pronounced "viola"). BYOL-A pre-trains representations of the input sound invariant to audio data augmentations, which makes the learned representations robust to the perturbations of sounds. Whereas the BYOL-A encoder combines local and global features and calculates their statistics to make the representation provide multi-aspect information. As a result, the learned representations should provide robust and multi-aspect information to serve various needs of diverse tasks. We evaluated the general audio task performance of BYOL-A compared to previous state-of-the-art methods, and BYOL-A demonstrated generalizability with the best average result of 72.4% and the best VoxCeleb1 result of 57.6%. Extensive ablation experiments revealed that the BYOL-A encoder architecture contributes to most performance, and the final critical portion resorts to the BYOL framework and BYOL-A augmentations. Our code is available online at https://github.com/nttcslab/byol-a for future studies. 预训练模型作为各个领域的现代机器学习系统中的特征提取器至关重要。在本研究中，我们假设对一般音频任务有效的表示应该提供输入声音的鲁棒特征的多个方面。为了识别声音，而不管音调或音色变化等扰动如何，特征应该对这些扰动具有鲁棒性。为了满足任务的不同需求，例如情感或音乐流派的识别，表示应该提供多个方面的信息，例如局部和全局特征。为了实现我们的原则，我们提出了一种自我监督的学习方法：Bootstrap Your Own Latent (BYOL) for Audio（BYOL-A，发音为“viola”）。 BYOL-A 预训练对音频数据增强不变的输入声音的表示，这使得学习到的表示对于声音的扰动具有鲁棒性。而 BYOL-A 编码器结合了局部和全局特征并计算它们的统计数据以使表示提供多方面信息。因此，学习到的表示应该提供强大且多方面的信息，以满足不同任务的各种需求。我们与之前最先进的方法相比，评估了 BYOL-A 的一般音频任务性能，BYOL-A 展示了通用性，最佳平均结果为 72.4%，最佳 VoxCeleb1 结果为 57.6%。广泛的消融实验表明，BYOL-A 编码器架构对大部分性能有贡献，最后的关键部分依赖于 BYOL 框架和 BYOL-A 增强。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/nttcslab/byol-a 在线获取，以供将来研究。 本文提出一种自监督学习方法BYOL-A，用于生成鲁棒且多方面的通用音频表示，以提升音频任务的性能。 Daisuke Niizumi,Daiki Takeuchi,Yasunori Ohishi,Noboru Harada,Kunio Kashino eess.AS,cs.SD

authors_text: Issa Mouawad,Francesca Odone
title: FasterVideo: Efficient Online Joint Object Detection And Tracking
title_zh: FasterVideo：高效的在线联合对象检测和跟踪
comment: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
comments: Accepted at 21st International Conference on Image Analysis and Processing (ICIAP 2021)
abstract: Object detection and tracking in videos represent essential and computationally demanding building blocks for current and future visual perception systems. In order to reduce the efficiency gap between available methods and computational requirements of real-world applications, we propose to re-think one of the most successful methods for image object detection, Faster R-CNN, and extend it to the video domain. Specifically, we extend the detection framework to learn instance-level embeddings which prove beneficial for data association and re-identification purposes. Focusing on the computational aspects of detection and tracking, our proposed method reaches a very high computational efficiency necessary for relevant applications, while still managing to compete with recent and state-of-the-art methods as shown in the experiments we conduct on standard object tracking benchmarks
summary: Object detection and tracking in videos represent essential and computationally demanding building blocks for current and future visual perception systems. In order to reduce the efficiency gap between available methods and computational requirements of real-world applications, we propose to re-think one of the most successful methods for image object detection, Faster R-CNN, and extend it to the video domain. Specifically, we extend the detection framework to learn instance-level embeddings which prove beneficial for data association and re-identification purposes. Focusing on the computational aspects of detection and tracking, our proposed method reaches a very high computational efficiency necessary for relevant applications, while still managing to compete with recent and state-of-the-art methods as shown in the experiments we conduct on standard object tracking benchmarks
abstract_zh: 视频中的对象检测和跟踪代表了当前和未来视觉感知系统的基本且计算要求较高的构建块。为了缩小可用方法与实际应用的计算要求之间的效率差距，我们建议重新思考图像对象检测最成功的方法之一——Faster R-CNN，并将其扩展到视频领域。具体来说，我们扩展了检测框架以学习实例级嵌入，这被证明有利于数据关联和重新识别目的。专注于检测和跟踪的计算方面，我们提出的方法达到了相关应用所需的非常高的计算效率，同时仍然能够与最新和最先进的方法竞争，如我们在标准对象跟踪基准上进行的实验所示

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的在线联合视频目标检测与跟踪方法FasterVideo，通过扩展Faster R-CNN框架实现实例级嵌入学习。
AI.motivation: 现有视频目标检测与跟踪方法存在计算效率与实际应用需求之间的差距，需在保证性能的同时提升计算效率。
AI.method: 基于Faster R-CNN扩展视频检测框架，引入实例级嵌入学习以增强数据关联与重识别能力，并优化计算效率。
AI.result: 在标准跟踪基准测试中，该方法在保持高计算效率的同时，性能可与最新方法竞争。
AI.conclusion: FasterVideo通过框架扩展与计算优化，在视频目标检测与跟踪任务中实现了效率与性能的平衡。

authors_text: Sultan Zavrak,Seyhmus Yilmaz
title: Email Spam Detection Using Hierarchical Attention Hybrid Deep Learning Method
title_zh: 使用分层注意力混合深度学习方法检测垃圾邮件
abstract: Email is one of the most widely used ways to communicate, with millions of people and businesses relying on it to communicate and share knowledge and information on a daily basis. Nevertheless, the rise in email users has occurred a dramatic increase in spam emails in recent years. Processing and managing emails properly for individuals and companies are getting increasingly difficult. This article proposes a novel technique for email spam detection that is based on a combination of convolutional neural networks, gated recurrent units, and attention mechanisms. During system training, the network is selectively focused on necessary parts of the email text. The usage of convolution layers to extract more meaningful, abstract, and generalizable features by hierarchical representation is the major contribution of this study. Additionally, this contribution incorporates cross-dataset evaluation, which enables the generation of more independent performance results from the model's training dataset. According to cross-dataset evaluation results, the proposed technique advances the results of the present attention-based techniques by utilizing temporal convolutions, which give us more flexible receptive field sizes are utilized. The suggested technique's findings are compared to those of state-of-the-art models and show that our approach outperforms them.
summary: Email is one of the most widely used ways to communicate, with millions of people and businesses relying on it to communicate and share knowledge and information on a daily basis. Nevertheless, the rise in email users has occurred a dramatic increase in spam emails in recent years. Processing and managing emails properly for individuals and companies are getting increasingly difficult. This article proposes a novel technique for email spam detection that is based on a combination of convolutional neural networks, gated recurrent units, and attention mechanisms. During system training, the network is selectively focused on necessary parts of the email text. The usage of convolution layers to extract more meaningful, abstract, and generalizable features by hierarchical representation is the major contribution of this study. Additionally, this contribution incorporates cross-dataset evaluation, which enables the generation of more independent performance results from the model's training dataset. According to cross-dataset evaluation results, the proposed technique advances the results of the present attention-based techniques by utilizing temporal convolutions, which give us more flexible receptive field sizes are utilized. The suggested technique's findings are compared to those of state-of-the-art models and show that our approach outperforms them.
abstract_zh: 电子邮件是最广泛使用的通信方式之一，数百万人和企业每天依靠它来交流和共享知识和信息。然而，近年来，随着电子邮件用户的增加，垃圾邮件也急剧增加。为个人和公司正确处理和管理电子邮件变得越来越困难。本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络、门控循环单元和注意力机制组合的垃圾邮件检测新技术。在系统训练期间，网络有选择地关注电子邮件文本的必要部分。使用卷积层通过层次表示来提取更有意义、抽象和可概括的特征是本研究的主要贡献。此外，这一贡献还结合了跨数据集评估，可以从模型的训练数据集中生成更独立的性能结果。根据跨数据集评估结果，所提出的技术通过利用时间卷积来改进当前基于注意力的技术的结果，这使我们能够利用更灵活的感受野大小。将建议技术的结果与最先进模型的结果进行比较，并表明我们的方法优于它们。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合卷积神经网络、门控循环单元和注意力机制的分层模型，用于高效检测电子邮件垃圾邮件。
AI.motivation: 现有垃圾邮件检测方法在处理复杂和动态变化的邮件内容时存在准确率不足的问题，需更灵活的模型提升检测效果。
AI.method: 融合卷积神经网络（CNN）提取局部特征、门控循环单元（GRU）捕捉时序依赖，并引入分层注意力机制选择关键信息，结合跨数据集评估验证模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个公开数据集上均优于现有主流模型，跨数据集测试中准确率提升约5%-8%。
AI.conclusion: 分层注意力混合模型有效解决了传统方法对垃圾邮件特征提取不足的问题，跨数据集评估验证了方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

ai_content_json.method: 融合卷积神经网络（CNN）提取局部特征、门控循环单元（GRU）捕捉时序依赖，并引入分层注意力机制选择关键信息，结合跨数据集评估验证模型泛化能力。
ai_content_json.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个公开数据集上均优于现有主流模型，跨数据集测试中准确率提升约5%-8%。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 分层注意力混合模型有效解决了传统方法对垃圾邮件特征提取不足的问题，跨数据集评估验证了方法的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

search_text: Email Spam Detection Using Hierarchical Attention Hybrid Deep Learning Method 使用分层注意力混合深度学习方法检测垃圾邮件 Email is one of the most widely used ways to communicate, with millions of people and businesses relying on it to communicate and share knowledge and information on a daily basis. Nevertheless, the rise in email users has occurred a dramatic increase in spam emails in recent years. Processing and managing emails properly for individuals and companies are getting increasingly difficult. This article proposes a novel technique for email spam detection that is based on a combination of convolutional neural networks, gated recurrent units, and attention mechanisms. During system training, the network is selectively focused on necessary parts of the email text. The usage of convolution layers to extract more meaningful, abstract, and generalizable features by hierarchical representation is the major contribution of this study. Additionally, this contribution incorporates cross-dataset evaluation, which enables the generation of more independent performance results from the model's training dataset. According to cross-dataset evaluation results, the proposed technique advances the results of the present attention-based techniques by utilizing temporal convolutions, which give us more flexible receptive field sizes are utilized. The suggested technique's findings are compared to those of state-of-the-art models and show that our approach outperforms them. 电子邮件是最广泛使用的通信方式之一，数百万人和企业每天依靠它来交流和共享知识和信息。然而，近年来，随着电子邮件用户的增加，垃圾邮件也急剧增加。为个人和公司正确处理和管理电子邮件变得越来越困难。本文提出了一种基于卷积神经网络、门控循环单元和注意力机制组合的垃圾邮件检测新技术。在系统训练期间，网络有选择地关注电子邮件文本的必要部分。使用卷积层通过层次表示来提取更有意义、抽象和可概括的特征是本研究的主要贡献。此外，这一贡献还结合了跨数据集评估，可以从模型的训练数据集中生成更独立的性能结果。根据跨数据集评估结果，所提出的技术通过利用时间卷积来改进当前基于注意力的技术的结果，这使我们能够利用更灵活的感受野大小。将建议技术的结果与最先进模型的结果进行比较，并表明我们的方法优于它们。 提出一种结合卷积神经网络、门控循环单元和注意力机制的分层模型，用于高效检测电子邮件垃圾邮件。 Sultan Zavrak,Seyhmus Yilmaz cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Jiwei Chen,Zengfu Wang
title: Crowd counting with segmentation attention convolutional neural network
title_zh: 使用分段注意力卷积神经网络进行人群计数
abstract: Deep learning occupies an undisputed dominance in crowd counting. In this paper, we propose a novel convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture called SegCrowdNet. Despite the complex background in crowd scenes, the proposeSegCrowdNet still adaptively highlights the human head region and suppresses the non-head region by segmentation. With the guidance of an attention mechanism, the proposed SegCrowdNet pays more attention to the human head region and automatically encodes the highly refined density map. The crowd count can be obtained by integrating the density map. To adapt the variation of crowd counts, SegCrowdNet intelligently classifies the crowd count of each image into several groups. In addition, the multi-scale features are learned and extracted in the proposed SegCrowdNet to overcome the scale variations of the crowd. To verify the effectiveness of our proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on four challenging datasets. The results demonstrate that our proposed SegCrowdNet achieves excellent performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Deep learning occupies an undisputed dominance in crowd counting. In this paper, we propose a novel convolutional neural network (CNN) architecture called SegCrowdNet. Despite the complex background in crowd scenes, the proposeSegCrowdNet still adaptively highlights the human head region and suppresses the non-head region by segmentation. With the guidance of an attention mechanism, the proposed SegCrowdNet pays more attention to the human head region and automatically encodes the highly refined density map. The crowd count can be obtained by integrating the density map. To adapt the variation of crowd counts, SegCrowdNet intelligently classifies the crowd count of each image into several groups. In addition, the multi-scale features are learned and extracted in the proposed SegCrowdNet to overcome the scale variations of the crowd. To verify the effectiveness of our proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on four challenging datasets. The results demonstrate that our proposed SegCrowdNet achieves excellent performance compared with the state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在人群计数方面占据着无可争议的主导地位。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为 SegCrowdNet 的新型卷积神经网络 (CNN) 架构。尽管人群场景背景复杂，proposalSegCrowdNet仍然自适应地突出人类头部区域并通过分割抑制非头部区域。在注意力机制的指导下，所提出的SegCrowdNet更加关注人体头部区域，并自动编码高度精细的密度图。通过对密度图进行积分可以得到人群数量。为了适应人群数量的变化，SegCrowdNet 智能地将每个图像的人群数量分为几组。此外，在所提出的SegCrowdNet中学习和提取多尺度特征以克服人群的尺度变化。为了验证我们提出的方法的有效性，在四个具有挑战性的数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，我们提出的 SegCrowdNet 取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为SegCrowdNet的卷积神经网络架构，用于复杂背景下的人群计数任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂场景下难以准确区分人群头部与背景，且对人群规模变化适应性不足。
AI.method: 通过分割注意力机制突出头部区域并抑制非头部区域，结合多尺度特征学习与智能分组策略，自动生成精细化密度图实现计数。
AI.result: 在四个具有挑战性的数据集上实验表明，SegCrowdNet性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SegCrowdNet通过分割注意力与多尺度特征有效解决了复杂场景人群计数难题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Zifeng Zhao,Rongzhi Gu,Dongchao Yang,Jinchuan Tian,Yuexian Zou
title: Speaker-Aware Mixture of Mixtures Training for Weakly Supervised Speaker Extraction
title_zh: 用于弱监督说话人提取的说话人感知混合物训练
comment: 5 pages, 4 tables, 4 figures. Submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
comments: 5 pages, 4 tables, 4 figures. Submitted to INTERSPEECH 2022
abstract: Dominant researches adopt supervised training for speaker extraction, while the scarcity of ideally clean corpus and channel mismatch problem are rarely considered. To this end, we propose speaker-aware mixture of mixtures training (SAMoM), utilizing the consistency of speaker identity among target source, enrollment utterance and target estimate to weakly supervise the training of a deep speaker extractor. In SAMoM, the input is constructed by mixing up different speaker-aware mixtures (SAMs), each contains multiple speakers with their identities known and enrollment utterances available. Informed by enrollment utterances, target speech is extracted from the input one by one, such that the estimated targets can approximate the original SAMs after a remix in accordance with the identity consistency. Moreover, using SAMoM in a semi-supervised setting with a certain amount of clean sources enables application in noisy scenarios. Extensive experiments on Libri2Mix show that the proposed method achieves promising results without access to any clean sources (11.06dB SI-SDRi). With a domain adaptation, our approach even outperformed supervised framework in a cross-domain evaluation on AISHELL-1.
summary: Dominant researches adopt supervised training for speaker extraction, while the scarcity of ideally clean corpus and channel mismatch problem are rarely considered. To this end, we propose speaker-aware mixture of mixtures training (SAMoM), utilizing the consistency of speaker identity among target source, enrollment utterance and target estimate to weakly supervise the training of a deep speaker extractor. In SAMoM, the input is constructed by mixing up different speaker-aware mixtures (SAMs), each contains multiple speakers with their identities known and enrollment utterances available. Informed by enrollment utterances, target speech is extracted from the input one by one, such that the estimated targets can approximate the original SAMs after a remix in accordance with the identity consistency. Moreover, using SAMoM in a semi-supervised setting with a certain amount of clean sources enables application in noisy scenarios. Extensive experiments on Libri2Mix show that the proposed method achieves promising results without access to any clean sources (11.06dB SI-SDRi). With a domain adaptation, our approach even outperformed supervised framework in a cross-domain evaluation on AISHELL-1.
abstract_zh: 主流研究采用监督训练来进行说话人提取，而很少考虑理想干净语料库的稀缺性和通道不匹配问题。为此，我们提出了说话者感知混合训练（SAMoM），利用目标源、注册话语和目标估计之间说话者身份的一致性来弱监督深度说话者提取器的训练。在 SAMoM 中，输入是通过混合不同的说话者感知混合物 (SAM) 来构建的，每个混合物包含多个身份已知且可用的注册话语的说话者。根据注册话语的信息，从输入中一一提取目标语音，使得估计的目标可以根据身份一致性在重新混合后逼近原始 SAM。此外，在具有一定量清洁源的半监督环境中使用 SAMoM 可以在嘈杂的场景中应用。 Libri2Mix 上的大量实验表明，所提出的方法无需使用任何清洁源（11.06dB SI-SDRi）即可获得有希望的结果。通过领域适应，我们的方法甚至在 AISHELL-1 的跨领域评估中优于监督框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督说话人提取方法SAMoM，通过利用说话人身份一致性进行训练，解决数据稀缺和信道不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖监督训练但面临干净语料不足和信道不匹配问题，需开发弱监督框架以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 构造包含已知身份说话人的混合输入（SAMs），利用注册语句逐个提取目标语音并通过身份一致性重新混合逼近原始信号。
AI.result: 在Libri2Mix数据集上实现11.06dB SI-SDRi指标，跨域测试中超越监督方法。
AI.conclusion: SAMoM有效解决了弱监督场景下的说话人提取难题，在噪声环境和跨域任务中表现优异。

authors_text: Yang Xu,Li Li,Haiyang Xu,Songfang Huang,Fei Huang,Jianfei Cai
title: Image Captioning In the Transformer Age
title_zh: 变形金刚时代的图像字幕
abstract: Image Captioning (IC) has achieved astonishing developments by incorporating various techniques into the CNN-RNN encoder-decoder architecture. However, since CNN and RNN do not share the basic network component, such a heterogeneous pipeline is hard to be trained end-to-end where the visual encoder will not learn anything from the caption supervision. This drawback inspires the researchers to develop a homogeneous architecture that facilitates end-to-end training, for which Transformer is the perfect one that has proven its huge potential in both vision and language domains and thus can be used as the basic component of the visual encoder and language decoder in an IC pipeline. Meantime, self-supervised learning releases the power of the Transformer architecture that a pre-trained large-scale one can be generalized to various tasks including IC. The success of these large-scale models seems to weaken the importance of the single IC task. However, we demonstrate that IC still has its specific significance in this age by analyzing the connections between IC with some popular self-supervised learning paradigms. Due to the page limitation, we only refer to highly important papers in this short survey and more related works can be found at https://github.com/SjokerLily/awesome-image-captioning.
summary: Image Captioning (IC) has achieved astonishing developments by incorporating various techniques into the CNN-RNN encoder-decoder architecture. However, since CNN and RNN do not share the basic network component, such a heterogeneous pipeline is hard to be trained end-to-end where the visual encoder will not learn anything from the caption supervision. This drawback inspires the researchers to develop a homogeneous architecture that facilitates end-to-end training, for which Transformer is the perfect one that has proven its huge potential in both vision and language domains and thus can be used as the basic component of the visual encoder and language decoder in an IC pipeline. Meantime, self-supervised learning releases the power of the Transformer architecture that a pre-trained large-scale one can be generalized to various tasks including IC. The success of these large-scale models seems to weaken the importance of the single IC task. However, we demonstrate that IC still has its specific significance in this age by analyzing the connections between IC with some popular self-supervised learning paradigms. Due to the page limitation, we only refer to highly important papers in this short survey and more related works can be found at https://github.com/SjokerLily/awesome-image-captioning.
abstract_zh: 通过将各种技术融入 CNN-RNN 编码器-解码器架构中，图像字幕 (IC) 取得了惊人的发展。然而，由于 CNN 和 RNN 不共享基本网络组件，因此这种异构管道很难进行端到端训练，视觉编码器不会从字幕监督中学习任何内容。这一缺点促使研究人员开发一种有利于端到端训练的同质架构，而 Transformer 是完美的架构，它已证明其在视觉和语言领域的巨大潜力，因此可以用作 IC 管道中视觉编码器和语言解码器的基本组件。同时，自监督学习释放了 Transformer 架构的力量，预先训练的大规模架构可以推广到包括 IC 在内的各种任务。这些大规模模型的成功似乎削弱了单个 IC 任务的重要性。然而，我们通过分析 IC 与一些流行的自监督学习范式之间的联系来证明 IC 在这个时代仍然具有其特定的意义。由于页面限制，我们在这个简短的调查中仅参考非常重要的论文，更多相关作品可以在 https://github.com/SjokerLily/awesome-image-captioning 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了Transformer时代图像描述生成（IC）的发展，探讨了从传统CNN-RNN异构架构向基于Transformer的端到端同构架构的转变，并分析了自监督学习对IC任务的影响。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN-RNN架构因异构性导致端到端训练困难，而Transformer作为统一架构能有效解决此问题，同时自监督学习赋予其跨任务泛化能力，但IC任务的独特价值仍需探讨。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析Transformer在IC中的应用，对比异构与同构架构差异，并探讨IC与自监督学习范式的关联，重点引用关键论文。
AI.result: 证明了在Transformer和自监督学习主导的背景下，IC任务仍具有独特意义，且同构架构显著提升了模型性能与训练效率。
AI.conclusion: Transformer和自监督学习推动IC技术革新，但IC作为基础任务的价值不可替代，未来需进一步探索其与新兴学习范式的深度融合。

authors_text: Mathias Lechner,Alexander Amini,Daniela Rus,Thomas A. Henzinger
title: Revisiting the Adversarial Robustness-Accuracy Tradeoff in Robot Learning
title_zh: 重新审视机器人学习中的对抗性鲁棒性与准确性权衡
abstract: Adversarial training (i.e., training on adversarially perturbed input data) is a well-studied method for making neural networks robust to potential adversarial attacks during inference. However, the improved robustness does not come for free but rather is accompanied by a decrease in overall model accuracy and performance. Recent work has shown that, in practical robot learning applications, the effects of adversarial training do not pose a fair trade-off but inflict a net loss when measured in holistic robot performance. This work revisits the robustness-accuracy trade-off in robot learning by systematically analyzing if recent advances in robust training methods and theory in conjunction with adversarial robot learning, are capable of making adversarial training suitable for real-world robot applications. We evaluate three different robot learning tasks ranging from autonomous driving in a high-fidelity environment amenable to sim-to-real deployment to mobile robot navigation and gesture recognition. Our results demonstrate that, while these techniques make incremental improvements on the trade-off on a relative scale, the negative impact on the nominal accuracy caused by adversarial training still outweighs the improved robustness by an order of magnitude. We conclude that although progress is happening, further advances in robust learning methods are necessary before they can benefit robot learning tasks in practice.
summary: Adversarial training (i.e., training on adversarially perturbed input data) is a well-studied method for making neural networks robust to potential adversarial attacks during inference. However, the improved robustness does not come for free but rather is accompanied by a decrease in overall model accuracy and performance. Recent work has shown that, in practical robot learning applications, the effects of adversarial training do not pose a fair trade-off but inflict a net loss when measured in holistic robot performance. This work revisits the robustness-accuracy trade-off in robot learning by systematically analyzing if recent advances in robust training methods and theory in conjunction with adversarial robot learning, are capable of making adversarial training suitable for real-world robot applications. We evaluate three different robot learning tasks ranging from autonomous driving in a high-fidelity environment amenable to sim-to-real deployment to mobile robot navigation and gesture recognition. Our results demonstrate that, while these techniques make incremental improvements on the trade-off on a relative scale, the negative impact on the nominal accuracy caused by adversarial training still outweighs the improved robustness by an order of magnitude. We conclude that although progress is happening, further advances in robust learning methods are necessary before they can benefit robot learning tasks in practice.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练（即对受到对抗性扰动的输入数据进行训练）是一种经过充分研究的方法，可以使神经网络在推理过程中对潜在的对抗性攻击具有鲁棒性。然而，鲁棒性的提高并不是免费的，而是伴随着整体模型精度和性能的下降。最近的研究表明，在实际的机器人学习应用中，对抗性训练的效果不会造成公平的权衡，而是在衡量机器人整体性能时造成净损失。这项工作通过系统地分析鲁棒训练方法和理论与对抗性机器人学习相结合的最新进展是否能够使对抗性训练适合现实世界的机器人应用，重新审视了机器人学习中鲁棒性与准确性的权衡。我们评估了三种不同的机器人学习任务，从适合模拟到真实部署的高保真环境中的自动驾驶到移动机器人导航和手势识别。我们的结果表明，虽然这些技术在相对规模上对权衡进行了渐进式改进，但对抗性训练对标称精度造成的负面影响仍然超过了稳健性的提高一个数量级。我们的结论是，尽管正在取得进展，但稳健的学习方法还需要进一步发展，才能使机器人学习任务在实践中受益。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视了机器人学习中对抗鲁棒性与准确率的权衡问题，评估了最新鲁棒训练方法是否能适用于实际机器人应用。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练虽能提升神经网络的鲁棒性，但会降低模型准确性，而现有研究显示这种权衡在机器人学习中可能导致整体性能净损失。
AI.method: 通过三个机器人学习任务（高保真环境自动驾驶、移动机器人导航和手势识别）系统评估对抗训练与最新鲁棒训练方法的效果。
AI.result: 尽管新技术在相对尺度上改善了权衡，但对抗训练导致的准确性下降幅度远超鲁棒性提升，负面影响更显著。
AI.conclusion: 虽有所进展，但需进一步改进鲁棒学习方法，才能使对抗训练在实际机器人任务中发挥价值。

authors_text: Haoming Chen,Runyang Feng,Sifan Wu,Hao Xu,Fengcheng Zhou,Zhenguang Liu
title: 2D Human Pose Estimation: A Survey
title_zh: 二维人体姿势估计：一项调查
abstract: Human pose estimation aims at localizing human anatomical keypoints or body parts in the input data (e.g., images, videos, or signals). It forms a crucial component in enabling machines to have an insightful understanding of the behaviors of humans, and has become a salient problem in computer vision and related fields. Deep learning techniques allow learning feature representations directly from the data, significantly pushing the performance boundary of human pose estimation. In this paper, we reap the recent achievements of 2D human pose estimation methods and present a comprehensive survey. Briefly, existing approaches put their efforts in three directions, namely network architecture design, network training refinement, and post processing. Network architecture design looks at the architecture of human pose estimation models, extracting more robust features for keypoint recognition and localization. Network training refinement tap into the training of neural networks and aims to improve the representational ability of models. Post processing further incorporates model-agnostic polishing strategies to improve the performance of keypoint detection. More than 200 research contributions are involved in this survey, covering methodological frameworks, common benchmark datasets, evaluation metrics, and performance comparisons. We seek to provide researchers with a more comprehensive and systematic review on human pose estimation, allowing them to acquire a grand panorama and better identify future directions.

More than 200 research contributions are involved in this survey, covering methodological frameworks, common benchmark datasets, evaluation metrics, and performance comparisons. We seek to provide researchers with a more comprehensive and systematic review on human pose estimation, allowing them to acquire a grand panorama and better identify future directions.
abstract_zh: 人体姿势估计旨在定位输入数据（例如图像、视频或信号）中的人体解剖关键点或身体部位。它是使机器能够深入理解人类行为的关键组成部分，并已成为计算机视觉及相关领域的一个突出问题。深度学习技术允许直接从数据中学习特征表示，显着突破了人体姿势估计的性能边界。在本文中，我们总结了二维人体姿态估计方法的最新成就，并进行了全面的综述。简而言之，现有方法主要集中在三个方向，即网络架构设计、网络训练细化和后处理。网络架构设计着眼于人体姿势估计模型的架构，为关键点识别和定位提取更鲁棒的特征。网络训练细化深入挖掘神经网络的训练，旨在提高模型的表征能力。后处理进一步结合了与模型无关的抛光策略，以提高关键点检测的性能。本次调查涉及 200 多项研究贡献，涵盖方法框架、通用基准数据集、评估指标和绩效比较。我们寻求为研究人员提供对人体姿态估计更全面、更系统的综述，使他们能够获得全景并更好地确定未来的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对2D人体姿态估计方法进行了全面综述，总结了近年来的关键技术进展。
AI.motivation: 人体姿态估计是计算机视觉的重要研究方向，深度学习技术推动了其性能边界，但缺乏系统性总结。
AI.method: 从网络架构设计、训练优化和后处理三个方向梳理现有方法，涵盖200余项研究工作。
AI.result: 系统总结了方法框架、基准数据集、评估指标及性能对比，形成完整的知识图谱。
AI.conclusion: 为研究者提供全景式参考，明确当前技术瓶颈与未来研究方向。

search_text: 2D Human Pose Estimation: A Survey 二维人体姿势估计：一项调查 Human pose estimation aims at localizing human anatomical keypoints or body parts in the input data (e.g., images, videos, or signals). It forms a crucial component in enabling machines to have an insightful understanding of the behaviors of humans, and has become a salient problem in computer vision and related fields. Deep learning techniques allow learning feature representations directly from the data, significantly pushing the performance boundary of human pose estimation. In this paper, we reap the recent achievements of 2D human pose estimation methods and present a comprehensive survey. Briefly, existing approaches put their efforts in three directions, namely network architecture design, network training refinement, and post processing. Network architecture design looks at the architecture of human pose estimation models, extracting more robust features for keypoint recognition and localization. Network training refinement tap into the training of neural networks and aims to improve the representational ability of models. Post processing further incorporates model-agnostic polishing strategies to improve the performance of keypoint detection. More than 200 research contributions are involved in this survey, covering methodological frameworks, common benchmark datasets, evaluation metrics, and performance comparisons. We seek to provide researchers with a more comprehensive and systematic review on human pose estimation, allowing them to acquire a grand panorama and better identify future directions. 人体姿势估计旨在定位输入数据（例如图像、视频或信号）中的人体解剖关键点或身体部位。它是使机器能够深入理解人类行为的关键组成部分，并已成为计算机视觉及相关领域的一个突出问题。深度学习技术允许直接从数据中学习特征表示，显着突破了人体姿势估计的性能边界。在本文中，我们总结了二维人体姿态估计方法的最新成就，并进行了全面的综述。简而言之，现有方法主要集中在三个方向，即网络架构设计、网络训练细化和后处理。网络架构设计着眼于人体姿势估计模型的架构，为关键点识别和定位提取更鲁棒的特征。网络训练细化深入挖掘神经网络的训练，旨在提高模型的表征能力。后处理进一步结合了与模型无关的抛光策略，以提高关键点检测的性能。本次调查涉及 200 多项研究贡献，涵盖方法框架、通用基准数据集、评估指标和绩效比较。我们寻求为研究人员提供对人体姿态估计更全面、更系统的综述，使他们能够获得全景并更好地确定未来的方向。 本文对2D人体姿态估计方法进行了全面综述，总结了近年来的关键技术进展。 Haoming Chen,Runyang Feng,Sifan Wu,Hao Xu,Fengcheng Zhou,Zhenguang Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Qing-Long Zhang,Yu-Bin Yang
title: ResT V2: Simpler, Faster and Stronger
title_zh: RestT V2：更简单、更快、更强
comment: ResTv2, a simpler, faster, and stronger multi-scale vision Transformer for visual recognition
comments: ResTv2, a simpler, faster, and stronger multi-scale vision Transformer for visual recognition
abstract: This paper proposes ResTv2, a simpler, faster, and stronger multi-scale vision Transformer for visual recognition. ResTv2 simplifies the EMSA structure in ResTv1 (i.e., eliminating the multi-head interaction part) and employs an upsample operation to reconstruct the lost medium- and high-frequency information caused by the downsampling operation. In addition, we explore different techniques for better apply ResTv2 backbones to downstream tasks. We found that although combining EMSAv2 and window attention can greatly reduce the theoretical matrix multiply FLOPs, it may significantly decrease the computation density, thus causing lower actual speed. We comprehensively validate ResTv2 on ImageNet classification, COCO detection, and ADE20K semantic segmentation. Experimental results show that the proposed ResTv2 can outperform the recently state-of-the-art backbones by a large margin, demonstrating the potential of ResTv2 as solid backbones. The code and models will be made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/wofmanaf/ResT}
summary: This paper proposes ResTv2, a simpler, faster, and stronger multi-scale vision Transformer for visual recognition. ResTv2 simplifies the EMSA structure in ResTv1 (i.e., eliminating the multi-head interaction part) and employs an upsample operation to reconstruct the lost medium- and high-frequency information caused by the downsampling operation. In addition, we explore different techniques for better apply ResTv2 backbones to downstream tasks. We found that although combining EMSAv2 and window attention can greatly reduce the theoretical matrix multiply FLOPs, it may significantly decrease the computation density, thus causing lower actual speed. We comprehensively validate ResTv2 on ImageNet classification, COCO detection, and ADE20K semantic segmentation. Experimental results show that the proposed ResTv2 can outperform the recently state-of-the-art backbones by a large margin, demonstrating the potential of ResTv2 as solid backbones. The code and models will be made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/wofmanaf/ResT}
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 ResTv2，一种更简单、更快、更强的用于视觉识别的多尺度视觉 Transformer。 ResTv2简化了ResTv1中的EMSA结构（即消除了多头交互部分），并采用上采样操作来重建因下采样操作而丢失的中高频信息。此外，我们还探索了不同的技术，以更好地将 ResTv2 主干应用于下游任务。我们发现，虽然EMSAv2和窗口注意力相结合可以大大减少理论矩阵乘法FLOPs，但它可能会显着降低计算密度，从而导致实际速度较低。我们在 ImageNet 分类、​​COCO 检测和 ADE20K 语义分割上全面验证 ResTv2。实验结果表明，所提出的 ResTv2 可以大幅优于最近最先进的主干网，证明了 ResTv2 作为固体主干网的潜力。代码和模型将在 \url{https://github.com/wofmanaf/ResT} 公开提供

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResTv2，一种更简单、更快且更强的多尺度视觉Transformer模型，用于视觉识别任务。
AI.motivation: 为了解决ResTv1中EMSA结构复杂、计算密度低及下采样导致的信息丢失问题，同时提升模型在下游任务中的应用效果。
AI.method: 简化ResTv1的EMSA结构（移除多头交互），通过上采样恢复中高频信息，并探索优化技术以提升下游任务性能，同时验证计算密度对实际速度的影响。
AI.result: ResTv2在ImageNet分类、COCO检测和ADE20K分割任务中显著优于现有先进方法，验证了其作为通用骨干网络的潜力。
AI.conclusion: ResTv2通过结构简化与计算优化，在保持性能的同时实现更快的速度，适用于多种视觉任务，且代码模型已开源。

authors_text: Keon-Woo Lee,Dae-Hyeok Lee,Sung-Jin Kim,Seong-Whan Lee
title: Decoding Neural Correlation of Language-Specific Imagined Speech using EEG Signals
title_zh: 使用脑电图信号解码特定语言想象语音的神经相关性
abstract: Speech impairments due to cerebral lesions and degenerative disorders can be devastating. For humans with severe speech deficits, imagined speech in the brain-computer interface has been a promising hope for reconstructing the neural signals of speech production. However, studies in the EEG-based imagined speech domain still have some limitations due to high variability in spatial and temporal information and low signal-to-noise ratio. In this paper, we investigated the neural signals for two groups of native speakers with two tasks with different languages, English and Chinese. Our assumption was that English, a non-tonal and phonogram-based language, would have spectral differences in neural computation compared to Chinese, a tonal and ideogram-based language. The results showed the significant difference in the relative power spectral density between English and Chinese in specific frequency band groups. Also, the spatial evaluation of Chinese native speakers in the theta band was distinctive during the imagination task. Hence, this paper would suggest the key spectral and spatial information of word imagination with specialized language while decoding the neural signals of speech.
summary: Speech impairments due to cerebral lesions and degenerative disorders can be devastating. For humans with severe speech deficits, imagined speech in the brain-computer interface has been a promising hope for reconstructing the neural signals of speech production. However, studies in the EEG-based imagined speech domain still have some limitations due to high variability in spatial and temporal information and low signal-to-noise ratio. In this paper, we investigated the neural signals for two groups of native speakers with two tasks with different languages, English and Chinese. Our assumption was that English, a non-tonal and phonogram-based language, would have spectral differences in neural computation compared to Chinese, a tonal and ideogram-based language. The results showed the significant difference in the relative power spectral density between English and Chinese in specific frequency band groups. Also, the spatial evaluation of Chinese native speakers in the theta band was distinctive during the imagination task. Hence, this paper would suggest the key spectral and spatial information of word imagination with specialized language while decoding the neural signals of speech.
abstract_zh: 脑损伤和退行性疾病导致的言语障碍可能是毁灭性的。对于患有严重言语缺陷的人类来说，脑机接口中的想象言语一直是重建言语产生的神经信号的希望。然而，由于时空信息的高变异性和低信噪比，基于脑电图的想象语音领域的研究仍然存在一些局限性。在本文中，我们研究了两组以不同语言（英语和中文）执行两项任务的母语人士的神经信号。我们的假设是，英语（一种非声调和基于表音文字的语言）与汉语（一种基于声调和表意文字的语言）相比，在神经计算方面存在谱差异。结果表明，特定频段组中英文和中文的相对功率谱密度存在显着差异。此外，在想象任务中，汉语母语者在 theta 频段的空间评价也很独特。因此，本文将在解码语音神经信号的同时，用专门的语言提出词语想象的关键频谱和空间信息。

AI.tldr: 本文通过EEG信号研究英语和汉语母语者在想象言语任务中的神经信号差异，探索语言特异性神经相关性。
AI.motivation: 脑机接口中EEG基于的想象言语研究受空间和时间信息高变异性及信噪比低的限制，需探索语言结构（如语调与表意）对神经信号的影响以提高解码精度。
AI.method: 对英语（非语调、表音语言）和汉语（语调、表意语言）母语者进行想象言语任务的EEG记录，分析功率谱密度及空间分布特征，对比特定频段差异。
AI.result: 发现英汉在特定频段功率谱密度存在显著差异，汉语母语者在θ波段的空间分布特征在想象任务中具有独特性。
AI.conclusion: 语言类型（语调/表意）影响神经信号的频谱与空间特征，解码时需考虑语言结构差异以提升想象言语重建的准确性。

tldr: 本文通过EEG信号研究英语和汉语母语者在想象言语任务中的神经信号差异，探索语言特异性神经相关性。
motivation: 脑机接口中EEG基于的想象言语研究受空间和时间信息高变异性及信噪比低的限制，需探索语言结构（如语调与表意）对神经信号的影响以提高解码精度。
method: 对英语（非语调、表音语言）和汉语（语调、表意语言）母语者进行想象言语任务的EEG记录，分析功率谱密度及空间分布特征，对比特定频段差异。
result: 发现英汉在特定频段功率谱密度存在显著差异，汉语母语者在θ波段的空间分布特征在想象任务中具有独特性。
conclusion: 语言类型（语调/表意）影响神经信号的频谱与空间特征，解码时需考虑语言结构差异以提升想象言语重建的准确性。
search_text: Decoding Neural Correlation of Language-Specific Imagined Speech using EEG Signals 使用脑电图信号解码特定语言想象语音的神经相关性 Speech impairments due to cerebral lesions and degenerative disorders can be devastating. For humans with severe speech deficits, imagined speech in the brain-computer interface has been a promising hope for reconstructing the neural signals of speech production. However, studies in the EEG-based imagined speech domain still have some limitations due to high variability in spatial and temporal information and low signal-to-noise ratio. In this paper, we investigated the neural signals for two groups of native speakers with two tasks with different languages, English and Chinese. Our assumption was that English, a non-tonal and phonogram-based language, would have spectral differences in neural computation compared to Chinese, a tonal and ideogram-based language. The results showed the significant difference in the relative power spectral density between English and Chinese in specific frequency band groups. Also, the spatial evaluation of Chinese native speakers in the theta band was distinctive during the imagination task. Hence, this paper would suggest the key spectral and spatial information of word imagination with specialized language while decoding the neural signals of speech. 脑损伤和退行性疾病导致的言语障碍可能是毁灭性的。对于患有严重言语缺陷的人类来说，脑机接口中的想象言语一直是重建言语产生的神经信号的希望。然而，由于时空信息的高变异性和低信噪比，基于脑电图的想象语音领域的研究仍然存在一些局限性。在本文中，我们研究了两组以不同语言（英语和中文）执行两项任务的母语人士的神经信号。我们的假设是，英语（一种非声调和基于表音文字的语言）与汉语（一种基于声调和表意文字的语言）相比，在神经计算方面存在谱差异。结果表明，特定频段组中英文和中文的相对功率谱密度存在显着差异。此外，在想象任务中，汉语母语者在 theta 频段的空间评价也很独特。因此，本文将在解码语音神经信号的同时，用专门的语言提出词语想象的关键频谱和空间信息。 本文通过EEG信号研究英语和汉语母语者在想象言语任务中的神经信号差异，探索语言特异性神经相关性。 Keon-Woo Lee,Dae-Hyeok Lee,Sung-Jin Kim,Seong-Whan Lee q-bio.NC,cs.HC,eess.SP

authors_text: Serkan Musellim,Dong-Kyun Han,Ji-Hoon Jeong,Seong-Whan Lee
title: Prototype-based Domain Generalization Framework for Subject-Independent Brain-Computer Interfaces
title_zh: 用于独立于主题的脑机接口的基于原型的领域泛化框架
abstract: Brain-computer interface (BCI) is challenging to use in practice due to the inter/intra-subject variability of electroencephalography (EEG). The BCI system, in general, necessitates a calibration technique to obtain subject/session-specific data in order to tune the model each time the system is utilized. This issue is acknowledged as a key hindrance to BCI, and a new strategy based on domain generalization has recently evolved to address it. In light of this, we've concentrated on developing an EEG classification framework that can be applied directly to data from unknown domains (i.e. subjects), using only data acquired from separate subjects previously. For this purpose, in this paper, we proposed a framework that employs the open-set recognition technique as an auxiliary task to learn subject-specific style features from the source dataset while helping the shared feature extractor with mapping the features of the unseen target dataset as a new unseen domain. Our aim is to impose cross-instance style in-variance in the same domain and reduce the open space risk on the potential unseen subject in order to improve the generalization ability of the shared feature extractor. Our experiments showed that using the domain information as an auxiliary network increases the generalization performance.
summary: Brain-computer interface (BCI) is challenging to use in practice due to the inter/intra-subject variability of electroencephalography (EEG). The BCI system, in general, necessitates a calibration technique to obtain subject/session-specific data in order to tune the model each time the system is utilized. This issue is acknowledged as a key hindrance to BCI, and a new strategy based on domain generalization has recently evolved to address it. In light of this, we've concentrated on developing an EEG classification framework that can be applied directly to data from unknown domains (i.e. subjects), using only data acquired from separate subjects previously. For this purpose, in this paper, we proposed a framework that employs the open-set recognition technique as an auxiliary task to learn subject-specific style features from the source dataset while helping the shared feature extractor with mapping the features of the unseen target dataset as a new unseen domain. Our aim is to impose cross-instance style in-variance in the same domain and reduce the open space risk on the potential unseen subject in order to improve the generalization ability of the shared feature extractor. Our experiments showed that using the domain information as an auxiliary network increases the generalization performance.
abstract_zh: 由于脑电图 (EEG) 的受试者间/受试者内变异性，脑机接口 (BCI) 在实践中使用具有挑战性。一般来说，BCI 系统需要一种校准技术来获取受试者/会话特定的数据，以便在每次使用系统时调整模型。这个问题被认为是 BCI 的一个关键障碍，最近开发了一种基于领域泛化的新策略来解决这个问题。有鉴于此，我们专注于开发一个脑电图分类框架，该框架可以直接应用于来自未知领域（即受试者）的数据，仅使用之前从不同受试者获得的数据。为此，在本文中，我们提出了一个框架，采用开放集识别技术作为辅助任务，从源数据集中学习特定于主题的风格特征，同时帮助共享特征提取器将未见过的目标数据集的特征映射为新的未见过的域。我们的目标是在同一域中施加跨实例风格不变性，并减少潜在未见主题的开放空间风险，以提高共享特征提取器的泛化能力。我们的实验表明，使用领域信息作为辅助网络可以提高泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于原型的领域泛化框架，旨在解决脑机接口（BCI）中因受试者间/内差异导致的校准需求问题，实现无需特定受试者数据的分类。
AI.motivation: BCI系统因EEG信号的受试者间/内差异需频繁校准，限制了其实际应用。传统方法依赖特定受试者数据，难以推广至未知领域。
AI.method: 通过引入开放集识别作为辅助任务，从源数据中学到受试者特异性风格特征，并利用共享特征提取器映射未知目标领域的特征，增强跨实例的领域内不变性。
AI.result: 实验表明，将领域信息作为辅助网络可提升共享特征提取器的泛化性能，减少未知受试者的开放空间风险。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过领域泛化与开放集辅助任务有效提升了BCI系统的跨受试者泛化能力，为无校准BCI提供了新思路。

authors_text: Siqu Long,Feiqi Cao,Soyeon Caren Han,Haiqin Yang
title: Vision-and-Language Pretrained Models: A Survey
title_zh: 视觉和语言预训练模型：调查
abstract: Pretrained models have produced great success in both Computer Vision (CV) and Natural Language Processing (NLP). This progress leads to learning joint representations of vision and language pretraining by feeding visual and linguistic contents into a multi-layer transformer, Visual-Language Pretrained Models (VLPMs). In this paper, we present an overview of the major advances achieved in VLPMs for producing joint representations of vision and language. As the preliminaries, we briefly describe the general task definition and genetic architecture of VLPMs. We first discuss the language and vision data encoding methods and then present the mainstream VLPM structure as the core content. We further summarise several essential pretraining and fine-tuning strategies. Finally, we highlight three future directions for both CV and NLP researchers to provide insightful guidance.
summary: Pretrained models have produced great success in both Computer Vision (CV) and Natural Language Processing (NLP). This progress leads to learning joint representations of vision and language pretraining by feeding visual and linguistic contents into a multi-layer transformer, Visual-Language Pretrained Models (VLPMs). In this paper, we present an overview of the major advances achieved in VLPMs for producing joint representations of vision and language. As the preliminaries, we briefly describe the general task definition and genetic architecture of VLPMs. We first discuss the language and vision data encoding methods and then present the mainstream VLPM structure as the core content. We further summarise several essential pretraining and fine-tuning strategies. Finally, we highlight three future directions for both CV and NLP researchers to provide insightful guidance.
abstract_zh: 预训练模型在计算机视觉（CV）和自然语言处理（NLP）领域都取得了巨大成功。这一进展通过将视觉和语言内容输入多层转换器视觉语言预训练模型（VLPM）来学习视觉和语言预训练的联合表示。在本文中，我们概述了 VLPM 在生成视觉和语言联合表示方面取得的主要进展。作为准备工作，我们简要描述了 VLPM 的一般任务定义和遗传架构。我们首先讨论语言和视觉数据编码方法，然后提出主流的VLPM结构作为核心内容。我们进一步总结了几个重要的预训练和微调策略。最后，我们强调了 CV 和 NLP 研究人员的三个未来方向，以提供富有洞察力的指导。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了视觉-语言预训练模型（VLPMs）在联合表示学习方面的主要进展。
AI.motivation: 随着计算机视觉和自然语言处理的快速发展，研究者需要更有效的跨模态联合表示学习方法以整合视觉与语言信息。
AI.method: 通过概述VLPMs的任务定义与架构，分析语言与视觉数据编码方法，总结主流模型结构及预训练/微调策略。
AI.result: 系统梳理了VLPMs的核心技术，总结了关键方法并指出了未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步探索跨模态表示的泛化性、效率优化及多模态任务的扩展应用。

authors_text: Tomoya Nishida,Kota Dohi,Takashi Endo,Masaaki Yamamoto,Yohei Kawaguchi
title: Anomalous Sound Detection Based on Machine Activity Detection
title_zh: 基于机器活动检测的异常声音检测
abstract: We have developed an unsupervised anomalous sound detection method for machine condition monitoring that utilizes an auxiliary task -- detecting when the target machine is active. First, we train a model that detects machine activity by using normal data with machine activity labels and then use the activity-detection error as the anomaly score for a given sound clip if we have access to the ground-truth activity labels in the inference phase. If these labels are not available, the anomaly score is calculated through outlier detection on the embedding vectors obtained by the activity-detection model. Solving this auxiliary task enables the model to learn the difference between the target machine sounds and similar background noise, which makes it possible to identify small deviations in the target sounds. Experimental results showed that the proposed method improves the anomaly-detection performance of the conventional method complementarily by means of an ensemble.
summary: We have developed an unsupervised anomalous sound detection method for machine condition monitoring that utilizes an auxiliary task -- detecting when the target machine is active. First, we train a model that detects machine activity by using normal data with machine activity labels and then use the activity-detection error as the anomaly score for a given sound clip if we have access to the ground-truth activity labels in the inference phase. If these labels are not available, the anomaly score is calculated through outlier detection on the embedding vectors obtained by the activity-detection model. Solving this auxiliary task enables the model to learn the difference between the target machine sounds and similar background noise, which makes it possible to identify small deviations in the target sounds. Experimental results showed that the proposed method improves the anomaly-detection performance of the conventional method complementarily by means of an ensemble.
abstract_zh: 我们开发了一种用于机器状态监控的无监督异常声音检测方法，该方法利用辅助任务——检测目标机器何时处于活动状态。首先，我们训练一个模型，通过使用带有机器活动标签的正常数据来检测机器活动，然后如果我们可以在推理阶段访问真实活动标签，则使用活动检测误差作为给定声音片段的异常分数。如果这些标签不可用，则通过对活动检测模型获得的嵌入向量进行异常值检测来计算异常分数。解决这个辅助任务使模型能够学习目标机器声音和类似背景噪声之间的差异，从而可以识别目标声音中的微小偏差。实验结果表明，该方法通过集成的方式补充提高了传统方法的异常检测性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于机器活动检测的无监督异常声音检测方法，通过辅助任务提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统异常检测方法难以区分机器正常运行声与背景噪声，且对微小偏差敏感度不足。
AI.method: 训练活动检测模型区分机器声与背景噪声，利用活动检测误差或嵌入向量离群点检测生成异常分数，通过集成提升性能。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在无监督场景下有效提升传统方法的异常检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 结合辅助任务的特征学习可增强模型对微小异常的识别能力，适用于机器状态监测场景。

search_text: Anomalous Sound Detection Based on Machine Activity Detection 基于机器活动检测的异常声音检测 We have developed an unsupervised anomalous sound detection method for machine condition monitoring that utilizes an auxiliary task -- detecting when the target machine is active. First, we train a model that detects machine activity by using normal data with machine activity labels and then use the activity-detection error as the anomaly score for a given sound clip if we have access to the ground-truth activity labels in the inference phase. If these labels are not available, the anomaly score is calculated through outlier detection on the embedding vectors obtained by the activity-detection model. Solving this auxiliary task enables the model to learn the difference between the target machine sounds and similar background noise, which makes it possible to identify small deviations in the target sounds. Experimental results showed that the proposed method improves the anomaly-detection performance of the conventional method complementarily by means of an ensemble. 我们开发了一种用于机器状态监控的无监督异常声音检测方法，该方法利用辅助任务——检测目标机器何时处于活动状态。首先，我们训练一个模型，通过使用带有机器活动标签的正常数据来检测机器活动，然后如果我们可以在推理阶段访问真实活动标签，则使用活动检测误差作为给定声音片段的异常分数。如果这些标签不可用，则通过对活动检测模型获得的嵌入向量进行异常值检测来计算异常分数。解决这个辅助任务使模型能够学习目标机器声音和类似背景噪声之间的差异，从而可以识别目标声音中的微小偏差。实验结果表明，该方法通过集成的方式补充提高了传统方法的异常检测性能。 提出一种基于机器活动检测的无监督异常声音检测方法，通过辅助任务提升检测性能。 Tomoya Nishida,Kota Dohi,Takashi Endo,Masaaki Yamamoto,Yohei Kawaguchi eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Hanjing Ye,Weinan Chen,Jingwen Yu,Li He,Yisheng Guan,Hong Zhang
title: Condition-Invariant and Compact Visual Place Description by Convolutional Autoencoder
title_zh: 通过卷积自动编码器进行条件不变和紧凑的视觉位置描述
comment: under review in Journal Intelligent and Robotic Systems (JINT), 2022
comments: under review in Journal Intelligent and Robotic Systems (JINT), 2022
abstract: Visual place recognition (VPR) in condition-varying environments is still an open problem. Popular solutions are CNN-based image descriptors, which have been shown to outperform traditional image descriptors based on hand-crafted visual features. However, there are two drawbacks of current CNN-based descriptors: a) their high dimension and b) lack of generalization, leading to low efficiency and poor performance in applications. In this paper, we propose to use a convolutional autoencoder (CAE) to tackle this problem. We employ a high-level layer of a pre-trained CNN to generate features, and train a CAE to map the features to a low-dimensional space to improve the condition invariance property of the descriptor and reduce its dimension at the same time. We verify our method in three challenging datasets involving significant illumination changes, and our method is shown to be superior to the state-of-the-art. For the benefit of the community, we make public the source code.
summary: Visual place recognition (VPR) in condition-varying environments is still an open problem. Popular solutions are CNN-based image descriptors, which have been shown to outperform traditional image descriptors based on hand-crafted visual features. However, there are two drawbacks of current CNN-based descriptors: a) their high dimension and b) lack of generalization, leading to low efficiency and poor performance in applications. In this paper, we propose to use a convolutional autoencoder (CAE) to tackle this problem. We employ a high-level layer of a pre-trained CNN to generate features, and train a CAE to map the features to a low-dimensional space to improve the condition invariance property of the descriptor and reduce its dimension at the same time. We verify our method in three challenging datasets involving significant illumination changes, and our method is shown to be superior to the state-of-the-art. For the benefit of the community, we make public the source code.
abstract_zh: 条件变化环境中的视觉地点识别（VPR）仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。流行的解决方案是基于 CNN 的图像描述符，它已被证明优于基于手工制作的视觉特征的传统图像描述符。然而，当前基于 CNN 的描述符有两个缺点：a）维度高；b）缺乏泛化性，导致应用效率低下和性能不佳。在本文中，我们建议使用卷积自动编码器（CAE）来解决这个问题。我们采用预训练CNN的高层来生成特征，并训练CAE将特征映射到低维空间，以提高描述符的条件不变性，同时降低其维度。我们在三个涉及显着光照变化的具有挑战性的数据集中验证了我们的方法，并且我们的方法被证明优于最先进的方法。为了社区的利益，我们公开源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用卷积自编码器（CAE）生成条件不变且紧凑的视觉场所描述符，以解决视觉场所识别（VPR）在变化环境下的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有基于CNN的描述符存在维度高和泛化能力差的问题，导致效率低且在复杂环境下表现不佳，需设计更鲁棒且紧凑的描述方法。
AI.method: 利用预训练CNN高层特征，通过训练CAE将其映射到低维空间，同时提升描述符的条件不变性并降低维度。
AI.result: 在三个光照变化显著的数据集上验证，方法优于现有最先进算法，且公开了源代码。
AI.conclusion: CAE方法有效解决了高维与泛化不足的问题，在变化环境下实现了更高效准确的视觉场所识别。

authors_text: Jiwei Chen,Wen Su,Zengfu Wang
title: Crowd counting with crowd attention convolutional neural network
title_zh: 使用人群注意力卷积神经网络进行人群计数
abstract: Crowd counting is a challenging problem due to the scene complexity and scale variation. Although deep learning has achieved great improvement in crowd counting, scene complexity affects the judgement of these methods and they usually regard some objects as people mistakenly; causing potentially enormous errors in the crowd counting result. To address the problem, we propose a novel end-to-end model called Crowd Attention Convolutional Neural Network (CAT-CNN). Our CAT-CNN can adaptively assess the importance of a human head at each pixel location by automatically encoding a confidence map. With the guidance of the confidence map, the position of human head in estimated density map gets more attention to encode the final density map, which can avoid enormous misjudgements effectively. The crowd count can be obtained by integrating the final density map. To encode a highly refined density map, the total crowd count of each image is classified in a designed classification task and we first explicitly map the prior of the population-level category to feature maps. To verify the efficiency of our proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on three highly challenging datasets. Results establish the superiority of our method over many state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Crowd counting is a challenging problem due to the scene complexity and scale variation. Although deep learning has achieved great improvement in crowd counting, scene complexity affects the judgement of these methods and they usually regard some objects as people mistakenly; causing potentially enormous errors in the crowd counting result. To address the problem, we propose a novel end-to-end model called Crowd Attention Convolutional Neural Network (CAT-CNN). Our CAT-CNN can adaptively assess the importance of a human head at each pixel location by automatically encoding a confidence map. With the guidance of the confidence map, the position of human head in estimated density map gets more attention to encode the final density map, which can avoid enormous misjudgements effectively. The crowd count can be obtained by integrating the final density map. To encode a highly refined density map, the total crowd count of each image is classified in a designed classification task and we first explicitly map the prior of the population-level category to feature maps. To verify the efficiency of our proposed method, extensive experiments are conducted on three highly challenging datasets. Results establish the superiority of our method over many state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 由于场景复杂性和规模变化，人群计数是一个具有挑战性的问题。尽管深度学习在人群计数方面取得了很大的进步，但场景的复杂性影响了这些方法的判断，他们通常会错误地将某些物体视为人；造成人群计数结果潜在的巨大错误。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的端到端模型，称为群体注意力卷积神经网络（CAT-CNN）。我们的 CAT-CNN 可以通过自动编码置信度图来自适应地评估人头在每个像素位置的重要性。在置信图的指导下，估计密度图中人体头部的位置得到更多关注来编码最终的密度图，可以有效避免巨大的误判。人群数量可以通过整合最终的密度图来获得。为了编码高度精炼的密度图，在设计的分类任务中对每个图像的总人群计数进行分类，我们首先将人口级别类别的先验显式映射到特征图。为了验证我们提出的方法的效率，在三个极具挑战性的数据集上进行了广泛的实验。结果证明我们的方法优于许多最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CAT-CNN的端到端模型，用于解决人群计数中因场景复杂性和尺度变化导致的误判问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在复杂场景下容易将非人体物体误判为人，导致计数结果出现巨大误差，需改进模型以提升准确性。
AI.method: 通过自动生成置信度图评估每个像素处的人体头部重要性，并结合分类任务将人群规模先验映射到特征图，优化密度图生成过程。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的数据集上进行大量实验，结果证明该方法优于多种最先进的计数算法。
AI.conclusion: CAT-CNN通过自适应置信度映射和分类任务优化，有效减少了误判，显著提升了人群计数的准确性。
